AHMAD, TASLIM UDDIN, B.A., Indian Police, Bengal (b. 1st Feb., 1920).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn. after exam. of 1941.

AHMED, AMIN (see Amin Ahmed).

AHMED, AZIZ, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (mag. and coll., Bengal) (b. 24th June, 1906).—Educ. at Punjab Univ. and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; joined the service 10th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in Bengal as asst. collr. and mag.; jt. mag. and

dep. coll., Dec., 1931; offg. depy. regr., co-op. soc., Jan., 1936; addtl. dist. magte., March, 1938, to Jan., 1939; magte. and collr., June, 1940; spec. offr., post-war reconstrn., Jan., 1945.

AHMED, RIAZUDDIN, M.A., Indian C.S. (b. 26th Jan., 1919).—Educ. at Bombay and Punjab Univ.; apptd. on probn., after examn. of 1943, and served in Madras.

AHMED, SHEIKH FATEH, B.Sc., Indian State Ryss. (dep. chief engr., E.I. rly.) (b. 18th Aug., 1888).—Joined the service 7th Jan., 1914; resdt. engr., E.I. Rly., Jan., 1922; exec. engr., ditto, Sept., 1927; dep. ch. eng., Nov., 1941.

AHMED, SYED GHIAS-UD-DIN, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 1st June, 1915).—Educ. at Gov. Inter. Coll., Lyall Pur, Punjab Univ., and Magdalene Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 9th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in United Provs., as asst. mag. and collr.

AHMED, SIR SYED SULTAN, Kt., D.L., Barr.-at-Law (member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council infm. and broadcasting) (b. 24th Dec., 1880).—Apptd. Dep. Legal Remembrancer to the Govt. of Bihar and Orissa, 1913; Govt. Advocate, 1916-37; acted as judge, Patna high court, 1919-23; vice-chancellor, Patna Univ., 1923-30; member, Hartog Educn. Committee, 1928-29; delegate, Indian Round Table Conferences, 1930-31; acting member of the Exec. Council of the Govr. of Bihar and Orissa, 1932; acting member of the Exec. Council of the Governor-General in charge of railways and commerce, 1937; law member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council, July, 1941, to May, 1943; member for information and broadcasting, May, 1943.

AHMED, ZAFRUDDIN ZIAUDDIN, Indian Police (asst. supt., Bombay) (b. 28th Nov., 1910).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Bombay, 7th Feb., 1933; confd., May, 1934.

AHSAN, ZAFARUL, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 15th April, 1911).—Educated at St. John's Coll., Oxford; joined the service 21st Sept., 1936; arrived in India, Oct., 1936, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sub. divl. offr., March, 1940; dir. of panchayats, Oct., 1942.

AHSAN-UD-DIN, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. coomr., Punjab) (b. 7th Sept., 1909).—Educ. at Govt. High Sch., Ludhiana, Ismalia High Sch., Amritsar, Punjab Univ., and Queen's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 4th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sub-divl. offr., Nov., 1936, to May, 1938; addtl. dep. commr., Aug., 1939.

AIKMAN, EDWARD HENRY, late Indian State Ryss., Burma (b. 23rd Sept., 1884).—Retd., Dec., 1938.*

AITCHISON, WILLIAM, M.C., M.A., B.Sc., M.B., Ch.B., Maj., I.M.S., Medical Dept., United Provs. (civil surg.) (b. 4th June, 1894).—Date of first commn., 28th Jan., 1925; civil surg., United Provs., Feb., 1932.

AITIZAZ-UD-DIN AHMAD KHAN, SAHIB-ZADA MIRZA, Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 6th Sept., 1899).—Joined the service as assist. supt. on 10th April, 1920; offg. supt., March, 1928; confd., Oct., 1931; offr. in charge, spec. enq. agency, civil sectt., June, 1941.

AINSWORTH, THOMAS METCALFE, Indian Police (Bihar and Orissa) (b. 30th Jan., 1920).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Oct., 1939.

AITKEN, CECIL EDWARD, C.I.E., B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (ch. engr. and sec. to govt., P.W.D., Bombay) (b. 8th Oct., 1888).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1911; exec. engr., Oct., 1920; offg. supt. engr., Dec., 1935; (provl.) ditto, May, 1938; ch. engr. and sec. to govt., P.W.D., Bombay, June, 1938; C.I.E., June, 1941.

AIYAR (see also Ayyar).

AIYAR, N. K. K. (see Krishna Aiyar, N. C.).

AIYAR, S. K. (see Krishna Aiyar, S.).

AIYAR, SIR P. S. A., Sivaswami (see Sivaswami Aiyar, Sir P. S. A.).

AIYAR, V. (see Venkatarama Aiyar).

AJIT CHAND, MALHOTRA, LALA, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 7th Oct., 1902).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 30th Oct., 1925; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1926; exec. engr., Oct., 1935.

AJIT SINGH, KALHA, SARDAR, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab), (b. 27th May, 1904).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 29th Oct., 1926; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1927; exec. engr., Oct., 1936; under sec., Punjab P.W.D. (irrgn.), May, 1943.

AJREKAR, SHRIPAD LAKSHMAN, B.E., late Indian Educational Service, Bombay (b. 29th March, 1883).—Retd., Apl., 1938.*

AJUDHIA NATH, KHOSLA, RAI SAHIB, LALA, B.A., A.M.I.E. (Ind.), Indian Service of Engrs. (chief engr., Punjab) (b. 11th Dec., 1892).—Joined the service 28th Sept., 1916; asst. engr., Sept., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1926; supt. engr. (perm.), Sept., 1941; ch. engr. and sec. to govt., p.w. irrgn., Dec., 1943.

AKBAR HUSAIN, CHAUDHRI, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, United Provs.) (b. 7th Oct., 1896).—Educ. at Canning Coll., Lucknow, and Peterhouse, Cambridge; joined the service 12th Dec., 1921; served in United Provs. as asst. commr. from 14th Jan., 1922; asst. mag. and collr., July, 1924; offg. sess. and sub-judge, Oct., 1926; offg. dist. and sess. judge, May, 1928; confd., Sept., 1930; judl. sec. to govt. and legal remem., Apl., 1942.

AKHAURY, SACHIDANAND, M.Sc., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bihar) (b. 19th March, 1911); joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 4th Feb., 1935.

AKHIL CHANDRA MITRA, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 16th Jan., 1900).—Joined the service, 30th Oct., 1923; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1924; exec. engr., Oct., 1933.

AKHTER HAMID, KHAN, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 15th July, 1914).—Educ. at Agra Univ.; joined the service 8th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

AKHUND, ABDULLAH SHAH MUHAMMAD, B.A., LL.B., late Bombay Civil Service (b. 26th Dec., 1884).—Retd., Dec., 1939.*

AKRAM, A. S. M., apptd. judge, Calcutta small cause ct. April, 1937; offg. judge high ct. Calcutta, variously from July, 1939; addl. judge, Aug., 1943, to 25th Sept., 1943.

AKRAM, MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Akram).

AL HASAN MUHAMMAD, B.A., late Indian Posts and Telegraphs (b. 16th Dec., 1885).—Joined the service as proby. supt., 1st June, 1909; confd., May, 1911; asst. dep. dir.-genl., March, 1932; on depn. to Univ. Postal Congr., Cairo, from Jan. to May, 1934; dep. P.M.G., Nov., 1935; headed the delegation from India

to the Universal Postal Congress, Buenos Aires, 1939; postmaster-general, Apr., 1939; retired, Dec., 1940; O.B.E., Jan., 1941.

ALAM, SHAH NAZIR (see Nazir Alam, S.).

ALBAN, REGINALD GEORGE EVELIN WILLIAM, O.B.E., Maj., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 21st Aug., 1899).—First commn., 1st Oct., 1918; in milty. employ to 20th May, 1925; under-secy. to pol. resdt., Persian Gulf, Dec., 1930; pol. agent and Brit. consul at Muscat, May, 1931; under-secty. to A.G.G. in C.I., Oct., 1934; asst. to pol. agent, Kalat, Oct., 1935; pol. agent, Sibi, Dec., 1936; O.B.E., Jan., 1939; counsellor, British Legation, Kabul; May, 1939; pol. agent, Bahrain, Oct., 1940; ditto, Punjab hill states, Nov., 1942.

ALCHIN, REV. CECIL JOHN, Indian Eccls. Establ., Bengal (b. 27th Nov., 1906).—Apptd. junr. chaplain on probn., March, 1940.

ALCOCK, ALFRED SYDNEY, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 29th Oct., 1881).—Retd., July, 1938.*

ALCOCK, WILLIAM GEORGE, O.B.E., Indian State Rlys. (secty. to G.M., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 25th Sept., 1886).—Joined the service 6th March, 1906; empld. as sub. in loco. dept. till Sept., 1920; pers. asst. to loco. supt., and ch. mechl. engr., Sept., 1920; secty. to agent (now termed genl. mag.), Jan., 1937; O.B.E., June, 1944.

ALDRED, LIONEL, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 5th May, 1915).—Educ. at Sloane Sch., London, and Caius Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 8th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Nov., 1938, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.

ALEXANDER, DAVID HENRY ARTHUR, Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 23rd Jan., 1917).—Educ. at Clifton Coll. and Hertford Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn. after seln. in May, 1940, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.

ALEXANDER, GEORGE PATTERSON, M.Inst.C.E. (chairman and port engr., Madras Port Trust) (b. 25th Jan., 1895).—Apptd. exec. engr., Madras Port Trust, 13th May, 1930; port engr., 25th Jan., 1933; actd. as chairman, Madras Port Trust, variously, from March, 1935; chairman and port engr., ditto, Oct., 1944.

ALEXANDER, HAROLD GEORGE, F.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., Lieut.-Col., ret'd., late I.M.S., Bihar Medical Dept. (b. 7th Feb., 1888).—Retd., Aug., 1938.*

ALEXANDER, HENRY RAYMOND, late Indian Police (Burma) (b. 6th Aug., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. supt. on 15th Nov., 1909; dist. supt., Dec., 1917; awarded King's police medal, Jan. 1931; offg. dep. inspr.-gaol., Oct., 1932, and again, Sept., 1936; ret'd., 6th Aug., 1944.

ALEXANDER, IAN URQUHART, M.B.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 13th June, 1915).—Educ. at High Sch. of Glasgow; and Glasgow Univ.; joined the service, 22nd Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.

ALEXANDER, ROBERT VEITCH, Indian Forest Engineering Service (b. 22nd Oct., 1891).—Joined the service, as forest engineer, Bombay, 24th Nov., 1921.

ALEXANDER, WILLIAM GORDON, M.A., Indian C.S. (b. 9th July, 1908).—Educated at George Watson's Coll., Edinburgh, Edinburgh

Univ., and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; under-secty., defence dept., Govt. of India, March, 1937; secty., Indian soldiers' board, Apr., 1939; to Apl., 1940; asst. finl. advr., mil. fin., Oct., 1940.

ALI AHMAD, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. Assam (b. 30th July, 1889).—Joined the service 26th Sept., 1912; asst. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Sept., 1922; asst. ch. engr., and under secty., P.W.D., Assam, Nov., 1935; offg. supt. engr., Oct., 1936; confd., June, 1938; addl. ch. engr. and sec. P.W.D. Mar. 1942; C.I.E., June, 1944; ret'd., 1944.

ALI, A. F. M. A. (see Abdul Ali, A. F. M.).
ALI, ALBAN, Indian Police (supt., Assam) (b. 23rd Sept., 1904).—Joined the service 5th Dec., 1924; in training to Sept., 1926; proby. asst. supt., Sept., 1926; confd., April, 1928; offg. supt., April, 1934; confd., June, 1935; served with I.A.F., Apl. 1942 to May, 1943; spec. offr. May, 1943 to June, 1944.

ALI, BAKHT YAWAR (see Bakht Yawar, A.).
ALI, FAZL, SAITYD, SIR.—Apptd. Chief Justice, high ct., Patna, Jan., 1943.

ALI, HAMID MOIZUDIN ABDUL (see Abdul Ali, H. M.).

ALI, HASAN TURAB, M.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 29th July, 1915).—Educ. at Delhi Univ., Christ's Coll., Cambridge, and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; arrived in India Oct., 1939, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. magte. and dep. collr., Nov., 1941; addl. dist. magte., June, 1944.

ALI, IKBAL ATHAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 15th July, 1916).—Educated at Sherwood Coll., Naini Tal, Lucknow Univ., and Christ Church Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1938; confd., 8th Sept., 1939; arrd. in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. magte. and dep. collr., May, 1941; addl. dist. magte., July, 1944.

ALI KHAN, G. (see Ghazanfur Ali Khan).

ALI, MAULVI SAITYD IJAZ (see Ijaz Ali, M.S.).

ALI, MUHAMMED BARKAT (see Barkat Ali, M.).

ALI, MUHAMMAD HAMID (see Hamid Ali, M.).

ALI, MUHSIN (see Muhsin Ali).

ALI, NASIM (see Nasim Ali, Maulvi).

ALI, RAMZAN (see Ramzan Ali).

ALI, SAITYD FAZL (see Fazl Ali, S.).

ALI, SHUJAT OSMAN (see Osman Ali, S.).

ALI, SYED RAZA (see Raza Ali, S.).

ALI, TORICK AMEER (see Ameer Ali T.).

ALI, ZAFAR (see Zafar Ali).

ALINGTON, NOEL STANLEY, M.C., Lieut.-Col., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 4th Jan., 1899).—First commn., dated 27th Oct., 1917; in milty. employ prior to 29th March, 1925; offg. pers. asst. to administr., Nabha, March, 1925; probnr. in pol. dept., Sept., 1925; pers. asst. to ch. commr. and agent to govr. genl., N.W.F.P., Jan., 1927; asst. commr., Bannu, Oct., 1928; under sec. to ch. commr., N.W.F.P., May, 1930; asst. pol. agent, Zhob, Apl., 1931; asst. pol. agent and asst. commr., Quetta-Pishin, Apl., 1932; pol. agent, Zhob, March, 1933; offg., under secty. to the Govt. of India, for. and pol. dept., Nov., 1935; confd., July, 1936; secty. to A.G.G. in C.I., Aug., 1936; resdt. Western Rajputana States, Sept., 1939; var. to Apl., 1943; sec. to resdt., Rajputana, Mar., 1941; pol. agt. in Mewar and S. Rajputana

States (in addn.), Sept., 1943; pol. agt., Kalat, and pol. agt. in charge, Bolam pass, Oct., 1943.

ALLAD DAD KHAN, Capt., I.A., Ind. Political Service (b. 12 Feb., 1910), apptd. to I.P.S. from mil. employ on probn., Oct., 1937; under sec. to A.G.G., res. and chief commr., Baluchistan, Jan., 1944; pol. agt., Chagai, Sept., 1944.

ALLAH BAKSH, KHAN SAHIB, B.A. (Oxon), Indian Forest Service (dep. consr., Punjab) (b. 1st June, 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Punjab, on 29th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1924; dir. soil consvn. circle, Oct., 1943.

ALLAH YAR KHAN, KHAN SAHIB, MALIK, late Indian Forest Service (Punjab) (b. 28th June, 1887).—Apptd. asst. consvr., Punjab, from 19th July, 1922; dep. consvr., April, 1928; retd., 24 Aug., 1942.

ALLAN, ROBERT GEORGE, C.I.E., M.A. (Cantab.), late Indian Agricl. Service, United Provs. (b. 7th Nov., 1879).—Retd., Nov., 1935.

ALLARDICE, EVERARD COCHRAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Madras) (b. 14th Dec., 1941).—Educ. at Clifton Coll., Bristol, and Corpus Christi Coll, Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 19th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Dec., 1938, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.

ALLEN, CHARLES HARRY POWEL, M.R.C.S., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (retd.) (b. 5th Dec., 1885).—Civil surg., Assam., Nov., 1936; retd., Dec., 1940.

ALLEN, HARRY S., Indian State Ryls. (colliery inspr., E.I. Rly.) (b. 14th Apl., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. colliery manager, 22nd Feb., 1914; colliery manager, Oct., 1920; inspr. of colliery areas, Oct., 1937.

ALLSOP, FRED, M.Sc., B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 26th Sept., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Burma, on 22nd Dec., 1925; dep. consvr., Apl., 1932; prof. of forestry, Univ. Coll., Rangoon, July, 1933.

ALLINSON, HENRY JOHN, A.M.I.E.E., Indian State Ryls. (ch. engr. (elec.)) (b. 13th March, 1889).—Joined the service as dist. elec. engr., E.I. Rly., 8th Apl., 1927; offg. ch. elec. engr., variously from March, 1930; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr. (elec.), E.B. Rly, Oct., 1935; confd., Nov., 1936; ch. elec. engr., March, 1940.

ALLSOP, SIR JAMES JOSEPH WHITTLESEA, Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Allahabad) (b. 11th Feb., 1887).—Educ. at St. George's Coll., Weybridge, and University Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 28th Nov., 1910, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Oct., 1916; on mil. duty, July, 1918, to Jan., 1919; sess. and sub-judge, July, 1924; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1925; offg. judl. secty. to govt., Apl., 1931; confd., March, 1933; offg. judge, ch. ct. of Oudh, May, 1933; addl. judge, high ct., Allahabad, Oct., 1934; judge, ditto, July, 1935; kt., Jan., 1945.

ALLSUP, W., M.B.E., M.I.Mech.E., M.I.E.I., Chief Electrical and Factory Inspector and Electrical Adviser to the Government of Assam.—Apptd., May, 1930; M.B.E., Jan., 1945.

ALMOND, SIR JAMES, B.A., Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 28th Sept., 1891).—Educ. at Bolton Grammar Sch. and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived 3rd Dec., 1915, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; on mil. service, Aug., 1916, to Feb., 1919; supy. asst. commr., Peshawar, Feb., 1919; ditto, and

persl. asst. to chief commr., N.W. Frontier Prov., April, 1919; confd. in pol. dept. of govt. of India, July, 1923 asst.; commr., Mardam., Oct., 1923; dep. commr., Hazara, Dec., 1924; dist. judge, Peshawar, June, 1927; divl. and sess. judge, ditto, Jan., 1928; presdt., enquiry comee., D.I. Khan, Sept., 1931; dist. and sess. judge, Peshawar, Oct., 1931; offg. resdt. and judl. commr., N.W.F.P., March, 1934; addl. judl. commr., N.W.F.P., Apl., 1935; judl. commr., N.W.F.P., Apl., 1937; kt., Jan., 1941.

AMAR NATH, RAI SAHIB, LALA, B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 26th March, 1890).—Joined the service, 7th June, 1915; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1931.

AMAR NATH, SAVARA, LALA, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Punjab) (b. 20th Nov., 1887).—Joined the service 9th Sept., 1910; asst. engr., Sept., 1917; exec. engr., Oct., 1922; retd., 6th June, 1941.

AMBEDKAR, BHIMRAO RAMJI, M.A., Ph.D., D.Sc., Bar.-at-Law (member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council, labour) (b. 1893).—Member round table conf., London, 1930-32, and jt. parl. cttee., 1932; member, national defence cl.; member, Bombay legis. assembly; member, govr.-genl.'s executive council (labour), July, 1942.

AMBEGAONKAR, KRISHNANATH GANESH, Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Central Provs.), (b. 12th Aug., 1902).—Educ. at Univ. of Bombay and Univ. Coll., London. —Joined the service, 22nd Oct., 1926; arrived, 28th Nov., 1926, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; under secty to govt., Dec., 1928; offg. dep. commr., April, 1930; and again, March, 1933; on depn. under res. bank of India, Apl., 1935; dep. commr., Nov., 1938; exec. offr., sugar syndicate, Sept., 1940; dep. finl. advr., Oct., 1942; dep. sec. (food) Dec., 1942; ditto, commerce, June, 1943; jt. ch. contr. of imports, Nov., 1943; jt. sec. fin. dept., May, 1944.

AMBRAVANESWAR, SIVARAMA KRISHNA, M.A., B.L., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 6th Feb., 1894).—Joined the service 9th March, 1918; dep. acct. gen., central revs. (works), Feb., 1929; ditto (civil), March, 1929; dep. acct. genl., Punjab, July, 1929; asst. acct. genl., posts and tels., Feb., 1931; dep. acct. genl., ditto, March, 1931; offg. acct. genl., ditto, June, 1933; offg. ch. auditor, E.B. Rly., June, 1934; dep. acct. genl., posts and tels., Sept., 1934; offg. dep. acct.-genl. (works), Punjab, Apl., 1935; comptr. N.W.F.P., Apl., 1937; govt. examiner of accts., M. & S.M. Rly., Aug., 1937; ch. auditor, N.W. Rly., and govt. exr. of accts., B.M.W. and R. & K. Ryls., Apl., 1945; acct. genl., P. & Tels. from Dec., 1940, to 15th July, 1941; ch. acctnt. N.W. Rly., July, 1941; confd. acct. genl., March, 1944.

AMEER ALI, SIR TORICK, Barr., late Judicial dept., Bengal. —Apptd. judge, high court, Calcutta, Nov., 1931; kt., June, 1941; chief justice high court, Calcutta, May, 1943, and again Apl. to 31st Aug., 1944; adviser to S. of S. for India and Burma, Nov., 1944.

AMERY, RT. HON. LEOPOLD STENNETT, P.C., secretary of state for India and for Burma, May, 1940.

AMIN AHMED, M.B.E., Barr., Bengal Judl. Dept. (Judge, small cause court).—Offg. Judge, small cause court, Calcutta, variously from 15th Apl., 1932; confd., Jan., 1935; M.B.E., Jan., 1938.

AMIN-UD-DIN, SHAIKH, M.Sc., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 30th June, 1897).—Educ. at Punjab Univ. and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1923; arrived 2nd Dec., 1923, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr. Aug., 1928; dep. commr. (sub. provl.), Dec., 1931; confd., Dec., 1936; sec., medl. etc., depts., Apl., 1939; sec., elec. dept., Apl., 1941; ch. contr. exports, New Delhi, May, 1944.

AMINUDDIN, SAIYID (see Saiyid Aminuddin).

AMIR AHMAD, K.B., B.A. Indian Police (supt.) (b. 17th Aug., 1891).—Joined the service as dep. supt. of police on 3rd Jan., 1916; apptd. to I.P. as supt., Bengal, Aug., 1937.

AMIR CHAND, M.B., LIEUT.-COL., I.M.S. (princl., medl. sch., Amritsar) (b. 9th Sept., 1889).—First commn. dated 1st Aug., 1914; in milty. employ to 15th Jan., 1921; profr., King Edward medl. school, Lahore, Jan., 1921; princpl., medl. sch., Amritsar, April, 1926; offg. profr. of medicine, King Edward Medical Coll., Lahore, March, 1936.

AMIR HUSAIN, KHAN BAHADUR SAIYID, B.A., late United Provs., C.S. (b. 30th Sept., 1881).—Retd., March, 1938.*

AMIR, SAIYID ALI (see Saiyid Ali, Amir).

AMIR-UD-DIN, MIR (see Amir-ud-din).

AMOLAK RAM, KHANNA, Indian Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 13th Oct., 1903).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 19th Nov., 1927; proby. asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1928; confd., Nov., 1929.

AMOORE, HENRY JAMES, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 2nd Sept., 1884).—Retd., Sept., 1939.*

ANAND, DHARM BIR, Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 15th Nov., 1909).—Apptd. asst. exec. engr., Bombay, 29th Apl., 1933.

ANAND, HIRA SINGH, M.B., Ch.B., D.P.H., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. (ret'd.) (b. 17th Sept., 1889).—First commn., 9th Nov., 1917; Profr. of physiology, King Edward Medl. Coll., Lahore, Feb., 1931; ret'd., March, 1942.

ANAND PRAKASH WATAL, Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., United Provs.) (b. 21st Aug., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 3rd Oct., 1917; in milty. employ from 22nd June, 1918, to 7th Aug., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Dec., 1921; offg. exec. engr., Feb., 1925; confd., Oct., 1926; confd. as suptg. engr., Jan., 1941; ch. engr. (temp.), Oct., 1944.

ANANDA RAO, DHANVADA, RAO BAHADUR, B.Sc., late Indian Agric. Service (b. 20th Sept., 1882).—Retd., Sept., 1937.*

ANANDA, RAO, KRISHNASWAMI, RAO BAHADUR, M.A., Indian Educl. Service (b. 21st Sept., 1893).—Joined the service as prof., Presdy. Coll., Madras, July, 1919.

ANANDA, RAO, UDIP, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Madras) (b. 20th Feb. 1903).—Joined the service as apped engr.; 1st July, 1926; asst. exec. engr., Oct. 1927, exec. engr., Oct., 1936.

ANANTA ACHARYA, THATTAI RAO BAHADUR, B.A., B.L. late Judl. Dept., Madras (b. 4th Aug., 1885).—Joined the service 13th Nov., 1913; sub-judge, Sept., 1932; dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1936; member, Madras pub. serv. commn., Apl., 1940; ret'd. Aug., 1940.

ANANTA RAMAN, KALPATHY NARAYANA, Indian C.S. (sub-collr., Madras) (b. 28th July, 1909).—Educ. at Madras Univ., and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 10th October, 1932; arrived in India, Nov.,

1932, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., July, 1935.

ANANTANARAYANA SARMA, A.N., M.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 22nd July, 1898).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 26th Oct., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927.

ANANTANARAYANAN, MADHAVIAH, Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Madras) (b. 1st May, 1907).—Educ. at University of Madras and Caius Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 15th October, 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr., Apl., 1931; dist. and sess. judge (confd.), June, 1942.

ANANTHANARAYANAN, AYYAR HARIHARAYYAR, Indian C.S. (addtl. dist. and sess. judge, Madras) (b. 24th Nov., 1907).—Educ. at Madras Univ., and the School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., Sept., 1934; addt. dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1943.

ANDERSON, SIR FREDERICK, C.S.I., C.I.E., B.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs., United Provs. (b. 19th June, 1884).—Retd., Dec., 1937; kt., June, 1943.*

ANDERSON, FREDERICK JASPER, C.I.E., M.C., M.B., Lieut.-Col., late I.M.S. (b. 10th March, 1886).—First commn. dated 27th Jan., 1912; in milty. employ to 1st May, 1923; dist. medl. offr., Feb., 1925; offg. princpl. and profr. of surgery, Vizagapatam, Apl., 1928; confd., June, 1929; offg. profr. of surgery, Mdl. Coll., Calcutta, June, 1934; C.I.E., June, 1939; ret'd., March, 1941.

ANDERSON, GERALD ALFRED, O.B.E., late Indian Police (United Provs.) (b. 26th Aug., 1892).—Retd., Nov., 1939*; O.B.E., June, 1944.

ANDERSON, SIR JAMES DRUMMOND, K.C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (fin. commr., Punjab) (b. 10th Aug., 1886).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., and Wadham Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 5th Dec., 1910, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr., and asst. settl. offr.; on milty. duty from Oct., 1917, to Dec., 1918; under sec. to Punjab Govt., s.p.t., Jan., 1920; dep. commr. (provl.), Sept., 1924; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1926; dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1927; offg. secty. to govt., legislative dept., Punjab, Apl., 1931; confd., May, 1933; addl. jt. secty., legisl. dept., govt. of India, Oct., 1936; offg. jt. secty., ditto, Nov., 1936; secty., ditto, Nov., 1936; on spec. duty, March, 1938; C.I.E., Jan., 1939; addtl. sec., govt. of India, def. dept., Oct., 1938; jt. chief sec., govt. of Punjab, Sept., 1939; addtl. fin. commr. and addtl. sec., Punjab, rev. dept., Oct., 1941; fin. commr. and sec. ditto, Nov., 1941; fin. commr., sub. perm., Dec., 1941; K.C.I.E., June, 1944.

ANDERSON, RT. HON. SIR JOHN, P.C., G.C.B., G.C.S.I., G.C.I.E. (b. 8th July, 1882).—Govr. of Bengal, March, 1932, to Nov., 1937.*

ANDERSON, KENNETH, B.A., India Office (actg. asst. sec., fin. dept.) (b. 5th June, 1906).—Educ. at Swindon Secondary Sch. and Wadham Coll., Oxford; apptd. asst. principal, 22nd Oct., 1928; resdt. clerk, Jan., 1929, to Sept., 1932; secty., Indian delegation to London Naval conf., Jan.-Apl., 1930; jt. secty., Indian round table conf., London, 2nd session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; 3rd Session, Nov.-Dec., 1932; jt. secty., Indian Federal Finance Expert Committe., Jan.

Aprl., 1932; on duty with Imp. Econ. Conf., July-Aug., 1932; pte. secty. to perm. under-secty. of state, May, 1933; actg. princpl., Dec., 1933; jt. secty., Niemeyer finl. enquiry, Oct., 1935; princpl., Oct., 1936; actg. asst. sec., June, 1942.

ANDERSON, LAURENCE ALLFROY PELHAM, M.A., M.D., Lieut.-Col., ret'd., late I.M.S. (b. 18th Aprl., 1886).—First commn., dated 27th July, 1912; in milty. employ to 15th March, 1922; asst. dir., central research institute, Aprl., 1928; offg. dir., Haffkine institute, Bombay, Aprl., 1929; dir., Pasteur inst., Rangoon, Nov., 1931; ditto, Shillong, July, 1934, ret'd. Aprl., 1941.

ANDERSON, VEN. NICOL KEITH, M.A., late Indian Eccles. Estabt., Burma (b. 10th June, 1882).—Ret'd., Jan., 1936.*

ANDERSON, WILLIAM ALEXANDER, A.M.I.C.E., Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., N.W. Rly.) (b. 29th Jan., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1923; exec. engr., Dec., 1923; offg. divl. supt. (junr.), Aug., 1932; divl. supt., Jan., 1940; divl. supt., senior, Sept., 1941.

ANDERTON, COAL CUTHBERT MURRELL, O.B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., N.W.F.P.) (b. 22nd Dec., 1888).—Joined the service, 2nd Nov., 1915; asst. engr., April, 1918; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., April, 1927; O.B.E., Jan., 1939.

ANDREW, THOMAS ADAMS, B.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs., Bombay (b. 26th Nov., 1885).—ret'd., Dec., 1939.*

ANDREASEN, ANTHONY TURNER, Capt., I.M.S., first commn., Feb., 1933; civil surgeon, Bihar, April, 1939; tfd. to Orissa, Nov., 1939.

ANDREWS, FREDERICK CHARLES, India Office (higher executive officer, acctnt.-genl.'s dept.) (b. 12th Feb., 1892).—Second div. clerk at General Register Office, April, 1911, to April, 1913; appointed second-class clerk, India Office, 10th April, 1913; and att'd. to record and registry dept.; transf'd. to acctnt.-genl.'s dept., Sept., 1913; on mil. service from August, 1914, to Feb., 1919; exec. officer, April, 1922; higher ditto, May, 1927; actg. suptg. ditto, Aprl., 1942.

ANDREWS, ROBERT STUART, M.C., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Burma) (b. 25th Aug., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1922; offg. exec. engr., Dec., 1928; confd., Oct., 1930; suptg. engr., June, 1941; addl. sec. reconstr. dept., 1944.

ANEY, MADHAOSHRIHARI (b. 29th Aug., 1880).—Apptd. member govr.-genl.'s exec. cl., Aug., 1941; apptd. representative of govt. of India in Ceylon, July, 1943.

ANGELO, ALFRED, O.B.E., Major, late India Posts and Telegraphs (b. 10th Sept., 1883).—Ret'd., Sept., 1938.*

ANGWIN, JAMES BADEN PENROSE, M.B.E., Lieut.-Col., R.E., Survey of India (supt.) (b. 25th Sept., 1900).—First commn., 18th Dec., 1919; asst. supt., Oct., 1926; supt., May, 1931; M.B.E., 1938.

ANIL CHANDRA BANERJI, M.B., B.S. (Alld.), D.P.H., Public Health Dept., United Provs. (dir. of public health) (b. 5th Feb., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. dir. of malariology, 1st July, 1922; asst. dir. of public health, 19th Nov., 1929; confd., Aprl., 1930; dir., ditto, Nov., 1939.

ANNAN, WILLIAM THOMAS, Burma Office (asst. principal) (b. 11th Jan., 1912).—Educ. at Kelvinside Academy, Glasgow Univ., and

Magdalen Coll., Oxford; apptd. asst. inspr. of taxes, Inland Rev., 19th Nov., 1935; asst. princpl., India Office, 3rd Feb., 1936; resd't. clk., Sept., 1936; asst. pte. sec. to the sec. of state, May, 1939, to Feb., 1941; actg. principal and posted to Burma Office, Feb., 1941.

ANSARI, MUHAMMAD ABDUL GHANI (see Muhammad, A. G. A.).

ANSORGE, ERIC CECIL, C.S.I., C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (advr. to the govr. of Bihar) (b. 6th March, 1887).—Educ. at St. Paul's, St; John's Coll., Oxford, and Univ. Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 5th Dec., 1911; and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transf'd. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; asst. to dir.-genl. of commercial intelligence, govt. of India, July 1918; under-sec. to govt. of India, comm. and ind. dept., May, 1919, s.p.t.; dep. sec. to ditto, Aug., 1920; addl. dep. sec., govt. of India, fin. dept. (temp.), April, 1923, to July, 1924; offg. mag. and collr., Jan., 1925; confd., Decr., 1925; sec. to govt., edn. and dev. dept., March, 1926; regr., co-operative societies, March, 1930; offg. commr., Aprl., 1935; C.I.E., May, 1937; rev. commr., Orissa, May, 1938; advr. to the govr., Nov., 1939; C.S.I., Jan., 1942; supvr. I.C.S. probrs., Feb., 1942; rev. commr., July, 1942; advr. to govr., Aprl., 1943.

ANTIA, MERVANJI JAMSHEDJI, M.A. (Bom.), M.A., LL.B. (Cantab.), Barr., Indian Educl. Service (profr., Sydenham coll. of commerce, Bombay) (b. 15th June, 1888).—Apptd. lecturer in English, coll. of commerce, 21st June, 1915; profr., ditto, Feb., 1919; I.E.S., from 5th Feb., 1921; offg. princpl., June, 1928; ditto and secty., Accountancy Diploma bd., March, 1932; cmfd. as princpl., Sydenham Coll. of Commerce, Feb., 1940.

ANVERY, ASAD ALI, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr.) (b. 23rd May, 1907).—Appointed asst. consvr., United Provs., Nov., 1932; dep. ditto, Nov., 1937.

APEDAILE, ERNEST GORDON STACKHOUSE, Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Burma) (b. 17th Dec., 1908).—Educ. at Christ's Hospital and Exeter College, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Dec., 1932, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under sec., home and pol. dept., Burma, May, 1936; ditto, defence dept., Dec., 1937; dep. sec., home dept., Sept., 1938; dep. commr., Nov., 1938; dep. sec., defence dept., Aug., 1939; addtl. sec. ditto, Sept., 1939.

APPA RAO D., Judcl. Dept., Madras (regtr., high ct., Madras) (b. 3rd Jan., 1889).—Joined the service, 22nd Aug., 1923; official referee, high ct., June, 1928; master high ct., July, 1934; registrar, March, 1938.

APPANDA RAJ, SRIDHAR, Indian Police (asst. supt., Madras) (b. 10th Jan., 1912).—Joined the service, as asst. supt., Madras, on probn., 29th Jan., 1934; confd., Jan., 1936.

ARBERRY, ARTHUR JOHN, M.A., Litt.D. (Cantab.), late India Office (b. 12th May, 1905).—Educ. at Portsmouth G.S. and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge, 1st class in Classical Tripos, Parts I and II. Oriental languages Tripos, Parts I and II, Fellow of Pembroke Coll., 1931; profr. of classics in the Egyptian Univ., 1932; asst. librarian, India Office, 1st Aug., 1934; author of various publications and translations, including "Catalogue of Arabic MSS. in the India Office," Vol. II, part II, "Catalogue of the India Office Library," Vol. II, Part VI, Persian Books, and "The India Office Library:

a historical sketch"; services loaned to War Office, Sept., 1939; transferred on loan to Min. of Information; ret'd., 30th Sept., 1944.

ARBUTHNOT, CLIFFORD WILLIAM ERNEST, C.I.E., B.E. and B.A. (R.U.I.), late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 13th Feb., 1885).—Joined as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1908; in milty. employ from 23rd Sept., 1914, to 20th Nov., 1918; exec. engr., Oct., 1916; C.I.E., June, 1930; member, legisl. council, Bombay, Nov., 1932; member, public serv. commn., Bombay-Sind, Apl., 1937; suptg. engr. (provl.), Feb., 1938; ditto, perm., May, 1938; ret'd., Feb., 1940.

ARCHBOLD, WILLIAM HUGH, Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 5th Jan., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 20th Nov., 1923; offg. supt., Jan., 1927; and again, Nov., 1932; confd., Oct., 1936; inspr. genl., Kashmir, Aug., 1935.

ARCHER, WILLIAM GEORGE, Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr. Bihar) (b. 11th Feb., 1907).—Educ. at Strand School, Brixton, Emmanuel College, Cambridge, and School of Oriental Studies, London; apptd. after examination of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931; and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; census supt., Bihar, Jan., 1940.

ARDAGH, LESLIE VERNON, M.C., B.A., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 7th Jan., 1896).—Ret'd., Oct., 1938.*

ARJAN DAS, AGGARWAL, OALA, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 1st Jan., 1897).—Joined the service, 23rd Nov., 1920; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1921; exec. engr., Oct., 1930.

ARMOUR, JOHN STUART, M.A. (Glas.), B.A. (Oxon), late Indian Educl. Service (princl. Patna Coll.) (b. 25th Jan., 1885).—Educ. Glasgow Univ. and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service as prof., Patna, 29th Oct., 1914; offg. princ. Patna training coll., July, 1916; on milty. service from 11th Oct., 1916, to 14th April, 1919; offg. asst. dir. of public instrn., Dec., 1920; prof. of English, Patna coll., Dec., 1921; offg. princ., Patna coll., Sept., 1929; offg. prinpl., Greer Bhumihar Brahman coll., July, 1931; confd., Aug., 1933; princl., Patna coll., July, 1935; confd., Feb., 1936; ret'd., Jan., 1941.

ARMSTRONG, SIR GODFREY GEORGE, Kt., O.B.E., M.C., V.D., M.Inst.T. (chairman, Madras Port Trust) (b. 3rd Oct., 1882), O.B.E., 1919; apptd. chairman, Madras Port Trust, 11th Oct., 1928; knight, June, 1944.

ARMSTRONG, WILLIAM HERBERT FLETCHER, C.I.E., M.A. (Cantab.), F.C.S., Indian Educl. Service (dir. of public instrn.) (b. 25th Apl., 1892).—Joined the service, 20th Sept., 1917; prof., Khalsa coll., Amritsar, March, 1920; lecturer, Univ. coll., Rangoon, Feb., 1922; prinpl., govt. intermediate coll., Lyallpur, Sept., 1924; vice-prinpl., C.T. coll., Lahore, Dec., 1927; offg. prinpl. ditto, March, 1931; and again, July, 1933; inspr. of European schools, Oct., 1935; asst. dir. of public instrn., Oct., 1935; offg. dir., Nov., 1936; sec. to govt., Punjab (educn.), July, 1941; C.I.E., June, 1943.

ARNOLD, CLAUDE IAN MORRIS, M.B.E., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 27th Nov., 1916).—Educated at Royal Masonic Sch., Bushey, Caius Coll., Cambridge, and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 15th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1941; under sec., home

dept., Jan., 1943; spec. offr., civ. supplies dept., Jan., 1945; M.B.E., Jan., 1945.

ARNOLD, FREDERICK BLACKMORE, O.B.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. secty., fin. dept., Burma) (b. 26th June, 1906).—Educ. at the College, Bishop's Stortford, and Trinity Hall, Cambridge; joined the service, 10th Oct., 1929; arrived Nov., 1929, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-secty. to govt., fin. dept., Sept., 1933; dep. secty., fin. dep., Dec., 1937; dep. commr. (provl.), July, 1939; confd., Aug., 1939; contr. of prices, Burma, Oct., 1939; import trade contr., June, 1940; sec. reconstr. dept., 1944; O.B.E., Jan., 1943.

ARTE, VINAYAK BHASKAR, B.Sc., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 23rd Aug., 1895).—Joined the service, 20th June, 1916; asst. auditor, N.W. rly., May, 1925; asst. acct.-genl., Bombay, June, 1928; exr., local fund audit, Bengal, Dec., 1931; asst. dir., army audit, Southern Cmd., Nov., 1933; examr., outside audit dept., Bengal, Nov., 1937; under secty., ext. affrs. dept., Feb., 1945.

ARTHUR, ALLAN JAMES VINCENT, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 16th Sept., 1915).—Educ. at Rugby and Magdalene Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 12th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Nov., 1938, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sub. divl. offr., Apl., 1941; on spec. duty, Punjab, home dept., Oct., 1941; s.d.o. and supt. sub jail, in addn., Jan., 1942.

ARUL, FREDERICK VICTOR, Indian Police, (Madras) (b. 24th Nov., 1917).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Feb., 1940.

ARUNACHALAM, NELLICHERI, SWAMINATHA, O.B.E., Indian C.S. (sub coll. and jt. mag., Orissa) (b. 15th Feb., 1903).—Educ. at University of Madras and Queen's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1928; arrived Dec., 1928, and served in Madras as asst. coll. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. magte., Nov., 1930; tfd. to Orissa, March, 1940; O.B.E., Jan., 1943.

ASADULLAH, KHALIFA MUHAMMAD, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A. (librarian, Impl. library) (b. 6th Aug., 1890).—Joined the service, 16th Nov., 1913; offg. librarian, Impl. library, Feb., 1929; confd., Dec., 1930.

ASANAND KUMAR, M.A., Income-tax Dept., Punjab (asst. commr.) (b. 17th April, 1891).—Joined the service, Jan., 1917; held non-gaz. appts., Jan., 1917, to Aug., 1921; collr. of income-tax, Sept., 1921; income-tax officer, Oct., 1929; confd. as asst. commr. of income-tax, March, 1936.

ASGHAR, ALI, B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 15th July, 1914).—Educ. at Punjab Univ.; joined the service 14th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and collr., May, 1940; magte. and collr., July, 1944.

ASGHAR, HAMID (see Hamid Asghar).

ASH, FELIX, O.B.E., Indian Posts and Tels. (dir. of tel. stores) (b. 15th Nov., 1893).—Joined the service, 11th March, 1924; confd. as asst. contr. tel. stores, Apl., 1928; contr., tel. stores, Feb., 1932; O.B.E., June, 1942; dir., tel. stores, May, 1944.

ASHA RAM SHARMA (see Sharma, A. R.).

ASHE, REGINALD WILLIAM ALAN, Income Tax dept., Bengal (commr.) (b. 25th July, 1891).—Joined the service, 4th Dec., 1913; inc. tax officer, Oct., 1924; offg. asst. commr., Dec.,

1926; confd., June, 1928; commr. (confd.), June, 1944.

ASHLEY-BROWN, REV. WILLIAM, L.Th., late Indian Eccles. Establ., Bombay (b. 22nd Feb., 1887).—Retd., Dec., 1939.*

ASKWITH, ARTHUR VIVIAN, C.I.E., Indian C.S. (chief commr., Delhi) (b. 16th Nov., 1893).—Educ. Bedford Sch., apptd. asst. supt. of police in I.P.S., Nov., 1913; on mil. service, Aug., 1916, to Jan., 1919; joined the I.C.S., 4th March, 1921; asst. commr., Punjab, April, 1921; dep. commr. (prov.), Feb., 1927; ditto (perm.), Nov., 1931; offg. secty. to govt., Punjab, transf. depts., May, 1934; secty. to govt., Punjab, home dept., May, 1935; chief commr., Delhi, July, 1940; C.I.E., Jan., 1941.

ASLI, HEHRAM DINSHAW, M.B.E., Office of High Commr. for India (b. 24th Nov., 1882).—Apptd. trade publicity officer, May, 1926; M.B.E., Jan., 1932.

ASPINALL, ROBERT STIVALA, C.I.E., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. (b. 5th Feb., 1895).—First commn., 5th Oct., 1922; agency surg., Kurram, Dec., 1929; civil surg., New Delhi, March, 1930, and Oct., 1934; ditto, Simla East, July, 1932; civil surg., Aymer and C.M.O., Rajputana, Apl., 1935; C.I.E., Jan., 1936; civil-surg., Sibi, Oct., 1936; C.M.O., W. India Agency, Apl., 1937; residency surgeon, Mysore, Oct., 1940.

ASRANI, MOTOOMAL ASSUDAMAI, B.A., B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., E.I. rly.) (b. 31st Dec., 1890).—Joined the service, 1st Aug., 1915; asst. engr., Jan., 1919; resdt. engr., Aug., 1924; exec. engr. (junr.), E.I. Rly., Nov., 1927; ditto (senr.), July, 1934.

ASTBURY, ARTHUR RALPH, C.S.I., C.I.E., M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs, Punjab (b. 5th June, 1880).—Retd., June, 1935.*

ASTLE, GEORGE HARVEY, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 4th Jan., 1912).—Educated at Alleyne's Grammar School, Uttoxeter, King's College, London, and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; apptd. after exam. of 1934; arrived in India, Jan., 1936, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

ASTON, HERBERT REID, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 22nd March, 1885).—Retd., May, 1935.*

ASUNDI, ANANT KRISHNA, B.A., LL.B., Bombay Civil Service, late Judicial Branch (b. 14th May, 1880).—Retd., May, 1935.*

ATA MUHAMMAD, SARDAR KHAN, B.A., LL.B., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Madras) (b. 8th Jan., 1914).—Educ. at Punjab Univ.; joined the service 14th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.

ATAL, JAI KUMAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., C.P.) (b. 19th Jan., 1914).—Educ. at Clayesmore Sch., Winchester, and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 16th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in the C.P. as asst. commr.; under sec., Jan., 1942.

ATKINS, L. B. W. (see Walsh Atkins, L. B.).

ATKINSON, DENIS JACKSON, O.B.E., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 5th June, 1897).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1920; asst. consvr., Dec., 1921; divl. forest entomologist, Nov., 1925; dep. consvr., Nov., 1926; O.B.E., Jan., 1943.

ATKINSON, SIR EDWIN HENRY DE VERE, K.C.B., K.B.E., C.M.G., C.I.E., Lieut.-Gen., R.E.—Master general of the ordnance, India, April, 1924.*

ATKINSON, JOHN DOMVILLE, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr., Bombay) (b. 7th Aug., 1906).—Joined the service as proby. asst. exec. engr., Bombay, 1st Oct., 1929; confd., Feb., 1934; exec. engr. (confd.), Sept., 1940; dep. sec. to govt. p.w.d., July, 1943.

ATKINSON, MONTAGUE PARKER, M.B., B.Ch., Major, I.M.S. (b. 23rd Nov., 1894).—Date of first commn., 29th Nov., 1923; in milty. employ to March, 1931; agency surg., Gilgit, Oct., 1935; ch. medl. offr. in the W. India States agency and residency surgn., Rajkot, Oct., 1940.

AUCHINLECK, GENERAL SIR CLAUDE JOHN EYRE, G.C.I.E., C.B., C.S.I., D.S.O., A.D.C. (Commander-in-Chief in India and War Member) (b. 1884).—Educ. Wellington Coll. Served in Egypt, 1914-15; Aden, 1915; Mesopotamia, 1916-19; operations against Upper Mohmands, 1933; Mohmand operations, 1935; Imp. Def. Coll., 1927; commanded 1st batt., 1st Punjab Regt., 1929-30; Instructor, Staff Coll., Quetta, 1930-33; Commdr., Peshawar Brig., India, 1933-36; Depy. Ch. of Gen. Staff, A.H.Q., India, 1936-38; Member, Expert Cttee. on Defence of India, 1938; Commdr., Meerut Dist., India, 1938-39; C.-in-C. in India in 1941; C.-in-C., Middle East, 1941-42; C.-in-C. and War Member, 20th June, 1943.

AUGIER, ARTHUR REGINALD, C.I.E., late Indian Posts and Telegraphs (b. 2nd Oct., 1887).—Joined the service 1st Feb., 1908; supt. of post offices, Oct., 1910; on depn. to Field Service and Iraq, July, 1918, to Oct., 1930; dep. dir.-genl., July, 1941; C.I.E., June, 1942; retd., Oct., 1943.

AUGIER, DOUGLAS ERIC, O.B.E., Opium dept., United Provs. (jt. opium officer, Malwa) (b. 24th June, 1885).—Joined the service as proby. asst. opium agent, 16th April, 1906; confd., Feb., 1908; dist. opium agent, Dec., 1926; jt. opium officer, Malwa, on depn., Jan., 1927; O.B.E., Jan., 1933.

AUSTIN, SIR THOMAS, K.C.I.E., Barr., Indian C.S. (adv. to Govr., Madras) (b. 20th July, 1887).—Educ. at Plymouth Coll., and Jesus Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 4th Dec., 1911; and served in Madras as asst. coll. and mag.; sub. coll. and jt. mag., July, 1917; on foreign service as supt., Pudukkottai estate, May, 1919, to Aug., 1920; collr., civil and milty. station, Bangalore, Feb., 1922; chairman, Assam labour board, Oct., 1924; offg. collr. and dist. mag., July, 1929; confd., Apl., 1930; regr. co-op soc., Madras, June, 1934; member, bd. of rev. Sept., 1938; ch. secty., July, 1940; advr. to govr., Nov., 1940; C.I.E., June, 1941; K.C.I.E. Jan., 1945.

AVADH BEHARI GUPTA, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (supig. engr., United Provs.) (b. 15th Sept., 1893).—Joined the service, 28th Oct., 1916; asst. engr., Oct., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Apl., 1924; exec. engr., Oct., 1926; confd. as suptg. engr., Jan., 1942.

AWATI, PRAHLAD RAOJI, B.A. (Bomb. and Cantab.), Natural Science Tripos, Pts. I & II, class II (Cantab.), D.I.C. (Lond.), Indian Educl. Service (b. 18th Dec., 1887).—Appointed prof. of zoology, Royal Institute of Science Bombay, 1st June, 1922.

AYLING, SIR WILLIAM BOCK, Kt., late Indian C.S., Madras.—Retd., June, 1924.*

AYLMER, EDMUND GEORGE, Printing and Stationery Dept. (manager, Govt. of India press).

(b. 16th March, 1890).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 15th May, 1914; dep. supt., Govt. central press, Oct., 1920; manager, ditto, March, 1923; offg. manager, Govt. of India press, Oct., 1930; confd., Oct., 1930.

AYUB BAKSH AWAN, B.Sc., Indian Police (b. 25th May, 1913).—Apptd. asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., 1st Feb., 1935; confd., Feb., 1937.

AYUB, MUHAMMAD, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 15th June, 1914).—Educ. at American High School, Baghdad, Col. Brown's Sch., Dehra Dun, University Coll., London, and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; arrived in India, Aug., 1936; joined the service, 22nd Oct., 1936; and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.

AYYADURAI AYYAR, VENKATAKRISHNA AYYAR, RAO BAHADUR, B.A., B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 5th Dec., 1885).—Joined the service as appr. engr., 20th Feb., 1909; asst. engr., Feb., 1910; exec. engr., Feb., 1919; dep. ch. engr., Madras, May, 1933; suptg. engr., June, 1938; retd., Dec., 1940.

AYYANGAR, GIYARPURAM N. R. (see Rangaswami Ayyangar, G. N.).

AYYANGAR, KUMBAKONAM SRINIVASA AYYANGAR KRISHNASWAMI, B.A., B.L. (b. 27th July, 1884).—Govt. pleader, July, 1935; apptd. judge, high ct., Madras, July, 1938; retd., July, 1944.

AYYANGAR, KUPPUSWAMI RAMASWAMI (see Kuppuswami Ramaswami Ayyangar).

AYYANGAR, KOMBUR RAMASWAMI KRISHNASWAMI (see Krishnaswami Ayyangar, K. R.).

AYYANGAR, NUGGEHALLI RAMANUJA (see Ramanuja, A. N.).

AYYANGAR, S. RANGASWAMI (see Rangaswami, S. A.).

AYYANGAR, SRINIVASA AYYANGAR PARTHASARATHI (see Parthasarathi Ayyangar, S. A.).

AYYAR (see also Aiyar).

AYYAR, ALLADI KRISHNASWAMI (see Krishnaswami, A. A.).

AYYAR, A. S. PANCHAPAKESA (see Panchapakesa Ayyar).

AYYAR, C. N. K. (see Kuppuswami Ayyar C. N.).

AYYAR, CHANDRASEKHARA SUBRAHMANYA (see Subrahmanya Ayyar C.).

AYYAR, C. V. A. (see Anantakrishna Ayyar, C. V.).

AYYAR, E. R. S. (see Seshu, Ayyar E. R.).

AYYAR, GOPALA V. (see Venkateswara Ayyar, G.).

AYYAR, GOPALASWAMI N. (see Nagaratnum, A. G.).

AYYAR, HARIHARAYYAR ANANTHANARAYANAN (see Ananthanarayanan H. A.).

AYYAR, K. R. V. (see Venkataramana Ayyar, K.).

AYYAR, KUNNISSAERI S. V. (see Venkatachala-Ayyar).

AYYAR, K. VENKATARAMA (see Venkatarama Ayyar, K.).

AYYAR, MADURA SUBBA AYYAR SUBRAHMANYA (see Subrahmanya Ayyar, M. S. A.).

AYYAR, NAGAPUDI CHANDRA SEKHARA, Rao Bahadur (judge, high court, Madras).—Apptd., Feb., 1943.

AYYAR, NILAKANTA MAHADEVA (see Nilakanta Mahadeva Ayyar).

AYYAR, PATHIAVADI SESHACHALA VISVANATHA (see Visvanatha Ayyar, P. S.).

AYYAR, P. N. RAMASWAMI (see Ramaswami Ayyar).

AYYAR, PERUMALAYYAR RAMAKRISHNA (see Ramakrishna Ayyar, P.).

AYYAR, P. V. BALAKRISHNA (see Balakrishna Ayyar).

AYYAR, RAMA (see Rama, A.).

AYYAR, T. G. N. (see Tarakad Gopalakrishna Narayana, Ayyar).

AYYAR, TINNEVELLY SELLAMIER SANKARA (see Sankara, Ayyar, T. S.).

AYYAR, T. V. SESHAGIRI (see Seshagiri Ayyar).

AYYAR, V. KRISHNAMURTI (see Krishnamurti Ayyar, V.).

AYYAR, VENKATARAMA RAMACHANDRA (see Ramachandra Ayyar, V.).

AZAM, MAKHIDUM MUHAMMAD, B.Sc., LL.B., Mil. Accts. Dept. (b. 15th Jan., 1892).—Held non-gaz. appts., Aug., 1918, to March, 1926; apptd. Officer, Cl. II, March, 1926.

AZAM, MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Azam).

AZIZ, A. (see Abdul Aziz).

AZIZ, MUHAMMAD ABDUL (see Abdul Aziz, M.).

AZIZUL HUQUE, KHAN BAHADUR, SIR M., C.I.E., B.L., D.Litt. (Calcutta), Minister for educn., Bengal, 1934-37; speaker, Bengal legis. assembly, 1937-42; vice-chancellor, Calcutta univ, 1938-42; and deptl. head of Islamic History and Culture, Calcutta univ., 1940-42; High Commissioner for India in U.K., 1942-43; member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council (comm. indus. and civil supplies), May, 1943.

AZIZUR RAHMAN, MUHAMMAD, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A., late Assam C.S. (b. 16th Oct., 1884).—Retd., Oct., 1939.*

BACON, BERNARD MATTHEW, B.A., Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 5th Aug., 1909).—Educ. at Cardinal Vaughan Sch., Kensington; Trinity Hall, Cambridge, and Sch. of Grential Studies, London; apptd. after exam. of 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Dec., 1935; asst. pol. agent, Nasirabad, Oct., 1936; 2nd asst. pol. agt., Mekran, Oct., 1938; asst. for Mekran to the pol. agent in Kalat and ex-officio commandant, Mekran Levy Corps, Dec., 1939; confd. in Ind. Political Service, Sept., 1940; undersecty. to the A.G.G., resdt. and ch. commr. in Baluchistan, July, 1941; asst. pol. agent in Loralai, Dec., 1941; sec. to resdt. Kolhapur, Feb., 1943; asst. pol. agent, Quetta-Pishin, July, 1944; pol. agent, Chagrai, Aug., 1944; sec. to A.G.G., Baluchistan, Sept., 1944.

BACON, REV. EDWARD ARTHUR, Indian Eccles, Estabmt. (United Provs.) (jun. chaplain) (b. 1st May, 1900).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., 23rd January, 1937; jun. chaplain, Jan., 1939.

BACON, ROGER NOEL, O.B.E., Major, I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 25th Dec., 1900).—First commn., 16th July, 1920; in milty. employ to 15th Oct., 1927; asst. pol. agent, N. Waziristan, Nov., 1929; asst. commr., Charsadda, July, 1931, and again, Apl., 1933; asst. dir. intel., Govt. of India, Dec., 1933; on spl. duty with Mohmand force, Sept., 1935; O.B.E. June, 1936; dep. commr., Hazara, Sept., 1937; asst. pol. agent, S. Waziristan, Dec., 1937; pol. agent, N. Waziristan, Feb., 1938; pol. agent, Khyber, Oct., 1940; home sec., govt., N.W.F.P., Sept., 1940; sec., to govt., 1944.

BADAN SINGH, M.Sc., LL.B., Indian Polide (b. 23rd June, 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., on 17th Aug., 1925; offg. supt., July, 1928; and again, March, 1933; confd., May, 1939.

BADENOCH, SIR ALEXANDER CAMERON, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 2nd July, 1889).—Educ. at Dunfermline High Sch., Edinburgh Univ., and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 23rd Nov., 1912, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sec., municipal commee., Amritsar, April, 1917; spl. duty, Punjab civil sectt., May, 1918; offg. under-sec. to govt., finl. dept., June, 1918; confd., Dec., 1918; dep. acct.-genl., Punjab, March to May, 1919; offg. acct.-genl., Central Provs., Oct., 1919; ditto, Calcutta, Jan., 1923; acct.-genl., post and tels., Calcutta, Jan., 1926; ditto, Delhi, Oct., 1926; acct.-genl., central revenues, Nov., 1928; offg. dir. of comml. audit, May, 1929; dir., rly. audit, Apl., 1930; C.I.E., June, 1931; offg. dep. auditor-genl. in India, Apl., 1931; and again, Nov., 1933; confd., May, 1932; offg. auditor-genl. in India, Apl., 1933; and again, July, 1935; C.S.I., Feb., 1937; aud. genl. in India (subst.), Apl., 1938; dep. auditor genl. in India, Oct., 1938; auditor genl. of India, Aug., 1940; kt. of the Order of St. John, Dec., 1940; kt., Jan., 1941; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1944.

BADOCK, RONALD WALTER, late Ind. Fin. Dept. (b. 21st Jan., 1886).—Joined the service, 20th Oct., 1910; asst. acct.-genl., Nov., 1911; examr., local fund accts., Burma, April, 1923; ret'd., Jan., 1941.

BAGCHI, BHUPAL PRASAD, M.Sc., M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 2nd July, 1917).—Educ. at Agra Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1941; served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

BAGSHAW, LEONARD EVAN, Indian C.S. (asst. collr.) (b. 27th Apl., 1918).—Educ. at Wellington Coll. and Wadham Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn. after seln. in Aug., 1940, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

BAGULEY, SIR JOHN MINTY, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 21st June, 1880).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1903; arrived 28th Nov., 1904; and served in Burma as asst. commr.; dist. judge, Oct., 1916; actg. judge, high ct., Rangoon, May, 1924; confd., Sept., 1927; knighted, Jan., 1939; ret'd., June, 1940.

BAHL, MOHAN LAL, Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Bihar) (b. 10th Oct., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bihar and Orissa, on 29th March, 1925; offg. exec. engr., June, 1930; confd., Oct., 1934; supt. engr.

BAHL, RANJIT RAI, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 16th Aug., 1915).—Educ. at Arya High School, Ludhiana, Punjab Univ., and Queen's Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 23rd Oct., 1939; confd., 26th Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.

BAIG, MIRZA OSMAN ALI, M.B.E., Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 9th Jan., 1904).—First commn., 31st Jan., 1924; in milty. employ until 11th Dec., 1930; asst. pol. agent, Sibi, Feb., 1933; ditto, Zhob, Oct., 1934; asst. pol. agent, Mekran, May, 1935; asst. commr., Peshawar, June, 1938; city mag., Peshawar, Oct., 1938; M.B.E., Jan., 1941; dep. secty. to govt. of N.W.F.P. (civ. def.), July, 1941; H.B.M.'s consul, Portuguese possns. in India, May, 1943; H.B.M.'s consul-genl., French estbts. in India (in addn.), Sept.-Oct., 1944.

BAIG, MIRZA SIKANDER ALI, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 22nd Sept., 1909).

—Educ. at Clifton Coll., Trinity Coll., Cambridge, and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 10th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Punjab as asst. commr.; sub-divl. officer, March, 1937; secty., Punjab and N.W.F.P. jt. public serv. commn., Apl., 1938; dep. commr., Nov., 1940, to Feb., 1942; under-sec. defence/war, govt. of India, Feb., 1942; addl. dep. sec. (war), Oct., 1944.

BAJNATH KHATTRI, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., United Provs., 31st Oct., 1925; offg. exec. engr., Feb., 1931; confd., Oct., 1935.

BAIKIE, HUGH MACANDREW, B.Sc., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 7th Sept., 1889).—Ret'd., Oct., 1939.*

BAILEY, ARTHUR CHARLES JOHN, C.I.E., late Indian Police (Bombay) (b. 2nd Oct., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. supt. of police, 24th Nov., 1906; supt. of police, Jan., 1918; awarded King's Police Medal, 1st Jan., 1920; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Feb., 1930; and again, July, 1933; confd., Jan., 1934; C.I.E., June, 1931; dep. inspr. genl., C.I.D., Poona, Nov., 1938; ret'd., 21st Apr., 1942.

BAILEY, FREDERICK MARSHMAN, C.I.E., Lieut.-Col., I.A., late Indian Political Service (b. 3rd Feb., 1882).—Ret'd., Apl., 1938.*

BAILEY, GEORGE HUBERT PARKE, Indian Police (supt., Madras) (b. 2nd Jan., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Madras, on 31st Dec., 1922; offg. dist. supt., Apl., 1929; offg. dep. commr., Jan., 1934; supt., Dec., 1935; Indian Police Medal, Jan., 1936; cent. intell. offr., Madras, Apl., 1944; dep. dir., intell. bureau, Nov., 1944.

BAINI PRASHAD, O.B.E., D.Sc. (Edin. and Punjab), F.R.S.E., F.L.S., F.Z.S., Zoological Survey of India (dir.) (b. 13th March, 1894).—Apptd. supt. of fisheries, Bengal, Bihar and Orissa, 1917; offg. dir., ditto, 1918; asst. supt., zoological survey of India, 1920, and again, 1921; offg. supt., ditto, 1920, and again, 1923; offg. dir., ditto, 1924, 1927, and again March, 1929; confd., Apl., 1933; O.B.E., June, 1942; fisheries devel. adviser, govt. of India, May, 1944.

BAJPAL, SIR GIRJA SHANKAR, K.C.S.I., K.B.E., C.I.E., B.A., B.Sc., Indian C.S. (high commr. for India in U.S.A.) (b. 3rd Apl., 1891).—Educ. at Allahabad and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived, 25th Nov., 1915, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr. (jt. mag.), May, 1918; on special duty as sec. to the Right Hon. V. S. Srinivasa Shastri, Apl., 1921, to Nov., 1922; C.B.E., Jan., 1923; under-sec. to govt. of India, dept. of educ., health and lands, Sept., 1923; offg. dep. sec., ditto, March, 1924; confd., June, 1926; C.I.E., July, 1926; offg. sec., ditto, Dec., 1927; jt. secty., ditto, Nov., 1929; jt. secty., British Indian delegation, round-table conf., London, Nov., 1930-Jan., 1931; mag. and collr., Oct., 1931; on spl. duty to S. Africa, Dec., 1931; secty. to govt. of India, dept. of educ., Aug., 1932; again, Jan., 1936; K.B.E., June, 1935; temp. member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council, Sept., 1935, to Jan., 1936; member, ditto, Apl., 1940; agent to govr.-genl. in U.S.A., Oct., 1941; K.C.S.I., June, 1943.

BAJPAL, UMA SHANKAR, Judicial Dept., United Provs. (judge, high ct., Allahabad) (b. 22nd Aug., 1884).—Joined the service as govt.

advocate, 6th Apl., 1927; offg. judge, high ct., Allahabad, March, 1931; and again, Oct., 1932; addl. judge, ditto, variously from July, 1933; judge (confd.), Apl., 1937.

BAKER, ERNEST BRIAN HINDLEY, O.B.E., B.A. (Oxon), Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 13th Sept., 1904).—Educ. at Westminster and Christ Church Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 19th Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927; and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., Aug., 1933; offg. dist. and sess. judge, June, 1934; and again, Feb., 1936; attd. govt. of India legisl. dept., Nov., 1937; confd., Sept., 1939; dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1938; addl. secty. to govr., Bengal, 1940; sec., home dept., Nov., 1944; O.B.E., Jan., 1944.

BAKER, HUGH CUTHBERT, B.A., Indian C.S. (secty., judl. dept., Burma) (b. 16th Nov., 1901).—Educ. at Campbell Coll., Belfast, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; joined the service, 22nd Oct., 1926; arrived, Dec., 1926, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; offg. under secty. to govt., home and pol. dept., March, 1929; offg. settlement officer, Moulmein, Apl., 1932; dep. secty., fin. dept., Burma, Dec., 1936, to Dec., 1937; secty., lands and rev. dept., Dec., 1937; depy. secty., home dept., Dec., 1940; secty., judl. dept., Apl., 1941; secty., home dept., June, 1941; ditto, fin., 1944.

BAKER, JOHN ALFRED, C.I.E., M.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 14th May, 1882).—Retd., March, 1935.*

BAKER, LEONARD YORK, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 30th Jan., 1903).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., United Provs., 18th Oct., 1926; exec. engr., Oct., 1935.

BAKER, PERCY NEVILLE HUMPHREY, A.M.I.C.E., A.M.I.M.E., Indian State Rlys. (divl. supt.) (b. 19th Dec., 1888).—Joined the service, 7th July, 1922; asst. supt., Feb., 1925; transptn. supt. (power), E.I. Rly., Aug., 1934; div. supt., Aug., 1941.

BAKER, SIR WILLIAM THOMAS WEBB, Kt., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 6th Dec., 1873).—Educ. at Rugby, and Exeter Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1896; arrived, 11th Dec., 1897, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag.; 2nd asst., Feb., 1906; 1st asst., Jan., 1910; judge and sess. judge, May, 1914; services lent to govt. of Central Provs. from March, 1923; judl. commr., Central Provs., Sept., 1923; offg. judl. commr., Bombay, Apl., 1926; addl. judge, high ct., Bombay, Nov., 1926; offg. judge, ditto, June, 1927; confd., Jan., 1929; offg. ch. justice, high ct., Bombay, Feb., 1933; ret'd., Dec., 1933; knighted, Jan., 1934.

BAKHLE, DATTAPRASANNA SADASHIVA, B.A., O.B.E., Indian C.S. (collr., Bombay) (b. 5th Dec., 1907).—Educ. at Bombay Univ., London Sch. of Economics and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; joined the service 10th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; under secty., home dept., govt. of India, March, 1935, to March, 1938; on special duty under the commr. of labour, March, 1939, to May, 1939; commr. for workmen's compensation and regr. of trade unions, May, 1939; confd. as collr., Nov., 1939; O.B.E., Jan., 1943; dir. of civ. supplies and jt. sec., fin. dept. var., from Oct., 1942.

BAKHT YAWAR ALI, M.A., Indian Police (b. 29th June, 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, on 11th July, 1924; offg. supt., Dec., 1932; supt., July, 1940.

BAKSH, ALLAH (see Allah Baksh).

BAKSH, SHAHABUDDIN KHUDA (see Shahabuddin, K.B.).

BAKSHI SINGH, SIDHU BHAI, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 3rd Sept., 1892).—Joined the service, Sept., 1914; asst. engr., Sept., 1915; asst. exec. engr., Sept., 1915; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1924.

BAKSI, GIRIJA BHUSHAN, M.A. (Cal.), B.A. (Oxon.), Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr. Central Provs.) (b. 15th Jan., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 30th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Sept., 1927; consvr., Feb., 1942.

BAKSI, NAGENDRABHUSAN, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and collr., Bihar) (b. 30th Nov., 1901).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and St. Catherine's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 28th Oct., 1925; arrived, 6th Dec., 1925, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. dep. commr., var. from Apl., 1933; addl. dist. mag., Nov., 1935; spec. offr., co-op. dept., Jan., 1937; regr., co-op. societies, Bihar, Apl., 1937; mag. and collr., June, 1939; again, Apl., 1942; sec. rev. commerce dept., Feb., 1940.

BAL, NARAYANA KRISHNA, Lieut.-Col., M.C., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 10th Sept., 1885).—First commn. dated 25th Jan., 1913; in milty. employ until 19th Nov., 1923; civil surg., Nov., 1926; dist. medl. officer, Madras, Apl., 1927; ret'd., Sept., 1940.

BALACHANDRA KOMAN, MALIKAYAL CHANDAPPA, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Madras) (b. 14th May, 1897).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and Queen's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 1st Nov., 1923; arrived, 23rd Nov., 1923, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; under sec. to govt., development dept., March, 1928; offg. dep. secty., local self-govt. dep., March, 1931; sub-collr., Jan., 1932; dist. and sess. judge (confd.), May, 1935.

BALACHANDRAN, KRISHNAPILLAI, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 18th Dec., 1918).—Educ. at Madras Univ.; apptd. on probn. after examn. of 1942, and served in Assam as asst. commr.

BALAKRISHNA AYYAR, PANDUKARAN VENKU, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Madras) (b. 26th Sept., 1900).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and Oxford (non-collegiate); joined the service, 7th Dec., 1925, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub. collr. and jt. mag., Jan., 1927; dist. and sess. judge (confd.), Dec., 1938.

BALAKRISHNA, MENON MADAMPATH, Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 19th Oct., 1913).—Apptd., asst. supt., Madras, on probn., 4th March, 1938; confd., March, 1940.

BALAKRISHNA PILLAI, VELLAYAMBALAM KRISHNA, B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Orissa) (b. 27th Sept., 1901).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and Exeter Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 22nd Oct., 1925; arrived, 7th Dec., 1925, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1932; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1935; cane commr., Nov., 1937; magte. and collr., May, 1939; (provl. subst.) dir. of indus., Bihar, Feb., 1938; addtl. dep. commr., Dhanbad, Oct., 1941; commr. of excise and I.G. regn., Apl., 1943.

BALAKRISHNA, SHETTY SUNNANGAL, Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 14th June, 1915).—Apptd. asst. supt., Madras, on probn., 2nd March, 1938; confd., March, 1940.

BALAKRISHNAN, ANANTHANARAYANA, B.A., B.L., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 4th Jan., 1899).—Joined the service, 7th Apr., 1921; dep. acct. genl., P. & T., Nagpur, Nov., 1936; ditto, Central Provs., March, 1937; asst. auditor genl. (Pers.), June, 1938; govt. ext., M. & S.M. Rly, Apr., 1941; auditor of accounts, Jodhpur rly., Aug., 1941.

BALBIR SINGH, KUNWAR, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., United Provs.) (b. 12th Oct., 1894).—Joined the service, 14th Sept., 1918; asst. engr., Sept., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1924; exec. engr., Sept., 1928; confd. as suptg. engr., July, 1942.

BALBIR SINGH, SARDAR, Indian Police (b. 20th Sept., 1912).—Apptd. asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., Feb., 1937.

BALDOCK, WILLIAM HENRY, Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 6th Aug., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 15th March, 1921; offg. supt., May, 1924; confd., Sept., 1930.

BALDWIN, ARTHUR CHARLES JOHN, M.A., late Indian Educ. Service, Burma (b. 21st Sept., 1882).—Retd., Oct., 1936.*

BALKISHAN KAPUR, LALA, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 27th Nov., 1896).—Joined the service 22nd Nov., 1920; asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1921; offg. exec. engr., Apr., 1929; confd., Oct., 1932; dir. irrig. research and land reclamation, March, 1944.

BALL, SIR EDMUND LANCASTER, B.A., late India Audit Office (b. 24th Apr., 1883).—Educ. at City of London Sch., and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. junior clerk, store dept., 1st March, 1907; transf. to India audit office, Aug., 1907; senr. clerk, Feb., 1915; asst. to auditor, Dec., 1921; auditor, March, 1934; kt., Jan., 1941; retd., Oct., 1943.

BALL, REV. HENRY, M.A., Indian Eccles. Establ. (junr. chaplain, Bombay) (b. 28th Aug., 1899).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., 30th Nov., 1928; confd., Nov., 1930.

BALLARD, BASIL WOODS (see Woods-Ballard).

BALWANT NAG SINGH, Indian Service of Engineers (asst. exec. engr., United Provs.).—Joined the service as engr. student, 25th Aug., 1930; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1931.

BALWANT SINGH, GAREWAL, SARDAR SAHIB SARDAR, B.A., Punjab Civil Service (b. 2nd Nov., 1892).—Extra asst. commr., Punjab, Oct., 1915; sub-div. officr. (subs. Provs.), Oct., 1936.

BALWANT SINGH, SHIHN, SARDAR, A.M.I.E. (Ind.), late Indian Service of Engrs; (b. 30th Aug., 1889).—Retd., Sept., 1936.*

BAM, ARVIND SHANKAR, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. collr.) (b. 12th March, 1918).—Educ. at Govt. High Sch., Yeotmal, Benares Hindu and Bombay Univ., and King's Coll., London; apptd. on probn. after seln. in Aug., 1941, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

BAMBAWALE, BHARGAO AMRIT, B.A., Indian Civil Service (dep. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 3rd Nov., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of Allahabad, and St. John's Coll., Cambridge. Joined the service, 26th Oct., 1926; arrived 5th Dec., 1926, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; under-sec. to govt., C.P., March, 1930; offg. dep. commr., Feb., 1933; provl. ditto, Sept., 1938; offr. in charge. Nagpur municipality, March, 1941; commr. of settlements, Nov., 1944.

BAMBAWALE, TRIMBAK AMRIT, Indian Police (dist. supt., Central Provs.) (b. 23rd March, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt. on 5th May, 1920; offg. dist. supt., Apr., 1923; confd., Aug., 1928; on spl. duty, Sept., 1940; princpl., trng. coll., 1944.

BAMBERGER, ALBERT EDWARD, India Office (asst. to pol. A.D.C.) (b. 7th Feb., 1894).—Apptd. clerical officer, 28th Oct., 1921; higher clerical officer, July, 1935; asst. to pol. A.D.C., July, 1935; pte. sec. to parly. under-sec. (in addn.), Jan., 1942.

BAMFORD, PERCIVAL CLIFFORD, C.I.E., late Indian Police (Bengal) (b. 28th Apr., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. supt. on 8th Dec., 1906; supt., July, 1917; on depn. as dep. intell. bureau, govt. of India, from Nov., 1924; offg. dir., ditto, Apr., 1934; awarded King's Police Medal, 1925; C.I.E., June, 1931; dep. inspr.-genl., Nov., 1931; retd., Apr., 1941.

BAMJEE, SORAB DINSHAW, B.Sc., Indian State Railways (dep. ch. comml. manager, E.I. rly.) (b. 30th Nov., 1889).—Joined the service, 4th March, 1914; resdnt. engr., E.I. Rly., March, 1922; exec. engr., ditto, Jan., 1928; dep. genl. manager, March, 1940; dep. chief commercial manager, Aug., 1940.

BAN, BINDRA (see Bindra Ban).

BANARJI, AGHORE NATH, B.L., late Judl. dept., Orissa (b. 16th March, 1888).—Apptd. dist. and sess. judge, 5th Nov., 1929; retd., May, 1943.

BANARJI, AMIYA CHARAN, M.A., M.Sc., Indian Educl. Service (b. 23rd Sept., 1891).—Apptd. prof. of mathematics, Muir Central Coll., Allahabad, 19th July, 1920; with Allahabad Univ. from 1st July, 1922.

BANARJI, BHOLA NATH, M.A., B.L., Rai Bahadur, late Indian Police (b. 5th Dec., 1883).—Retd., Dec., 1938.*

BANARJI, BHUPENDRA NATH, Rai Bahadur, late Indian Police (b. 1882).—Retd., Oct., 1937.*

BANARJI, INDU BHUSHAN, Indian Police, asst. supt., Bihar (b. 16th Sept., 1915).—Apptd. on probn., Feb., 1938; confd., 15th Dec., 1938.

BANARJI, JATINDRA MOHAN, Rai Bahadur, late Bengal Civil Service (b. Aug., 1881).—Retd., Aug., 1934.*

BANARJI, RAGHABENDRA NATH, Rai Bahadur, B.A., B.L., Barr., Indian Police (supt., (b. 2nd Apr., 1893).—Joined the service, 20th Jan., 1917; King's Police Medal, 1924; apptd. to I.P. as supt., Bengal, Oct., 1935; awarded Indian Police Medal, Jan., 1938.

BANARJI, SHAILENDRA NATH, RAI BAHADUR B.A., B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 13th Jan., 1881).—Retd., Jan., 1936.*

BANARJI, TRIDIB NATH, M.B. (princpl. medl. coll., Patna) (b. 18th March, 1890).—Joined the service as asst. surg., 1st Sept., 1915; prof. medl. coll., Patna, Dec., 1925; princpl. ditto, Feb., 1940.

BANARSI DAS, P.M.S., Supt., Mental Hospital, Agra (b. 1st Apr., 1887).—Civil surgn., March, 1933; supt., Mental Hospital, Agra, May, 1934.

BANERJEE, AMRITA LAL, RAI BAHADUR, I.S.O., B.A., Federal Ct. of India (b. 20th Jan., 1880).—Joined the service, 28th Nov., 1904, and held non-gazetted appts. to 31st Oct., 1914; supt. legislative dept., Govt. of India, Nov., 1914; asst. secty., Aug., 1927; I.S.O., June, 1936; asst. reg. fed. ct., India, Nov., 1937.

BANERJEE, BAMA CHARAN, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 3rd Nov., 1893).—Joined the

service, 2nd Sept., 1916; asst. acct.-genl., posts and tels., March, 1929; dep., ditto, Feb., 1930; exr. local fund accts., Central Provs., Sept., 1930; exr., local fund accts., Bihar and Orissa, Aprl., 1934; dep. acct.-genl., Bengal, Sept., 1936; comptroller, Sind, March, 1941; ditto, Orissa, July, 1941; ditto, N.W.F.P., Aug., 1941.

BANERJEE, BHABO NATH, M.Sc., Ph.D., late Meteorological Dept. (b. 15th Aug., 1895.)—Retd., Aprl., 1935.*

BANERJEE, HIRANMAY, B.A. (Cal.), Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. coll., Bengal) (b. 5th Sept., 1905).—Educ. at Univ. of Calcutta and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Bengal as asst. coll. and mag.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Nov., 1930; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Aprl., 1936; addl. ditto from Feb., 1937.

BANERJEE, NARENDRA NATH, late India Posts and Tels. (b. 25th Sept., 1885).—Joined the service, 26th Sept., 1907; asst. supt., Aug., 1910; asst. divl. engr., Feb., 1921; divl. engr., Feb., 1926; offg. dir. tel. engrg., June, 1931; ditto, Bombay, Sept., 1932; ditto, Punjab, May, 1934; offg. dir. tels., March, 1935; confd., May, 1935; p.m.g., Bihar and Orissa, May, 1938; retd., Sept., 1940.

BANERJEE, RABINDRA NATH, C.I.E., M.A. (Cal.), B.A. (Cantab.), Indian C.S. (secty. to govt. of Ind. Commonwealth relations) (b. 1st Feb., 1895).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 22nd March, 1920; arrived, 20th May, 1920, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Aprl., 1925; regr. of co-op. societies and of indus., Jan., 1929; dep. commr. and ditto, Feb., 1930; secty. to govt., C.P., rev. dept., Dec., 1933; ditto, local self govt. dept., Nov., 1936; secty. to govr., Aprl., 1937; C.I.E., June, 1938; sec., govt. of India commonwealth relations, Feb., 1944.

BANERJEE, SANTOSH KUMAR, Rai Bahadur, late Dept. of Indus. and Labour (b. 7th Sept., 1883).—Retd., Sept., 1938* offr. on special duty, dept. of supply, Aprl., 1940.

BANERJEE, SATYENDRA MOHAN, M.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 14th Dec., 1898).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Cambridge Univ. (non-collegiate); joined the service, 25th Oct., 1923; arrived, 3rd Dec., 1923, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and coll.; and sub-divl. officer, May, 1925; offg. magte. and coll., March, 1929; offg. secty., bd. of rev., Bengal, Feb., 1935; confd., Aug., 1935; mag. and collr. (confd.), Dec., 1938; sec. rev. dept., Oct., 1943; ditto, forest dept., Aprl., 1944.

BANERJEE SHAMANANDA, B.A. (B.Sc. (Cal.), B.Sc. (Tech., Manchester Univ.) (dir. of tels., wireless) Indian Posts and Telegraphs (b. 29th May, 1897).—Joined the service, 2nd Aprl., 1925, as asst. div. engr., wireless (on probn.), confd., Oct., 1925; div. engr., wireless, Aprl., 1928; del. to internl. conf., Cairo, Feb., 1938; asst. ch. engr., wireless, July, 1939; confd. as dir. of tels., Aug., 1944.

BANERJEE, SURENDRA NATH, RAI BAHADUR, I.S.O., B.A., late Commerce Dept., Govt. of India (b. Nov., 1881).—Retd., Aug., 1938.*

BANERJEE, SURENDRA NATH, RAI BAHADUR, B.A. (b. 20th March, 1883), Income-tax Dept., Bengal.—Retd., Nov., 1938.*

BANERJEE, UPENDRA NATH, Indian State Rlys. (dist. loco. supt., E.B. rly.) (b. 2nd Nov., 1892).—Joined the service, 4th Jan., 1920, as

asst. loco. supt.; dist. loco. supt., E.B. rly. (prov.), Aug., 1934.

BANERJI, SIR ALBION RAJ KUMAR, Kt., C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A., late Indian C.S., Madras.—Retd., May, 1922.*

BANERJI, ANIL CHANDRA (see Anil C. B.).

BANERJI, BIBHUTI BHUSHAN, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt., Orissa).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Bihar and Orissa, 27th Jan., 1934; confd., Dec., 1934.

BANERJI, JYOTIR MOY, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr.) (b. 24th Oct., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Madras, 19th Nov., 1928; dep. consvr., Nov., 1933.

BANERJI, SHISHAR KUMAR, O.B.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., C.P.) (b. 21st Oct., 1913).—Educ. at D.A.V. Intermediate Coll., Dehra Dun, and Allahabad Univ.; joined the service, 27th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in the C.P. as asst. commr.; O.B.E., June, 1943.

BANERJI, SUDHANU KUMAR, M.Sc., D.Sc. (Calcutta), Indian Meteoro. Dept. (dir. genl. of observations) (b. 27th Aprl., 1893).—Apptd. dir., Bombay and Alibagh observatories, Aprl., 1922; meteorologist, Aprl., 1923; supt. meteorologist, Oct., 1938; offg. dir. gen. of observatories, var. from March, 1933; dir. genl. of observatories, Sept., 1944.

BANKS, JAMES DALLAWAY, Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., U.P.) (b. 3rd Jan., 1917).—Educ. at Nottingham High Sch. and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 8th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in U.P. as asst. mag. and collr.

BANNERMAN, SIR ARTHUR D'ARCY GORDON, Bart., K.C.V.O., C.I.E., Lieut.-Col., Indian Army (ret'd.).—First commn., 29th Aug., 1885; from Aprl., 1893, offd. as asst. to govr.-genl.'s agent in Central India; confd., Nov., 1896; 1st asst. to ditto, May, 1897; 1st asst. to govr.-genl.'s agent in Rajputana, and chief commr., Ajmer-Merwara, Oct., 1899; offg. pol. agent in Kotah and Jhalawar, Aprl., 1903; C.I.E., June, 1903; confd., Feb., 1905; resdnt. at Jaipur and pol. agent in Alwar, Sept., 1910; special duty from Feb., 1911; C.V.O., Dec., 1911; pol. agent, E. States of Rajputana, Nov., 1913; resdnt., Kashmir, Dec., 1917; ret'd. from I.A., Feb., 1921; pol. A.D.C. to sec. to state for India, Sept., 1921, to Sept., 1928; K.C.V.O., Jan., 1928; gentleman usher in ordinary to H.M. the King, Oct., 1928.

BANWARI LAL, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bihar) (b. 16th Feb., 1903).—Joined the service, 5th Nov., 1924; asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1925; offg. exec. engr., var. from July, 1931; confd., Oct., 1934.

BANWELL, GODWIN EDWARD, O.B.E., M.C., late Indian Police (Burma) (b. 31st July, 1897).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., 28th Jan., 1920; offg. dist. supt., Feb., 1925; confd., Nov., 1928; O.B.E., Dec., 1930; awarded King's Police Medal, Jan., 1931; pers. asst. to dep. insp.-genl. rlys., Sept., 1937; dep. commr., Rangoon city pol., Feb., 1938; ret'd., May, 1940.

BAPAT, SHIRAM BALKRISHNA, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 22nd Aug., 1906).—Educ. at Bombay Univ., Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge, and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., March, 1934; addl. dist. judge from

Sept., 1937; magte. and collr., Nov., 1940; sec., home dept., Oct., 1944.

BARBER, CHARLES GORDON, C.I.E., M.B.E., A.C.G.I., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 18th Jan., 1885).—Retd., May, 1939.*

BARBER, LEWIS, A.M.I.E.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 4th March, 1885).—Retd., Oct., 1938.*

BARBER, ROBERT CECIL, Dept. of Land Records, Burma (asst. dir.) (b. 5th May, 1888).—Joined the service, 16th Dec., 1909, as asst. supt.; supt., Apl., 1914; offg. asst. dir., Nov., 1934; confd., Feb., 1935.

BARBER, SAMUEL, Indian State Rlys. (dep. chief trans. (power) supt., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 6th Dec., 1899).—Asst. transp. supt., jun., Oct., 1924; transp. supt., sen. (prov.), Jan., 1938; dep. ch. trans. supt. (power), provl., Aug., 1940.

BARCLAY, ARCHIBALD GEORGE GRANT, A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Madras) (b. 6th Aug., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1911; exec. engr., Oct., 1919; suptg. ditto, July, 1940; retd., Aug., 1942.

BARCLAY, JOHN BUCHANAN, Indian State Rlys. (rly. traffic mgr.) (b. 20th Aug., 1890).—Joined the service as traffic probationer, 14th Oct., 1911; asst. traffic supt., Oct., 1914; asst. traffic manager, Nov., 1922; divl. traffic manager, Aug., 1924; goods supt., Jan., 1931; dist. traffic mgr. (prov.), Apl., 1940.

BARKAT ALI, KHAN BAHADUR, late Indian Rly. Accts. Service (b. 2nd Feb., 1883).—Retd., Feb., 1938.*

BARKAT ALI, MUHAMMAD, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A., late India Posts and Tels. (b. Aug., 1885).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1907; supt., Jan., 1909; asst. p.m.g., Punjab, July, 1930; dep. p.m.g., Bombay, May, 1934; p.m.g., Aug., 1938; retd., Aug., 1940.

BARKER, ARTHUR NEAL, B.Sc., A.I.C., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 15th Sept., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., on 31st Dec., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1930.

BARKER, ALFRED EDWARD, Indian Police (Bengal) (b. 18th Feb., 1919).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Dec., 1940.

BARKER, BASIL HYDE, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Burma) (b. 24th Oct., 1906).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Burma, 23rd Nov., 1928; exec. engr., Oct., 1937; mil. duty, Nov., 1940.

BARKER, FREDERICK ALLAN, C.I.E., O.B.E., M.A., M.D., Lieut.-Col., late I.M.S., Jail Dept., Punjab.—Retd., Oct., 1939.*

BARKER, HENRY THOMAS, late India Posts and Telegraphs (b. 7th March, 1885).—Joined the service, April, 1901; deputy supt., May, 1934; chief supt., March, 1939; retd., March, 1940.

BARKER, PERCY EDGAR, O.B.E., late Mil. Accts. Dept. (b. 11th Apl., 1884).—Retd., Apl., 1939.*

BARKER, SIR RAYNER CHILDE, Kt., C.I.E., India Office, late Indo-European Telegraph Dept.—Retd., Nov., 1912.*

BARKER, ROBERT, Indian Police (dist. supt.) (b. 2nd Nov., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, on 24th Nov., 1921; dist. supt., June, 1926.

BARKER, RONALD WILLIAM, O.B.E., B.A., Lieut.-Col., I.A., retd., late Burma Commn. (b. 20th Sept., 1883).—Retd., from civil employ., Jan., 1939.*

BARKER, SIR WILBERFORCE ROSS, K.C.I.E., C.B.—Chairman, public services commn., May, 1926, to Nov., 1932; K.C.I.E., June, 1930.

BARLEE, SIR KENNETH WILLIAM, B.A., Barr., late Indian C.S., Bombay (b. 29th Nov., 1877).—Retd., Nov., 1937.*

BARLOW, HAROLD EVERARD, Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 12th May, 1892).—Educ. at Haileybury and Institut Minerva, Zurich; joined the service, 26th Aug., 1920; arrived, 7th Dec., 1920, and served in United Provs. as asst. commr.; jt. mag., July, 1922; city mag., Nov., 1924; offg. mag. and collr., April, 1925; offg. dep. commr., March, 1926; offg. mag. and collr., Dec., 1926; confd., March, 1932.
