(supgt. engr., Bombay) (b. 19th Aug., 1891).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1919; asst. exec. engr., May, 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1924; dep. secty. to govt., P.W.D. (roads and bldgs.), Bombay, March, 1934; supgt. engr. (prov. perm.), Apl., 1939.

GREENWAY, CHARLES MERVYN, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 19th Apl., 1886).—Ret'd., Oct., 1935.*

GREENWOOD, DAVID ABERNEATHY, Jail Dept., Madras (supgt.) (b. 13th March, 1887).—Joined the service, 14th Nov., 1919; supt., central jail, Vizagapatam, 1st Nov., 1920; awarded K.-i-H. medal (2nd class), Jan., 1924; offg. supt., Alipuram jail, Bellary, variously from Dec., 1924.

GREENWOOD, EDWARD JOSEPH BERNAL, M.Sc., M.I.E.E., M.I.E. (Ind.) (supgt. engr., elec., electricity dept., Madras) (b. 16th Sept., 1886).—Joined the service as elec. inspr. to Govt., 25th Feb., 1913; elec. inspr., Jan., 1933; supgt. engr., July, 1939.

GREGORY, ALBERT EDWARD, India Office (hr. clerical officer, acct.-genl.'s dept.) (b. 12th Feb., 1900).—Apptd. clerical officer, 16th Apl., 1920; actg. higher ditto, July, 1935; confd., Aug., 1936; actg. hr. exec. offcr., milty. dept., July, 1940.

GREGORY, MARCAR SHERIDAN, O.B.E., M.C., V.D., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 23rd June, 1888).—Ret'd., May, 1935.*

GREGORY, RALPH, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 11th Dec., 1908).—Educ. at Univ. Coll., London, and Keble Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. magte., Jan., 1935.

GREGORY, SIR THEODOR EMANUEL GUGENHEIM, D.Sc. (b. 10th Sept., 1890).—Apptd. econ. advr. to the govt. of India, Jan., 1938; kt., June, 1942.

GREGORY, WALTER GASPER, Barr., Judt. Dept., Bengal.—Acted as addl. judge, high ct., from 27th March, 1925, to 27th Aug., 1925, and from 9th Nov., 1925, to 11th March, 1926; offg. judge, high ct., March to Aug., 1926, Nov., 1926, to Aug., 1927, and again from Nov., 1927.

GREGORY MOSES, RALPH, Indian C.S.—Name changed to GREGORY, RALPH (q.v.).

GREGSON, WILLIAM, late Indian Agricl. Service (Burma) (b. 28th July, 1892).—Ret'd., Sept., 1939.*

GREVAL, SHIVA DEVA SINGH, M.D., Ch.B., D.P.H., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. (imp. serologist, Calcutta) (b. 31st Dec., 1892).—First commn. dated 1st March, 1922; in milty. employ prior to 22nd Sept., 1926, when he joined the central research inst., Kasauli; imp. serologist, May, 1943.

GREWAL, BALBIR SINGH, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 28th Aug., 1912).—Educ. at Government High Sch., Ludhiana, the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London, and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 23rd Sept., 1936; arrived in India, Dec., 1936, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sub. divl. offcr., Apl., 1938; judge, small cause ct., Simla, Feb., 1942, to Apl., 1942.

GREY, CHARLES ROBERT, M.B.E., Indian State Rlys. (div. mech. engr. and works manager, N.W. Rly.) (b. 20th Oct., 1894).—Joined service, Dec., 1910; asst. mech. engr., junr. scale, N.W. rly., July, 1927; div. mech. engr., provl., senr. scale, Jan., 1939; confd., Jan., 1940; M.B.E., Jan., 1942.

GRIEVE, WILLIAM, C.I.E., M.A., B.Sc., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 21st March, 1885).—Joined the service, 9th Nov., 1914; educt. inspr. in Sind, July, 1923; offg. inspr. of European schools, Bombay Presby., Apl., 1924; offg. dep. dir. of public instn., Apl., 1928; confd., Sept., 1929; offg. dir., ditto, Feb., 1932; confd., Aug., 1936; C.I.E., June, 1938; ex-officio jt. secty. to the govt. of Bombay, genl. and educt. depts., March, 1939; ret'd., March, 1940.

GRIFFIN, SIR ARTHUR CECIL, O.B.E., B.Sc. (secty., rly. bd.) (b. 30th March, 1888).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1911; on mil. duty from 5th Nov., 1914; O.B.E., Jan., 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1920; offg. dep. agent, Apl., 1933; divl. supt. (sen.), Nov., 1934; dep. chief engr. (prov. perm.), Feb., 1938; perm., Oct., 1939; secty., rly. bd., May, 1938; genl. manager, N.W. rly., Feb., 1941.

GRIFFIN, FREDERICK CHARLES, M.I.C.E., late Public Health Dept., Bengal (b. 20th Feb., 1883).—Ret'd., 1939.*

GRIFFIN, LANCELOT CECIL LEPEL, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 5th Jan., 1900).—Educ. at Wellington Coll., and Christ Church, Oxford; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1923; arrived, 17th Dec., 1923, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. commr., Nalmi Tal, March, 1925; jt. mag., Nov., 1925; under-sec. to agent to govr.-genl. in C.I., Nov., 1927; asst. pte. secty. to Viceroy, Apl., 1929; secty. to A.G.G., Punjab States, March, 1932; commr., Ajmer-Merwara, Apl., 1936; addl. dep. secty., pol. dept., Apl., 1937; pol. agent, Orissa States, Oct., 1939; also resdt. at Jaipur, Nov., 1940; C.I.E., Jan., 1942; counsellor, Brit. legation, Kabul, Apl., 1942; sec. to crown representative, Jan., 1944; confd., Aug., 1944.

GRIFFITH, ARTHUR LAWRENCE, Indian

Forest Service (b. 24th May, 1903).—Joined the service, 17th Dec., 1926; dep. consvr., Nov., 1930; sylviculturist, forest research inst., Dehra Dun, Dec., 1940.

GRIFFITH, FRANCIS GORDON, O.B.E., Indian State Rlys. (divl. transpn. officer, N.W. Rly.) (b. 23rd Nov., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., 1st Apl., 1913; on spl. duty, rly. bd., March, 1920; asst. dist. traffic supt., Jan., 1922; in milty. employ from July, 1924, to March, 1926; O.B.E., June, 1926; transpn. officer, Aug., 1926; statistical officer, Apl., 1929; divl. supt., senr., July, 1940; dep. c.c.m., provl., Dec., 1940.

GRIFFITH, SIR RALPH EDWIN HOTCHKIN, K.C.S.I., C.I.E., Lieut.-Col., I.A., rettd. (b. 4th March, 1882).—Retd., Sept., 1937.*

GRIFFITHS, CHRISTOPHER HOWARD, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 11th Nov., 1883).—Retd., Nov., 1938.*

GRIFFITHS, DAVID THOMAS, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 10th Oct., 1896).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 1st Jan., 1923; offg. dep. consvr., Aug., 1924; confd., Feb., 1927; offg. consvr., July, 1941.

GRIFFITHS, JOHN COLDWELL, B.A., Indian C.S. (sub. collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 30th Apl., 1913).—Educ. at Swansea Gr. Sch., and Jesus Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 2nd Oct., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub. collr. and jt. mag., March, 1939.

GRIFFITHS, PERCIVAL JOSEPH, C.I.E., B.A. (Cantab.), B.Sc. (Lond.), late Indian C.S. (Bengal) (b. 15th Jan., 1899).—Retd., Aug., 1937.*

GRIFFITHS, WILLIAM THOMAS, Indian State Rlys. (dep. agent (staff), G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 20th Aug. 1888).—Joined the service, 1st May, 1916; 3rd. asst. secty., May, 1921; offg. publicity supt., Apl., 1923; asst. traffic manager, Oct., 1923; divl. ditto, Feb., 1929; offg. dep. agent, G.I.P. rly., July, 1933; confd., Dec., 1935; dep. traffic manager, provl., Apl., 1940.

GRIGG, SIR PERCY JAMES, K.C.B., K.C.S.I. (b. 16th Dec., 1890).—Member, govt.-genl.'s exec. council, May, 1934, to Apl., 1939.*

GRIGSON, WILFRED VERNON, C.S.I., B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 11th Oct., 1896).—Educ. at St. John's Sch., Leatherhead, and Christ Church, Oxford; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1920; arrived, 3rd Dec., 1920, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., March, 1925; and again, March, 1931; confd., Apl., 1934; on foreign service as adminr., Bastar State, March, 1927; aboriginal tribes enq. offr., May, 1940; jt. sec to govt., Sept., 1940; sec. to govr., Apl., 1941; on depn. to H.E.H. the Nizam's govt., March, 1942; C.S.I., Jan., 1945.

GRILLE, SIR FREDERICK LOUIS, M.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (chief justice, high ct., Nagpur) (b. 20th Feb., 1889).—Educ. at Harrow, and Jesus Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived, 22nd Nov., 1913, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; serving under govt. of India, army dept., from Oct., 1917, to Oct., 1919; sub-judge, Central Provs., Oct., 1919; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1920; confd., Dec., 1926; offg. legal remembr. and secty. to govt., legal dept., Oct., 1927; offg. addl. judl. commr., July, 1931; confd., March, 1934; offg. judl. commr., June, 1933; confd., Jan., 1935; judge, high ct., Nagpur, Jan., 1936; kt., May, 1937; apptd. chief justice, Oct., 1943.

GRINDAL, ALAN DOUGLAS, late Punjab C.S. (b. 14th Dec., 1881).—Retd., Dec., 1936.*

GRINDAL, ERIC BERTRAM WOOD, O.B.E., late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 25th Oct., 1885).—Held non-gazetted appt. from 30th March, 1904; senior acct., Apl., 1920; accts. officer, central accts. office, July, 1929; dep. acct.-genl., central revs., Apl., 1932; offg. acct.-genl., ditto, Aug., 1934; offg. ch. auditor, rly. clearing accts., March, 1936; offg. compr., N.W.F.P., July, 1936; audit officer, Indian Stores dept., Sept., 1936; compr., Sind, Jan., 1937; O.B.E., June, 1939; rettd., Nov., 1941.

GRINDLEY, ARCHIBALD PERCIVAL REGINALD, Indian State Rlys. (divl. transpn. officer, N.W. Rly.) (v. Sept., 1892).—Asst. traffic supt., Oct., 1914; divl. transpn. officer., May, 1935.

GRIST, FREDERIC EDWIN, C.I.E., India Office (asst. secty., finl. dept.) (b. 9th Nov., 1883).—Educ. at King's Coll. Sch.; apptd. clerk 2nd class, registry and record dept., 23rd Jan., 1902; attached to mil. dept., May to Oct., 1907; transfed. to mil. dept., Nov., 1912; minor staff clerk, March, 1917; staff clerk, June, 1919; principal, Oct., 1921; actg. asst. secty., July, 1931; secty., capitation rate tribunal, Nov., 1932; asst. secty., finl. dept., Dec., 1934; C.I.E., June, 1938.

GRUER, HAROLD GEORGE, M.A., Barr., late Indian C.S. (b. 6th May, 1886).—Educ. at Robert Gordon's Coll., Aberdeen, Aberdeen Univ., and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 26th Nov., 1910, and served in the Central Provs., as asst. commr.; addl. sr. sub-judge, July to Oct., 1915; sub-judge, June, 1917; on mil. service (I.A.R.O.), Nov., 1917, to March, 1919; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1923; confd., Nov., 1925; offg. addl. judl. commr., June, 1934; and again, Sept., 1935; judge, high ct., Nagpur, Jan., 1936; rettd., Oct., 1943.

GRUNDY, ERIC EDMUND LEIGH, O.B.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 6th Apl., 1888).—Joined the service as princpl., technical sch., Jamalpur, 29th Sept., 1924; O.B.E., June, 1941; rettd., Apl., 1943.

GUBBAY, MOSES MORDECAI SIMEON, C.S.I., C.I.E., late Indian C.S.—Retd., Apl., 1921; apptd. commr. for I.C.S. Family Pension Fund, Oct., 1937.*

GUGGALI, GURUSIDDAPPA HOOVAPPA, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bombay) (b. 18th Oct., 1897).—Educ. at Fergusson Coll., Poona, and Trinity Hall, Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 6th Jan., 1922, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1932; confd., Oct., 1933.

GUHA, BRAJA KANTA, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 3rd July, 1900).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ., and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1924; arrived, 8th Dec., 1924, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; under-secty. to govt. of Bengal, fin. commerce and marine depts., March, 1929; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1931; K.-i-H. medal, 1st class, Feb., 1937; dist. and sess. judge, confd., Jan., 1938.

GUHA, SURENDRA KUMAR, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (suprg. engr., Bengal) (b. 4th May, 1894).—Joined the service, 7th Jan., 1920; asst. exec. engr., Apl., 1923; exec. engr., Jan., 1930; suptg. engr., March, 1942.

GUHA, SURENDRA NATH, RAI BAHADUR, M.A., B.L., late Bengal Judi. Dept. (b. 11th Nov., 1876).—Retd., Nov., 1937.*

GUHA RAY, SAILENDRA NATH, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 14th Nov., 1899).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ., and Lincoln Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1924; arrived, 8th Dec., 1924, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1930; confd., Jan., 1938.

GUHA-THAKURTA, S.C., M.A., Bengal C.S. (b. 8th Sept., 1901).—Apptd. information officer, home dept., govt. of India, May, 1936.

GUL MUHAMMAD KHAN, B.A., Indian Police (supt.) (b. 8th Feb., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. supt., N.W.F.P., on 30th Jan., 1923; offg. supt., Jan., 1931; confd., June, 1934.

GULAM HUSSAIN RAHIMTULLA KHAIRAZ (see Khairaz, G. H. R.).

GUMBLETON, JOHN GILLUM MAXWELL, Indian Police (supt.) (b. 13th Sept., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bombay, on 17th Nov., 1922; offg. supt., Jan., 1926; confd., Jan., 1934; dep. inspr.-genl., states of W.I., Oct., 1936 to March, 1943.

GUMBRILL, ARTHUR, Indian State Rlys. (publicity officer, E.I. Rly.) (b. 15th June, 1887).—Joined the service as publicity officer (tempy.), 15th March, 1927; confd., Dec., 1928; offg. central publicity officer, Indian State rlys., Apl., 1933, and again, Apl., 1937.

GUNDEVIA, YEZDEZARD DINSHAW, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 19th June, 1908).—Educ. at Bombay Univ., and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr., asst. settl. officer, Oct., 1936.

GUNDIL, NARAYAN RAMKRISHNA, B.A., LL.B., late Judl. Dept., Bombay (b. 22nd Feb., 1885).—Joined the service, 20th Nov., 1913; asst. judge, Dec., 1933; offg. dist. and sess. judge variously from Dec., 1931; confd., May, 1938; ret'd., Feb., 1940; apptd. judicial member, income tax appellate tribunal, Apl., 1941.

GUNDY, ARTHUR ROBERT, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 15th Nov., 1881).—Ret'd., Nov., 1936.*

GUNJIKAR, KASHINATH RAMCHANDRA, M.A. (Cantab.), B.Sc. (Bom.), Indian Educl. Service (prof., R.I. of Science, Bombay) (b. 8th March, 1894).—Joined the service as prof. of maths., Elph. Coll., Bombay, 7th June, 1925; ditto, R.I. of Science, Bombay, Nov., 1926.

GUNN, JOHN PATERSON, late Indian Service of Engrs. (Punjab) (b. 31st Oct., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1913; I.A.R.O., from 7th Sept., 1916, to 11th Apl., 1920; asst.; exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1922; pers. asst. to ch. engr., Nov., 1927; dir., irrig. research inst., Lahore, in addn., June, 1935, to Nov., 1936; ret'd., 29th July, 1941.

GUNNING CARDWELL SINCLAIR, O.B.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Assam) (b. 28th Jan., 1889).—Educ. at Bedford Gr. Sch., and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 30th Nov., 1912, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; acting under-sec. to chief commr., Sept., 1916; confd., Dec., 1916 on mil duty, I.A.R.O., Oct., 1918, to Jan., 1919; offg. dep. commr., May, 1923; confd., Sept., 1928; O.B.E., June, 1942.

GUPTA, ARUN CHANDRA, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr.) (b. 30th Oct., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Bengal, 3rd Dec., 1926; dep. consvr., Nov., 1930.

GUPTA, ASHOK CHANDRA, O.B.E., M.A., late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 4th Nov., 1884).—Ret'd., Dec., 1939.*

GUPTA, AVADH BEHARI (see Avadh Behari G.).

GUPTA, BINODE BIHARI, late Indian Police (Assam) (b. Apl., 1885).—Joined the service, 15th Apl., 1905; inspr., Dec., 1928; dep. supt., 1929; promoted to I.P. as addl. supt., July, 1932; supt., Aug., 1937; ret'd., Apl., 1940.

GUPTA, BIRENDRA CHANDRA, A.I.E.E., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 10th Dec., 1881).—Joined the service, 28th Jan., 1913; prof., civil engrg. coll., May, 1919; princpl., Dacca engrg. sch., May, 1933; ret'd., July, 1938.

GUPTA, CHANDRA PRAKASH, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag.) (b. 8th Oct., 1919).—Educ. at Modern High Sch., Delhi, Delhi Univ., and Clare Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn. after seln. in July, 1932, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag.

GUPTA, HARISH CHANDRA, M.Sc., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 15th July, 1910).—Educ. at Ewing Christian Coll., Allahabad, University of Allahabad, and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 6th Sept., 1935; arrived in India, Oct., 1935, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Nov., 1936; addl. dist. mag., Apl., 1941; addl. land collr., Feb., 1943.

GUPTA, HIRENDRA NATH, B.Sc., Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 23rd Nov., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bengal, on 16th Aug., 1924; offg. supt., March, 1931; confd., Apl., 1937.

GUPTA, IRESH CHANDRA, M.Sc., A.I.C., His Majesty's Mint, Bombay (b. 11th March, 1898).—Joined the service, 30th Aug., 1921, as dep. assay master; offg. assay master, Apl., 1922; March, 1923, and Sept., 1926.

GUPTA, JYOTISH CHANDRA, B.A., late Income-tax Dept., Bengal (b. Dec., 1884).—Joined the service, Apl., 1910; held non-gaz. appts. prior to 8th March, 1916; sub-dy. collr., Burdwan, March, 1916; income-tax officer, Apl., 1922; confd. as asst. commr. of income-tax, May, 1934; ret'd., Dec., 1939.

GUPTA, KULADA CHARAN DAS (see Das Gupta, K.C.).

GUPTA, LAKSHMAN SARUP (see Lakshman, S. G.).

GUPTA, NIRMAL CHANDRA SEN, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 7th July, 1918).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1941; served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

GUPTA, PANNA LAL, Indian State Railways (exec. engr., E.I. Rly.) (b. 16th Jan., 1896).—Asst. engr., 24th Sept., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr. (provl.), 1937; confd., Oct., 1938.

GUPTA, RADHA KRISHANA (see Radha, K.G.).

GUPTA, RAGHUVANSH LAL, M.Sc. (Allbd.), Indian C.S. (jt. fin. advr., food) (b. 7th Aug., 1905).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ., and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under secty. to govt. fin. dept., Bihar and Orissa, Apl., 1934; and again, Feb., 1936; offg. dep. secty., ditto, Oct., 1936; under-secty., fin. dept., govt. of India, Oct., 1937; fin. sec., bd. of rev., Oct., 1939; dep. sec., fin., Apl., 1940; contr. for. trade, Calcutta, May, 1941; dep. finl. advr., supply fin., March, 1942; ditto, food, Jan.,

1943; jt. finl. advr., foreign (food), March, 1943.
GUPTA, RANJIT KUMAR, B.A., Indian Police, Bengal (b. 9th Feb., 1920).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., after exam. of 1941.

GUPTA, RANJIT, Indian C.S. (ch. presdy. mag., Bengal) (b. 1st Feb., 1906).—Educ. at University Coll., Aberystwyth, and King's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Nov., 1930; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1935; offg. mag. and collr., Sept., 1935; addtl. dist. mag., Jan., 1936; ch. presdy. mag., Calcutta (confd.), Apl., 1937.

GUPTA, SAMARENDRA NATH, Dept. of Industries, Punjab (princl., Mayo sch. of arts) (b. 29th March, 1887).—Joined the service as asst. princpl., Mayo sch. of arts, 2nd Jan., 1914; vice-princl., ditto, May, 1928; princpl., ditto, Nov., 1929.

GUPTA, SARAT KUMAR DUTTA, M.A., M.B.E., late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 17th June, 1881).—Retd., June, 1936*; re-empld. in dept. of war transport, govt. of India, July, 1943.

GUPTA, SATYENDRA NATH, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (collr., customs, Karachi) (b. 29th July, 1895).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., London, and Trinity Hall, Cambridge; joined the service, 23rd Oct., 1918; arrived, 10th Jan., 1919, and posted to Bengal; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Jan., 1921; offg. asst. collr. of customs, Calcutta, 1922; offg. mag. and collr., Dec., 1925; confd., Aug., 1930; offg. dep. Indian trade commr. in London, July, 1928; offg. Indian trade commr., Nov., 1929; trade commr. Hamburg, March, 1931; C.I.E., June, 1935; collr. of customs, Bombay Oct., 1939; ditto, Karachi, Dec., 1937; and again, Jan., 1940.

GUPTA, SEN (see Sen Gupta).
GUPTA, SHAIBAL KUMAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 26th Feb., 1902).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ., and Jesus Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 29th Oct., 1925; arrived, 7th Dec., 1925, and served in Bengal as asst. collr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, March, 1932; addl. ditto, 24-Parganas, Aug., 1935; dist. and sess. judge, confd., Jan., 1939.

GUPTA, SHAMLAL, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Central Provs.) (b. 15th Apl., 1897).—Joined the service, 21st Oct., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1929; on for service under Delhi municipal cte., March, 1939.

GUPTA, SHORLINDRA CHANDRA, M.A. (Can- tab.), Indian Finance Dept. (b. 20th Feb., 1892).—Joined the service, 20th May, 1916; currency officer, Cawnpore, Apl., 1922; under-secty., fin. secty., govt. of India, Dec., 1925; offg. under-secty. for. and pol. dept., Aug., 1930; audit officer, Indian stores dept., Nov., 1931; offg. dep. govt. exr., B.N. rly., Feb., 1933; exr., outside audit dept., Bengal, Dec., 1933; comptr., Assam, Feb., 1935; acct.-genl., Cent. Provs. and Berar, Dec., 1939; confd. as acct.-genl., Oct., 1942; dir. of audit, def. services, Oct., 1943.

GUPTA, SUKANAR, M.A., Indian Police (supi., Bengal) (b. 1st Jan., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bengal, on 7th Dec., 1922; addl. supt., March, 1928; offg. supt., March, 1931; confd., Oct., 1932.

GUPTA, SUNNY, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 6th March, 1905).—Apptd. asst. exec. engr., Bengal, 14th Apl., 1931; exec. engr., Aug., 1937.

GUPTA, SURESH CHANDRA, RAI BAHADUR,

M.A., late India Posts and Tels. (b. 10th Aug., 1881).—Retd., Aug., 1936.*

GURBACHAN SINGH, SARDAR, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 15th Dec., 1902).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 26th Oct., 1925; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1926; exec. engr., Oct., 1935.

GURBAKHSH SINGH, SARDAR BAHADUR, B.A., M.B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs., Punjab (b. 15th Jan., 1883).—Retd., Jan., 1938.*

GURCHARN DAS, LALA, MEHTA, Rai Sahib, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Punjab) (b. 11th March, 1887).—Joined the service, 18th Oct., 1900; asst. engr., Oct., 1910; exec. engr., Apl., 1920; offg. suptg. engr., June, 1933; subst. ditto, March, 1937; retd., 11th March, 1942.

GURDIAL SINGH, Indian Police (b. 15th June, 1908).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., 3rd Feb., 1932; confd., Feb., 1934.

GURDIAL SUNDER SINGH, M.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bombay) (b. 22nd July, 1899).—Joined the service, 9th Nov., 1923; asst. consvr., Dec., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927; personal asst. to insp.-genl. of forests and presdt., forest research inst., Dehra Dun, Nov., 1940.

GURJAR, NARAYAN PANDURANG, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bombay) (b. 12th Apl., 1895).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 7th Oct., 1919; asst. engr., Oct., 1920; offg. exec. engr., Oct., 1928; confd., Oct., 1929; conslg. p.h. engr. to govt., Sind (in addn.), Apl., 1938; transf. to Bombay, Aug., 1939.

GURNER, CYRIL WALTER, C.S.I., Indian C.S. (commissioner, Bengal) (b. 18th Jan., 1888).—Educ. at Merchant Taylors' Sch., London, Oriel Coll., Oxford, and Univ. Coll. London; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 4th Dec., 1911, and served in Eastern Bengal and Assam as asst. mag. and collr.; transf. to Bengal, Apl., 1912; under-secty. to govt. genl. dept., Sept., 1915; dep. chairman, Calcutta Corpn., July, 1918; dep. sec. to govt., of Bengal, pol. and appt. dept., Sept., 1923; mag. and collr., March, 1925; secty., govt. of Bengal, local self-govt. dept., March, 1929; offg. chairman, Calcutta Improvement trust, March, 1933; confd., Dec., 1934; confd. as commr. of a divn., Feb. 1938; spec. offr. (land rev. commn.), rev. dept., Apl., 1940; C.S.I., Jan., 1941; spec. offr., public health dept., Feb., 1943.

GURNEY, WILFRED ERIC, V.D., A.M.I.C.E., Indian State Ryis. (divl. engr., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 2nd Dec., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 16th Nov., 1911; on milty. service, 16th Nov., 1914, to 1st Oct., 1919; resdt. engr., Oct., 1919; divl. engr., Oct., 1930; offg. dep. ch. engr. (bridges), July, 1936.

GUTHRIE, ALAN, M.B.E., late Dept. of Industries, Madras (b. 1st June, 1881).—Retd., Aug., 1935.*

GWYER, SIR MAURICE LINFORD, K.C.B., K.C.S.I., D.C.L., K.C.—Member of Indian States Enquiry Committee, 1932; late First Parliamentary Counsel to the Treasury; apptd. first Chief Justice of India, Oct., 1937; retd., 25th Apl., 1943.

GWYN, AYLMER HAMOND, Lieut.-Col., I.A., retd., late Survey of India (b. 13th Feb., 1883).—Retd., Oct., 1934.*

GWYNN, JOHN PETER LUCIUS, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr. and mag., Madras) (b. 22nd June,

1916).—Educ. at St. Columba's Coll., Rathfarnham, Co. Dublin, Trinity Coll., Dublin, and University Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 10th Oct., 1938; confd., 9th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.

GWYTHER, CYRIL EDRYK, B.A., F.S.S., late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 3rd March, 1882).—Retd., May, 1936.*

GYAN NATH, RAI BAHADUR, Raja, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian Political Service (b. Feb., 1885).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 9th July, 1909, to 22nd Aug., 1913; extra asst. commr., Jan., 1916; under-secty. to agent to govr.-genl., Punjab States, Jan., 1922; on foreign service to Nabha State, 1st May, 1928; presdt., council of regency, Nabha state, March, 1932; C.I.E., Jan., 1934; Raja as hereditary distinction, June, 1938; prime minister and vice-president, Council of State, Jaipur, Oct., 1939; retd., Feb., 1940.

GYAN SINGH, BHAI, B.A., late Income Tax Dept., Punjab (b. 28th Aug., 1884).—Joined the service, 6th May, 1911; income tax collr., Jan., 1923; extra asst. commr., Oct., 1924; offg. asst. commr., June, 1926; confd., Jan., 1931; offg. commr., Punjab and N.W.F.P., Apl., 1938, to Aug., 1939; retd., Aug., 1939.

GYANI, SUNDRA SINGH, Sardar Bahadur, B.A., Indian State Rlys. (divl. transpn. offcr., N.W. Rly.) (b. 14th May, 1893).—Asst. traffic supt., Oct., 1914; divl. transpn. offcr., May, 1935; dep. ch. opterg. supt. (prov.), Oct., 1942.

GYAW, U., B.A., B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (supg. engr., Burma) (b. 6th March, 1891).—Temp. service as agric. engr. from 3rd Jan., 1919; agric. engr., Oct., 1920; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1924; offg. supt. engr., March, 1936; confd., May, 1939.

GYAW, U ON, O.B.E., Indian Police (dist. supt., Burma) (b. 8th June, 1887).—Apptd. asst. dist. supt., Apl., 1920; dist. supt., Jan., 1924; O.B.E., June, 1932.

GYI, SIR JOSEPH AUGUSTUS MAUNG, Kt., Barr., Burma Judl. Dept. (b. 31st Dec., 1872).—Minister in charge of agric., excise and forest depts., Burma, Jan., 1923; apptd. judge, high ct., Rangoon, Nov., 1924; member of govr's exec. council, Burma, July, 1926; kt., Jan., 1927; actg.-govr., Burma, Aug., 1930; minister, govt. of Burma, May, 1932; minister for transf. subjects, Jan., 1933; member, Burma legisl. council, Oct., 1932; pres. of the Senate, Aug., 1940.

GYI, U THA DIN, Barr., Burma Judl. Service (b. 18th Oct., 1890).—Apptd. second judge, small cause courts, Rangoon, 21st Apl., 1925; offg. ch. judge, ditto, Nov., 1932.

HABIBULLAH, MUHAMMAD (see Muhammed H.).

HABIBUR, RAHMAN, Khan Bahadur, Indian Police (supt.) (b. 10th May, 1894).—Joined the service, 2nd Jan., 1918; Khan Bahadur, 1933; appointed to I.P. as supt., Bengal, Apl., 1937.

HACKFORTH, PERCY, A.M.I.C.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 23rd June, 1880).—Retd., Feb., 1937.*

HACKNEY, NORMAN, B.Sc., Indian State Rlys. (chemist and metallurgist, N.W. Rly.) (b. 18th Nov., 1891).—Apptd. asst. chemist and metallurgist, G.I.P. rly., 26th June, 1919; chemist and metallurgist, N.W. rly., Apl., 1927; dep. dir., munitions production, dept. of supply.

HADDON, JOHN REID, O.B.E., B.Sc., M.R.C.V.S., D.V.S.M., Indian Vety. Service (vety. research officer) (b. 4th Apl., 1896).—Joined

the service, 24th Aug., 1923; dep. dir., imp. vety. serum inst., May, 1930; vety. research officer (serology), May, 1933; dep. director, Impl. vety. research inst., and offr.-in-charge, pathology and bacteriology sect., July, 1940; O.B.E., Jan., 1941.

HADOW, SIR RAYMOND PATRICK, Kt., C.I.E., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs (Punjab) (b. 26th March, 1879).—Retd., March, 1934.*

HADOW, REGINALD MICHAEL, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commn., Cent. Provs.) (b. 17th Aug., 1915).—Educ. at Berkhamsted and King's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 5th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in the Cent. Provs. as asst. commr.; a.d.c. to govr., May, 1941; pol. offr., Trucial court, May, 1944; vice commr., Bushire, Nov., 1944.

HAEGERT, GOTTFRIED ERNEST JOHN, late Public Works Dept., Punjab (b. 8th Aug., 1883).—Retd., Aug., 1938.*

HAFAZAT HUSSAIN, Indian C.S. (collr. and mag., United Provs.) (b. 28th Feb., 1902).—Educ. at Univ. of Patna and Allahabad, and Caius Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 22nd Oct., 1926; arrived, Nov., 1926, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; under-secty., industries and labour dept., govt. of India, June, 1930; offg. mag. and collr., Jan., 1934; dep. secty. to govt., United Provs., industries branch (temp.), Apl., 1935; collr. and mag. (confd.), Aug., 1939; dir. of industries, etc., Assam, Feb., 1941; sec. to govt., United Provs., Oct., 1942.

HAFIZUDDIN, A. K. MUHAMMAD, B.A., Indian Police (b. 15th Jan., 1909).—Joined the service as asst. supt. of police, Bengal, on probn., 21st Apl., 1933; confd., May, 1935.

HAFEEZ, MUHAMMAD ABDUL (see Abdul, H. M.).

HAIDER, AGHA (see Agha Haider).

HAIG, GEOFFREY ALEXANDER, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 99th May, 1900).—Educ. at Winchester and Trinity Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr., asst. settlt. offcr., Oct., 1936; on spec. duty, Dec., 1937, to May, 1938.

HAIG, SIR HARRY GRAHAM, K.C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 13th Apl., 1881).—Educ. at Winchester and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1904; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1905, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr., and asst. commr.; special duty in fin. dept. of govt. of India, Apl., 1910; under-sec. to govt., United Provs., June, 1910, to May, 1912; commr. of municipalities, Indore State, Dec., 1912, to May, 1915; apptd. to the I.A.R.O., May, 1915; reverted from milty. duty, Apl., 1919; dep. sec., fin dept., govt. of India, Dec., 1919, to Nov., 1920; secty., Indian fiscal commn., 1921-1922; mag. and collr., Sept., 1922; C.I.E., June, 1923; on special duty with royal commn. on superior civil services in India, 1923-24; offg. pte. sec. to the Viceroy, Jan., 1925; offg. sec. to govt. of India, home dept., Apl., 1926; confd., Dec., 1926; C.S.I., Jan., 1930; temp. member, exec. council of govr.-genl., March-July, 1930; attended Indian round table conf., London, Nov., 1930-Jan., 1931; member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council, March, 1932; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1933; govr., United Provs., Dec., 1934, to Dec., 1939; retd., May, 1940.

HAIG, WOLSELEY DE HAGA, C.I.E., D.S.O.,

Lieut.-Col., R.E., retd., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 25th Aug., 1884).—Retd., Aug., 1939.*

HAIGH, FRANK FRASER, C.I.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (chief engr., Punjab) (b. 4th Feb., 1891).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1913; in milty. employ, 1916-19; exec. engr., Oct., 1922; under-sec. to govt. P.W.D. (irrig.), Apl., 1927; chief engr. and sec., govt. Punjab, Sept., 1941; C.I.E., June, 1944.

HAILES, MARTIN HUNTER, Indian State Ryls. (dist. traffic supt., Burma Ryls.) (b. 19th Apl., 1885).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., 29th July, 1908; dist. traffic supt., Nov., 1928.

HAILEY, PHILIP COTES, Maj., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 20th Jan., 1903).—First commn., 1st Feb., 1923; in milty. employ to Sept., 1927; under-secty. to A.G.G. and ch. commr. in Baluchistan, Dec., 1929; asst. to pol. agent, Kalat, Apl., 1930; asst. pol. agt., S. Waziristan, Oct., 1931; offg. under-secty., for and pol. dept., June, 1933; Brit. trade agent, Gyanthe, and asst. to pol. officer in Sikkim, Dec., 1933; confd., March, 1937; offcr. on spec. duty, f. & p. dept., July, 1936; under-secty., f. and p. dept., Aug., 1936; under-secty., pol. dept., Apl., 1937; dep. ditto, March, 1938; first asst. to resdt. in Kashmir, Oct., 1938; counsellor, Brit. Legn., Kabul, Oct., 1940; sec., to resdt., Baroda and Gujarat states, Feb., 1943; pol. agt. W. Kathiawar agency, Nov., 1944.

HAILEY, BARON, WILLIAM MALCOLM HAILEY OF SHAHPUR AND NEWPORT PAGNELL, G.C.S.I., G.C.M.G., G.C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 15th Feb., 1872).—Retd., Dec., 1934.*

HAJARA, KARUNA KUMAR, M.A. (Cal.), Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 22nd Aug., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of Calcutta, and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 5th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928; and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1930; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1934; offg. dist. and sess. judge, var. from May, 1935.

HAKEWILL, CHARLES THOMAS LANCELOT, Indian Police (b. 31st Oct., 1915).—Apptd. asst. supt., Central Provs., on probn., Oct., 1936; addl. supt., Nov., 1941.

HAKIM RAI, LALA, Rai Bahadur, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 2nd Sept., 1897).—Joined the service, 17th Oct., 1921; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1931.

HAKSAR, SUNDAR NARAIN, M.A., B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 4th Dec., 1909).—Educ. at D.N. High Sch., Delhi, Punjab Univ., Delhi Univ., and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sub. divl. offr., Apl., 1935; p.a. to commr., Dec., 1936; addtl. dist. and sess. judge, Sept., 1940.

HAKUMAT RAI, DIWAN, M.C., M.D., Col., I.M.S. (insp.-genl., civil hosp., Cent. Provs.) (b. 15th May, 1883).—First commn., dated 27th July, 1907; in milty. employ to 21st Aug., 1921; offg. civil surg., Aug., 1921; confd., Nov., 1921; profcr., King Edward medl. coll., t., 1923; offg. insp.-genl. of civil hosp., njab, Apl., 1935; offg. dep. dir.-genl., I.M.S., v., 1935; insp.-genl., civil hosp., Central rovs., July, 1937.

HALDAR, MAYARTARU, M.A., B.L., late Bengal C.S. (b. 1st Feb., 1888).—Joined the

service, Aug., 1912; sub. judge, Dec., 1934; dist. and sess. judge, May, 1938; retd., Feb., 1943.

HALDAR, SUDHANSU KUMAR, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 6th Dec., 1901).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ., and King's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1926; arrived, Dec., 1926, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Dec., 1927; commr. of excise and salt, Oct., 1932; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1933; confd., May, 1939.

HALDAR, SUDHINDRA KUMAR, C.I.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (commr., Bengal) (b. 4th Oct., 1891).—Educ. at Calcutta and London Univ.; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived, 21st Nov., 1915, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; asst. mag. and collr., Bengal, Apl., 1919; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1923; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1926; mag. and collr., July, 1928; dep. secty. to govt. of Bengal, fin., commerce and marine depts., July, 1929; sec., retrencht. ctee., Bengal, May, 1932; commr. of excise and salt, Bengal, Oct. to June, 1935; secty. to govt., local self govt. dept., June, 1935; secty., dept. of communications and works, Bengal, Apl., 1937; commr., June, 1939; C.I.E., June, 1943.

HALE, HARRY WILLIAM, B.Sc., Indian Police (b. 5th Feb., 1903).—Joined the service as asst. supt., N.W.F.P., on 20th Nov., 1923; dist. officer, frontier constaby., March, 1930; secty., frontier regns. ctee., May, 1931; on spl. duty under dir., intel. bureau, Nov., 1936, to Sept., 1937; asst. insp.-genl., traffic and sec., Punjab provl. transp. authy., Sept., 1941; on spec. duty, addtl. I.G. police office, Oct., 1941; princpl., police trng. sch., Phillaur, March, 1942.

HALES, THOMAS CHRISTMAS, V.D., late Indian State Ryls. (b. 15th Dec., 1885).—Joined the service, 1st Jan., 1908, as asst. traffic supt.; dist. ditto, July, 1917; offg. dep. ch. comml. manager, Jan., 1928; senr. asst. comml., Apl., 1929; and again, Apl., 1931; offg. divl. supt., Apl., 1929; offg. dep. ch. operating supt. (movements), Feb., 1932; offg. divl. supt. (senr.), N.W. rly., variously from Jan., 1933; dep. ch. comml. manager, N.W. rly., Aug., 1933; offg. ch. ditto, Apl., 1935; divl. supt. (senr.), July, 1939; retd., Dec., 1940.

HALFHIDE, ROBERT ALFRED, M.B.E., late Printing and Stationery Dept. (b. 5th Dec., 1886).—Held non-gazetted appt. from 8th Feb., 1904; supt., May, 1920; dep. contr., March, 1924; M.B.E., June, 1936; retd., Dec., 1941.

HALFORD, DAVID REECE CHARLES, B.A., B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Sind) (b. 14th Sept., 1910).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge, and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; apptd. after exam. of 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

HALIFAX, VISCOUNT, Rt. Hon. EDWARD FREDERICK LINDLEY WOOD, K.G., P.C., G.C.S.I., G.C.I.E.—Viceroy and governor-general of India, 3rd Apl., 1926, to 17th Apl., 1931.

HALIM, ABDUL, Munshi (see Abdul Halim).

HALL, ARTHUR GEORGE, Indian State Ryls. (exec. engr.) (b. 7th Nov., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; confd., Jan., 1922; exec. engr., June, 1929; govt. insp. ryls., Burma, Apl., 1937, to Apl., 1938; exec. engr., N.W. rly., Apl., 1938; confd. (prov.

exec. engr., N.W. rly., Apl., 1938; confd. (provl.), March, 1938.

HALL, DANIEL GEORGE EDWARD, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (Burma) (b. 17th Nov., 1891).—Retd., March, 1936.*

HALL, GEOFFREY FOWLER, Capt., C.I.E., M.C., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bihar) (b. 9th March, 1888).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1911; asst. engr., Nov., 1911; exec. engr., Oct., 1920; offg. suptg. engr., March, 1931, and again, Oct., 1933; confd., May, 1934; C.I.E. June, 1935; ch. engr. (temp.), Jan., 1936; offg. ch. engr. and secty. to govt. of Bihar, p.w.d., May, 1937; temp. ch. engr. and dep. secty. to govt. (irrign.), Oct., 1937; ch. engr. and secty. to govt., p.w.d., Apl., 1938.

HALL, HAROLD PERCIVAL, Capt., I.A. (b. 9th Sept., 1913).—Apptd. to I.P.S. on probn., Nov., 1937; asst. pol. agt. and colonisation officer., Nasirabad, Feb., 1944; confd. in I.P.S., May, 1944.

HALL, SIR JOHN FREDERICK, C.S.I., C.I.E., O.B.E., late Indian C.S. (chairman, Madras pub. serv. commn.) (b. 14th Apl., 1882).—Educ. at Hymer's Coll., Hull, and Clare Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1904; arrived, 11th Dec., 1905, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub. collr. and joint mag., Feb., 1913; offg. collr. and dist. mag., Feb., 1919; O.B.E., Dec., 1919; confd., Apl., 1925; sec. to govt. rev. dept., March, 1928; C.I.E., June, 1931; offg. 3rd member, bd. of rev., Madras, and commr. of land rev. and settlt., Feb., 1933; offg. 2nd member, ditto, July, 1933; 2nd member, ditto (provl.), and 1st member offg., May, 1935; C.S.I., Feb., 1937; kt., June, 1938; retd., Apl., 1940; chairman, Madras public serv. commn., Apl., 1940.

HALL, WILLIAM ÆNEAS, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Burma) (b. 26th March, 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1912; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1921; offg. exec. engr., Aug., 1926; confd., Apl., 1928; offg. suptg. engr., June, 1932; confd., Apl., 1938; retd., 26th March, 1944.

HALL, REV. WILLIAM JOHN, B.A., Indian Eccles. Establishment (United Provs.) (junr. chaplain) (b. 17th Feb., 1911).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., 17th Feb., 1938; junr. chaplain, Feb., 1940.

HALL, WILLIAM STIRLING, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 26th March, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr. on 20th Oct., 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1931; on mil. duty, Jan., 1942.

HALL, WILLIAM TELFORD, C.I.E., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (ch. consvr., United Provs.) (b. 2nd June, 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr. on 27th Feb., 1921; dep. consvr., Oct., 1922; instr., Forest coll., Dehra Dun., March, 1935, to Apl., 1938; consvr. (confd.), 1938; C.I.E., June, 1942; confd. as ch. consvr., Aug., 1941.

HALLAND, GORDON HERBERT RAMSAY, C.I.E., O.B.E., late Indian Police (b. 13th Apl., 1888).—Retd., Sept., 1933.*

HALLETT, SIR MAURICE GARNIER, G.C.I.E., K.C.S.I., B.A., Indian C.S. (gouv. of United Provs.) (b. 28th Oct., 1883).—Educ. at Winchester and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1906; arrived, 25th Nov., 1907, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transf. to Bihar and Orissa, Apl., 1912; under-sec. to govt., pol., appt. and educn. depts., March, 1913; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Apl., 1915; under-sec. to govt., pol., appt. and educn. depts., Nov.,

1915, to Feb., 1916; mag. and collr., Nov., 1920; ditto and sec. to govt., local self-govt. dept., Sept., 1922; offg. commr., Patna divn., 16th Aug., 1925, to 15th Oct., 1925; offg. ch. sec. to govt., Apl., 1927, and again June, 1930; offg. commr., Bhagalpur, March, 1929; C.I.E., Jan., 1930; offg. secty., govt. of India, home dept., July, 1932; confd., March, 1933; C.S.I., June, 1934; member, council of state, March, 1936; K.C.S.I., Feb., 1937; govr. of Bihar, March, 1937; actg. govr., United Provs., May to Sept., 1938; govr., United Provs., Dec., 1939; G.C.I.E., Jan., 1943.

HALLIDAY, ROBERT STIRRAT, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 11th Feb., 1909).—Educ. at Greenock High Sch., Glasgow Univ., and Wadham Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; asst. judge (under trng.), Aug., 1938.

HALLIDAY, REV. SYDNEY LANG, Indian Eccles. Estabt. (junr. chaplain).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., Bihar and Orissa, 12th Oct., 1932; confd., Oct., 1934.

HALLOWES, BASIL JOHN KNIGHT, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (commr., Ajmer-Merwara) (b. 27th Aug., 1884).—Educ. at Mill Hill, Caius Coll., Cambridge, and University Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1909, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag.; sec., municipal bd., Agra, Aug., 1913; under-sec. to govt., United Provs., Sept., 1916, to Apl., 1918; jt. mag., May, 1918; offg. as mag. and collr. from Nov. 1920; offg. dy. sec. to govt., industries dept., Oct., 1924; confd. as mag. and collr., Oct., 1925; dep. commr., Nov., 1927; offg. commr., variously from July, 1928; commr., Ajmer-Merwara, Apl., 1937; confd. as commr., Jan., 1940; C.I.E., Jan., 1941.

HALLOWS, HENRY COLIN, Indian Police (b. 23rd May, 1911).—Joined the service as prob. asst. supt., Punjab, 24th Nov., 1930; confd., Nov., 1932.

HALLOWS, RALPH INGHAM, Indian Police (b. 4th May, 1913).—Joined the service as prob. asst. supt., Punjab, Nov., 1932; confd., Nov., 1934; joined Indian police serv. on probn. under trng., Hyderabad, Oct., 1937; ditto, Punjab, June, 1938; asst. pol. agent, Bahrein, May, 1939; under-sec. to pol. resdt. in Persian Gulf, Oct., 1941; asst. pol. agt., Punjab hill states, March, 1943; ditto, Muscat, Oct., 1944.

HALLOWS, RICHARD MILNES, Indian Police (b. 14th Feb., 1916).—Apptd. asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., 10th Nov., 1935; confd., Nov., 1937.

HALLOWS, WILLIAM, late Factory Dept., Bombay (b. 28th July, 1891).—Retd., Aug., 1939.*

HAMBLING, REV. VICTOR FREDERICK, Indian Eccles. Estabt. (b. 27th Nov., 1896).—Apptd. junr. chaplain, 23rd Oct., 1929.

HAMID, ABUL FAZL ABDUL (see Abul, F. A. H.).

HAMID, AGHA ABDUL, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 2nd Aug., 1912).—Educ. at Nuslim High Sch., Lyallpur, and Punjab Univ.; joined the service, 20th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.

HAMID ALI, MUHAMMAD, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. coll., Bengal) (b. 4th Sept., 1906).—Educ. at Lucknow Univ. and Peterhouse Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 13th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, 19th Nov., 1931, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1934;

addl. dist. mag., Apl., 1939; spec. offcr., home dept., Sept., 1944; dep. sec., ditto, Oct., 1944.

HAMID ASGHAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Punjab) (b. 27th Sept., 1897).—Educ. at Punjab Univ., and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; arrived, 9th Jan., 1922, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, June, 1930; and again, Oct., 1932; dist. and sess. judge (confd.), July, 1937.

HAMID, MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Hamid)

HAMID, MUHAMMAD ABDUL (see Muhammad Abdul H.).

HAMID MOIZUDIN ABDUL ALI (see Abdul Ali, H. M.).

HAMILTON, HARRY, B.A., Indian Educl. Service (b. 3rd Aug., 1891).—Joined the service as profcr. of English, Deccan Coll., Poona, 27th Sept., 1919; offg. princpl., Gujarat Coll., Ahmedabad, June, 1924; princpl., Elph. Coll., Bombay, June, 1926; secty., fed. public service commn., Sept., 1936 to Feb., 1940; dep. dir. of instrn., Bombay, Sept., 1941.

HAMILTON, ARCHIBALD HENRY DE BURGH, B.A., Indian C.S. (puisne judge, high ct., Allhd.) (b. 4th July, 1886).—Educ. at King's Sch., Canterbury, Corpus Christi Coll., Cambridge, and University Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 28th Nov., 1910, and served in the United Provs. as asst. commr., and asst. mag. and collr., jt. mag., Oct., 1916; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1920; sess. and sub-judge and ditto, Aug., 1924; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1925, and again, May, 1936; offg. legal remembr. to govt., Apl., 1928; offg. judl. commr., N.W.F.P., Jan., 1936; offg. judge, high ct., Allahabad, July, 1937; judge, ch. ct., Oudh, Oct., 1937; puisne judge, high ct., Allhd., July, 1940.

HAMILTON, ARTHUR FRANCIS, C.I.E., M.B., F.R.C.S., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 13th May, 1880).—Ret'd., March, 1935.*

HAMILTON, ARTHUR PLUMPTRE FAUNCE, O.B.E., B.A., M.C., Indian Forest Service (ch. consvr., Punjab) (b. 7th Oct., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 17th Dec., 1921; dep. consvr., Nov., 1925; instr., Rangers' coll., Dehra Dun, June, 1933; O.B.E., June, 1938; ch. consvr., Oct., 1943.

HAMILTON, KISMET LELAND BREWER, C.I.E., M.A., late Indian C.S. (Central Provs.) (b. 13th Aug., 1883).—Ret'd., May, 1936.*

HAMILTON, SACKVILLE WILLIAM SACKVILLE D.S.O., Col., R.E., late Survey of India (b. 3rd Nov., 1882).—Ret'd., Nov., 1937.*

HAMILTON, WILLIAM FRANCIS ALFRED, O.B.E., Indian Police (dist. supt., Madras) (b. 28th Dec., 1907).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 3rd Dec., 1928; confd., Dec., 1930; M.B.E., June, 1931; asst. dir., intelligence bureau, Nov., 1934; awarded Indian police medal, Jan., 1934; confd. as dist. supt., Oct., 1941; O.B.E., June, 1944.

HAMMETT, ROY HESSELTINE, A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (ch. engr., Bombay) (b. 17th Oct., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Dec., 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1925; dep. secty. to govt., Bombay, p.w.d. (rds. and bldgs.), Dec., 1937; suptg. engr. (confd.), Apl., 1943; tempy. addtl. sec., govt. of Bombay (p.w.d.), Jan., 1944; sec., ditto (tempy.), Apl., 1944.

HAMPTON, CYRIL HERBERT, Indian Police (asst. supt., Burma) (b. 7th Apl., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, on 29th Oct., 1921; offg. dist. supt. variously from Sept., 1924.

HAMPTON, HAROLD JOHN CHARLES, Office of the High Commr. for India (exec. officer, store dept.) (b. 23rd Jan., 1903).—Apptd. clerical officer, 11th Oct., 1920; exec. officer, 1st Nov., 1932.

HAMPTON, HENRY VERNER, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (Bombay) (b. 1st May, 1890).—Joined, 22nd Feb., 1914, as profcr. of Logic and English, Gujarat Coll.; profcr. of Logic and English, Feb., 1915; vice-princpl., Karnatak Coll., Dharwar, June, 1920; actg. princpl., March, 1921, June, 1923, and March, 1924; confd., June, 1925; princpl., secondary trng. coll., Bombay, Nov., 1930; ret'd., Apl., 1942; member, Bombay-Sind publ. serv. commn. from Apl., 1942.

HAN, MAUNG SAW, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 9th Oct., 1908).—Educ. at Government High Sch., Rangoon, Rangoon Univ., and Wadhams Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; examr., local fund accts., Nov., 1939.

HANAFIN, JOHN BERCHMANS, C.I.E., F.R.C.I., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 10th Aug., 1882).—Ret'd., Oct., 1936.*

HANCE, JAMES BENNETT, C.I.E., O.B.E., M.D.; Maj.-Gen., I.M.S. (inspr.-genl., civil hosp., Cent. Provs. and Behar) (b. 2nd Apl., 1887).—First commn. dated 27th July, 1912; offg. civil surg., Quetta, Nov., 1919; O.B.E., Oct., 1920; ditto, D.I. Khan, March, 1923; M.O., S.W. Scouts, Aug., 1923; civil surg., D.I. Khan, Sept., 1924; on foreign service in Jodhpur State from 20th Aug., 1925; ch. medl. officer, W.I. states agency and resdy. surg., Rajkot, July, 1928; resdy. surg., Mysore, Oct., 1933; C.I.E., Jan., 1939; inspr.-genl., civil hosp., Cent. Provs. and Behar; also dir. of pub. health in addn., June, 1941; dir.-genl., Oct., 1943; member, med. council of India, Oct., 1943.

HANCOCK, CYRIL PERCY, C.I.E., O.B.E., M.C., Maj., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 18th Sept., 1896).—First commn. dated 16th Dec., 1914; in milty. dept. prior to 29th March, 1920; tempy. asst. pte. sec. to govt., Bombay, Nov., 1922; asst. pte. sec. to Viceroy, Feb., 1923; sec. to agent to govr.-genl. in states of Western India, March, 1926; O.B.E., June, 1930; offg. dep. secty. to govt. of India, for. and pol. dept., July, 1930; secty. to agent to govr.-genl. in Rajputana, etc., Oct., 1930; presdt., council of state, Bharatput, May, 1932; offg. pol. agent, E. Rajputana states, in addn. to his duties in Bharatput, Feb., 1933, and Aug., 1935; dep. secty., pol. dept., Oct., 1938; confd., Feb., 1939; C.I.E., Jan., 1941; resdt. in Eastern states, Oct., 1941; resdt. (cl. I) and resdt., Baroda and states of W.I. and Gujarat, Nov., 1944.

HANCOX, LESLIE PASCOE, O.B.E., Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 18th May, 1906).—Educ. at St. Olave's Gr. Sch., and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, 1st Dec., 1929, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and coll.; jt. mag., March, 1931; city mag., Lucknow, Apl., 1935; offg. mag. and collr., Feb., 1936; O.B.E., Jan., 1939; sec. to govt., United Provs. (civil supplies), Nov., 1942.

HANDS, ARTHUR SHELDON, C.I.E., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 26th Apl., 1896).—Educ. at Epsom Coll., Middlesex Hosp., and Med. Sch., and Oxford Univ.; apptd. after exam. of 1920; arrived, 3rd Jan., 1921, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr., offg.

mag. and collr., Feb., 1926; and again, Dec., 1931; confd., July, 1933; offg. dep. commr. Aug., 1927; C.I.E., July, 1933; dep. secty. to the govt. of India, home dept., May, 1935, to May, 1938; sec., agric. edl. dept., May, 1940; a.r.p. offcr., March, 1941; contr., ditto, March, 1941; commr., presdy. div., Apl., 1944.

HANDS, PATRICK LANCELOT JOHN, Indian State Rlys. (dep. contr. of stores, E.I. Rly.) (b. 13th Dec., 1889).—Apptd. dist. contr. of stores, on probn., 6th Dec., 1919; confd., Oct., 1920; offg. dep. contr., Aug., 1934; dep. contr. of stores, provl., July, 1940; contr. of stores, Aug., 1941.

HANIFFKHAN, MUHD, SHARIFF KHAN, B.A., Indian Police (Bombay) (b. 15th Feb., 1908).—Joined, 2nd Dec., 1930; confd., supt., police, Apl., 1941.

HANLEY, PERCY JOSEPH, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., central p.w.d.) (b. 20th Jan., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Punjab, 16th Oct., 1927; transfed. to Central p.w.d., May, 1935; exec. eng., Apl., 1940.

HANNA, CHARLES HUGH, India Audit Office (supgt. hr. executive officer) (b. 23rd Feb., 1894).—Educ. at Alleyne's Sch., Dulwich; apptd. 2nd-class clerk, 15th July, 1912; higher exec. officer, Apl., 1922; suptg. ditto, Sept., 1938; lent to min. of shipping, July, 1940.

HANNAY, SIR HUGH AUGUSTUS MACNISH, Kt., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 14th May, 1878).—Retd., Jan., 1936.*

HANSEN, HENRY ERIC, late Indian Police (Bengal) (b. 18th Oct., 1892).—Retd., July, 1936.*

HANSEN, REV. JAMES LAWRENCE, Indian Eccles. Estabt., Punjab (b. 2nd July, 1907).—Apptd. junr. chaplain on probn., Jan. 1940.

HAPPELL, SIR ALEXANDER JOHN, O.B.E., Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl., Madras) (b. 13th June, 1887).—Joined the service, Nov., 1907; supt., Dec., 1917; dep. commr. of police, Madras City, March, 1921; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1924; O.B.E., June, 1925; supt., govt. railway police, Oct., 1927; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., June, 1931; confd., Feb., 1936; kt., June, 1942.

HAPPELL, ARTHUR COMYN, Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Madras) (b. 20th Oct., 1891).—Educ. at Tonbridge, and King's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 4th Oct., 1921; arrived, 1st Dec., 1921, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., July, 1924; offg. dep. sec. to govt., fin. dept., May, 1925; offg. under-sec. to govt., public dept., July, 1925; ditto, dev. dept., Apl., 1926; regr., high ct., Oct., 1926; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1930; confd., Sept., 1932; judge, high ct., Madras, June, 1941.

HAQ, SHEIKH ANWARUL, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 11th May, 1917).—Educ. at Government High Sch., Jullandar City, Punjab Univ., and University Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 23rd Oct., 1939; confd., 27th Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940, and served in Punjab as asst. commr.; sec., Punjab and N.W.F.P. public serv. commn., Aug., 1942, to 1944.

HAQ, S. M., B.A., LL.B., Khan Bahadur, Punjab C.S., Judl. Bch. (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 13th Aug., 1895).—Joined the service, 8th July, 1932, as offg. dist. and sess. judge; confd., Jan., 1934.

HAQUE, KAZI ANWARUL, B.A., Indian Police (b. 8th Feb., 1909).—Joined the service as asst.

supt. of police, Bengal, on probn., 20th Feb., 1933; confd., May, 1935.

HAQUE, SHEIKH IKRAMUL, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 23rd Oct., 1915).—Educ. at Punjab Univ.; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 15th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.

HARBANS LAL, VEDHERA, Rai Bahadur, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 11th Jan., 1901).—Joined the service as appr. engr., 23rd Oct., 1924; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1925; exec. engr., Oct., 1934; under-sec., govt. Punjab (irrign.), Oct., 1943.

HARCOURT, ROBERT MAURICE, Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 5th Sept., 1916).—Educ. at Dulwich and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1939; confd., 23rd Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940, and served in Punjab as asst. commr.

HARDIE, ROBERT, M.A., late Indian Police (Burma) (b. 6th June, 1888).—Joined the service as asst. supt. on 4th Dec., 1909; dist. supt., Dec., 1917; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Nov., 1926; offg. commr. of police, Dec., 1932; confd. Sept., 1933; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1934; dep. inspr.-genl., Jan., 1937; retd., 23rd Dec., 1942.

HARDING, GEORGE TREVOR HAMILTON, C.I.E., Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 18th June, 1895).—Joined the service, 28th Nov., 1925; on milty. duty from 26th July, 1916, to 9th Apl., 1919; asst. supt., Dec., 1920; supt., March, 1925; C.I.E., Jan., 1931; dep. inspr.-genl., March, 1941; inspr.-genl., Patiala (on depn.), Apl., 1944.

HARDING, REV. JOHN AMBROSE, M.A., Burma Eccl. Estabt. (senr. chaplain, Burma) (b. 12th Sept., 1894).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., 7th May, 1926; junr. chaplain, May, 1928; transfed. to Burma, Feb., 1938; senr. chaplain, May, 1938.

HARDMAN, JAMES SNELSON, O.B.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (sec. fin. dept., Bihar) (b. 7th June, 1905).—Educ. at Manchester Grammar School, and Trinity College, Cambridge; joined the service, 10th Oct., 1929; arrived, 29th Nov., 1929, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and coll.; under-secy. to govt., pol. and appts. dept., Bihar and Orissa, Apl., 1934; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1936; attaché, dept. of education, health and lands, Nov., 1938; under-secy., ditto, May, 1939; O.B.E., June, 1944; sec. fin. dept., Bihar, Sept., 1944.

HARDWICK, DONALD ROSS, Indian Police (inspr.-genl., Bengal) (b. 26th Feb., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. supt. on 18th Dec., 1914; offg. supt., May, 1924; confd., Dec., 1925; asst. inspr.-genl., Jan., 1933 to Dec., 1935; Indian Police medal, 1939; confd. inspr.-genl., Dec., 1942.

HARDY, DONALD PEVERIL, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., U.P.) (b. 29th July, 1912).—Educated at High School, Middlesbrough, and Selwyn College, Cambridge; appointed after exam. of 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1935 and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. commr., Nov., 1937.

HARDY, JAMES DOUGLAS, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 8th June, 1915).—Educ. at Penistone Grammar School and Caius College, Cambridge; joined the service, 23rd Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; p.a. to commr., March, 1939; sub. divl. offr., Nov., 1940; judge, small cause ct., Simla, Apl., 1942.

HARE, REV. ARTHUR NEVILLE, B.A., late Indian Eccles. Establ. (United Provs.) (b. 28th Feb., 1886).—Retd., Feb., 1939.*

HARE, REGINALD ARTHUR PROCTOR, O.B.E., Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 13th Feb., 1896).—Joined the service as asst. supt. on 10th March, 1921; supt., July, 1925; O.B.E., June, 1944.

HARE-DUKE, ARTHUR ROBERT AUBREY, M.A., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian State Rlys., E.I. Rly. (b. 13th July, 1885).—Joined the service as dep. contr. of stores (temp.), 13th Dec., 1926; confd., Dec., 1928; offg. contr. of stores, variously from June, 1929; rettd., July, 1940.

HARGREAVE, HERBERT NEWTON, Indian Police (supt., Orissa) (b. 21st Jan., 1905).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, on 8th Dec., 1924; offg. supt., Feb., 1933; confd., Sept., 1937; transfed. to Orissa, Dec., 1939.

HARI CHAND, M.C., M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. (civil surg., Punjab) (b. 26th Aug., 1886).—First commn., dated 31st Jan., 1914; in milty. employ to 30th Jan., 1924; civil surg., Jan., 1924.

HARICHAND, D. E., P.H.E., D.Litt. (Paris) late Indian Educl. Service (b. 26th Apr., 1889).—Apptd. supt. of Sanskrit studies, Bihar and Orissa, 8th Apr., 1918; prof. of Sanskrit, Patna, Apr., 1929; on for. serv. as principl. T.N.J. Coll., Bhagalpur, July, 1934 to July, 1939; principl., Patna Coll., July, 1939; rettd., 2nd June, 1944.

HARISH CHANDRA, M.Sc., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, United Provs.) (b. 15th Sept., 1894).—Educ. at Muir Central Coll., Allahabad, and Oxford Univ. (Non-Coll.); apptd. proby. dep. collr., 4th March, 1918; asst. mag. and collr., 1st March, 1922; jt. mag., Oct., 1924; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1925; offg. sess. and sub. judge, Dec., 1926; confd., June, 1929; dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1929; judicial secty., United Provs. and legal remembrancer, Nov., 1939.

HARISH CHANDRA, KHANNA, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Punjab) (b. 4th Nov., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., on 9th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Dec., 1928; on depn. to forest research inst., Dehra Dun Apr., 1929.

HARIVANSH LAL, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 6th Dec., 1912). Educ. at D.A.V. High School, Lahore, Punjab Univ., and Jesus College, Oxford; joined the service, 15th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.; transfed. to Orissa; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Jan., 1940; dir. of dev., Jan., 1944.

HARLEY, ALEXANDER HAMILTON, M.A., late Indian Educ. Service (Bengal) (b. 11th June, 1882).—Retd., June, 1937.*

HARLOW, CHRISTOPHER MILLWARD, C.I.E., B.Sc., late Indian Forest Service (Cent. Provs.) (b. 5th Jan., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 23rd Dec., 1911; on milty. duty from 30th Sept., 1916 to 1st May, 1917; dep. consvr., Dec., 1916; employed under Rewa Durbar, Nov., 1929; offg. consvr., May, 1931; confd., Aug., 1936; chief consvr., March, 1940; C.I.E., June, 1942; rettd., Jan., 1944; and re-empld. as sec. divnl. and resettlement dept., Jan., 1944.

HARNAM DAS BHANOT (see Bhanot, H. D.)

HARNETT, WALTER LIDWELL, C.I.E., M.B., F.R.C.S., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. rettd. (b. 7th June, 1879).—Retd., Dec., 1934.*; addl. member,

India Office medl. bd. and examiner of surgical instruments, India, Store Dept., May, 1941.

HARPER, REGINALD KIRMAN, M.C., Indian C.S. (commr. of income-tax, Burma) (b. 31st Dec., 1895).—Educ. at King Edward VII Grammar School, Morpeth; joined the service, 29th Oct., 1923, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Dec., 1927; offg. regr., co-op. societies, Burma, March, 1932; exr., local fund accts., Burma, June, 1936; commr. of income-tax, March, 1938.

HARPER-NELSON, JOHN JOSEPH, C.I.E., O.B.E., M.C., M.D., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., rettd. (b. 12th Jan., 1882).—Retd., Jan., 1937.*

HARRIES, SIR ARTHUR TREVOR, Judl. Dept., United Provs. (chief justice, high ct., Patna).—Apptd. judge, high ct., Allahabad, July, 1934; chief justice, high ct., Patna, Oct., 1938; Knighted, Jan., 1939.

HARRIS, SIR DOUGLAS GORDON, K.B.E., C.S.I., C.I.E., M.I.E. (Ind.), late Dept. of Industries and Labour, Govt. of India (b. 19th Oct., 1883).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1907, as asst. engr., United Provs.; exec. engr., Oct., 1915; under-sec. to govt. of India, public works dept., Oct., 1915; asst. inspr.-gen. of irrign. in India, Oct., 1920; sec., new capital construction cttee., Delhi, 1st Oct., 1922; dep. sec., public wks. branch, dept. of industries, etc., Nov., 1922; C.I.E., June, 1925; offg. consulting engr. to govt. of India, Aug., 1926; confd., Jan., 1927; C.S.I., June, 1932; rettd., May, 1934; off. member, exec. council of Palestine Jan., 1936; K.B.E., Jan., 1942.

HARRIS, HENRY WILLIAM, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 30th May, 1883).—Joined the service, Sept., 1920; asst. works manager, E.I. rly., Apr., 1921; offg. works mang. (manufactg.), Feb., 1924; confd., March, 1928; rettd., March, 1940.

HARRIS, HUBERT ARNOLD, Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Punjab) (b. 22nd July, 1896).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1920; asst. exec. engr., Dec., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1928; offg. under-secty. to govt., Punjab, p.w.d., bldgs. and road bch., May, 1933; and again, Oct., 1936; under-secty., p.w.d., Punjab, Nov., 1939; suptg. engr. (subst.), July, 1944.

HARRIS, JOHN FREDERICK WILLOUGHBY, Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 19th June, 1912).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., United Provs., 1st Nov., 1931; confd., Apr., 1934; offg. supt., July, 1936.

HARRIS, JOHN RUSSELL, Indian Police (cent. intell. offcr., Sind) (b. 19th March, 1907).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bombay, 14th Nov., 1927; confd., Nov., 1929; offg. supt., Sind, May, 1932; cent. intell. offr., Sind., Sept., 1939; confd., Oct., 1940.

HARRIS, REGINALD JOHN, Indian State Rlys. (asst. tel. supt., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 29th Jan., 1901).—Asst. tel. supt., Jan., 1902; asst. transportation supt. tel. (junior), Nov., 1922; senior scale, Jan., 1939.

HARRIS, RONALD MONTAGUE JOSEPH, M.V.O., B.A., India Office (actg. principl. serv. and gen. dept.) (b. 6th May, 1913).—Educ. at Harrow and Trinity Coll., Oxford; apptd. asst. principl., India Office, 16th Nov., 1936; posted to Burma Office, Apr., 1937; services loaned to the Cabinet Offices, Jan., 1939 to Oct., 1944; actg. principl., June, 1941; M.V.O., Jan., 1943.

HARRISON, ARTHUR NEVILLE JOHN, C.I.E., B.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 15th Sept., 1881).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1904; asst. examr., Jan., 1905; dep. examr., Apr., 1909;

dep. chief auditor, B.B. & C.I. Rly., Apl., 1924; chief auditor, ditto, Dec., 1925; C.I.E., June, 1936.

HARRISON, ARTHUR SIDNEY, B.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 14th Sept., 1886).—Retd., June, 1936.*

HARRISON, SIR CHARLTON SCOTT CHOLMELEY, Kt., C.I.E., M.I.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 13th May, 1881).—Retd., June, 1935.*

HARRISON, CLIFFORD PEVENSEY MATTISON, M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bengal) (b. 23rd Feb., 1884).—Retd., Jan., 1939.*

HARRISON, FRANCIS ANTHONY KITCHENER, B.A., India Office (actg. princpl., ext. dept.) (b. 28th Aug., 1914).—Educ. at Winchester and New College, Oxford; apptd. asst. princpl., 1st Nov., 1917; asst. priv. sec. to the sec. of state, Feb., 1941; actg. princpl., Nov., 1944.

HARRISON, GEORGE FRANCIS, Indian Police (dist. supt., Madras) (b. 3rd July, 1909).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 3rd Dec., 1928; confd., Jan., 1931; confd. as dist. supt., Aug., 1942.

HARRISON, MISS GLADYS, B.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 27th Dec., 1887).—Retd., June, 1936.*

HARRISON, JAMES LEES, Indian Forest Service (b. 3rd May, 1893).—Joined the service as forest engr., Coorg, 24th Nov., 1921; ditto, Assam, 4th Dec., 1927; dep. consvr., Oct., 1932; lecturer, Indian Forest College, Dehra Dun, Sept., 1938.

HARRISON, JOSEPH RICHARD, C.I.E., F.G.S., Indian State Rlys. (ch. mining engr., rly. bd.) (b. 25th Feb., 1888).—Joined the service as asst. coal supt., 13th March, 1916; colliery supt., Kargali colliery, G.I.P. Rly., Feb., 1923; supt. of collieries, Oct., 1925; offg. chief mining engr., rly. board, variously from Apl., 1927; confd., June, 1935; C.I.E., Jan., 1942.

† HARRISON, PHILIP TERIOT (see R of Svce. in file).

HARRISON, WALTER LEONARD, Office of the priv. secy. to H.E. the Viceroy (asst. secy.) (b. 20th Dec., 1899).—Joined A.H.Q., India, Sept., 1919; supt. def. dept., Jan., 1936; asst. secy., Nov., 1937 to Jan. 1938; on spl. duty, office of P.S.V., 1st July, 1939; asst. secy., ditto, 15th July, 1939.

HARRISON, WILLIAM, late Office of High Commr. for India (b. 22nd Jan., 1877).—Retd., May, 1938.*

HART, FRANK ANTHONY ALBERT, O.B.E., B.A., Indian Forest Service (asst. consvr., Orissa) (b. 30th Oct., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Bihar and Orissa, on 29th Nov., 1921; agency forest officer, Nov., 1930; O.B.E., Jan., 1936.

HART, FREDERIC JOHN ALBERT, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bengal) (b. 2nd Jan., 1896).—Joined the service as asst. consvr. on 15th Nov., 1921; dep. consvr., Nov., 1922.

HARTLEY, ARTHUR COULTON, O.B.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. coll., Bengal) (b. 24th March, 1906).—Educ. at University of Manchester and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and coll.; jt. mag. and dep. coll., May, 1931; settlmt. offr., Dec., 1934; asst. secy. to govr., Bengal, Oct., 1938; O.B.E., Jan., 1943; dir. of rationing, Jan., 1945.

HARTLEY, GEORGE EDWARD, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 2nd Apl., 1907).—Apptd. asst. exec. engr., United Provs., 24th Oct., 1930;

exec. engr., Oct., 1939; on depn. to R.I.N., June, 1940.

HARTNOLL, ERIC STEWART, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 5th Jan., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. consvr. on 21st Dec., 1915; dep. consvr., Feb., 1914; offg. consvr., Apl., 1936.

HARTOG, SIR PHILIP JOSEPH, K.B.E., C.I.E., M.A., B.Sc. (b. 2nd March, 1864).—Retd., Apl., 1930.*

HARTY, ARTHUR HENRY, C.I.E., M.R.C.S. (Eng.), L.R.C.P. (Lond.), Lieut.-Col., I.M.S.—Apptd. offg. supt., central mental hosp., Yervada, Aug., 1925; confd., Sept., 1926; offg. civil-surg., Dec., 1929; C.I.E., Jan., 1942; inspr.-gen., civil hosps., Aug., 1943.

HARVEY, ALEXANDER FORDYCE, F.C.H., late Indian State Railways (b. 24th March, 1884).—Retd., March, 1939.*

HARVEY, BERNARD ALEXANDER MACLEOD FORTESQUE, B.A., Indian Police (b. 19th Nov., 1916).—Appointed asst. supt., Madras, on probn, 20th Feb., 1939.

HARVEY, CECIL WALTER LEWERY, O.B.E., M.C., Lieut.-Col., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 27th Oct., 1897).—First commn. dated 12th Nov., 1914; in milty. employ. to 30th Apl., 1924; asst. mag. and collr., Agra, May, 1924; on foreign service as adviser and pte. sec. to Raja of Poonch, Jan., 1925; offg. under-sec. to govt. of India, for. and pol. dept., Jan., 1927; under-sec. to A.G.G. in Rajputana and C.C. in Ajmer Merwara, March, 1927; under-sec. to resident of Hyderabad, Apl., 1927; ditto to agent to gov.-genl. in Rajputana, May, 1928; offg. under-secy. to govt. of India, for. and pol. dept., March, 1929; confd., Sept., 1929; on foreign service in Manipur States, Dec., 1930; first asst. to resdt., Baroda, Feb., 1933; secty. to A.G.G., Gujerat states, Apl., 1933; pol. agent, W. Kathiawar agency, Oct., 1934; secty. to A.G.G. states of Western India, March, 1936; O.B.E., Jan., 1938; Prime Minister, Alwar State, Sept., 1938; pol. agt., Malwa, Feb., 1942 sec. resdt. C. India, June, 1942; pol. agt., Bhopal, Apl., 1944.

HARVEY, GUY JOSEPH, late Indian Police (b. 5th March, 1894).—Retd., Aug., 1932.*

HARVEY, THOMAS, M.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs., (Bombay) (b. 13th Nov., 1885).—Retd., Feb., 1938.*

HASAN, ALI (see Ali Hasan).

HASAN SAIDY WAZIR (see Wazir Hasan, S.).

HASAN, SHEIKH MAHMUD, M.Sc., Indian C.S. (sub. collr., Madras) (b. 14th June, 1908).—Educ. at Government Jubilee High School, Lucknow, Lucknow University and Magdalen College, Cambridge; joined the service, 9th October, 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr., sub.-collr., Feb., 1936.

HASAN, SYED IBN-I., Capt. I.A. (b. 10th Oct., 1910).—Apptd. to I.P.S. on probn., Nov., 1936; under-sec., govt. of India, external affairs dept., Feb., 1943.

HASAN, SYED IMDAD, M.Sc., Indian Police, United Provs. (b. 10th Dec., 1920).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn. after exam. of 1942.

HASAN, SYED SIDDIQUE, Indian C.S. (jt. mag. United Provs.) (b. 4th Feb., 1904).—Educ. at University of Lucknow and Exeter Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 14th Oct., 1929; arrived, 19th Nov., 1929, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., Aug., 1933; regr. of co-op. societies, Jan., 1941.

HASAN, ZAFAR (see Zafar Hasan).

HASAN ZAHEER, SAIVID, B.A., Indian C.S. (educn. secty. to govt., United Provs. (b. 16th Nov., 1899).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ. and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 9th Nov., 1923; arrived, 14th Dec., 1923, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. commr., March, 1925; jt. mag., Apl., 1926; offg. mag. and collr., Nov., 1928; and again, Sept., 1933; addl. dep. secty., genl. bch., United Provs. (temp.), Apl., 1935; dep. secty. to govt., U.P., March, 1937; ditto, India, mag. and collr. (confid.), Oct., 1938; temp. addtl. dep. secty., govt. of India, lab. dept., June, 1940; educn. sec. govt., U.P., Jan., 1944.

HASAN, ZIA-UL (see Zia-ul Hasan).

HASHIM, RAZA SAIVID, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 16th Feb., 1910).—Educ. at Government High School, Hardoi, Lucknow Christian College, University of Lucknow and Jesus College, Oxford; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Bombay as asst. commr.; served in Sind from Jan., 1939; dep. sec. to govt., May, 1940; provl. press advr., Sept., 1941.

HASHMI, ZAMANSHAM MAHABUBSHAH, Khan Bahadur, late Indian Police (b. 1st July, 1881).—Retd., July, 1936.*

HASLAM, ROY HAVELOCK, Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 30th Oct., 1892).—Joined the service, 14th Nov., 1913; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1918; supt., of police Apl., 1925; ditto and dep. commr., Bombay, Dec., 1927; supt., Aden, Nov., 1928; dep. commr. of police for air raid precautions, Bombay, July, 1939.

HASLEHUST, HAROLD MAITLAND, M.B.E. Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl., Bombay) (b. 30th Nov., 1888).—Joined, 10th Dec., 1908; on milty. duty from May, 1915 to Feb., 1919; M.B.E., June, 1919; supt. of police, June, 1921; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1923; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., March, 1936; confd. May, 1936.

HASNAIN, KHAN BAHADUR, S. G. (b. 13th Jan., 1891).—Apptd. asst. secty., legislative assembly dept., Apl., 1939.

HASNIE, SHUJAT ALI.—New entry.

HASSAN, AHMAD, Khan Bahadur, M.A., Punjab C.S. (dep. commr.) (b. 20th Jan., 1885).—Joined the service, 3rd Nov., 1908; extra asst. commr., July, 1912; dep. commr., subst. permit., July, 1933.

HASSAN, KHWAJA MUHAMMAD, Khan Bahadur, B.A., Indian State Rlys. (b. 20th March., 1891).—Joined the service, 14th Oct., 1914; dep. dir., estabt., rly. bd., May, 1932; supervisor of rly. lab., May, 1937.

HASSAN, SYED FIDA, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 4th Dec., 1908).—Educ. at D.S. High School, Lahore, Punjab University, the School of Oriental Studies, London, and Oriel College Oxford; joined the service, 5th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sub-divl. offcr., Apl., 1936; offr. on spec. duty, taxation, finr. commd's office, Jan., 1941; spec. offr., home dept., Sept., 1941; colonization offr., Havell project, 1944.

HASTINGS, ARCHIBALD WILLIAMS, late mil. accts. dept. (b. 18th Aug., 1880).—Joined the service as mil. accts., 2nd cl., Feb., 1912; confd., cl. I offcr., Nov., 1934; retd., Aug., 1944.

HATCH-BARNWELL, ANTHONY WILLIAM CHARLES, B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr.,

Bengal) (b. 6th March, 1912).—Educ. at Sherborne and Worcester College, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1934; arrived in India, Dec., 1935, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1938, addl. mag., Apl., 1941; settlement offr. Sept., 1941; mag. and collr., Jan., 1945.

HATCH-BARNWELL, STEPHEN BENEDICT, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 26th June, 1909).—Educ. at Malvern College and Keble College, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1935; mag. and collr., July, 1941; dep. dir. civil supplies, Dec., 1943.

HATFIELD, MORGAN BESLEY, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., United Provs.) (b. 16th Jan. 1893).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1919; asst. engr., Jan., 1920; asst. exec. engr., March, 1921; exec. engr., Oct., 1925; confd. as suptg. engr., Nov., 1943.

HATT-COOK, ROWLAND, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 14th Sept., 1885).—Retd., Jan., 1937.*

HAWES, CHARLES GEORGE, C.I.E., M.C., B.Sc. (Lon.), A.C.G.I., A.M.I.C.E., M.R.San.I., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Sind) (b. 7th March, 1890).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1912; in milty. employ from 19th June, 1915 to 7th Feb., 1919; exec. engr., Dec., 1919; C.I.E., June, 1939.

HAWES, DERRICK GORDON HARINGTON, Capt. I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 22nd May, 1907).—First commn., 29th Jan., 1927; in mil. employ up to 23rd March, 1934; p.a. to Resident, Kashmir, March, 1934; under training in the Punjab, Oct., 1934; under-secty. to A.G.G. to C.I., March, 1936; pol. agent, Bhopal, Sept., 1936; under-secty. to the A.G.G. in C.I., Nov., 1936; offg. dep. opium agent in Malwa, in addn., Nov., 1936; confd. in the Indian pol. service, Apl., 1937; on foreign service in Alwar State, Dec., 1937; under secty., pol. dept., Mar., 1938; confd. Nov. 1938; first asst. to resdt. in Kashmir, Sept., 1940; sec. resdt., E. States, July, 1942; ditto, Hyderabad, March, 1943.

HAWES, RONALD NISBETT, C.B.E., Capt., R.E., retd., India Posts and Tels. (chief tele. commn., engr.) (b. 11th Nov., 1895).—Joined the service, 5th Jan., 1920; divl. engr., wireless, Oct., 1923; dir., Calcutta stn., Indian State broadcasting service, in addn., Apl., to Oct. 1933; chief tele. commn. engr., Burma, Apl., 1937; C.B.E., June, 1941.

HAWKER, REGINALD JAMES, Office of High commr. for India (higher exec. officer, store dept.) (b. 9th Dec., 1884).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, India store depot, 21st Sept., 1903; transfed. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; exec. officer, Apl., 1922; higher clerical offr., May, 1922; higher exec. officer, May, 1926; actg. princpl., ditto, Dec., 1939; actg. controller May, 1940.

HAWKES, FRANK ROXBURGH, O.B.E., late Indian State Rlys (b. 9th Oct., 1885).—Joined the service, 22nd Oct., 1904; asst. traffic supt., Sept., 1906; dist. ditto, Apl., 1914; O.B.E., June, 1919; divl. comml. officer, Nov., 1924; offg. divl. supt., Nov., 1927; confd., Apl., 1930; offg. ch. comml. manager, Nov., 1932; confd., Dec., 1932; retd., Oct., 1940.

HAWLEY, HERBERT, O.B.E., M.Sc., F.I.C., Medical Dept., Madras (b. 4th Nov., 1887).—Apptd. govt. analyst, King Inst., Guindy, 9th

Jan., 1924; retd., Nov., 1943; re-empd. as govt. analyst, Nov., 1943; O.B.E., Jan., 1944.

HAWORTH, REV. CYRIL EVINGTON, late Indian Eccl. Estab., United Provs. (b. 1st Feb., 1903).—Retd., Feb., 1936.*

HAWORTH, SIR LIONEL BERKELEY HOLT K.B.E., Leut.-Col., I.A. (retd.); late Indian Political Service).—Retd., May, 1929.*

HAWTHORN, GEORGE THOMAS, Office of the High Commr. for India (exec. officer, store dept.) (b. 20th June, 1892).—Apptd. to store dept., Nov., 1919; clerical officer, July, 1921; exec. officer, Jan., 1926.

HAY, ALLAN SELWOOD, late Indian State Rlys. (N.W. Rly.) (b. 21st July, 1888).—Asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1916; asst. exec. engr., 18th Jan., 1921; exec. engr. (prov.), Jan., 1936; confd., March, 1938; retd., July, 1943.

HAY, BROUGHTON, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Orissa) (b. 2nd Nov., 1914).—Educ. at Radley and New College, Oxford; joined the service, 21st Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in B. and O. as asst. mag. and collr.; posted to Orissa from May, 1938; asst. pol. agent, Chhattisgarh states, June, 1941; under-sec. to resdt. for Baroda states, July, 1942; asst. commr., Peshawar, May, 1943.

HAY, NORMAN TREVOR CARLTON, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs.—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Burma, 8th Feb., 1931; exec. engr., Dec., 1940; admin. offr., irgn. dept., 1944.

HAY, ROBERT, C.I.E., M.B., Major-Gen., I.M.S. (dep. dir. genl., I.M.S.) (b. 8th March, 1889).—First commn. dated 23rd Jan., 1917; in milty. employ to 25th June, 1925; offg. agency surgn., Bundelkhand, July, 1925; offg. medl. officer, Seistan consulate, Feb., 1926; agency surgn., D.I. Khan, Nov., 1928; ditto, Kurram, Apl., 1930; resdy. surgn., Kashmir, Apl., 1931; agency surgn., Bundelkhand, Dec., 1931; civil surgn., Quetta, Nov., 1933; ch. medl. officer, Baluchistan, March, 1935; resdy. surgn., Mewar, Sept., 1935; ch. medl. officer, Rajputana, Dec., 1935; dep. dir. genl., I.M.S., Jan., 1939; insp.-gen. civil hosps., Punjab, Oct., 1942 to May, 1944; surgeon-general with Bombay govt. (offg.) from July, 1944; C.I.E., Jan., 1942.

HAY, WILLIAM RUPERT, C.S.I., C.I.E., Lieut.-Col., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 18th Dec., 1893).—First commn. dated 3rd July, 1915; joined pol. dept., 25th May, 1920; asst. pol. agent, Chitral, Aug., 1921; asst. commr., Bannu, Dec., 1923; ditto, Tonk, March, 1924; pol. agent, S. Waziristan, Nov., 1925; asst. commr., Mardan, Dec., 1928; jt. dep. commr., Peshawar, Aug., 1930; spl. mag. in D.I. Khan dist., Aug., 1931; on special duty, Dokalim Boundary commn., June, 1932; pol. agent, Dir, Swat and Chitral, July, 1932; and again, Jan., 1933; offg. ch. secty. to govt., N.W.F.P., Nov., 1932; C.I.E., Jan., 1934; counsellor, Brit. legn., Kabul, Nov., 1934; offg. dep. secty., F. and P. dept., Govt. of India, Oct., 1936; confd., as dep. secty., external affairs dept., Apl., 1937; ditto, Nov., 1938; resdt. in Waziristan, Nov., 1940; resdt. in Persian Gulf, Nov., 1941; C.S.I., Jan., 1943; confd., resdt., cl. I, and A.G.G. resdt., and C.C. in Baluchistan, Aug., 1944.

HAYAT, SIR UMAR (see Umar Hayat Khan).

HAYDEN, ARTHUR BARTRUM, Lieut., R.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Burma) (b. 16th Nov., 1901).—First commn. dated 13th

July, 1921; asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1925; exec. engr., Nov., 1933; milty. duty, Nov., 1939.

HAYES, ARTHUR ANDERSON, late Indian Police, Burma (b. 26th July, 1894).—Retd., Oct., 1938.*

HAYES, CYRIL BEAUCHAMP, M.C., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 30th Apl., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 12th May, 1920; exec. engr., Burma rly., June, 1929; offg. supt. of stores, Feb., 1937; retd., Feb., 1940.

HAYFIELD, WILLIAM MONTAGUE, late Indian Service of Engrs., Burma (b. 16th Feb., 1883).—Retd., Feb., 1938.*

HAYLEY, THOMAS THEODORE STEIGER, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Assam) (b. 4th Oct., 1913).—Educated at Clifton College and Peterhouse College, Cambridge; appointed on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 13th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Nov., 1938, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; under-secy., govt. of Assam, June, 1940; publicity offr., June, 1940.

HAYWARD, SIR MAURICE HENRY WESTON, Kt., K.C.S.I. LL.B., Barr., late Indian C.S., Bombay—Retd. July, 1926.

HAYWARD, REV. WILLIAM GEORGE, B.A., late Indian Eccles. Estab. (b. 18th June, 1888).—Apptd. junr. chaplain, Madras, 5th March, 1926; senr. chaplain, March, 1936; retd., March, 1942.

HAYWOOD, WILLIAM GERALD, late Indian Police (United Provs.) (b. 5th Sept., 1908).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 25th Nov., 1929; confd., Nov., 1931; retd., 3rd Apl., 1943.
