HAZARI, RAJENDRA NATH, B.A., LL.B. (b. 4th Nov., 1901) (Military Accounts Dept.).—Joined service as an officer in class II, March, 1926; F.A. and secty., Quetta reconstruction committee Apl., 1939; revtd. to mil. accts. dept., June, 1940.

HEAD, EDGAR ALFRED, Office of High Commr. for India (higher clerical officer, store dept.) (b. 7th Apl., 1876).—Educ. at King Edward's Gr. Sch., Bath; clerk, 2nd class, 30th May, 1895; transf. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; higher clerical officer, Apl., 1922.

HEAD, WALTER RALEIGH TREVELYAN, Indian Police (Bengal) (b. 10th Aug., 1919).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Oct., 1939.

HEADLEY, ROBERT HOLLOWELL, O.B.E., LL.B., late India Office (b. 9th March, 1876).—Retd., Nov., 1937.*

HEALE, DAVID HERBERT, Indian Police (b. 4th Feb., 1919).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., Nov., 1938; confd., Sept., 1940.

HEALY, DANIEL, C.I.E., late Indian Police (Bombay) (b. 22nd Aug., 1884).—Retd., Aug., 1939.*

HEALY, ROWLAND HENRY SAVAGE, B.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Burma) (b. 13th Nov., 1905).—Educ. at Earlsfort House School, Dublin, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; joined the service, 19th Oct., 1929; arrived, Dec., 1929, and served in Burma as asst. commr. dep. regr., high ct., Rangoon, Aug., 1932; asst. dist. judge, Nov., 1934; offg. dist. and sess. judge, March 1936; confd., Oct., 1938.

HEANEY, GEORGE FREDERICK, C.B.E., Lieut.-Col., R.E. Survey of India (supt.) (b. 1st June, 1897).—First commn., dated 26th May, 1916; in milty. employ to 10th Aug., 1921; asst. supt., Aug., 1921; offg. supt., March, 1929; confd., Aug., 1929; offg. dir., July, 1943; C.B.E., July, 1943.

HEAPE, ROBERT H., A.M.I.C.E., Indian

State Ryls. (exec. engr.) (b. 8th Aug., 1894).—
Joined the service as resdt. engr., G.I.P. rly.,
30th June, 1921; exec. engr., Apl., 1935.

HEARN, GEORGE WILLIAM, India Office
(subtg. executive officer, acctt.-gen'l's dept.) (b.
23rd June, 1889).—Educ. at Central Founda-
tion Sch., London; apptd. clerk, 2nd class, 4th
Dec., 1907; minor staff clerk, Jan., 1920; actg.
staff clerk, Apl., 1921; higher exec. officer
(acting), Apl., 1922; confd., Nov., 1922; also
assessor of income-tax; suptg. exec. officer,
Sept., 1935; lent to min. of aircraft prodn.,
May, 1940.

HEARN, SIR GORDON RISLEY, Kt., C.I.E.,
D.S.O., A.M.I.C.E., Lieut.-Col., R.E., late
Railway Dept.—Retd., Sept., 1926.*

HEARN, JOHN WHITCOMBE, C.I.E., B.A.,
LL.B., Indian C.S. (commr., Punjab) (b. 27th
Nov., 1885).—Educ. at Blundell's Sch., Tiver-
ton, Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge, and Uni-
versity Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of
1909; arrived in India, 28th Nov., 1910, and
served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under-
sec. to govt. of India, rev. and agric. dept., Oct.,
1920; dep. commr. (prov'l.), Oct., 1924; ditto
(perm.), Oct., 1927; home secty. to govt.,
Punjab, Oct., 1930; offg. commr., Feb., 1936;
addl. secty. to govt., Punjab, Feb., 1936;
commr., March, 1936; C.I.E., Jan., 1941;
addl. fin. commr. and addl. sec. to govt. (rev.),
Dec., 1941.

HEATH, CLEMENT JOHN, late Indian Police
(Burma) (b. 10th June, 1890).—Joined the
service as asst. supt., 5th Dec., 1910; dist.
supt., Dec., 1917; dep. commr. of police,
Rangoon, Nov., 1927; offg. dep. inspr.-genl.,
Jan., 1936; confd., June, 1939; ret'd., Jan.,
1943.

HEATHCOCK, REV. DOUGLAS WILLIAM,
Indian Eccles. Estabt. (junr. chaplain) (b. 2nd
Jan., 1897).—Apptd. chaplain on probn.,
Lahore Diocese, 14th Apl., 1942.

HECTOR, GEORGE PITTENDRICH, M.A.,
D.Sc., late Indian Service Agricl. (Bengal) (b.
20th Oct., 1881).—Retd., Oct., 1935.*

HECTOR, JOHN ALEXANDER ERNEST, B.Sc.,
Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Burma) (b.
11th Feb., 1901).—Joined the service on 1st
Oct., 1923; exec. engr., Oct., 1932; ditto,
tempy. aviation divn., central p.w.d., Rangoon,
Feb., 1935.

HEDDON, HAROLD, late Office of High
Commr. for India (b. 13th Oct., 1882).—Apptd.
2nd class clerk, registry and record dept., 16th
Dec., 1902; transfd. to store dept., Jan., 1917;
transfd. to office of high commr. for India,
Oct., 1920; higher clerical officer, Apl., 1922;
ret'd., Oct., 1942.

HEENAN, JOHN LAWDER, Indian Police (b.
21st Apl., 1896) (dist. supt., Burma).—Joined
the service as asst. dist. supt., on 7th Feb.,
1921; offg. dist. supt., July, 1924; confd. May,
1929; served under govt. of Bihar to Aug.,
1944.

HEINIG, JOSEPH ERIS, B.Sc., Indian State
Rlys. (dep. gen. mang., N.W. Rly.) (b. 27th Jan.,
1892).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr.,
1st Oct., 1919; offg. exec. engr., Oct., 1925;
confd., June, 1935; dy. gen. mang., Oct., 1941.

HEJMADI, VASUDEO SUNRAO, Indian C.S.
(collr., Madras) (b. 26th Jan., 1900).—Educ. at
St. Xavier's High School, Bombay, and Caius
Coll., Camb.; apptd. after exam. of 1923;
arrived, 3rd Dec., 1923, and served in Madras
as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr., Jan., 1925;
offg. collr. and dist. mag., Feb., 1931; tempy.

dep. sec., developmt. dept., Apl., 1940; collr.
(confd.), Nov., 1943; sec., revenue dept., Jan.
1943.

HEMEON, CLARENCE REID, Indian C.S.
(judge high ct., Nagpur,) (b. 30th Jan., 1897).—
Educ. at Cork Gr. Sch., and Univ. Coll., Cork;
apptd. by nomination; joined the service, 1st
Nov., 1921; arrived, 12th Apl., 1922, and
served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.; sub-
judge, June, 1925; offg. dist. and sess. judge
March, 1927; confd., Jan., 1935; offg. legal,
remembr. and sec. legal dept., Central Provs.
June, 1932; confd., Jan., 1935; addl. sec.
govt. of India legisl. dept., Oct., 1939 to Feb.
1940; judge, high ct., Nagpur, June, 1944.

HEMMINGS, LEONARD, Indian State Rlys.
(b. 11th Apl., 1894).—Production engr., E.I.
rly., Apl., 1927; confd., senr. scale, Sept., 1937.

HEMSWORTH, THOMAS GARRETT
FREDERICK, B.A., late Indian Service of
Engrs., (Burma) (b. 2nd Aug., 1890).—
Joined the service as asst. exec. engr. on 1st
Oct., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1925; retired
Aug., 1942.

HENDERSON, ALAN GERALD RUSSELL,
B.A., Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Calcutta) (b.
22nd March, 1886).—Educ. at Westminster Sch.
and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. after exam.
of 1909; arrived in India, 27th Nov., 1910,
and served in E. Bengal and Assam as asst.
mag. and collr.; transfd. to Bengal, Apl., 1912;
jt. mag. and dep. collr., Dec., 1915; I.A.R.O.,
Jan. to March, 1918; dist. and sessions judge,
March, 1923; offg. secty., judicial dept., and
supt. and remembr. of legal affairs, Apl., 1932;
confd., July, 1932; offg. addl. judge, high ct.,
Calcutta, variously from Apl., 1933; actg.
judge, ditto, Apl., 1934; confd., March, 1937.

HENDERSON, CHARLES ALEXANDER, C.S.I.,
V.D., late Indian C.S. (Madras) (b. 2nd May,
1882).—Educ. at Haileybury, and Exeter Coll.,
Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1904; arrived
11th Dec., 1905, and served in Madras as asst.
collr. and mag. and spl. settl. offr.; sub-collr.
and jt. mag., Sept., 1914; dir. of land records,
June, 1916; on foreign service as Diwan,
Jeypore Estate, Apl., 1920; offg. collr. and
dist. mag., Oct., 1921; sub-collr., Aug., 1922;
offg. collr. and dist. mag., Apl., 1926; offg.
secty. to govt., dev. dept., Madras, May, 1933;
offg. second secty. to govt., Madras, Jan., 1935;
and again March, 1936; offg. 2nd member, bd.
of rev., May, 1936; 3rd member, ditto, March,
1937; C.S.I., Jan., 1938; 2nd member, ditto,
Feb., 1938; agent of the Govt. of India in
Burma, Sept., 1939; 1st member, bd. of rev.
(confd.), Apl., 1940; ret'd., 11 Dec., 1940.

HENDERSON, JOHN WILMOT, Indian State
Rlys. (divl. supt. N.W. rly.) (b. 11th July,
1893).—Joined the service, 4th June, 1912;
asst. transptn. traffic officer, Oct., 1924; offg.
divl. personnel officer, N.W. rly., March,
1930; divl. transptn. officer, March, 1931; divl.
supt., junr., Dec., 1940.

HENDERSON, KENNETH HARVEY, O.B.E.,
Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 24th Dec.,
1906).—Educ. at Mill Hill, New College, Oxford,
and King's College, London; joined the service,
15th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930,
and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; pol.
asst. and comdt. border milty. police, June,
1933; offg. dep. commr., March, 1935; dep.
commr. sub. provl., Dec., 1941; O.B.E.,
Jan., 1944.

HENNESSY, JOSEPH MARTIN REEVES,
O.B.E., L.R.C.P. & S. (Edin.), D.T.M. & H.

(Lond.), Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. (ret'd.), late Medical Dept., Central Provs. (b. 7th May, 1886).—First commn., 31st Jan., 1914; civil surgeon, Jubbulpore, Sept., 1931; offg. inspr.-genl. of civil hosps., C.P., May, 1935; and again, Feb., 1937; ret'd., May, 1941; O.B.E., June, 1941.

HENNESSY, JOSSLEYN, B.A. Hons. (Oxon.) (b. 17th Nov., 1902).—Educ. at Charterhouse and New Coll., Oxford; chev. of legion of honr., 1937; apptd. dir. of public information, Sept., 1937 to Nov., 1941.

HENNIKER-GOTLEY, GEORGE RAINALD, C.I.E., B.A., D.S.O., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Punjab) (b. 5th Sept., 1893).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Punjab, 18th Dec., 1922; dep. consvr., Aug., 1926; C.I.E., June, 1944.

HENRY, COLIN, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 23rd Feb., 1902).—Educ. at King Edward VII School, Sheffield, and Wadhams College, Oxford; joined the service, 23rd Oct., 1926; arrived, Dec., 1926, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, variously from June, 1931; confd., Nov., 1936; attd. govt. of India legisl. dept., Apl., 1938; on spec. duty, legal remembr.'s office, Aug., 1938; dep. commr., Nov., 1940.

HENSHAW, LEWIS, O.B.E., A.M.I.Mech.E., A.M.I.E.E., A.M.I.Struct.E., M.I.E. (Ind.) (supig. engr., Electricity Dept., Madras) (b. 2nd May, 1888).—Joined the service as elec. inspr. to govt., on 8th Nov., 1920; elec. engr., March, 1921; confd., Apl., 1924; suptg. engr., offg., Aug., 1935; confd., Aug., 1937; O.B.E., Jan., 1943.

HERBERT, CHARLES GORDON, C.S.I., C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 28th Feb., 1893).—Educ. at Merchant Taylor's Sch., and Wadhams Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 14th Feb., 1920; arrived, 11th May, 1920, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., May, 1923; offg. collr. and dist. mag., March, 1928; ditto (provl. subs.), Jan., 1935; secty. to A.G.G., in Rajputana, March, 1396; jt. secty., pol. dept., May, 1938; confd. in the Indian Political Service, Apl., 1939; C.I.E., June, 1939; secty. to H.E. the Crown Repres., March, 1930; addl. secty., pol. dept., Dec., 1940; pol. agt., Jaipur, Apl., 1941; C.S.I., June, 1944; resdtd. Gwalior, July, 1942; again, July, 1944.

HERBERT, CHRISTOPHER ALFRED, B.A., Indian C.S. (assi. mag. and collr., U.P.) (b. 15th June, 1913).—Educ. at Mountjoy School, Dublin, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; joined the service, 22nd Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in the U.P., as asst. mag. and collr.

HERDON, GERALD CHARLES ROUTH, Indian Police (supt., N.W.F.P.) (b. 30th July, 1897).—Joined the service as asst. supt. on 27th Dec., 1919; offg. supt., March, 1925; confd., May, 1926; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1928.

HERON, ALEXANDER MACMILLAN, D.Sc., F.G.S., late Geological Survey of India (b. 31st July, 1884).—Retd., July, 1939.*

HERVEY, ARTHUR CHARLES CONSTANTINE, M.A. (Cantab.), late Indian Educl. Service (b. 18th Dec., 1886).—Joined the service as prof., Khalsa Coll., Amritsar, on 7th Oct., 1918; princpl., Ludhiana Coll., 26th Sept., 1925; ret'd., 1 May, 1942.

HESTERLOW, ALFRED MAURICE VICTOR, M.B., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. ret'd. (Assam) (b. 4th May, 1887).—First commn. dated 1st

Nov., 1920; in milty. employ until 2nd Feb., 1924; asst. dir. of public health, Madras, Feb., 1924; prof., medl. coll., Madras, May, 1926; asst. dir. of public health, Madras, Aug., 1931; offg. dir., March, 1934; ditto, Bombay, Apl., 1935; dir., Assam, Jan., 1938; inspr. genl. civ. hosps., in add., Apl. to June, 1941; ret'd., 1941.

HETHERINGTON, THEODORE JOHN HOSTE, B.A., late Indian C.S. (U.P.) (b. 29th Apl., 1914).—Retd., Apl., 1939.*

HEWETSON, CYRIL EDWARD, B.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr. Cent. Provs.) (b. 18th June, 1903).—Joined the service as asst. consvr. 25th Dec., 1926; dep. consvr., Dec., 1930.

HEWETT, DECIMUS HENRY, Indian State Rly. (dep. ch., mech. engr., G.I.P. rly.) (b. 30th Jan., 1893).—Joined the service, 12th March, 1926, production engr., G.I.P. rly., March, 1926; offg. works manager, G.I.P. rly., May, 1928; confd., Oct., 1932; dep. ch. mech. engr. provl., Nov., 1938; confd., Dec., 1940.

HEWITT, RICHARD CLAUDE LIFFORD, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bihar) (b. 10th Aug., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1912; exec. engr., Oct., 1921; offg. suptg. engr., variously from May, 1934; ret'd., March, 1944.

HEWLETT, GEORGE GORDON, India Office (higher exec. officer, acctnt.-gens. dept.) (b. 6th Aug., 1894).—Apptd. second class clerk, India Office, 7th Jan., 1913 and attd. to library; transf. to acctnt.-gensl's. dept., March, 1913; on mil. service from Dec., 1915 to Jan., 1919; exec. officer, Apl., 1922; asst. clk. to council, Feb. 1932 to Feb. 1935; actg. hr. exec. officer Feb., 1934; confd., Dec., 1934.

HEYSHAM, ERIC HENRY BERKELEY, Indian State Rlys (dep. ch. optg. supt.) (b. 2nd March, 1896).—Joined the service, 28th Nov., 1919 as asst. supt., E.I. rly.; transptn. supt. (traffic comml.), May, 1935; dep. ch. optg. supt. provl., Aug., 1941.

HEZLETT, JAMES, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S., Assam (b. 26th June, 1875).—Retd., Nov., 1934.*; chairman, pub. serv. commn., Assam, Apl., 1937 to March, 1940.

HIBBERT, RICHARD OSWALD, B.A., Indian C.S. (assi. commr., Punjab) (b. 16th Dec., 1914).—Educ. at Shrewsbury and St. John's College, Cambridge; joined the service, 14th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; pol. asst. and comdt., border mil. police, Apl., 1941.

HICKEY, PATRICK FRANCIS BURKE, D.S.O., late Indian Service of Engrs. (United Provs.) (b. 14th Dec., 1885).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1909; in mil. employ from 18th June, 1915 to 5th May, 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1917; offg. suptg. engr., Nov., 1930; confd., Nov., 1931; offg. ch. engr., variously from Mar., 1935; confd., Dec., 1939; ret'd., 1st Feb., 1944.

HICKINBOTHAM, TOM, C.I.E., O.B.E., Major, I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 27th Apl., 1903).—First commn., 30th Aug., 1923; in military employ until 15th March, 1930; offg. under-secty. to A.G.G., Punjab States, Dec., 1932; civil secty. to ch. commr., Aden, Dec., 1933; asst. pol. agent, Bahrain, Apl., 1936; offg. pol. agent, Bahrain, May, 1936; secty. to pol. resdtd. in Persian Gulf, Nov., 1937; civil secty., member of exec. cl., Colony of Aden and passport offer., Aden, March, 1938; O.B.E., Jan., 1939; under sec. to pol. resdtd., Persian

Gulf, Feb., 1939; pol. agent, Muscat, Apl., 1939; pol. agt., Kuwait, Aug., 1941; C.I.E., Jan., 1944; pol. agt., Bahrain, Aug., 1943; again, Nov., 1944.

HICKS, GEORGE AUGUSTUS, V.D., late Indian State Ry., Burma (b. 10th Dec., 1879).—Retd., Dec., 1936.*

HICKS, HENRY ARTHUR HUGH GERARD, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 31st Oct., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., on 11th Dec., 1922; dep. consvr., Nov., 1926.

HICKS, VERNON WILLIAM FARQUHARSON, O.B.E., Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 30th Jan., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. supt., on 27th Dec., 1919; addl. supt., March, 1926; supt., Aug., 1929; O.B.E., Jan., 1935; on depn. under govt. of India (rly. bd.) for employment as supt., watch and ward dept., E.B. Rly., May, 1936 to Aug., 1939; temp. dep. inspr.-gen. prisons, Feb., 1943 to Aug., 1944.

HIDAYATULLAH, KHAN BAHADUR SHAIKH, SIR GHULAM HUSAIN, K.C.S.I., B.A., LL.B.—Member of govt.'s exec. council, Bombay, June 1928 to June, 1934; delegate to Indian round table conf., London, Nov., 1930—Jan., 1931; Second Session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; services placed at disposal of Govt. of India, Reform Office, Oct., 1931; K.C.S.I., June, 1933.

HIGGINS, JOHN COMYN, C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (Assam) (b. 21st May, 1882).—Educ. at Bradfield and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1905; arrived 22nd Dec., 1906, and served in E. Bengal and Assam as asst. mag., and collr.; vice-presdt., Manipur Durbar, May 1910; asst. commr., Assam, and ditto, Apl., 1912; C.I.E., June, 1920; dep. commr. March 1921; pol. agent, Manipur, Apl., 1924; offg. commr., March, 1934; ditto (provl. subs.), Feb., 1935; confd., Oct., 1935; member, rev. tribunal, Apl., 1939; retd., 22nd Dec., 1941; civ. liaison offr., Dec., 1941, to Jan., 1944; chairman, publ. serv. commn., Assam, Jan., 1944.

HIGGINS RICHARD, Indian Police (dep. inspr.-gen., Bengal) (b. 19th Apl., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt. on 15th March, 1921; addl. supt., Feb., 1925, and again March, 1927; offg. supt., March, 1928; offg. dep. comm. of police, Calcutta, March, 1928; confd., Jan., 1931; confd., dep. inspr.-gen., May, 1943; Indian police medal, 1944; offr. of the Order of St. John.

HIGGS, MERVYN ARMSTRONG, M.B.E., M.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (U.P.) (b. 8th Oct., 1887).—Retd., July, 1938.*

HIGHAM, BERNARD, C.I.E., M.B., M.R.C.S. (Eng.), L.R.C.P. (Lond.), Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., retd. (b. 14th Dec., 1880).—Retd., Dec., 1935.*

HIGHAM, REV. PHILIP, M.A., late Indian Eccles Estabt. (b. 21st Sept., 1888).—Joined the service, 1st Dec., 1919; junr. chaplain, Nov., 1921; senr. chaplain, Nov., 1931; retd., Apl., 1942.

HIGHET, JAMES COCHRANE, F.C.H., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian State Railways (N.W. Rly.) (b. 19th May, 1884).—Retd., May, 1939.*

HIGMAN, WALTER FREDERICK BARON, A.M.Inst.T., Indian State Ry., (transpn. traffic-commcl. supt., E.I. rly.) (b. 18th May, 1902); joined the service, 29th July, 1921; asst. supt. Apl., 1922; senr. scale (provl.), Aug., 1937; confd., July, 1938.

HILEY, ARTHUR CLIFFORD, C.I.E., Indian Forest Service (chief consvr.) (b. 11th Sept.,

1887).—Joined the service, Dec., 1910, as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Dec., 1915; offg. consvr., July, 1927; confd., Aug., 1928; chief consvr., Bombay, Apl., 1937; C.I.E., Jan., 1939.

HILL, KENNETH ARTHUR LULHAM, B.A. (Cantab.), Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 22nd Apl., 1899).—Educ. at Dulwich Coll. and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 30th Oct., 1922; arrived, 13th Dec., 1922, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., variously from March, 1932; confd., Feb., 1936; commr. presdy. divn., Nov., 1940; sec., forest and excise dept., Apl., 1941; sec., agric. dept., Feb. 1942; jt. sec. co-op. credit dept., Oct., 1942 to Apl., 1944.

HILL, NEVILLE CHARLES, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 9th Sept., 1909).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Burma, 26th Jan., 1933; confd., Jan., 1935.

HILL, REGINALD JOHN JAMES, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 1st July, 1905).—Educ. at Univ. of Edinburgh, and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1928; arrived, 12th Nov., 1928, and served in the Central Provinces as asst. commr., under-sec. to govt., Jan., 1931; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1932; sec. to govt. of India (fin.), July, 1944.

HILL, ROBERT HUGHES, M.A. Indian Agricul. Service (dep. dir. of agric., Central Provs.) (b. 5th Nov., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. dir. of agric., Dec., 1920; economic botanist, Dec., 1925; dep. dir. of agric., Oct., 1926.

HILL, RONALD ARTHUR CHARLES, O.B.E., Indian Police (dep. inspr.-gen., Punjab) (b. 11th July, 1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 15th Oct., 1921; offg. supt., Feb., 1926; confd., July, 1927; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1931; O.B.E., May, 1937; asst. inspr., genrly. police, May, 1943; dep. inspr.-gen., police Lahore, Apl., 1944.

HILL, ROWLAND ALFRED KIRHKAM, M.B.E., late Indian Political Service (b. 26th March, 1884).—Retd., March, 1939.*

HILTON, GORDON CHARLES, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Punjab) (b. 26th Oct., 1885).—Retd., July 1938.*

HIND, NEVILLE GODFREY, C.S.I., M.C., Major-Gen., I.A.; (b. 8th Jan., 1892).—First commn., 6th Sept., 1911; in mil. employ until 18th May, 1938; dep. secty. to Govt. of India, def. dept., May, 1938 to 4th March, 1940; C.S.I., June, 1943.

HINDE, REGINALD GRAHAM, Lieut.-Col., I.A., retd., late Indian Political Service, (b. 19th May, 1887).—Retd., Apl., 1939.*

HINDLEY, SIR CLEMENT DANIEL MAGGS, K.C.I.E., late Indian Railway Board.—Retd., Sept., 1929.*

HINDLEY, NOEL LANYON, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 24th Dec., 1893).—Educ. at Marlborough Coll. and Cambridge Univ.; apptd., after exam. of 1920; arrived, 4th Dec., 1920, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1925; dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1931; registrar, high ct., appellate side, Nov., 1931 to March, 1935; dist. and sess. judge, Assam, Nov., 1936.

HIRA SINGH, SARDAR SAHIB, late Punjab Med. Service (b. Oct., 1882).—Retd., Oct., 1937.*

HITCHCOCK, RONALD VICTOR, V.D., B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E. late Indian State Ry., (b. 22nd June, 1885).—Retd., May, 1939.*

HITCHCOCK, WILLIAM SURRIDGE, late

Indian Police (Bihar and Orissa) (b. 14th Nov., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. supt. on 30th Nov., 1910; supt., March, 1922; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1927; on deputation as dep. supt., watch and wards, E.I. Rly., Feb., 1927 to Apr., 1928; central intelligence officer, Bihar, March, 1939; ret'd., 29 Jan., 1942.

HO, KWAY FOUNG, B.A., Burma C.S. (Cl. I) (asst. commr.) (b. 20th March, 1913).—Educ. at, Rangoon Univ.; joined the service, 8th Sept., 1938; arrived in Burma, Dec., 1938, and served as asst. commr.; on military service, Nov., 1940.

HOARE, CHARLES EDGAR, India Office (higher exec. officer, mil. dept.) (b. 1st Jan., 1891).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, 13th Nov., 1913; war services—European war, 1914-16; exec. officer, Apr., 1922; joint editor, India Office List, May, 1932 to Oct., 1937; actg. higher exec. officer, March, 1933; confd., Sept., 1935; actg. supply officer, March, 1941.

HOARE, THE RIGHT HON. SIR SAMUEL, Bt., P.C., G.C.S.I., G.B.E., C.M.G., Hon. LL.D. (Cantab.), M.P. (Lord Templewood), Secty. of State for India, Aug., 1931, to June, 1935.

HOBART, ROBERT CHARLES ARTHUR STANLEY, C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 27th July, 1881).—Ret'd., Apr., 1939.*

HOBSON, JAMES, Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 24th Aug., 1895).—Joined the service, 16th Dec., 1922; offg. supt., Nov. 1925; confd., Nov., 1932; asst. to dep. inspr.-gen. of police, C.I.D., Poona, Oct., 1938 to Oct. 1939; dep. commr. police, Bombay, Nov., 1941 to June, 1943.

HODDER, WILFORD OWEN PENDEREL, O.B.E., Indian Police Service (supt., N.W.F.P.) (b. 10th May, 1903).—Joined the service as asst. supt. on 30th Nov., 1922; offg. dist. officer, frontier constabulary, March, 1926; offg. supt., Sept., 1930; supt. (prov. subs.), June, 1935; offg. asst. dir., intel., Govt. of India, July, 1939; supt., Nov., 1938; on spec. duty, C.I.D., Apr., 1940; asst. inspr.-gen., C.I.D., June, 1940; O.B.E., June, 1940; asst. dir. intell., Quetta, Jan., 1944.

HODDER, WILLIAM ST. LAWRENCE, Indian Police (b. 10th Aug., 1907).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 16th Nov., 1927; addtl. supt., Oct., 1940; confd. as supt., Jan., 1943; under central govt., C.I.D., Delhi, June, 1944.

HODGE, EDWARD HUMFREY VERE, C.I.E., Lieut.-Col. ret'd., late I.M.S. (b. 28th Aug., 1883).—Ret'd., Aug., 1938.*

HODGE, JOHN DOUGLAS VERE, C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (Bengal) (b. 17th Oct., 1887).—Ret'd., Jan., 1939.*

HODGE, WILLIAM ERIC, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bengal) (b. 2nd Apr., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 6th Oct., 1921; dep. consvr., Nov., 1923.

HODSON, ERIC, Indian Police (dep. inspr.-gen., Bengal) (b. 19th March, 1894).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 2nd Dec. 1913; confd. June, 1915; addtl. supt., April, 1922; awarded King's police medal, 1924; supt., July, 1925; dep. commr. of police, Calcutta, Feb., 1934; dep. inspr.-gen., June, 1942; comdt. civil pioneer force, Bengal, Dec., 1941.

HODSON, ROBERT VIVIAN ERIC, Capt. I.A. (b. 20th July, 1914).—Apptd. to I.P.S. on probn., Oct., 1939; under-sec. to res. Baroda and for states of W.I. and Gujarat, Nov., 1944.

HOGG, SIR GILBERT PITCAIRN, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 2nd Feb., 1884).—Educ. at Glasgow High Sch. and Glasgow

Univ.; apptd. after exam. of 1907; arrived 28th Nov., 1908, and served in E. Bengal and Assam as asst. mag. and collr.; transfed. to Bengal, Apr., 1912; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Nov., 1914; vice-chairman, Chittagong port commrs, July, 1915; on mil. duty, Oct. 1917 to Jan., 1918, offg. addtl. dist. and sess. judge, Assam, May, 1918; on mil. duty, Aug., 1918, to Jan., 1919; and returned to Bengal; mag. and collr., Apr., 1921; commr. of excise and salt, Bengal, Sept., 1923; offg. sec., govt. of Bengal, agric. and industries dept., and director of industries, Apr., 1926; secty., govt. of Bengal, agric. and industries and P.W. depts., Nov., 1928; offg. commr., July, 1931; confd., Dec., 1931; C.I.F., June, 1932; addtl. secty. to govt. of Bengal, pol. dept., Oct., 1932, offg. ch. secty. to govt., Bengal, Apr., 1933; confd., Jan., 1934; tempy. member, govr.'s exec. council, Bengal, Apr., 1936, and again, Feb. 1937; C.S.I., June, 1936; actg. govr. of Assam, June to Oct., 1938; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1939; ret'd., Feb., 1941.

HOGG, SIR MALCOLM NICHOLSON, Kt., member of council of India, May, 1920, to Apr., 1925.

HOGSHAW, FRANCIS HENRY, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bengal) (b. 16th Dec., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 10th Oct., 1915; exec. engr., Oct., 1924; offg. supt. engr., Nov., 1934.

HOLBERTON, NELSON VAUGHAN, late Indian Forest Service (Burma) (b. 27th May, 1885).—Ret'd., Feb., 1938.*

HOLDING, SAMUEL HENRY, late India Posts and Tels. (b. 7th Apr., 1882).—Ret'd., Apr., 1937.*

HOLGATE, MAURICE JAMES, O.B.E., M.B., B.S. (Lon.), Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 15th May, 1884).—Ret'd., May, 1939.*

HOLLAND, ARCHER SELWYN, late Indian Police (Bombay) (b. 23rd Oct., 1886).—Joined the service, 23rd Nov., 1907, as asst. supt.; supt. of police, Apr., 1920; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Jan., 1932; confd., Jan., 1934; ret'd., 23rd Oct., 1941.

HOLLAND, EDGAR WILLIAM, C.I.E., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bengal) (b., 28th Apr., 1899).—Educ. at Rossall Sch., and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 26th Nov., 1923; arrived, 15th Dec., 1923, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., March, 1929; confd., Dec., 1936; jt. secty. to govt., co-op. edn. dept., Bengal, Apr., 1937; spec. offr., fin. dept., Bengal, July, 1940; sec. publ. health dept., Aug., 1943; C.I.E., June, 1944.

HOLLAND, LAWRENCE BERTRAM, B.A., late Indian Forest Service (Orissa) (b. 25th Feb., 1885).—Ret'd., Aug., 1939.*

HOLLAND, SIR ROBERT ERSKINE, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., C.V.O., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 29th June, 1873).—Ret'd. from I.C.S., Apr., 1925; member of Council of India, 21st Apr., 1925; to July, 1931.*

HOLLAND, SIR THOMAS HENRY, K.C.S.I., K.C.I.E., D.Sc., F.R.S., late Berkeley Fellow of the Owens Coll., late Geol. survey of India; member, govr.-genl.'s Council, Apr., 1920 to Sept., 1921.*

HOLLIDAY, GEORGE DARGUE, B.Sc., Indian Police (b. 14th May, 1906).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 17th Nov., 1926. confd. as supt., March, 1942.

HOLLINS, SAMUEL THOMAS, C.I.E., late

Indian Police (United Provs.) (b. 6th Oct., 1881).—Retd., Oct., 1936.*

HOLMAN, THOMAS GEORGE HOATHLEY, Indian Police (supt.) (b. 10th July, 1905).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bengal, on 1st Jan., 1926; offg. addl. supt., variously from March, 1932; offg. princpl., police training coll., Sardah, Apl., 1933; supt. (temp.), June, 1936; confd., June, 1938; princpl. police trng. coll., Sardah, Feb., 1943.

HOLMES, ANDREW GILMOUR, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 5th June, 1915).—Educ. at George Heriot's Sch., Edinburgh and Edinburgh Univ.; joined the service 20th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr., jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1939; addl. mag. Apl., 1942; dep. contr. rationing, Nov., 1943.

HOLMES, ARTHUR MALCOLM, Indian Police (b. 21st July, 1908).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Central Provs., 24th Nov., 1928; A.D.C. to govr., C.P., Dec., 1933 to June, 1937; awarded King's police medal, July, 1938; asst. to inspr.-gen., Feb., 1944.

HOLMES, FREDERICK GORDON, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 14th July, 1916).—Educ. at King Edward's School, Bath, and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1939; confd., 4th March, 1941; served in United Provs., as asst. mag. and collr.

HOLMES, HENRY CHRISTOPHER, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bombay) (b. 10th Sept., 1897).—Joined the service, as forest engr., Bombay, 24th Nov., 1921; dep. consvr., July, 1928; on active service with R.N. from 1st Nov. 1939.

HOLMES, JAMES EDWARD, Office of High Commr. for India (exec. officer, store dept.) (b. 30th Aug., 1897).—Apptd. clerical officer, India Office, 2nd Feb., 1920; transferred to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; actg. exec. officer, May, 1930; confd., July, 1935.

HOLROYD, LIEUT.-COL. GILBERT, M.B., I.M.S., ret'd., Jail Dept., United Provs. (b. 17th Sept., 1880).—Retd., Aug., 1935.*

HOLT, EDWARD HARLAND, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collector, Sind) (b. 20 Apl., 1907).—Educ. at Bradford Grammar School and Queen's College, Oxford; apptd. after examination of 1930; arrived in India Nov., 1931, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; served in Sind from Apl., 1936.

HOLT, JOHN WILLIAM CECIL, Indian State Rlys. (dep. dir. rly. bd.) (b. 22nd July, 1900).—Asst. supt., E.I. rly., Oct., 1925; supt. (senr.) Aug., 1937.

HOMAN, ARTHUR KNOX, late Indian State Rlys (N.W. rly.)—Retd., Oct., 1939.*

HOMFRAY, CHARLES KENYON, late Indian Forest Service (Bengal) (b. 19th Apl., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. consvr. on 11th Dec., 1922; dep. consvr., Nov., 1924; ret'd., May, 1940.

HOOD, SIR HUGH MEGGISON, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., Indian C.S. (adviser to the govr., Madras) (b. 5th June, 1885).—Educ. at Middlesbrough High Sch., and Jesus Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 23rd Nov., 1909, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Sept., 1916; on mil. duty from Aug., 1916 to Apl., 1919; registrar, co-operative societies, Apl., 1923; and again, Nov., 1926; offg. collr. and dist. mag., March, 1924; confd., Aug., 1929; offg. sec. to govt., rev. dept., Dec., 1925; chairman, Madras provl. banking enquiry commee., Dec., 1929; offg. secty. to

govt., finance dept., Apl., 1931; confd. Dec., 1931; C.I.E., June, 1934; offg. secty. to govt., Madras, law and educn. dept., March, 1936; secty. to govt., home dept., Apl., 1936; offg. second secty. to govt., Apl., 1936; offg. ch. secty. to govt., Madras, June, 1936; Aug., 1938 and Aug., 1939; C.S.I., Jan., 1939; 3rd membr. bd. of rev. (provl. subst.); adviser to the govr., Oct., 1939; K.C.I.E., June, 1942.

HOOD, ROBERT HOOD, late Indian Service of Engineers (United Provs.) (b. 18th Dec., 1891).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1919; asst. engr., Dec., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Sept., 1921; exec. engr., Oct., 1924; ret'd. 23rd Oct., 1940.

HOOD, VISCOUNT, SAMUEL HOOD, B.A., India Office (b. Oct. 15th, 1910).—Educ. at Eton and Trinity College, Cambridge; apptd. asst. princpl., Feb. 19th, 1935; resdt. clk., March, 1936; asst. pte. secty. to secty. of state for India, Sept., 1936; ditto for Burma, Apl., 1937; actg. princpl., May, 1939; services loaned to the Ministry of Information, Sept., 1939.

HOOD, WILLIAM, Indian State Rlys. (dep. ch. engr. (bridges), G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 5th Sept., 1893).—Joined the service as asst. bridge engr., 23rd Jan., 1925; senr. asst. ditto, Aug., 1927; offg. dep. ch. engr. (bridges), Nov., 1932; confd., Sept., 1934; offg. dep. ch. contr. of standardisation, July, 1936; dep. ch. engr. provl., Apl., 1941.

HOOGWERF, GERALD JAMES, Indian Police (b. 8th Oct., 1918).—Apptd. asst. supt., United Provs., on probn., Nov., 1938.

HOOJA, MADAN MOHAN LALL, B.Sc., Indian Police (b. 5th Sept., 1914).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bengal, on probn., March, 1939; confd., March, 1941.

HOOLE, NORMAN PETER GLEDHILL, Indian Police (b. 9th May, 1916).—Apptd. asst. supt., Burma, on probn., 6th Dec., 1935.

HOON, PRAN NATH, Indian State Rlys. (dist. contr. of stores, E.B. rly.) (b. 5th March, 1889).—Joined the service, 12th Jan., 1915; asst. contr. of stores, Sept., 1923; dist. contr. of stores (junr.), E.B. rly., Sept., 1926; ditto (senr.), May, 1933.

HOOPER, ERNEST GEORGE GALE, Office of the High Commr. for India (exec. officer, store dept.) (b. 14th Dec., 1899).—Apptd., clerical officer, 3rd Feb., 1924, after service at India Office from 21st May, 1920; exec. officer, 1st Nov., 1932.

HOOPER, GEOFFREY GRANT, B.A., M.C., late Indian Civil Service (Bengal) (b. 7th Dec., 1891).—Retd., Jan., 1938.*

HOPE, CAPT. THE HON. SIR ARTHUR OSWALD JAMES, G.C.I.E., M.C., govr. of Madras, March, 1940.

HOPE, JOHN RUTHERFORD, O.B.E., Mil. Accts. Dept. (b. 14th May, 1894).—Held non-gaz. and sub-gaz. appts. from Apl., 1922 to Apl., 1929; apptd. to class II, Apl., 1929; dep. finl. advr., R.A.F., Oct., 1934; dep. finl. advr., mil. fin., Oct., 1938; O.B.E., Jan., 1941.

HOPE, ROBERT CYPRIAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Madras) (b. 25th Sept., 1915).—Educ. at St. Edward's Sch., Oxford, and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 6th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Nov., 1938, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.

HOPKINS, ALAN CECIL, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Central Provs.) (b. 30th Oct., 1896).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 5th Dec., 1924; dep. consvr., Sept., 1926.

HOPKINS, EDWARD ALFRED, Indian Police

(supt., Punjab) (b. 4th Aug., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, on 29th Nov., 1921; offg. supt., May, 1928; awarded King's police medal, March, 1929

HOPKINS, GEOFFREY MAYNE, O.B.E., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., United Provs.) (b. 5th July, 1898).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., on 30th Nov., 1921; dep. consvr., Oct., 1926; O.B.E., Jan., 1942.

HOPKINSON, ARTHUR JOHN, C.I.E., Indian Civil Service, Indian Political Service, (b. 28th Nov., 1894).—Educ. at Marlborough, and Exeter Coll., Oxford; arrived, 10th May, 1920, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; services placed at disposal of govt. of India, for. and pol. dept., Feb., 1924; asst. commr., Ajmer-Merwara, March, 1924; British trade agent at Gyantse and asst. to pol. offr. in Sikkim, Jan., 1927; pol. agt., E. Kathiawar states, Nov., 1928; dep. commr., Hazara, Nov., 1930; secty. to govt., N.W.F.P., transf. depts., Apl., 1932; chief secty., N.W.F.P., Apl., 1934; C.I.E., Jan., 1938; serv. in N.W.F.P., again from Oct., 1938; pol. agt., W. Kathiawar agency, March, 1939; secty. to A.G.G., resdt. and ch. commr. in Baluchistan, Sept., 1940; pol. agent in Kalat and pol. agent in charge of Bolan Pass, Oct., 1941; on specl. duty, Sikkim, Dec., 1944.

HOPWOOD, STEPHEN FRANCIS, M.C., late Indian Forest Service (b. 23rd June, 1880).—Retd., June, 1935.*

HORMAZDIAR PHIROZ DASTUR (see Dastur, H. P.).

HORNELL, SIR WILLIAM WOODWARD, Kt., C.I.E., B.A. (Oxon.), late Indian Educatl. Service.*

HORSFIELD, HERBERT ELLIS, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bihar and Orissa) (b. 3rd Nov., 1887).—Retd., Apl., 1937.*

HORSFIELD, RODERICK, Indian State Rys. (divl. trans. supt., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 30th Apl., 1893).—Joined the service as asst. trans. supt., 18th Apl., 1924; offg. divl. trans. supt., Dec., 1926; confd., Sept., 1930.

HORTON, RALPH ALBERT, C.I.E., late Indian Police (United Provs.) (b. 5th Oct., 1885).—Joined the service as asst. supt. on 25th Nov., 1906; supt., Oct., 1921; C.I.E., Jan., 1928; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Apl., 1932; confd., May, 1936; offg. inspr.-genl., June, 1935; confd., Oct., 1936; retd., Oct., 1940.

HORWILL, LIONEL CLIFFORD, Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Madras) (b. 19th Sept., 1890).—Educ. at Royal Coll. of Science and Univ. Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived, 10th Dec., 1915, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; on milty. duty, July, 1916, to Dec., 1919; sub. collr., Sept., 1921; offg. dist. and sess. judge, March, 1925; confd., Feb., 1929; addl. judge, ct. of resdt., Hyderabad, Nov., 1935; offg. judge, high ct., Madras, variously from July, 1936; dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1938; judge, high ct., Madras, Jan., 1940.

HOSALI, SATYENDRANATH, B.A., Indian Police (b. 4th July, 1913) (asst. supt., Bombay).—Apptd. on probn., 3rd Feb., 1937; confd., March, 1939.

HOSE, SIR JOHN WALTER, Kt., C.S.I., late Indian C.S. and India Office.—Retd., Jan., 1916; employed in India Office from Jan., 1916, to Oct., 1926.*

HOSIE, JAMES FINDLAY, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Bihar) (b. 22nd Aug., 1913).—Educ. at Kilsyth Academy, Glasgow Univ., and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd.

on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 9th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Dec., 1938, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.; sub. divl. offr., 1940; under sec., pol. and appts. dept., Apl., 1942.

HOULTON, JOHN WARDLE, C.I.E., B.A. (Cantab.), Indian C.S. (offg. ch. sec. to govt., Bihar) (b. 28th Jan., 1892).—Educ. at Christ's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 5th Feb., 1920; arrived, 12th May, 1920, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; mag. and collr. (provl. sub.), March, 1932; offg. secty. to govt., rev. dept., Bihar and Orissa, Apl., 1933; mag. and collr., July, 1935; C.I.E., Jan., 1939; commr. of excise, and I.G.R., July, 1940; offg. ch. sec. to govt., Bihar, Apl., 1944.

HOWARD, SIR ALBERT, Kt., C.I.E., M.A., A.R.C.S., F.C.S., F.L.S., late Dept. of Agric.—Joined the service, 5th May, 1905, as biological botanist, Agric. Coll., Pusa; imperial economic botanist, May, 1906; C.I.E., June, 1924; on foreign service under Indore Durbar, Oct., 1924; retd., Dec., 1928; kt., June, 1934.

HOWARD, SIR HENRY GEORGE, Maj., C.I.E., M.C., M.I.E.E., M.A.M.Soc.C.E., Electricity Dept., Madras (b. 5th Oct., 1883).—Chief engr. for electricity on agreement from 6th Sept., 1927; consltg. engr. to govt. on contract, Nov., 1939; kt., Jan., 1939.

HOWARD, SIR STANLEY HERBERT, B.A., Indian Forest Service (b. 17th Apl., 1888).—Joined the service, 23rd Nov., 1912, as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Nov., 1916; silviculturist, forest research inst., Dehra Dun, Oct., 1919, to Jan., 1926; offg. consvr., Dec., 1929; and again, Apl., 1933; confd., Apl., 1936; ch. consvr., March, 1940; inspr.-genl. of forests and president, forest resch. inst., Dehra Dun, 1940; kt., Jan., 1943.

HOWARD, REV. GEORGE JOSEPH, Indian Eccles. Estabt. (junr. chaplain) (b. 12th Feb., 1906).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., Madras diocese, Sept., 1938; junr. chaplain, Sept., 1940; on mil. duty, Feb., 1944.

HOWE, HENRY, B.A., A.M.I.C.E., M.I.E. (Ind.), late Indian State Rlys. (b. 19th July, 1883).—Retd., June, 1939.*

HOWE, ROBERT DOUGLAS, B.A., B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 21st Feb., 1914).—Educ. at Bishop Foy Sch., Waterford, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 12th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Nov., 1938, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.

HOWELL, ALFRED EDWARD, Indian State Rlys. (production engr., N.W. Rly.) (b. 31st March, 1890).—Joined the service as asst. works manager, N.W. rly., 6th Apl., 1927; production engr., N.W. rly., Oct., 1930.

HOWELL, DAVID ARNOLD, C.I.E., O.B.E., A.M.I.C.E., Public Works Dept., Punjab (chief engr.) (b. 28th June, 1890).—Joined the service as asst. sany. engr., 25th Dec., 1920; exec. sany. engr., March, 1921; offg. suptg. engr., Apl., 1932; confd., Dec., 1932; O.B.E., June, 1939; C.I.E., Jan., 1944; ch. engr., p.w.d., public health branch, Jan., 1944.

HOWELL, SIR EVELYN BERKELEY, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., M.A., late Indian C.S. (Punjab and N.W. Frontier Prov.) (b. 12th Feb., 1877).—Retd., Sept., 1934.*

HOWES, JOHN BARON, O.B.E., Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 17th Dec., 1907).—First commn., 12th Sept., 1931; pers. asst. to pol. res., Persian Gulf, Oct., 1935; under-sec. to

pol. res., Persian Gulf (addl. charge), Feb., 1936; asst. pol. agent, Bahrain, May, 1936; under trng. in United Provs., Jan., 1937; on special duty, Karachi, Apr., 1938; asst. pol. agent, Bahrain, Sept., 1938; confd. in Indian political service, Feb., 1939; pol. officer, Trucial Coast, Oct., 1939; and again, July, 1940; publicity officer, Persian Gulf, Oct., 1940; M.B.E., June, 1941; pol. agent, Muscat, Aug., 1941; under-sec., external affairs dept., March, 1944; O.B.E., June, 1944; dep. sec., infm. and broadcasting dept., Sept., 1944.

HOWROYD, ROGER ANTHONY FITZWILLIAM, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 20th Dec., 1915).—Educ. at Eton and Magdalen Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1939; confd., 27th Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940, and served in Punjab as asst. commr.

HOWSON, GEOFFREY, C.I.E., M.C., Lieut.-Col., I.A., retd., For. and Pol. Dept., Govt. of India (asst. master, Mayo coll., Ajmer) (b. 14th Aug., 1883).—First commn. dated 21st Jan. 1903; C.I.E., June, 1919; in milty. employ to 24th Apr., 1927; asst. master, Mayo coll., Ajmer, Apr., 1927.

HOWSON, WILLIAM ROXBURGH, Capt., I.A. (b. 3rd June, 1914).—Apptd. to I.P.S. on probn., Oct., 1938; vice-consul, Khorramshahr, Oct., 1944.

HOYLE, ARTHUR LASCELLES, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Central Provs.) (b. 18th Jan., 1887).—Retd., March, 1937.*

HOYLE, LEONARD ARTHUR, late Indian State Rlys. (G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 4th Feb., 1886).—Joined the service, 5th July, 1928; as traction engr., rolling stock, G.I.P. rly., offg. depy. transport supt. (traction), June, 1930; asst. divl. supt. (traction), G.I.P. rly., May, 1933; retd., Apr., 1941.

HTAY, MAUNG BA, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 3rd June, 1908).—Educ. at the Wesleyan High Sch., Monywa, Rangoon Univ., and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, January, 1934, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; western sub-divl. mag. June, 1938; asst. settlt. offr., Oct., 1940.

HUBAN, JOHN PATRICK, O.B.E., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. (surgn.-gen., Madras) (b. 13th Feb., 1891).—First commn. dated 23rd Sept., 1914; in milty. employ to 16th Oct., 1922; O.B.E., Jan., 1920; civil surgn., Oct., 1922; ch. medl. officer, Jaipur, Jan., 1932; admin. medl. officer in Rajputana and addtl. depy. dir.-gen., I.M.S., 1940; inspr.-gen., civil hos., and d.p.h., N.W.F.P., 1941; surgn.-gen., Madras, July, 1944.

HUBBACH, SIR JOHN AUSTEN, K.C.S.I., M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 28th Feb., 1878).—Educ. at Winchester and King's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1901; arrived, 6th Dec., 1902; and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr., and asst. settlmt. offr.; settlmt. offr., May, 1909; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Feb., 1910; transf. to Bihar and Orissa, Apr., 1912; special duty, bd. of rev., Dec., 1912; offg. sec., ditto, Sept., 1913, to May, 1914; temp. empd. in rev. and statistics dept., India Office, from May to Sept., 1915; mag. and collr., March, 1916; serving under govt. of India, army dept., from May to July, 1918; offg. sec. to govt., Bihar and Orissa, rev. and judl. depts., Feb. 1919; confd., Apr., 1919; dir. of land records and surveys, Bihar and Orissa, Feb., 1923; offg. commr., Feb., 1925; confd., Dec., 1928; offg. member, bd. of rev.,

May, 1932; C.S.I., Jan., 1933; temp. member, govr.'s exec. council, Bihar and Orissa, Aug., 1933; and again, Oct., 1934; confd., Feb., 1935; K.C.S.I., Feb., 1936; govr. of Orissa, Apr., 1936; retd., Apr., 1941; apptd. advr. to sec. of state for India, March, 1942.

HUBBARD, ALEXANDER EGERTON, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 5th Nov., 1882).—Retd., June, 1939.*

HUBBARD, PHILIP MAITLAND, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 9th Nov., 1910).—Educ. at Elizabeth Coll., Guernsey, and Jesus Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Punjab as asst. commr.; asst. colonzn. offr., May, 1937, to Oct., 1937; sub. divl. offr., Nov., 1938; on for. serv. under Bahawalpur state, Nov., 1939; colonzn. offr., Oct., 1941; addtl. dist. and sess. judge, 1944.

HUDDELETON, SIR ERNEST WHITESIDE, C.I.E., C.B.E., Capt., R.I.N. (retd.), late Office of High Commr. for India (b. 18th Aug., 1874).—Retd., Sept., 1938.*

HUDSON, SIR HAVELOCK, G.C.B., K.C.I.E., A.D.C., Gen., Indian Army (retd.), (b. 26th June, 1862); late vice-presd., Council of India, Nov., 1928*

HUDSON, SIR WALTER FRANK, K.C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (Sind) (b. 22nd Aug., 1875).—Retd., Oct., 1933.*

HUGGINS, HENRY WALTER, Indian State Rlys. (late N.W. Rly.) (b. 10th Oct., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. loco. supt., 25th Jan., 1914; dist. loco. supt., Sept., 1925; divl. rolling stock offr., Oct., 1927; offg. dep. ch. operating supt., March, 1936; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr., Oct., 1936; provl. perm., Nov., 1937; confd., Oct., 1939; retd., 9th Oct., 1944.

HUGHES, ARTHUR, O.B.E., B.A. (Man.), Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 25th Jan., 1905).—Educ. at City and County Sch., Chester, Victoria Univ., Manchester, and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 14th Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., Aug., 1933; offg. addl. dep. secty. to the govt. of Bengal, fin., comm. and marine depts., Nov., 1936; dep. secty., ditto, Apr., 1937; jt. secty., com. and lab. dept., Bengal, May, 1938; offcr. on spec. duty, dept. of lab., govt. of India, May, 1940; O.B.E., June, 1943; chairman, labour tribunal, Nov., 1943.

HUGHES, DEDWYDD WILLIAM, B.A., late Indian Forest Service (Burma) (b. 7th Apr., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. consvr. on 19th Dec., 1912; dep. consvr., March, 1915; retd., Feb., 1945.

HUGHES, HENRY, A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Burma) (b. 18th June, 1885).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1907; exec. engr., Oct., 1915; offg. supt. engr., July, 1924; confd., June, 1928; offg. dep. ch. engr., June, 1932; offg. ch. engr., Apr., 1935; confd., May, 1938; retd., Sept., 1940.

HUGHES, THOMAS LEWIS, C.B.E., late Indian C.S. (b. 27th July, 1897).—Educ. at Birkenhead Sch.; on mil. service from Sept., 1915, to Dec., 1922; joined the service, 29th Oct., 1923, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; sub-divl. offices, Jan., 1925; offg. dep. commr., Dec., 1932; ditto (provs. subs.), March, 1935; secty. to finl. commr., Burma, Dec., 1936; retd., Aug., 1939; re-empd. as sec. to govr., Burma, Sept., 1942; C.B.E., Jan., 1943.

HUGHES, VIVIAN ARTHUR, late India Posts

and Tels. (b. 14th Nov., 1882).—Retd., July, 1937.*

HUGHES-HUGHES, EDWARD ESSEX, Indian Police (asst. supt., Assam) (b. 11th Aug., 1915).—Apptd. on probn., Nov., 1936; confd., Nov., 1938; asst. to the pol. offr., Sadiya Frontier Tract, Nov., 1938, to Dec., 1939.

HUGHFF, REGINALD GEORGE, Indian State Rlys. (works manager, E.I. Rly.) (b. 30th Oct., 1892).—Joined the service, 11th Feb., 1921; works manager, E.I. rly., Sept., 1923; offg. pers. asst. to dep. ch. mechl. engr., senr. scale, June, 1925, and again, Feb., 1929; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr., E.I. rly., Jan., 1936; confd., Apl., 1940.

HUKAM CHAND, RAI BAHADUR, LALA, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 22nd Feb., 1880).—Retd., Feb., 1935.*

HUKUM SINGH, THAKUR, Rai Bahadur, B.A., late United Provs. C.S. (b. March, 1884).—Retd., March, 1939.*

HULKOTI, CHANAPPA CHANVIRAPPA, LL.B., late Bombay C.S. (Judl. Branch) (b. 27th Dec., 1887).—Held various judicial appointments from 22nd June, 1928; judge and sess. judge, 16th Jan., 1930; dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1936; retd., 27th Dec., 1942.

HULL, GEORGE, Comdr., R.I.N., retd., late Marine Dept., Burma (b. 2nd July, 1879).—Retd., Apl., 1937.*

HULLAND, WALTER GEORGE, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 28th Jan., 1908).—Educ. at the Grammar Sch., Barnstaple, and Jesus Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

HUME, ANDREW PARKE, Indian C.S., mag. and collr., United Provs. (b. 24th Nov., 1904).—Educ. at University Sch., Hastings, Lausanne, and King's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 21st Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in the United Provs. as asst. commr.; jt. mag., Aug., 1929; offg. dep. commr., March, 1932; offg. addl. dep. secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, June, 1936; offr. on spl. duty, ditto, Sept., 1936; chairman, Delhi improvement trust, March, 1937; dep. secty., dept. of supply, May, 1941; confd. as mag. and collr., July, 1941; jt. sec., supply dep. Aug., 1944.

HUME, ROBERT, O.B.E., Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl., Madras) (b. 1st Jan., 1896).—Joined the service, 4th Dec., 1920; asst. supt., Aug., 1923; supt., May 1930; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1925; O.B.E., June, 1931; dep. commr. for town of Madras, Feb., 1935; awarded Indian police medal, Jan., 1938; confd. as dep. inspr.-genl., Aug., 1941.

HUMPHREY, CECIL ALBERT, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Assam) (b. 17th Oct., 1904).—Educ. at Uppingham, and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1928; arrived, Dec., 1928, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1936; dep. sec. (home) Jan., 1942.

HUMPHREY, WILFRED, Indian Police (asst. supt., N.W.F.P.) (b. 11th June, 1905).—Joined the service as asst. supt., on probn., 5th Dec., 1924; confd., Oct., 1929; asst. dir. intell., G.I. rly., March, 1937; ditto, under govt. of India, Peshawar, Apl., 1938.

HUMPHRYS, SIR FRANCIS HENRY, G.C.M.G., G.C.V.O., K.B.E., C.I.E., Lieut.-Col., I.A. (ret'd.) (b. 24th Apl., 1879).—Retd., Nov., 1929.*

HUNT, EDWIN WILLIAM, O.B.E., Indian Police (b. 1st Feb., 1906).—Joined the service as

asst. supt., United Provs., 19th Nov., 1925; offg. supt., Nov., 1932, and again, March, 1933; awarded Indian police medal; supt. (confd.), Feb., 1940; O.B.E., June, 1943.

HUNT, GEOFFREY HOWARD, B.Sc., M.C., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Punjab) (b. 7th Nov., 1891).—Retd., Oct., 1938.*

HUNT, HENRY CARTER, late Indian Police (Bengal) (b. 19th Sept., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. supt. on 26th Nov., 1909; supt., June, 1920; dep. commr. of police, Calcutta, Feb., 1925; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Jan., 1933, and again, Oct., 1936; confd., July, 1937; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1938; retd., 19th Sept., 1944.

HUNT, ROLAND CHARLES COLIN, Indian C.S. (asst. collr. and mag., Madras) (b. 19th March, 1916).—Educ. at Rugby and Queen's Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 14th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.

HUNTER, ALEXANDER MELEDORE, V.D., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 26th Apl., 1882).—Retd., Sept., 1937.*

HUNTER, CHARLES FREDERICK, late Indian Service of Engrs. (United Provs.) (b. 12th Feb., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1909; in milty. employ. from 28th July, 1918, to 31st Jan., 1919; exec. engr., May, 1919; offg. dep. ch. engr., Feb., 1933; supt. engr., confd., Feb., 1937; retd., Nov., 1940.

HUNTER, DOUGLAS CAMPBELL, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 30th Aug., 1886).—Educ. at Felsted Sch., and Jesus Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 28th Nov., 1910, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr., and asst. settl. offr.; jt. mag., Dec., 1916; on mil. duty, July, 1918, to March, 1919; offg. as dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1921; sess. and sub-judge, May, 1925; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1925; judge, high ct., Allahabad, July, 1939; retd., 19th Jan., 1944.

HUNTER, GUY GUNNING RATCLIFFE, M.A., Indian Educl. Service (dir. of public instrn., Cent. Provs.) (b. 16th Apl., 1890).—Joined the service as profrr., Jubbulpore coll., 28th Dec., 1912; profrr., Morris coll., Nagpur, July, 1924; offg. princpl., ditto, July, 1931; offg. dir. of public instrn. and educ. secty., Cent. Provs. and Berar, June, 1938.

HUNTER, JAMES DE GRAAFF, C.I.E., D.Sc., M.A., late Survey of India (b. 11th Sept., 1891).—Retd., March, 1935.*

HUQUE, KHAN BAHADUR SIR MUHAMMAD AZIZUL, C.I.E. (see Azizul Huque).

HURLEY, THOMAS JOSEPH, O.B.E., M.R.C.V.S., Indian Veterinary Service (dir. vet. serv., Madras) (b. 4th May, 1895).—Apptd. supt., I Circle, Civil Vety. dept., Vizagapatam, March, 1922; offg. as princpl., Madras vety. coll., June, 1926; and again, Sept., 1928; profrr. of surg., ditto, Aug., 1928; offg. dir. of vety. services, Madras, variously from June, 1929, to Sept., 1939; confd. as dir., Sept., 1939; O.B.E., Jan., 1945.

HURN, REV. EDWARD LIDDELL ARTHUR, Indian Eccles. Estabt. (United Provs.) (junr. chaplain) (b. 4th Sept., 1905).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., 11th Nov., 1935; junr. chaplain, Nov., 1937.

HURRELL, IAN MURRAY, Indian Police (asst. supt., United Provs.).—Apptd. asst. supt., United Provs., on probn., 1st Nov., 1934; confd., Nov., 1936.

HUSAIN, AKHTAR, Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 1st March, 1902).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ. and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 19th Oct., 1926; arrived, Nov., 1926, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under-secty. to govt. of India, dept. of educn., etc., Oct., 1930; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1932; confd. (subs. provl.), March, 1933; addl. dep. secty. to govt. of India, for. and pol. dept., June, 1935; junr. secty. to finl. commrs. and dep. secty. to govt. revenue dept., May, 1937; dep. commr. (confd.), July, 1937, and settl. officer, Gurgaon, Oct., 1938; sec. to govt., post-war reconstrn. dept., July, 1944.

HUSAIN, AKHTAR, O.B.E., Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 10th Jan., 1907).—Educ. at the Universities of Allahabad and Agra and at Corpus Christi Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Sept., 1934; asst. commr., Ajmer-Merwara, March, 1937; dep. sec. (supply), govt. of India, Dec., 1943; O.B.E., Jan., 1944.

HUSAIN, BADR-UD-DIN TYABJI (see Tyabji, H. B.).

HUSAIN, CHAUDHRI AKBAR (see Akbar Husain, C.).

HUSAIN, HAFAZAT (see Hafazat Husain).

HUSAIN, MUHAMMAD AZIM (see Muhammad Azim Hussain).

HUSAIN, NAJABAT (see Najabat Husain).

HUSAIN WAJAHAT (see Wajahat Husain).

HUSAIN, ZAHID (see Zahid Husain).

HUSAIN, ZAKIR (see Zakir Husain).

HUSSAIN, BUNYAD (see Bunyad Hussain).

HUSSAIN, HAFAZAT (see Hafazat Hussain).

HUSSAIN, IQBAL (see Iqbal Hussain).

HUSSAIN, K.B., JAVAD, Madras C.S. (b. 11th Feb., 1893).—Joined Sept., 1916; dep. collr., Apl., 1929; sub. collr., Nov., 1930; commr., Madras Corp., Jan., 1934; collr., July, 1938; member, Madras public serv. commn., Nov., 1942.

HUSSAIN, MIAN MUHAMMAD TASDIQUE (see Mian, M. T. H.).

HUSSAIN, MUHAMMAD AFZAL (see Muhammad, A. H.).

HUSSAIN, MUHAMMAD HADI, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 15th Jan., 1906).—Educ. at Punjab Univ. and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; under-secty., office of chief secty., govt. of Assam, May, 1937, to March, 1938; dir. of indus. and regr. of co-ops., Feb., 1941.

HUSSAIN, MUZAFFAR (see Muzaffar Hussain).

HUSSEY, BERNARD EDWARD, I.C.S., ret'd. (b. 14th Jan., 1909).—Educ. at King Edward VI Sch., Stafford, and Downing Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Jan., 1933, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., Oct., 1935; ret'd., June, 1940.

HUTCHINGS, ROBERT HOWELL, C.M.G., C.I.E., Indian C.S. (sec., govt. of India, dept. of food) (b. 11th March, 1897).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch. and Trinity Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1920; arrived, 4th Dec., 1920, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and collr., Apl., 1922; under-sec., govt. of Bengal, pol. and appt. dept., Oct., 1924; offg. supt., central jail, Alipore, Oct., 1926; addl. mag. and collr., March, 1928; addl. dep. secty., pol. dept., govt. of Bengal, Nov., 1929; offg. pte.

secty. to govr. of Bengal, Feb., 1930; offg. dep. secty., pol. dept., Bengal, Apl., 1931; member, mining board, Bengal, Nov., 1932; offg. dep. secty. to govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, Apl., 1933; and again, June, 1934; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1935; C.I.E., June, 1935; mag. and collr., May, 1935; jt. secty., home dept., Bengal, Oct., 1937; addl. secty., home dept., Bengal, Feb., 1939; agent of the govt. of India in Burma, Sept., 1939; addtl. sec., govt. of India (war), July, 1942; C.M.G., Feb., 1943; sec., govt. of India (food), Sept., 1943.

HUTCHINSON, FREDERICK HEAP, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (chief engr., United Provs.) (b. 16th Oct., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1914; asst. exec. engr., Sept., 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; agric. engr., Sept., 1929; under-secty. to govt., p.w.d., United Provs., Dec., 1931; on depts. to govt. Mauritius, 1938; suptg. engr. (confd.), Jan., 1940; ch. engr., Aug., 1943.

HUTTON, CHARLES INGLIS, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 31st Dec., 1879).—Ret'd., Sept., 1935.*

HUTTON, JOHN HENRY, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (Assam) (b. 27th June, 1885).—Ret'd., Oct., 1938.*

HUTTON, SIR THOMAS, K.C.I.E., C.B., M.C., i.d.c., p.s.c., Lieut.-Gen. (sec., planning and develop. dept.) (b. 27th March, 1890).—Dept. chief of senr. staff, A.H.Q., India, 1940-1941; chief of gen. staff, India, 1941; G.O.C., Burma, 1942; sec., war resources and reconstr. cttees. of cl. of India, 1942-43; sec., planning and devel. dept., 1944.

HYDARI, M. S. A. (see Muhammad Saleh Akbar Hydari).

HYDE, EDGAR STANLEY, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 6th Feb., 1906).—Educ. at Sedbergh and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 10th Oct., 1928; arrived, 30th Nov., 1928, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; admr., Baster state, March, 1934; supt., Lushai Hills, May, 1942, to June, 1944.

HYDE, HENRY ARMROID, C.I.E., M.C., Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 17th Jan., 1885).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1906; exec. engr., Oct., 1914; offg. suptg. engr., Feb., 1924; confd., June, 1929; ch. engr., and secty. to govt. p.w.d., Central Provs., Nov., 1932; C.I.E., Jan., 1936.

HYDER, LODHI KARM, C.I.E., Ph.D.—Meniber, public services commn., Jan., 1932, to Jan., 1937.*

IBBOTSON, SIR ARCHIE WILLIAM, C.I.E., M.B.E., M.C., B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., United Provs.) (b. 25th Jan., 1886).—Educ. at King Edward's Sch., Birmingham, and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 28th Nov., 1910, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag.; on milty. service (I.A.R.O.), from May, 1915 (Military Cross, Feb., 1917), to June, 1919; M.B.E., June, 1919; jt. mag., Oct., 1916; offg. dep. commr., May, 1920; settl. officer, Nov., 1923, to May, 1924; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1924; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1935; confd. as mag. and collr., Aug., 1926; offg. commr., May, 1929; special commr., Alwar durbar, Jan., 1933; C.I.E., June, 1934; dep. commr., Oct., 1935; confd. as commr., May, 1942; kt., Jan., 1944; actg. advr. to the govr., Sept., 1943.

IBRAHIM, MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Ibrahim).

IDDON, COLWELL, M.B.E., India Office (administrative officer for service questions) (b. 1st Oct., 1893).—Apptd. clerical officer, 27th March, 1922; asst. to jt. editors, India Office List, 1927-29; acting higher clerical officer, June, 1930; confd., Sept., 1933; M.B.E., June, 1933; apptd. staff officer for services questions, Jan., 1936; apptd. administrative officer, July, 1939; acting princpl., Jan., 1942.

IENGAR, HARARRI VENKATANARASINGHA VERADA RAJ, C.I.E., Indian C.S. (Bombay) (b. 23rd Aug., 1902).—Educ. at Mysore Univ., and Queen's Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 20th Oct., 1926; arrived, Nov., 1926, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; offg. under-sec. to govt., revenue dept., Bombay, March, 1931; confd., July, 1931; passport officer to govt., Bombay, Oct., 1933; dep. secty. to govt., fin. dept., Bombay, June, 1934, and again, Oct., 1936; secty., ditto, May, 1937; C.I.E., Jan., 1941; sec., rev. dept., Oct., 1941; addtl. sec., home dept., Sept., 1942; sec., ditto, Sept., 1943; jt. sec., govt. of India (planning and devel.), Oct., 1944.

IFE, DOUGLAS WALTER STANTON, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bihar) (b. 17th Apl., 1915); educ. at Watford Gr. Sch., and Christ Church Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 13th Dec., 1938; arrived in India, Jan., 1939, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., June, 1941.

IJAZ ALI, MAULVI SAIVID, O.B.E., Khan Bahadur, B.A., M.B.E., late United Provs. C.S. (b. 30th Jan., 1881).—Retd., Jan., 1936*; O.B.E., June, 1942.

IKRAM, SHEIKH MOHAMAD, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 10th Sept., 1908).—Educ. at Government High Sch., Lyallpur, the Punjab Univ., and Jesus Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 2nd Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; dep. regr., co-op. societies, Apl., 1937; offg. regr., ditto, var. from June, 1938.

IKRAMULLAH, MOHAMMAD, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. secty., supply dept.) (b. 15th Jan., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of Allahabad and Nagpur, and Trinity Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1927; arrived, 13th Dec., 1927, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., 1931; special duty, forest divisions, 1931-32; under-secty. to govt., Central Provs., May, 1933; under-secty., govt. of India, dept. of indus. and lab., Oct., 1933; offg. dep. secty., ditto, Jan., 1936; and again, July and Oct., 1936; secty., coal mining cttees, Nov., 1936, to Apl., 1937; dep. Indian trade commr., May, 1937; offg. Indian trade commr., May, 1938; advr. and secty., 24th and 25th Labour Conferences; dep. secty., supply dept., govt. of India, Feb., 1940; jt. ditto, Jan., 1944.

ILAHI, NUR (see Nur Ilahi).

ILM-UD-DIN, MOHAMMAD, M.A., Imperial Customs Service (asst. collr.) (b. 14th Nov., 1895).—Joined the service, March, 1923; asst. collr. of customs, Nov., 1935.

INAM-UL, MAJID (see Majid Inam-ul).

INAYAT ULLAH KHAN, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 16th Feb., 1907).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ., and Christ Church, Oxford; joined the service, 10th Oct., 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sub. divl. offr., Apl., 1935; addtl. dist. and sess. judge, May, 1938;

dep. regr. co-ops., Sept., 1940; addtl. ditto, July, 1943; addtl. dir., civil supplies and dep. sec., supplies, Nov., 1943.

INDARJIT RAI, TANDAN, Indian Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 10th Nov., 1905).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 19th Nov., 1927; proby. asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1928; confd., Oct., 1931.

INDER, ROBERT WILFRID, B.A., late Indian Forest Service (b. 7th June, 1885).—Retd., July, 1939.*

INDRANARAYAN BRIJMOHANLAL, LL.B., Bombay Judicial Dept. (judge, small causes ct., Bombay) (b. 31st July, 1885).—Officiated as addl. judge and as judge, small causes ct., Bombay, from 9th Feb., 1925, to 30th Sept., 1928; confd., Oct., 1928; offg. ch. judge, June, 1935.

INDRAVADAN NARAYANBHAI MEHTA (see Mehta, I. N.).

INDUBHUSAN MUNDLE (see Mundle, I. B.).

INGLIS, SIR CLAUDE CAVENDISH, C.I.E., B.A.I. (Trin. Coll., Dub.), late Indian Service of Engrs. (dir., central irrigation and hydrodynamic research station, Poona) (b. 3rd March, 1883).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1906; exec. engr., Oct., 1914; offg. suptg. engr., Dec., 1927; confd., Nov., 1934; C.I.E., Jan., 1936; retd., Apl., 1939; dir., central irrigation and hydrodynamic research station, Poona, Nov., 1939; kt., Jan., 1945.

INGLIS, SIR HUGH ARBUTHNOT, Indian Police (inspr. genl., United Provs.) (b. 28th June, 1890).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Nov., 1910; supt., July, 1923; princpl., police training sch., Moradabad, March, 1931; inspr. genl., July, 1940; kt., Jan., 1942.

INGOLDBY, ERIC C.I.E., Indian State Rlys. (ch. mechl. engr., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 7th Jan., 1892).—Joined the service, 14th Nov., 1921; asst. mechl. engr., Nov., 1922; works manager, May, 1935; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr., March, 1925; works manager, June, 1928; offg. dir., mech. engrg., Nov., 1928; on spl. duty, rly. bd., Nov., 1929; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr., March, 1930; confd., Apl., 1933; dep. ch. contr. of standardisation (temp.), Dec., 1932; confd., Feb., 1935; offg. ch. ditto, Apl., 1935; offg. dir., rly. bd., Oct., 1935; confd., Jan., 1936; ch. mechl. engr., G.I.P. rly. (provl.), Feb., 1938; confd., Aug., 1940; C.I.E., Jan., 1943; ch. contr., standardization cent. standards office for rlys., Apl., 1943.

IMAM, JAFAR, Bihar Judl. Dept.—Apptd. Advocate-General, Sept., 1942.

INGRAM, REV. JAMES WILLIAM, late Indian Eccl. Estabt. (b. 10th Apl., 1890).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., 21st Aug., 1919; junr. chaplain, Aug., 1921; senr. chaplain, Aug., 1929; offg. presdy. senr. chaplain, ch. of Scotland, Madras, Nov., 1930; and again, Feb., 1935; confd., Aug., 1937; retd., Aug., 1943.

INGRAM, LESTER CHARLES, Indian Police (b. 7th Feb., 1914).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt. of police, United Provs., Nov., 1933; confd., Apl., 1936.

INKSON, NORMAN LEOPOLD, D.S.O., V.D., late Indian State Rlys. (G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 31st Oct., 1882).—Retd., Oct., 1939.*

INNES, CHARLES, O.B.E., B.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 3rd Apl., 1882).—Retd., June, 1935.*

INNES, SIR CHARLES ALEXANDER, K.C.S.I., C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (b. 27th Oct., 1874).—Retd., Aug., 1933.*

INNES, FERGUS MUNRO, B.A., Indian C.S.

(dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 12th May, 1903).—Educ. at Charterhouse Sch. and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 16th Oct., 1926; arrived, Nov., 1926, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under-sec., pol. dept., Punjab, Dec., 1927; registrar, high ct., Lahore, Dec., 1930; dep. commr. (subs. provl.), Oct., 1932; confd., Oct., 1936; collr. of customs, Calcutta, Apl., 1939; offg. ch. contr. of imports, Oct., 1944.

IQBAL AHMAD, SIR, B.A., LL.B., Judl. dept., United Provs. (ch. justice, high ct., Allahabad).—Apptd. addl. judge, Allahabad high ct., Oct., 1932; judge, ditto, July, 1933; actg. chief justice, ditto, Feb., 1941; chief justice, ditto, June, 1941; kt., June, 1941.

IQBAL HUSSAIN, KHAN SAHIB, MIAN, B.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Punjab) (b. 9th Nov., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr., on 1st Oct., 1912; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1921; offg. suptg. engr., Oct., 1933; ret'd., 9th March, 1944.

IRANI, RUSTOMJEE HORMUSJI, F.C.H., late Indian State Rlys. (N.W. Rly.) (b. 3rd June, 1880).—Ret'd., June, 1935.*

IRVING, SIR MILES, Kt., C.I.E., O.B.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (Punjab) (b. 1st Aug., 1876).—Ret'd., March, 1935.*

IRWIN, BARON (see Halifax, Viscount).

IRWIN, CYRIL JAMES, C.S.I., C.I.E., V.D., B.A., late Indian C.S. (Central Provs.) (b. 4th Jan., 1881).—Ret'd., Aug., 1936.*

IRWIN, HERBERT WILLIAM, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (A.I.R.O.) (b. 11th July, 1906).—Apptd. asst. exec. engr., Bengal, 18th Feb., 1930.

IRWIN, JOSEPH BOYD, C.I.E., D.S.O., M.C., B.A., Indian C.S. (addtl. sec., govt. of India (war)) (b. 6th March, 1895).—Educ. at Trinity Coll., Dublin; joined the service, 23rd Oct., 1920; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1920, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; pers. asst. to commr. in Sind and Sindhi translator to govt., Dec., 1924; asst. commr. in Sind and ditto, March, 1927; offg. collr. and dist. mag., Feb., 1929; and again, March, 1932; confd., Nov., 1935; offg. secty., home and eccl. depts., Bombay, Feb. 1936; confd., May, 1936; secty. to govr., Bombay, Aug., 1938 to Sept., 1943; addtl. sec., govt. of India (war), Sept., 1943; C.I.E., June, 1942.

IRWIN, REGINALD DE VERE, Indian State Rlys. (ch. mechl. engr., E.B. Rly.) (b. 5th Apl., 1893).—Joined the service as asst. loco. supt., 3rd March, 1915; dist. loco. supt., March, 1924; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr., Oct., 1934; confd., Feb., 1937; ch. ditto, Aug., 1944.

ISAAC, PALATHUNKAL VARKI, B.A., M.Sc., D.I.C., Indian Agricl. Service (2nd entomologist) (b. 6th June, 1891). Joined the service as 2nd entomologist 26th June, 1922.

ISAR, RAYMOND FRANCIS, Indian C.S. (asst. collr. and mag.) (b. 19th Jan., 1916).—Educ. at St. Joseph's Naini Tal, St. George's, Mussoorie, and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1939; confd., 27th Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.

ISHAQE, HAFIZ SAYED MUHAMMAD, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 6th Aug., 1906).—Educ. at Aligarh Univ., Lucknow Univ., and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 14th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Dec., 1933; dir., rural reconstrn., Oct., 1940; ch.

contr., jute, Oct., 1940; spec. offr., dept. of civil supplies, May, 1942.

ISHWAR, DAYAL, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 16th Oct., 1895).—Joined the service, 18th March, 1921; asst. acct.-genl., Punjab, July, 1923; divl. audit offcr., O. & R. rly., March, 1925; accts. offcr., N.W. rly., Apl., 1929; asst. contr. of rly. accts., Apl., 1932; asst. auditor-genl. (personnel), March, 1933; audit officer, Indian stores dept., March, 1936, and again, Jan., 1937; dep. acct.-genl., posts and tels., Nov., 1936; audit offcr., Indian stores dept., Jan., 1939; comptr., Sind, Nov., 1938; ditto, N.W.F.P., Oct., 1939; ch. accts. offcr. (American purchases) dept. of supply, Aug., 1941.

ISLAM AHMAD, Indian Police (b. 5th Feb., 1913).—Apptd. asst. supt., United Provs., on probn., 27th Jan., 1936.

ISLAM, KHAN SHAMSUL, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr. and mag.) (b. 16th Aug., 1915).—Educ. at Govt. High School, Hathrao, Allahabad Univ., and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; apptd. on probn., 21st Oct., 1939; confd., 30th Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.

ISMAIL, PARVEZ MUHAMMAD, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 27th May, 1908).—Educ. at Central Model Sch., Lahore, Punjab Univ., and Selwyn Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sub-divl. offcr., Nov., 1936; judge, small cause ct., Simla, March, 1940; dep. regr., co-op. societies, June, 1943.

ISMAIL, SHAH ABUL HASANAT MUHAMMAD (see Shah, A. H. M. I.).

ISVARAN, VENGUAYYAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 30th June, 1908).—Educ. at Madras Univ., and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 14th Oct., 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; served in Sind from June, 1942; dir. of agric. educn., May, 1943.

IVEY, RONALD CHURCHILL, O.B.E., Indian State Rlys. (dep. transpn. supt., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 18th June, 1887).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., G.I.P. rly., 8th July, 1919; transptn. (traffic comml.), supt., May, 1929; offg. divl. transptn. supt., May, 1933; offg. dep. transptn. supt., Jan., 1935; confd., July, 1935; O.B.E., June, 1943.

IYENGAR, KOMBAR RAMASWAMI KRISHNASWAMI, M.B., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 5th July, 1883).—Ret'd., July, 1938.*

IYENGAR, MANDAYAM ANNADHORAI THIRUMALAI (see Thirumalai Iyengar, M.A.).

IYENGAR, SESHADRY AMARENDRA, B.A., Indian C.S. (sub. collr., Madras) (b. 12th Feb., 1911).—Educ. at La Martinière Coll., Lucknow, Bishop Cotton's Boys' High Sch., Univ. of Madras, and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 6th Sept., 1935; arrived in India, Nov., 1935, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub. collr., Apl., 1938.

IYENGAR, VANKIPURAM RANGASWAMI, late India Posts and Tels. (b. 29th Apl., 1884).—Ret'd., March, 1939.*

JACK, ALEXANDER PURVIS, Indian Police (dist. supt., Central Provs.) (b. 21st Dec., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Nov., 1909; dist. supt., Jan., 1922; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1932.

JACK, SIR ROBERT ERNEST, late Indian C.S. (Bengal) (b. 20th Dec., 1878).—Ret'd., Dec., 1938.*

JACKETS, CECIL HECTOR, Indian Police (dist. supt., Madras) (b. 19th March, 1904).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 20th Nov., 1923; asst. commr. of police, Madras, July, 1930; offg. dist. supt., Apl., 1931; confd., Jan., 1938.

JACKS, WILLIAM HENRY, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr. and mag.) (b. 20th Oct., 1915).—Educ. at La Martinière Coll., Calcutta, Calcutta Univ., Edinburgh Univ., and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1939; confd., 23rd Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.

JACKSON, DONALD, Utke, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 19th May, 1918).—Educ. at Marlborough, and Peterhouse, Cambridge; apptd. on probn., after seln., in May, 1940, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.; comdt., civil pioneers, June, 1943; served under govt. of Assam, Oct., 1944.

JACKSON, EUGENE WENTWORTH DISNEY, O.B.E., M.C., B.A., B.A.I., A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Burma) (b. 1st July, 1894).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1926; O.B.E., Feb., 1937.

JACKSON, RIGHT HON. SIR FRANCIS STANLEY, Lieut.-Col., P.C., G.C.S.I., G.C.I.E. (b. 21st Nov., 1870).—Govr. of Bengal, March, 1927, to March, 1932.

JACKSON, SIR GILBERT HOLLINSHEAD BLOMFIELD, Kt., M.A., late Indian C.S. (Madras) (b. 26th Jan., 1875).—Retd., Jan., 1935.*

JACKSON, GORDON NOEL, Indian Police (b. 25th Dec., 1913).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt. of police, Punjab, Nov., 1933; confd., Nov., 1935; apptd. to Indian Political Service subs. on probn., May, 1939; personal asst. to resdt., Rajputana, May, 1939; under trng. in Ajmer, Oct., 1939; o.-in-c., civic guards and a.r.p. in Baluchistan, July, 1940; asst. pol. agt., Bahrain, Jan., 1941; ditto, Muscat, May, 1942; pol. agt., Kuwait, June, 1943; under-sec. to resdt., Persian Gulf, Dec., 1943; pol. agt., Kuwait, June, 1944.

JACKSON, HARRY, late Indian State Ryls. (b. 19th Aug., 1881).—Retd., Feb., 1937.*

JACKSON, HERBERT GUY, B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (supgt. engr., Madras) (b. 30th Apl., 1893).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Madras, 1st Oct., 1915; asst. exec. engr., July, 1922; offg. exec. engr., Nov., 1924; confd., Aug., 1926; supgt. engr., Dec., 1941.

JACKSON, JAMES DUNCAN, late Indian Service of Engrs., Punjab (b. 25th Aug., 1883).—Retd., Oct., 1937.*

JACKSON, LAURENCE HUNGERFORD, Col., I.A., Survey of India (dir.) (b. 27th Sept., 1889).—First commn. dated 8th Sept., 1909; asst. supt. (proby.), 7th Sept., 1914; in milty. employ from 18th Sept., 1914, to 18th Dec., 1919; asst. supt., May, 1921; supt., Dec., 1926; offg. dir., June, 1934; dir., Sept., 1938.

JACKSON, REV. LAURENCE SEPTIMUS, M.A., Indian Eccles. Dept. (junr. chaplain)—Apptd. junr. chaplain, Madras, on probn., 11th Dec., 1933; confd., Dec., 1935.

JACOB, SIR CLAUD WILLIAM, G.C.B., G.C.S.I., K.C.M.G., Field-Marshal, I.A. (b. 21st Nov., 1863).—Sec., mil. dept., India Office, Apl., 1926, to May, 1930.*

JACOB, KORATHU GEORGE, M.A., Imp. Customs Service (b. 9th May, 1900).—Joined the service, 14th Apl., 1924; asst. collr., Bombay, 1926; second secty., central bd. of rev.,

Oct., 1938; ex officio dep. secty., govt. of India fin. dept. (cent. revs.), Apl., 1940; collr., cent. excise, Madras, Dec., 1943.

JACOB, MAZHUANCHARRY CHAKKA, B.A., Indian Forest Service (b. 8th May, 1887).—Joined the service as asst. consvr, Assam, 9th Nov., 1930; dep. consvr, Nov., 1935; in charge, wkg. plan divn., Shillong, Sept., 1937.

JACOBSON, ERIC JOHN HART, M.B.E., Indian State Ryls. (divisional supt., E.I. Ry.) (b. 23rd March, 1894).—Joined the service, 27th Sept., 1913; transptn. supt., E.I. rly., March, 1926; M.B.E., Jan., 1939; dep. ch. opertg. supt., Apl., 1941; divl. supt., Aug., 1941.

JAFAR, IMAM SAIYID (b. 18th Apl., 1900).—Apptd. judge, high ct., Patna, Oct., 1943.

JAFAR, MOHAMMAD, M.B., B.S., M.R.C.S., D.T.M. & H., D.P.H., Maj., I.M.S. (airport health officer, Karachi) (b. 5th July, 1901).—First commn. dated 23rd Oct., 1930; in mil. employ to July, 1935; in the medical research dept. to Jan., 1937, when he joined the port health dept.; airport health officer, Karachi, Nov., 1937.

JAFRI, SACHED SAIYID, M.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 7th Nov., 1916).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ., Aligarh Univ., and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; apptd. on probn., 21st Oct., 1939; arrived in India, Nov., 1940, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.

JAGAN NATH BHAGAT, Rai Bahadur, M.A., LL.B., late Punjab C.S., Judl. bch. (b. 1st Sept., 1886).—Joined the service, 16th Jan., 1911; extra asst. commr., Nov., 1913; sub-judge, Sept., 1919; dist. and sess. judge, confd., July, 1934; retd., Sept., 1941.

JAGANNATH, JUNEJA, LALA, A.M.I.E. (Ind.), late Indian Service of Engrs. (Punjab) (b. 27th Oct., 1888).—Joined the service 5th Oct., 1911; asst. engr., Oct., 1912; exec. engr., Oct., 1921; retd., 27th Oct., 1943.

JAGANNATHAN, RAGAVIENGAR, M.A., B.L., mil. accts. dept. (b. 26th Feb., 1898).—Joined the service as offer. in cl. II, Aug., 1923; finl. advr. and sec., Quetta reconstr. cttee. June, 1940; retd., 4th Sept., 1943.

JAGANNATHAN, SARRUKAI, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (under-secty. to govt. of Bihar) (b. 18th May, 1914).—Educ. at Christian Coll. Sch., Madras, Madras Univ., and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 21st Sept., 1936; arrived in India, Oct., 1936, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.

JAGAT NARAYAN, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 14th Feb., 1911).—Educ. at Government High Sch., Sitapur, Queen's Intermediate Coll., Benares, Thomason Civil Engineering Coll., Roorkee, and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., March, 1936.

JAGDEO SINGH, GAREWAL, SARDAR, M.R.C.V.S., Indian Vety. Service (supgt. civil vety. dept., Central Provs.) (b. 18th Nov., 1894).—Joined the service, 29th Jan., 1918; supt., May, 1919; offg. dir. of civil vety. dept., B. and O., Apl. to Nov., 1930; offg. princpl., Punjab vety. coll., Apl., 1935; offg. dir., vety. services, Central Provs., June, 1937.

JAGDISHWAR DAYAL, M.B.E., M.A., Mil. Accts. Dept. (b. 14th June, 1903).—Joined the service as offer. in cl. II, Apl., 1927; M.B.E., Jan., 1939; dep. fin. advr., mil. fin., Nov., 1940.

JAGDISH PRASAD, KUNWAR, SIR, K.C.S.I., C.I.E., O.B.E., M.A., late Indian C.S. (b.

17th June, 1880).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ., and Lincoln Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1902; arrived, 11th Dec., 1903, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., June, 1913; O.B.E., June, 1919; mag. and collr., Feb., 1921; and sec. to govt. (addl.); C.I.E., Jan., 1923; ch. secty. to govt., United Provs., July, 1927; confd., Jan., 1928; C.S.I., Jan., 1931; commr., June, 1932; retd., Apl., 1933; member, govr.-gen'l's. exec. council, United Provs., Apl., 1933; member, govr.-gen'l's. exec. council, Apl., 1935; member, council of state, Apl., 1935 to March, 1940; kt., June, 1935; K.C.S.I., May, 1937.

JAGTAP, BALKRISHNA PIRAJIRAO, RAO BAHADUR, L.C.E., M.R.San.I. and C., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bombay) (b. 30th June, 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Feb., 1921; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1925; offg. exec. engr., May, 1928; confd., Oct., 1933; retd., 30th June, 1942.

JAI LAL, SIR RAI BAHADUR, B.A., LL.B., late Judl. Dept., Punjab (b. 17th Aug., 1878).—Retd., Aug., 1938.*

JAI RAJ SINGHA, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr.) (b. 19th Feb., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., United Provs., on 5th Dec., 1924; dep. consvr., Nov., 1929.

JAI RAM, LALA, B.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 17th Oct., 1887).—Retd., Jan., 1936.*

JAIN, LAKSHMI CHANDRA, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 30th June, 1910).—Educ. at Christ Church Coll., Cawnpore, Allahabad Univ., Imperial Coll. of Science, London, and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Nov., 1936; dir. of civil indus., United Provs., Jan., 1944.
