JAKEMAN, ARTHUR REGINALD, Indian Police (dep. supt., Madras) (b. 1st June, 1907).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Madras, 18th Nov., 1926; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1932; commr. of police and comdt. of state forces, Pudukottai, Aug., 1932; reverted to Brit. serv., May, 1933; offg. dist. supt., March, 1934; offg. asst. comdt. of police, Aden, June, 1936; reverted, Dec., 1936; confd. as dist. supt., Oct., 1939; on depn. to Assam, Dec., 1942; to Nov., 1944.

JAKUB, SHAH, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 2nd Apl., 1897).—Joined the service, 23rd Feb., 1920; asst. auditor, O. and R. Rly., Oct., 1924; divl. audit officer, N.W. rly., Jan., 1926; asst. acct.-genl., Burma, Jan., 1929; offg. ch. accts. officer, N.W. rly., Sept., 1932; dep. acct.-genl., Punjab, Nov., 1933.

JAMAL-UD-DIN, M.B., Ch.B., Lieut.-Col. I.M.S. (civil surg., Punjab) (b. 22nd May, 1891).—First commn. dated 1st Aug., 1914; civil surg., May, 1925.

JAMES, ANTHONY SAMUEL, M.C., India posts and Tels. (dir. of tels.) (b. 28th Apl., 1891).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 18th Dec., 1919; asst. divl. engr., Feb., 1921; divl. engr., March, 1927; dir., posts and tels., Sind and Baluchistan circle, May, 1933; offg. dir. tel. engrg., Bombay, March, 1934; ditto, Punjab, Apl., 1935; dir. of tels., confd., Aug., 1939.

JAMES, ARTHUR HULBERT, Office of High Commr. for India (higher clerical officer, store dept.) (b. 12th March, 1893).—Apptd. second-class clerk, India Office, 26th June, 1912, and attd. to stores dept.; on mil. service from Oct.,

1915, to Nov., 1917; transf. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; exec. officer, Apl., 1922; higher clerical officer, Apl., 1926; actg. higher exec. offr., Jan., 1940.

JAMES, BASIL REGINALD, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, United Provs.) (b. 1st Aug., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of Allahabad and Selwyn Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 20th Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. sess. and sub-judge, Jan., 1934; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1936; confd., Jan., 1940.

JAMES, CLAUDE HUBERT, Indian Fin. Dept. (b. 3rd Oct., 1882).—Joined the service as asst. examr., p.w. accts., 17th Aug., 1903; dep. examr., Jan., 1907; dep. acctnt.-genl., Punjab, Sept., 1914; asst. acctnt.-genl., ditto, Nov., 1916; on depn. to mily. accts. dept., Apl., 1917, to March, 1919; offg. audit offr., Nushki Extension Rly., Aug., 1919; govt. examr. of accts., G.I.P. and B.B. and C.I. Rly., March, 1923; dep. auditor, E.B. rly., Nov., 1927; offg. dep. acct.-genl., rlys. (inspection), Feb., 1928; offg. audit officer, Burma Rlys., Jan., 1929; offg. dep. ch. auditor, E.I. rly., Apl., 1930; dep. govt. examr. of accts., B.N. rly., Nov., 1930; offg. ch. auditor, G.I.P. rly., Apl., 1931.

JAMES, SIR JOHN FRANCIS WILLIAM, M.A. (Oxon), Barr., late Indian C.S. (Bihar and Orissa) (b. 3rd June, 1879).—Retd., June, 1939.*

JAMES, JOSEPH FRAIN, M.B., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., retd. (b. 1st Nov., 1882).—Retd., Apl., 1937.*

JAMES, LEWIS EDWARD, Legisl. Dept., Govt. of India (asst. secty.) (b. 3rd May, 1900).—Joined legisl. dept., Nov., 1918; supt., Apl., 1932; asst. secty., Jan., 1938.

JAMES, PETER LAWRENCE SETON, Indian Police (Assam) (b. 4th Apl., 1920).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Oct., 1939; confd., Nov., 1941.

JAMES, REV. RHYS, B.A., late Indian Eccles. Estabt. (Madras) (b. 10th Oct., 1889).—Apptd. temp. chaplain, 1st July, 1918; junr. chaplain, Jan., 1921; senr. chaplain, Jan., 1931; retd., May, 1942.

JAMES, SIDNEY HAMILTON, Dept. of Industries, Burma (chief insp. of factories, expl. and mines) (b. 14th Dec., 1891).—Apptd. asst. inspr. of factories, 19th Oct., 1920; inspr., Oct., 1924; offg. ch. inspr., variously from Feb., 1925; confd., Apl., 1936; chief inspr. factrs., expl., and mines, Apl., 1937.

JAMESON, GERALD GREY, Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 4th July, 1898).—Joined the service, 19th July, 1916; in mil. employ from 19th July, 1916, to 14th Nov., 1921; asst. supt., Nov., 1921; offg. dist. offr., frontier constabulary, Jan., 1925; supt., Jan., 1927; asst. inspr.-genl. govt. rly. police, Apl., 1940, to Oct., 1943.

JAMESON, WILLIAM JAMES, Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal) (b. 29th Oct., 1915).—Apptd. on probn., 21st Nov., 1935; confd., Jan., 1939.

JAMUAR, BRAHMDEV PRASAD, Barr., Bihar C.S. (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 22nd Sept., 1898).—Offg. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1936; confd., Apl., 1937.

JANAKIRAM SINGH, BANAPHAR, M.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 15th Oct., 1899).—Joined the service, 5th Dec., 1924; dep. consvr., Nov., 1928.

JANARDHANA RAO, KARASAGOD PATNA-SHETTI, RAO BAHADUR, B.A., Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl., Madras) (b. 15th March, 1892).—Joined the service, 4th June, 1915; apptd.

to I.P. as dist. supt., Madras, Aug., 1932; offg. asst. inspr.-genl., Apl., 1936; dep. commr., crimes branch, Nov., 1936; awarded Indian police medal, July, 1940; supt. (sel. grade), Aug., 1944; confd. as dep. inspr.-genl., Oct., 1944.

JANES, RONALD ARTHUR, India Office (asst. acct.-genl.) (b. 28th Sept., 1888).—Educ. at Thanet Coll., Margate, and Taunton Sch.; apptd. 2nd-class clerk, 4th July, 1907; on mil. service from Dec., 1915, to Feb., 1919; minor staff clerk, Jan., 1920; acting staff clerk, Apl., 1921; acting higher exec. officr., Apl., 1922; confd., July, 1922; suptg. exec. officr., Sept., 1932; actg. asst., acct.-genl., Nov., 1937; assessor of inc. tax, Dec., 1937; confd., as asst. acct.-genl., Jan., 1938; actg. dep. acct.-genl., Jan., 1941; commr. of inc. tax, Feb., 1941.

JANG, RANA LOKE SHAMSHER, (see Rana, L. S. J.).

JAKI NATH, ATAL, Pandit, late Punjab C.S. (b. 16th Sept., 1881).—Retd., Sept., 1936.*

JANVRIN, JULIAS VVVIAN BREESE, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 16th July, 1903).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bengal, on 7th Dec., 1922; offg. addl. supt., March, 1929; offg. supt., Jan., 1930; awarded Indian police medal, 1932; confd., Feb., 1934; dep. commr. of police, Calcutta, May, 1940, to Nov., 1943.

JAOQUES, COLIN CAMPBELL, Indian Police (supt., Assam) (b. 11th June, 1905).—Joined the service, 23rd Nov., 1925; in training to Oct., 1927; proby. asst. supt., Oct., 1927; confd., Nov., 1927; offg. supt., rly. police, Feb., 1937; supt. of police, confd., 1938; asst. to the I.G. police; addtl. supt. police, K. & J. hills; asst. pol. officr., Khan states, Feb., 1940; asst. inspr. gen., Feb., 1940.

JARDINE, LIONEL WESTROPP, C.I.E., Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 15th Feb., 1895).—Educ. at Charterhouse and Wadham Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 30th Sept., 1921; arrived in India, 30th Nov., 1921, and served in United Provs. as asst. commr.; city mag., Nov., 1923; pol. officer on probn., Jan., 1925; asst. commr., Nowshera, Nov., 1926; ditto, Mardan, Aug., 1927; offg. dep. commr., Peshawar, May, 1928; pol. agt., Khyber, Nov., 1928; sec. to ch. commr., N.W.F.P., May, 1930; dep. commr., Dera Ismail Khan, Nov., 1930; 1st asst. to resdt. in Kashmir, May, 1931; minister, Kashmir, Feb., 1932; pol. agt., Bundelkhand, Apl., 1934; officr. on spec. duty, Peshawar, Feb., 1936; dep. commr., Peshawar, March, 1936; offg. rev., and divl. commr., Peshawar, Nov., 1936; again dep. commr., Peshawar, Nov., 1936; rev. and divl. commr., N.W.F.P., Nov., 1938; C.I.E., Jan., 1939; resdt. for Baroda and Gujarat states, Feb., 1943.

JASBIR SINGH, KUNWAR, C.I.E., Barr., United Provs. C.S. (mag. and collr.) (b. 16th June, 1889).—Joined the service, 1st Aug., 1913; under secty. to govt., United Provs., Apl., 1921; mag. and collr., Oct., 1935; C.I.E., June, 1941.

JASWANT RAI, TANEJA, RAI BAHADUR, LALA, M.A., LL.B., late Punjab C.S. (b. 10th Aug., 1878).—Retd., Aug., 1933.*

JATAR, NILKANTH SHIRAM, C.I.E., D.S.O., M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., Lieut.-Col., retd., late I.M.S., Jail Dept., Central Provs. (inspr.-genl.) (b. 26th May, 1887).—In milty. employ prior to 21st Jan., 1922; supt., central jail, Nagpur, Jan., 1922; offg. inspr.-genl. of prisons, Feb., 1930; confd., Feb., 1934; C.I.E., June, 1938; retd., and re-empd. from July, 1942.

JATHAR, GANESH BHASKAR, B.A. (Cantab.), M.A. (Edin.), late Indian Educl. Service (b. 10th July, 1887).—Joined the service, 21st June, 1920; proftr. of history, Elph. coll., Bombay, June, 1920; ditto, Deccan coll., Dec., 1924; offg. princpl., Karnatak coll., Dharwar, June, 1931; retd., 10th July, 1942.

JAVAD HUSSAIN KHAN SAHID, Khan Bahadur, Madras C.S. (sub. collr.) (b. 11th Feb., 1893).—Joined the service, 8th Sept., 1916; dep. collr., Apl., 1929; sub. collr., Nov., 1930; offg. collr., Nov., 1932; commr. to Madras corp., Jan., 1934.

JAYAKAR, MUKUND RAMRAO, P.C., M.A., LL.B. (b. 13th Nov., 1878). Member, Bombay legis. cl., 1923; member, legis. assembly, 1928; delegate, Indian R.T.C., 1930-1933; judge, federal court of India, Oct., 1937, to Feb., 1939; P.C., Feb., 1939; member of judl. commtee. of privy cl., Feb., 1939 to Apl., 1941.

JAYAKAR, MOTABHAI SUNDARRAO, C.I.E., M.A., late Bombay C.S. (b. 1st Dec., 1884).—Apptd. dep. collr., March, 1909; actg. collr. of income tax, Dec., 1914; personal asst. to collr., March, 1924; offg. collr. and dist. mag. and pol. agt., May, 1926; collr., Oct., 1930; C.I.E., June, 1936; retd., Dec., 1939.

JAYARAJAN, P. M. R. (see Paul, M. J. R.).

JAYARATNAM, THOMAS COOKE SAMUEL, C.S.I., C.I.E., B.A., B.Sc., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 10th Oct., 1893).—Educ. at London Univ., and Clare Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 23rd Oct., 1918, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr. from 20th Feb., 1919; under-secty., govt. of Central Provs. in addition, July, 1923; under-secty., govt. of India, home dept., June, 1924; dep. commr., Aug., 1927; jt. secty., Indian franchise cttee., Jan., 1932; offg. dep. sec., dept. of industries and lab., govt. of India, July, 1932, and again Apl., 1933; offg. commr. of settlements and dir. of land records, etc., Central Provs., Oct., 1933; confd., June, 1934; commr. of settlements, to March, 1937; chairman, textile enq. cttee., 1941; C.I.E., Jan., 1941; offg. ch. sec., March, 1942; C.S.I., Jan., 1945.

JAYAVANT, ANANT RAMKRISHNA, Indian Police (b. 20th June, 1910).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Central Provs., 20th Feb., 1932; confd., Nov., 1933.

JEEJEEBHOY, F., Chief Justice, Court of Small Causes, Rangoon.—Offg., May, 1937; confd., Jan., 1938.

JEFFERIS, CHARLES EDWARD, A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Punjab) (b. 1st Dec., 1885).—Joined the service as asst. engr. on 1st Oct., 1909; exec. engr., Oct., 1917; under-sec. to govt., p.w.d. (irrign.), Jan., 1926; offg. suptg. engr., variously from March, 1929; confd., May, 1937; on depn. to Orissa, Apl., 1936, to Nov., 1937; retd., Dec., 1940.

JEFFERYS, REGINALD CASTELMAN, Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 15th Aug., 1922).—Joined the service, 15th Nov., 1912; asst. supt., May, 1914; on mil. duty from 6th Nov., 1917, to 2nd March, 1919; supt., Feb., 1924; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1931; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., March, 1936; on depn. to govt. of India, def. dept., Aug., 1940.

JEHANGIR, SIR COWASJI, Bart., G.B.E., K.C.I.E.—Tempy. member of govt.'s exec. council, 8th Dec., 1912, to 12th July, 1922; confd., 23rd June, 1923; O.B.E., Jan., 1918; K.C.I.E., June, 1927; retd., June, 1928; delegate to Indian round table conf., London, Nov., 1930-Jan., 1931; 2nd session, Sept.-Dec., 1931;

3rd session, Nov., 1932; member, legisl. assembly, Jan., 1931; member of Ind. delegation to monetary and economic conf., London, June, 1933; member, Ind. res. bank cttee., July, 1931; member, nat. def. council, July, 1941; G.B.E., Jan., 1944.

JENKIN, JAMES LESLIE, Office of High Commr. for India (acting controller, store dept.) (b. 23rd Aug., 1888).—Educ. at King Edward VI.'s Gr. Sch., Grantham; apptd. clerk, 2nd class, 10th June, 1907; transfid. to office of high commissioner for India, Oct., 1920; asst. controller, store dept., Apr., 1921; princpl. exec. offcr., 1922; actg. contr., Jan., 1940.

JENKIN, REGINALD TREVOR, M.A., late Indian Forest Service (Central Provs.) (b. 25th Aug., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Dec., 1912; asst. postal censor, Bombay, from 27th Apr., 1915; dep. consvr., Sept., 1919; offg. consvr., variously from May, 1931; retd., March, 1942.

JENKIN, WILLIAM NORMAN PRENTICE, C.I.E., Indian Police (dep. dir., intell. bureau) (b. 11th Aug., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, on 27th Dec., 1919; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1925; offg. supt., Apr., 1927; confd., May, 1930; C.I.E., June, 1931; cent. intell. offcr., Punjab, Delhi and Sind, Nov., 1935; dep. dir., intell. bureau, March, 1939; confd., Apr., 1941.

JENKINS, SIR EVAN MEREDITH, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., Indian C.S. (secty. to govr. genl. and pte. secty. to Viceroy) (b. 2nd Feb., 1896).—Educ. at Rugby and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1920; arrived, 4th Dec., 1920, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1925; ditto (provl.), Oct., 1927; ditto (perm.), Jan., 1932; dep. secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of indus. and lab., Nov., 1933; offg. jt. secty., ditto, June, 1935, and again, Jan., 1936; C.I.E., June, 1936; ch. commr., Delhi, March, 1937; secty., supply dept., govt. of India, July 1940; secty. to Viceroy and secty. to govr. genl. (personal), Oct., 1943; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1944; C.S.I., Jan., 1941.

JENKINS, JOHN LEWIS, Indian Police (dep. inspr. genl., Bengal) (b. 8th Sept., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. supt., on 27th Jan., 1920; addl. supt., Apr., 1926; supt., Nov., 1929; asst. inspr. genl., Aug., 1934, to March, 1938; dep. inspr. genl. (confd.), June, 1944; Indian police medal, 1939.

JENKINS, WALTER ALLEN, C.I.E., D.Sc. (Sheffield), Indian Educl. Service (dir., public instrn.) (b. 1st Apr., 1891).—Joined the service as prof. of Dacca Coll. on 2nd March, 1916; services placed at disposal of Univ. of Lacca from July, 1921, to July, 1926; offg. inspr. of schools, Dec., 1926; confd., Jan., 1927; offg. asst. dir., public instrn., Jan., 1931; princpl. Rajshahi Coll., Mar. 1932; offg. special offcr. for primary educn., March, 1933; princpl., David Hare training coll., Nov., 1934; C.I.E., June, 1942; dir., public instrn., March, 1943; spec. offr., fin. dept., Aug., 1944.

JENKINS, WILLIAM JOHN, C.I.E., M.A., B.Sc., Indian Agric. Service (dir. of agric., Poona) (b. 27th Oct., 1892).—Joined the service as dep. dir. of agric., Dec., 1920; dep. secty., Indian central cotton cttee.; offg. dir. of institute of plant industry, Indore, May to Nov., 1927; dep. dir. of agric., Sind, June, 1930; offg. dep. dir., Bombay, Nov., 1936; C.I.E., June, 1939; dir. of agric., Poona, July,

1939; held in addn. post of dir., vet. services, Jan. to March, 1944.

JENNER, ERIC JOHN, M.B.E., Indian Police (supt., Sind) (b. 11th Feb., 1910).—Joined the service as proby., asst. supt., Bombay, 25th Nov. 1930; confd., July, 1932; supt., confd., Oct., 1941; M.B.E., June, 1943; dep. commr., C.I.D., Sept., 1943; Indian police medal.

JENNETT, STANLEY, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr.) (b. 6th Aug., 1904).—Joined the service as proby. asst. exec. engr., Punjab, 1st Oct., 1928; confd., Sept., 1930; under-secty., govt. of Punjab, p.w.d., irrign., Oct., 1942.

JENNINGS, ALFRED KICKWEED, Office of High Commr. for India (higher clerical officer, store dept.) (b. 30th March, 1890).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, 2nd Feb., 1914; on mil. service from June, 1915, to June, 1919; transfid. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; exec. offcr., Apr., 1922; higher clerical offcr., May, 1926; actg. higher exec. offcr., Oct., 1939.

JENNINGS, EDGAR, Indian Police (dist. supt., Burma) (b. 18th March, 1895).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, on 19th Feb., 1921; dist. supt., March, 1929.

JEPHSON, MAURICE KEARLEY, India Office (higher exec. offcr., mil. dept.) (b. 2nd Apr., 1893).—Apptd. second-class clerk, 26th Feb., 1912, and attd. to registry and record dept., transfid. to rev. and statistics dept., Jan., 1917; on mil. service from March, 1917, to Sept., 1919; exec. offcr., Apr., 1922; actg. higher exec. offcr., June, 1924, to June, 1925; confd., Aug., 1927; actg. suptg. exec. offcr., June, 1940; editor, India Office and Burma Office List, March to Nov., 1940.

JERROM, JOHN HENLEY GRIMLE, M.V.C.V.S., Indian Veterinary Service (dir. vety. services, Sind) (b. 6th Dec., 1886).—Joined the service as supt. civil veterinary dept., Sind, March, 1921; offg. dir., vety. services, Bombay, Apr., 1933; dir., vety. services, Sind, Apr., 1936.

JESSON, ARTHUR WILLIAM MOSLEY, A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Punjab) (b. 12th Aug., 1884).—Retd., Aug., 1939.*

JETLEY, BRIZ BHUSHAN SHARAN (see Briz, B. S. J.).

JHA, ADITYA NATH, M.A., Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 18th Aug., 1911).—Educ. at Jesus Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 16th Sept., 1936; arrived in India, Oct., 1936, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. commr., Oct., 1936; apptd. to Ind. pol. serv. (subst.), Nov., 1939; under-secty. to resdt. for E. States, Nov., 1939.

JHA, AMAR NATH, M.A., United Provs. Educn. Service, Cl. I (b. 25th Feb., 1897).—Joined the service as prof., Muir Cent. Coll., Alld., 1st Aug., 1917; on for. serv. with Alld. Univ. from July, 1922; apptd. vice-chancellor, Allahabad Univ., Dec., 1938.

JHA, BHOLA NATH, Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 23rd Feb., 1902).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ., and Exeter Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 22nd Oct., 1926; arrived, 27th Nov., 1926, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., 27th Oct., 1929; secty., bd. of rev., Dec., 1937; dep. secty., agric. and rural devel., Dec., 1939; mag. and collr. (confd.), Feb., 1940; rev. sec., Feb., 1942.

JHA, CHANDRA MOHAN, Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 11th Feb., 1898).—Apptd. dep. supt. of police, 1st Aug., 1922; to selection

grade of dep. supt. of police, 1st July, 1937; offg. supt., 12th June, 1938; confd., 11th Nov., 1938.

JHA, CHANDRA SHEKHAR, O.B.E., M.Sc., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Bihar) (b. 20th Oct., 1909).—Educ. at the Watson High English Sch., Madhubani, Patna Univ., and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 3rd Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-secty., fin. dept., Bihar, Oct., 1936; dep. commr., Apl., 1939; contr. and sec., supply and transp., Apl., 1943; O.B.E., Jan., 1945.

JHA, LAKSHMI KANT, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and collr., Bihar) (b. 22nd Nov., 1913).—Educ. at Barari H.E. Sch., Bhagalpur, Benares Univ., and Trinity Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 20th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and collr., May, 1940; under-sect., local self govt. dept., Nov., 1940; ditto, govt. of India, supply, June, 1942.

JHUNNA SINGH, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Punjab) (b. 31st July, 1898).—Joined the service as asst. consvr. on 2nd Dec., 1922; dep. consvr., Nov., 1926; dir., fuel circle, Punjab, March, 1944.

JIA RAM, Indian Police (b. 21st Nov., 1912).—Apptd. asst. supt., United Provs., on probn., Feb., 1937.

JIVA NAND PANDE, B.A., Indian Police (b. 19th Dec., 1883).—Retd., Dec., 1938.*

JIWAN AMRIK SINGH, B.A., Dip. of Forestry, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bombay) (b. 10th July, 1901).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927.

JOG, DATTATRAYA PARASHURAM (see Parashuram Jog, D.).

JOGENDRA SINGH, SIRDAR SIR (member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council, educn., health and lands) (b. 25th May, 1877).—Minister of Agric., United Provs., 1926-37; served on Indian sugar cte., Ind. taxation enq. comm., and Skeen cte., Ind. army indianisation cte., member of govr.-genl.'s exec. council, educn., health and lands, July, 1942.

JOHN, JORDAN CONSTANTINE, O.B.E., M.B., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd., Civil Medl. Dept., Bihar (civil surg.) (b. 22nd Sept., 1886).—First commn. dated 27th July, 1912; O.B.E., June, 1919; in mil. employ up to 30th Apl., 1923; civil surg., Sept., 1924; ret'd. and re-empld., 22nd Sept., 1943.

JOHN, RICHARD STANLEY THOMAS, B.A., Indian C.S. (b. 2nd Feb., 1909).—Educ. at Haverfordwest Gr. Sch., University Coll., Cardiff, and Exeter Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Dec., 1932, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Nov., 1934; asst. commr., Dera Ismail Khan, Dec., 1936; asst. pol. agt., Chitral, Feb., 1937; under-secty. to pol. resdt., Persian Gulf, June, 1938; vice-consul, Bushire, Feb., 1939.

JOHNSON, FRANK, India Office (higher clerical officer., mil. dept.) (b. 10th Dec., 1883).—Apptd. clerical officer., 17th Oct., 1921; acting higher ditto, Sept., 1933; confd., Dec., 1934.

JOHNSON, JAMES RUSSELL, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 15th May, 1891).—Joined the service as proby. dep. collr., 22nd May, 1911; dep. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1913; proby. asst. supt. of police, March, 1920; confd., June, 1921; asst. supt., May, 1920; addl. supt., Apl., 1921; offg. supt., Apl., 1924;

confd., Aug., 1926; supt., rly. police, Oct., 1939, to Oct., 1944.

JOHNSON, SIR JOHN NESSITT GORDON, C.S.I., C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (b. 25th Feb., 1885).—Educ. at Rossall, and Queen's Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 23rd Nov., 1909, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag.; under-sec. to govt., May, 1915, to Apl., 1916; jt. mag., Apl., 1917; regr., high ct., Allahabad, March, 1918; on mil. service (I.A.R.O.), Aug., 1918, to Feb., 1919; again regr., high ct., Allahabad, March, 1919; mag. and collr., Dec., 1924; again regr., high ct., Allahabad, Nov., 1920; dep. commr., Delhi, Nov., 1924; offg. dep. sec., govt. of India, industries and labour dept., May, 1925; dep. commr., Delhi, Sept., 1926; C.I.E., Jan., 1928; offg. ch. commr., Delhi, March, 1928; confd., March, 1932; C.S.I., June, 1936; vacated appt. of chief commr., March, 1937; kt., May, 1937; ret'd., July, 1939.

JOHNSON, LESLIE JAMES, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 8th Sept., 1914).—Educ. at St. George's Coll., Mussoorie, Punjab Univ., and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 3rd Oct., 1938; confd., 8th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.

JOHNSON, NORMAN, Indian State Rlys. (b. 31st July, 1894).—Joined the service, 1st Apl., 1920; asst. rolling stock offr., Dec., 1924; asst. works manager, Nov., 1927; asst. loco. supt., Nov., 1932; dist. ditto, Burma Rlys., March, 1933; offg. dep. carr. and wagon supt., March, 1933; confd., Dec., 1934; ch. exec. offr., Burma rlys., Aug., 1942; dep. dir.-genl. (munitions), supply dept., Aug., 1943.

JOHNSON, STANLEY MERRY, M.C., Indian State Rlys. (bridge engr.) (b. 5th Jan., 1896).—Joined the service, 3rd Dec., 1923; asst. bridge engr., July, 1928; exec. engr. (bridges), N.W. rly., March, 1931; offg. dep. ch. engr. (bridges), N.W. rly., March, 1936; (provl.) Apl., 1940.

JOHNSON, ALEXANDER, India Office (higher clerical offr., acctnt.-genl.'s dept.) (b. 6th Dec., 1882).—Apptd. clerical offr., 17th Oct., 1921; higher clerical offr., 6th Apl., 1926.

JOHNSON, DAVID PERCIVAL, A.R.C.Sc.I. late Indian Agricl. Service (b. 23rd Jan., 1890).—Joined the service as dep. dir. of agric., 1st Dec., 1920; offg. profr. of agric., Punjab agricl. coll., July, 1927; confd., May, 1933; offg. asst. dir. of agric., March, 1930; confd., Oct., 1933; ret'd., Feb., 1940.

JOHNSON, DAVID SETON, C.I.E., Lieut.-Col., R.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bombay) (b. 7th Aug., 1886).—Joined as asst. engr., 21st Sept., 1909; on milty. duty from 25th Oct., 1914, to 10th Sept., 1919; exec. engr., Feb., 1917; on depn. as chairman and ch. engr., Aden port trust, etc., Oct., 1924; C.I.E., Jan., 1933; chairman, Karachi port trust, May, 1934; ret'd., Sept., 1942.

JOHNSON, ERIC FURKER, Lieut.-Col., R.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 9th Aug., 1891).—Retd., July, 1937.*

JOHNSON, SIR FREDERICK WILLIAM, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., B.A., LL.B., late Indian C.S. (b. 2nd Nov., 1872).—Retd., March, 1931.*

JOHNSON, REV. CANON GEORGE FREDERICK, B.A., late Indian Eccles. Estabt. (Sind) (b. 17th Apl., 1884).—Retd., June, 1938.*

JOHNSON, JAMES HALCRO, B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Punjab) (b. 8th May, 1891).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1914; asst. exec. engr.,

March, 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; retd., Dec., 1941.

JOHNSTON, JOHN, M.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 13th July, 1904).—Educ. at Anderson Educational Institute, Lerwick, Univ. of Edinburgh, and Jesus Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 26th Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., March, 1932; offg. mag. and collr., March, 1933; confd., Apl., 1941.

JOHNSTON, JOHN PIM WATSON, O.B.E., Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 20th May, 1896).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 20th March, 1921; offg. supt., Feb., 1925; confd., June, 1938; O.B.E., June, 1938.

JOHNSTON, MALCOLM KENNETH, M.B.E., Indian Police (asst. dir., intell. bureau) (b. 22nd Apl., 1907).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bengal, on 17th Nov., 1926; offg. supt., Jan., 1933, and again, May, 1933; offg. dep. commr., Oct., 1936; awarded King's police medal, 1938; asst. dir., intell. bureau, home dept., March, 1938; supt., confd., May, 1940; M.B.E., Jan., 1941.

JOHNSTON, ROBERT LENG, late Indian Police (v. 4th March, 1888).—Retd., July, 1939.*

JOHNSTON, RONALD HILARY GRAVDS, Indian C.S. (mag. and collr.) (b. 26th Jan., 1898).—Educ. at Aldenham Sch.; joined the service, 4th Sept., 1923; arrived in India, 14th Nov., 1923, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., March, 1929; services placed at disposal of govt. of Bengal, Apl., 1935; mag. and collr., Feb., 1938.

JOHNSTON, WILFRID, M.C., B.A., Burma Office (acting asst. secty., Burma office) (b. 9th Oct., 1892).—Educ. at Methodist Coll., Belfast, and Trinity Coll., Dublin (scholar); war service—served in R.F.A., Nov., 1915, to Apl., 1919 (M.C., Sept., 1917); apptd. junr. clerk, 20th Jan., 1920, and attd. to acctnt.-genl.'s dept., India Office; asst. princpl., Apl., 1921; act. princpl. clerk, Jan. to March, 1922; resdt. clerk, March, 1922; asst. pte. sec. to sec. of state for India, Sept., 1924; actg. princpl., Aug., 1927; confd., June, 1929; actg. asst. secty., Burma Office, Feb., 1939.

JOHNSTON, WILLIAM, M.A., late Indian C.S. (Bengal) (b. 13th May, 1888).—Retd., Aug., 1938.*

JOHNSTONE, THOMAS WHITE, O.B.E., A.R.C.Sc., D.I.C., late Factory Dept., Bombay (b. 31st Aug., 1887).—Joined the service as inspr. of factories, Bombay, 28th March, 1913; offg. ch. inspr., June, 1920; confd., May, 1923; O.B.E., Jan., 1936; retd., Aug., 1944.

JOLLY, SIR GORDON GRAY, K.C.I.E., M.B., Ch.B., D.P.H., D.I.M., and H., K.H.P. Major-Gen., I.M.S. (dir.-genl., I.M.S.) (b. 6th Apl., 1886).—First commn., dated 1st Aug., 1908; C.I.E., June, 1919; in mil. employ to 7th March, 1922; asst. dir. of public health, Burma, March, 1922; offg. dir. of public health, March, 1927; confd., Feb., 1928; dep. dir.-genl., I.M.S., Dec., 1933; offg. public health commr. with the govt. of India, Nov., 1935; dir. pub. health, Burma, July, 1937; inspr.-genl., civil hosps., Punjab, Nov., 1937; dir.-genl., I.M.S., Sept., 1939; K.H.P., Aug., 1939; local rank of lieut.-genl., Oct., 1940; commdnt., Order of St. John, June, 1941; K.C.I.E., June, 1941.

JOLLYE, HUMPHREY CYPRIAN BEVERLY, B.A., late Indian Forest Service (Orissa) (b. 26th Sept., 1888).—Joined the service as

asst. consvr. on 5th Dec., Dec., 1912; with army dept. from 24th Sept., 1916, to 6th March, 1919; dep. consvr., Jan., 1920; employed under govt. of India, rly. dept., as timber advisory officer, Oct., 1931; consvr. (confd.); retd., March, 1944.

JONES, ALFRED JOSEPH, M.B.E., Indian Police (dist. supt.) (b. 25th July, 1901).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, on 27th Nov., 1922; offg. dist. supt., July, 1932; confd., Feb., 1937; M.B.E., Jan., 1943.

JONES, ARTHUR DOUGLAS, Indian Police (b. 23rd Feb., 1917).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bengal, on probn., Dec., 1937; confd. Dec., 1939.

JONES, ASHLEY NORMAN POSTANCE, Indian Police (dist. supt.) (b. 5th Apl., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Central Provs., on 2nd July, 1923; offg. dist. supt., March, 1927; confd., July, 1939; cmdt., specl. armed constabulary, March, 1942.

JONES, SIR, CYRIL EDGAR, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., Indian C.S. (secty. to govt. of India, fin. dep.) (b. 29th Dec., 1891).—Educ. at Jesus Coll., Cambridge, apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived, 10th Dec., 1915, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag. and spl. asst. settlt. officer; on mil. duty from Oct., 1917 to Jan., 1919; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Sept., 1918; spl. settlt. officer, Nov., 1920; dep. secty. to govt., fin. dept., Nov., 1929; offg. addl. secty., ditto, Apl., 1932; ditto, public dept., Apl., 1933; collr. (provl. subs.), Aug., 1933; secty. to govt., fin. dept., Madras, July, 1934; collr., Oct., 1934; C.I.E., Feb., 1937; secty. to govt. of India, fin. dept., Apl., 1939; C.S.I., June, 1941; K.C.I.E., June, 1944; offg. member of govr.-genl.'s exec. cl., May to Sept., 1944.

JONES, EDMUND BRYAN, C.I.E., Indian Police (Bengal) (b. 3rd June, 1889).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 26th Nov., 1909; supt., Dec., 1919; asst. to inspr.-genl., Nov., 1927; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Oct., 1932; awarded Ind. police medal, 1933; ditto (provl. subs.), July, 1934; confd., July, 1938; C.I.E., June, 1939; retd., 3 June, 1944.

JONES, EDMUND DOUGLAS JOHN, Indian Police (dist. supt., Central Provs.) (b. 13th March, 1892).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Nov., 1911; dist. supt., July, 1924; employed as dep. supt., watch and ward depot, E.I. Rly., Apl., 1928.

JONES, EDWARD ELLIS, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 23rd May, 1883).—Retd., Nov., 1938.*

JONES, FREDERICK THEODORE, C.I.E., M.V.O., late Indian Service as Engrs. (b. 30th July, 1885).—Joined the service, 18th Sept., 1907 asst. engr., Sept., 1908; M.V.O., Dec., 1911; exec. engr., May, 1917; C.I.E., Jan., 1931; offg. suptg. engr., variously, since May, 1925; confd., Aug., 1933; offg. ch. engr., Nov., 1932; and again, Apl., 1936; K.-i-H. Medal, 1st class, Jan., 1936; confd. as ch. engr., cent. pub. wks. dept., Aug., 1938; retd., July, 1940; apptd. consltg. engr., cent. public wks. dept., July, 1940.

JONES, REV. GRYFFYDD WATCYN, B.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (senr. chaplain, Punjab) (b. 2nd May, 1889).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 12th May, 1921; junr. chaplain, May, 1923; senr., ditto, Sept., 1929.

JONES, HAROLD GORDON, Indian State Rlys. (dep. ch. mechl. engr., E.I. rly.) (b. 5th Apl., 1890).—Joined the service, 4th Apl., 1920; asst. rolling stock officer, Feb., 1925; transptn. (power) supt., E.I. rly., Aug., 1934; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr., Apl., 1936; confd., J 1938.

JONES, IVAN ELLIS, C.I.E., Indian Civil Service (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 26th June, 1903).—Educ. at The High School, Harcourt Street, Dublin, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr. under-secty. to govt., home dept., Nov., 1929; offg. dep. commr., Oct., 1931; dep. commr. (subs. provl.), Oct., 1934; chairman, Lahore improvement trust, Nov., 1935, variously, to Oct., 1937; dep. commr. (provl.), Oct., 1937; ditto, sub-permt., Feb., 1940; regr. co-op. socs., Apl., 1940; ditto, and dir., rural reconstrn., March, 1941; dir. of food purchases and dep. sec., govt., Punjab (supplies), March, 1944; C.I.E., June, 1944.

JONES, IVOR RHYS, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr. and mag.) (b. 4th Apl., 1916).—Educ. at West Ham Secondary School, Brasenose Coll., Oxford, and Clare Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1939; confd., 28th Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.

JONES, PHILIP NORTON, Indian Police (supt. and dep. commr., Bengal) (b. 27th March, 1903).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bengal, on 7th Dec., 1922; offg. addl. supt., Jan., 1929; awarded King's police medal, Oct., 1933; supt., March, 1933; dep. commr. of police, Calcutta, June, 1935.

JONES, REGINALD TREVOR, C.I.E., M.C., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 19th Dec., 1888).—Joined the service, Oct., 1912, as asst. engr.; I.A.R.O. from 16th June, 1915 to 29th March, 1919; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1921; under-secty. to govt., public wks. dept., Nov., 1927; 1927; offg. supt. engr., variously, from July, 1932; ch. engr. and secty., p.w.d., Punjab, Nov., 1939; C.I.E., Jan., 1943; ret'd., 13th Apl., 1944.

JONES, THOMAS HENRY BERTRAM, Indian State Rlys. (divl. mech. engr., N.W. Rly.) (b. 3rd Oct., 1900).—Asst. loco. supt., junr. scale, 11th Dec., 1922; divl. mech. engr. (provl.), senr. scale, Feb., 1937; confd., Jan., 1939.

JONES, THOMAS KIRKHAM, M.C., Indian Service of Engineers (b. 11th Aug., 1893).—Joined the service as forest engr., Punjab, on 27th Nov., 1921; under-secty. to govt., pub. wks. dept. (elect.), Punjab, Jan., 1930; apptd. to I.S.E. irrign. bch., Punjab, Jan., 1935; prinpl. govt. sch. of engr., Rasul, Apl., 1936; served in def. dept., Aug., 1941.

JONES, WILLIAM JOHNSTONE, late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 2nd Apl., 1884).—Ret'd., Apl., 1939.*

JOSCELYNE, HAROLD AVELING, B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 9th March, 1886).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1908; exec. engr., Oct., 1916; offg. suptg. engr., Apl., 1929; offg. dep. ch. engr., Nov., 1930; offg. contr. of stores, Feb., 1931; offg. dep. ch. engr., Feb., 1932; confd., May, 1934; offg. ch. engr., Sept., 1932; offg. senr. govt. inspr. of rlys., Sept., 1934; ch. engr., Dec., 1935; ret'd., Apl., 1941.

JOSEPH, NADUVATHUSERI JOSEPH, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Madras) (b. 22nd Apl., 1897).—Joined the service as appr. engr., 19th June, 1919; asst. exec. engr., June, 1920; offg. exec. engr., Apl., 1927; confd., June 1939.

JOSEPH, PALAKUNNATH MATHAI, M.A., B.L., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 24th Apl., 1897).—Joined the service, 4th Apl., 1921; asst. acct.-genl., Bombay, Aug., 1922; asst. dir. of audit, United

Prov., Apl., 1929; dep. acct.-genl., Burma, June, 1930; asst. dir., army audit, western cmd., May, 1931; dep. contr., Assam, Aug., 1932; dep. dir. of comml. intell. and statistics, commerce dept., govt. of India, June, 1934; reverted to Indian audit dept., from Apl., 1937, and posted to Madras as dep. acct.-genl.; compt. Orissa, Jan.; 1939; fin. offr. purchase, Sept., 1940; dy. ch. accts., officer N.W. Rly., Apl., 1941; compt. Sind, 1941.

JOSHI, DATTATRAYA SHRIDHAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (under-secty. to govt. of India, dept. of lab.) (b. 11th Oct., 1908).—Educ. at the New English School, Poona, Bombay Univ., the School of Economics, London, and the School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933; and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; under secty., home pol. depts. and passport offcr., Dec., 1937; under-secty., govt. of India, dept. of labour, July, 1941; dep. sec., ditto, Oct., 1943.

JOSHI, GAJANAN KRISHNA, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bombay) (b. 27th Oct., 1899).—Educ. at Bombay Univ. and Oxford Univ. (non-coll.). joined the service, 24th Oct., 1924; arrived, 5th Dec., 1924; and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; offg. collr., dist. mag. and pol. agent, Nov., 1925; under-secty. to govt., rev. dept., March, 1928; collr., Nov., 1936; on spl. duty, rev. dept.; ret'd., 29th Jan., 1942.

JOSHI, JAGANNATH VISHWANATH, O.B.E., M.A. (Cantab.), Commerce Dept., Govt. of India (dep. dir. of statistical research) (b. 21st May, 1898).—Apptd. asst. secty. to the govt. of Bombay, finance dept., on probn., Jan., 1924; confd., Jan., 1925; dep. dir. of comml. intelligence and statistics, on probn., Dec., 1928; confd., Dec., 1929; apptd. dep. dir. of statistical research, Jan., 1933; O.B.E., June, 1943.

JOSHI, KESHO DAT (see Kesho Dat Joshi).
JOSHI, SIR MOROFANT VISHWANATH, K.C.I.E., late member of govt.'s exec. council, Central Provs.—Ret'd., Dec., 1925.*

JOSHI, RAMACHANDRA CHINTAMAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr. and mag.) (b. 1st March, 1916).—Educ. at Bombay Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1940, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.

JOSHI, VINAYAK MAHADEO, B.A., B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 10th July, 1914).—Educ. at New English School, Poona, Bombay Univ. and Caius College, Cambridge; joined the service, 20th Sept., 1937; arrived in India Oct., 1937, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

JOSHUA, Josh S., B.Sc., Indian Police, Bengal (b. 27th Feb., 1920).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., after exam. of 1940.

JOTISH, CHANDRA GHOSH, Indian Police (b. 28th Nov., 1912).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, on probn., Jan., 1937.

JOYCE, ALEX HOUGHTON, C.I.E., O.B.E., India Office (advr. on publicity questions) (b. 5th March, 1894).—On mil. service from Dec., 1914, to Sept., 1919; apptd. clerical officer, Feb., 1922; higher clerical officer, Aug., 1924; asst. to information officer, March, 1930; jt. publicity officer, Indian round table conf., London, Nov., 1930-Jan., 1931; 2nd Session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; 3rd Session, Nov.-Dec., 1932; ditto, Burma round table conf., London, Dec., 1931; pers. asst. to prime minister, monetary and econ. conf., London, June-Aug., 1933; officer on spl. duty under govt. of India, home dept., Apl.-Nov., 1935; asst. information officer, Nov., 1935; again on spl. duty with the govt. of

India, home dept., from Oct., 1936 to Nov., 1937; information officer, Dec., 1937; O.B.E., June, 1938; advr. on publicity questions, March, 1941; C.I.E., Jan., 1943.

JOYCE, GARRETT JOSEPH, Major, I.M.S. 5th March, 1904).—Date of first commn., 22nd Dec., 1923; civil surgeon and supt. dist. jail, Punjab, Apl., 1937.

JUDGE, DIGBY THOMAS BENJAMIN, Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 9th July, 1891).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 13th Apl., 1910 to 19th July, 1915, and from 7th Dec., 1920, to 3rd Dec., 1924; on milty. duty from Sept., 1915 to June, 1920; asst. supt., Dec., 1924; offg. supt., Feb., 1932, and again, Apl., 1933; supt. (confd.), Aug., 1939; King's police medal, June, 1943.

JUDGE, HARRY, FREDERICK PERCEVAL late Indian Finance Dept., (b. 16th March, 1880).—Retd., March, 1935.*

JUGAL KISHORE, THAKUR, B.A., LL.B., Indian Police Service (b. 23rd Aug., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Central Provs., 1st May, 1926; offg. dist. supt., May, 1932; confd., Nov., 1941.

JUKES, JOHN EDWIN CLAPHAM, C.S.I., C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (Bombay) (b. 12th Nov., 1878).—Retd., Aug., 1933.*

JUPP, STANLEY DERRINGTON, Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 2nd May, 1909).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, 6th Dec., 1928; confd., Dec., 1930.

JYOTSANATH GHOSAL (see Ghosal, J.).

KABIR, ALAMGIR MAHINUDDIN AMIRE, B.A., Indian Police (b. 25th Nov., 1911).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bengal, on probn., 1st March, 1935; confd., 1937.

KADRI, WAHID BAKSH, Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.).—Apptd. on probn., after exam. of 1942; served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

KAHLON, GYAN SINGH, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 13th March, 1913); educ. at Govt. Inter. Coll., Ludhiana and Punjab Univ.; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1938; arrived in India, Jan., 1939, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1940; addl. dist., mag., Feb., 1944.

KAISER, KHWAJA MUHAMMAD, B.A., Indian Police, Bengal (b. 13th Sept., 1918).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., after exam. of 1940.

KAIWAR, SETU RAO, B.A., Indian C.S. (under secty., educn., etc., dept., Madras) (b. 2nd July, 1911).—Educ. at the Hindu High Sch., Triplicane, Univ. of Madras, Univ. Coll., London, and Worcester Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub. collr. and jt. mag., Feb., 1937; under-secty., educn. and pub. health dept., Jan., 1938; under-sec. govt.-genl. (def. co-ordn.), July, 1941; under-sec., govt. of India (defence), July, 1942; sec., Indian sailors', soldiers' and airmen's bd. (in addn.), Nov., 1942.

KAJI, HIRALAL LALLUBHAI, M.A., B.Sc., Indian Educl. Service (prof. coll. of commerce, Bombay) (b. 8th Apl., 1886).—Held non-gazetted appts. in Rajkot from 11th Apl., 1910 to 2nd Aug., 1918; lecturer in geography, Bombay, 3rd Aug., 1916; prof. ditto, Feb., 1919; I.E.S. from 5th Feb., 1921; prof. of statistics, Feb., 1921; K.-i.H. Medal, 2nd class, June, 1930.

KALE, CHINTAMAN GOVIND, B.A., B.Sc., B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Bombay) (b. 5th Oct., 1890).—Joined the

service, 25th Aug., 1917; asst. engr. (provl. service), Aug., 1918; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1919; offg. exec. engr., July, 1923; confd., Aug., 1927; dep. sec., Bombay govt., p.w.d., Sept., 1942 to Feb., 1944; suptg. engr., March, 1944.

KALI CHARAN, M.A., Indian Audit Department (b. 28th Oct., 1900).—Joined the service, 24th Feb., 1926; asst. dir. of audit, def. services, Northern Command, May, 1936; asst. acctnt.-genl., Punjab, May, 1938; dep. ditto, Oct., 1939 dep. compt., Assam, Oct., 1940.

KALIA, GUR SARAN DAS, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 22nd Feb., 1915).—Educ. at D.A.V. High School, Lahore, Punjab University and Oriel College, Oxford; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 6th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

KALUMAL PAHLUMAL, B.A., LL.B. (b. 18th Apl., 1877).—Judge small cause ct. Karachi, Dec., 1927 to 25th Mar., 1929; retd., Dec., 1935.*

KALYANARAMAN, AYYASWAMI, B.S., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 18th Jan., 1903).—Joined the service, 22nd March, 1926; depy. chief auditor, G.I.P. Rly., Apl., 1934; depy. govt. examiner of accts., B. & N.W. Rly., May, 1936; asst. acctnt.-gen., United Provs., Aug., 1937; dep. acctnt. gen., United Provs., Dec., 1937; depy. acctnt.-genl., Madras, March, 1939; ditto, posts and tels., Madras, June, 1940.

KALYANARAMAN, CHELLAMIER, B.A., B.L., Indian C.S. (jt. mag., and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 21st Sept., 1906).—Educ. at School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. under-secty. to govt., fin. dept., Bihar and Orissa, Oct., 1935; under-secty. to govt., Orissa, Apl., 1936 to March, 1937; dep. secty. to govt., Bihar, educ., dev., and empl. depts., March, 1940.

KAMA KAKA, BURJORJI HORMASJI, M.C., Lieut.-Col., retd., late I.M.S. (b. 24th Aug., 1883).—Retd., Aug., 1938.*

KAMAL-UD-DIN AHMAD, SHAMS-UL-ULAMA, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 20th Jan., 1882).—Retd., Jan., 1937.*

KAMAT DWARKANATH DHARMAJI, B.A., L.M. & S. (Bom.), L.R.C.P. and S. (Edin.), L.F.P.S. (Glas.), Lieut.-Col. I.M.S., retd. (b. 29th Feb., 1880).—Retd., March, 1935.*

KAMAT, GAJANAN RAOJI, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Assam) (b. 26th Dec., 1908).—Educ. at Bombay University, R.I. College of Science and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; offg. under-secty. to govt., Assam, in the depts. under the chief secty., Nov., 1934; confd., March, 1935; headquarters asst. to collr. of salt rev., Madras, May, 1937; on spec. duty, govt. of India, fin. dept., Apl., 1938; asst. finl. advr., mil. fin., Sept., 1938; dep. fin. advr., mil. fin., July, 1940.

KAMATH, HUNDI SRINIVASA, B.A. (Mad.), Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 21st Jan., 1905).—Educ. at Univ. of Madras, University Coll. and Sch. of Economics, London, and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1928; arrived, 16th Nov., 1928, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Dec., 1935; snr. dpy. regr., co-op. socs., Nov., 1940; addtl. sec., food dept., June, 1942; sec., ditto, Jan., 1943.

KAMATH, HUNDI VISHNU, late Indian C.S. (Central Provs.) (b. 15th July 1907.)—Retd., Apl., 1938.*

KAMLAKAR DUBE, Pandit, Rai Bahadur, M.A., late United Provs. C.S. (b. 10th Feb., 1881).—Retd., May, 1935.*

KAMTA PRASHAD, O.B.E., M.Sc., B.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 11th Feb., 1890).—Joined the service, 9th Dec., 1919; prof. of physics, Patna, July, 1920; prof., Ravenshaw Coll., March, 1922; princpl. science coll., Patna, Jan., 1941; O.B.E., Jan., 1944; ret. d., Feb., 1945.

KAMTE, NARAYANRAY MARUTIRAV, B.A., Indian Police (sup. (Bombay)) (b. 11th Sept., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bombay, 18th Aug., 1923; offg. supt., variously from May, 1929; confd., May, 1936; dep. commr., Bombay, Apl., 1938 to Aug., 1941; Indian police medal, June, 1942.

KANCHI PRASAD, RAI BAHADUR, Indian State Rlys, (dep. ch. engr., E.I., Rly.) (b. 17th Nov., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 13th Sept., 1914; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; dep. ch. engr., Jan., 1940.

KATETKAR, V. G., Indian Police.—Apptd. asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., 30th Jan., 1934; confd., June, 1935.

KANGA, SIR JAMSHEDI BEHRAMJI, Kt., M.A., LL.B., Barr., late Judl. Dept., Bombay.—Advocate-genl., 16th Apl., 1922 to Feb., 1935.

KANIA, SIR HARILAL JEKISONDAS, LL.B., Judicial dept., Bombay (judge, high ct., Bombay).—Apptd. offg. judge, high ct., Bombay, 17th June, 1930; actg. addl. judge, Oct., 1932; judge, high ct., Bombay, June, 1933; chairman, disturbances enquiry comtee., Bombay, Jan., 1939; kt., June, 1943.

KANJILAL PROPHULLA C. (see Prophulla, C. K.).

KANWAR SAIN, LALA RAI BAHADUR, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 2nd Jan., 1899).—Joined the service, 9th Oct., 1922; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1923; exec. engr., Oct., 1932; under-secty. (Haveli), May, 1937; dir., irrgn. research, Jan., 1943; author of "A Guide for the Young Men" (in Urdu) regarding social reforms.

KAO, RAMESHWAR NATH, Indian Police (United Provs.) (b. 10th May, 1918).—Apptd. asst. supt., on probn., March, 1940.

KAPADIA, JAMSHED DINSHAH, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 15th Feb., 1908).—Educ. at Cambridge University (non-collegiate); joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Dec., 1931, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

KAPADIA, MANEKSHA PHIROZSHAH, B.A., Income Tax Dept., Bombay (asst. commr. of income-tax) (b. 12th Oct., 1887).—Held temp. and permanent non-gazetted appts. from 21st Dec., 1908 to 7th Feb., 1924; income-tax officer, Bombay City Feb., 1924; asst. commr. of income-tax, Apl., 1925; on spec. duty with central bd. of rev., June, 1937 to Feb., 1938; asst. commr. of income-tax, March, 1938.

KAPOOR, NANAK CHAND, Indian State Rlys. (sup. (transplantation, E.I. Rly.)) (b. 12th March, 1902).—Joined service on E.B. Rly., Jan., 1926; asst. dist. supt., Jan., 1928; transportation (traffic commercial) supt., senior scale provl., Jan., 1939.

KAPUR, BALKISHAN (see Balkishan Kapur).

KAPUR, BALRAJ KRISHNA, Capt., M.B.E., I.A., Indian Pol. Serv. (b. 12th Jan., 1910).—First Commn., 30th Jan., 1930; under trng. in

the Punjab, Nov., 1934; asst. commr., Bannu, Apl., 1936; ditto, Dera Ismail Khan, Jan., 1938; confd., Sept., 1938; asst. commr., Manschra, Dec., 1939; settlement offr., Sept., 1941; M.B.E., June, 1944.

KAPUR, RAGHU PATI, B.A., B.Sc. Econ., Indian C.S. (asst. collr. and mag., Madras) (b. 2nd Sept., 1914).—Educ. at D.A.V. High School, Lahore, Punjab University, University College, London, and London School of Oriental Studies; appointed on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 8th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.

KAPUR SINGH, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 2nd March, 1909).—Educ. at the Khalsa High School, Lyallpur, the Punjab Univ. and St. Catherine's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933; and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sub-divl. offcr., May, 1936 to May, 1938; addl. dep. commr., June, 1941.

KARAKA, FRAMJI JAHANGIR DOSABHAI FRAMJI, B.A., late Impl. Customs Service (b. 14th Aug., 1882).—Retd., Aug., 1937.*

KARAMATTULLAH, MUHAMMAD, Indian C.S. (sub. collr., Madras) (b. 1st May, 1904).—Educ. at University of Madras, and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1928; arrived, Dec., 1928, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Nov., 1930; under-secty., dev. dept., Madras, Apl., 1935 to July, 1936;.

KARANDIKAR, SHANKAR KESHAV, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 6th Apl., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bombay, 9th Feb., 1926; offg. exec. engr., March, 1930; confd., Feb., 1935.

KARAN SINGH, RAI BAHADUR THAKUR, B.A., LL.B., late Indian Police (b. 26th July, 1882).—Retd., July, 1937.*

KARIM, A. (see Abdul Karim).

KARIM, FAZL AHMAD, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 5th Dec., 1907).—Educated at Allahabad University and New College, Oxford; joined the service, 10th Oct., 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1934; addl. dist. mag., June, 1939; mag. and collr., July, 1940; emptl. advr. to govt., Jan., 1942; addl. dist. and sess. judge, July, 1943.

KARIM, MUHAMMAD FAZLUL, see Muhammad, F. K.

KARM CHAND, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 8th Feb., 1882).—Retd., Feb., 1937.*

KARTAR SINGH, BHAI, Sardar Bahadur, late Indian Forest Service, Punjab (b. 2nd Oct., 1885).—Joined the service, 1st Apl., 1912; asst. consvr., Jan., 1923; dep. consvr., Dec., 1925; on Chamba State, Dec., 1930; ret. d., Oct., 1940.

KARUNAKARAN NAYAR, CHETTUR RAO BAHADUR, B.A., Barr.-at-Law, Indian Police (b. 22nd June, 1889).—Joined the service, 22nd Feb., 1912; apptd. to the Indian Police as dist. supt., Madras, May, 1937.

KASHI RAM BERY (see Bery, K. R.).

KASHYAP, NARINDAR NATH, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 26th May, 1917).—Educ. at Punjab Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1941; served in Punjab as asst. commr.

KATHPALIA, K. N. (see Krishna Narayan K.).

KAUL, BRAHMA KUMAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 11th Nov., 1917).—

Educ. at Allahabad Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1940, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.

• KAUL, MADAN GOPAL, M.A., Indian C.S. (b. 16th Jan., 1921).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1943, and served in Bengal.

KAUL, MAHESHWAR NATH, M.A. (Cantab.), BART. (b. 16th Sept., 1901).—Apptd. dep. secty., Legisl. Assembly dept., Sept., 1937.

KAUL, PRADYUMNA KRISHNA, B.A., Indian C.S. (addtl. judge, ch. ct., Oudh) (b. 14th Jan., 1900).—Educ. at Punjab Univ. and Queen's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 15th Oct., 1923; arrived, 10th Dec., 1923, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; dep. commr. (subs. provl.), Apl., 1931; confd., March, 1935; addtl. judge, chief ct., Oudh, May, 1944.

KAUL, TRILOKI NATH, B.A., LL.B., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., U.P.) (b. 27th Dec., 1912).—Educ. at S.P. High School, Srinagar, Kashmir, Punjab Univ., Allahabad Univ., and King's College, London; joined the service, 15th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in U.P. as asst. mag. and collr.

KAULA, SIR GANGARAM, Kt., C.I.E., B.A., late India Finance Dept. (b. 9th May, 1877).—Joined the service, 3rd Jan., 1896, as asst. examr., p.w. accts.; dep. examr., Feb., 1900; examr., Jan., 1906; dept. compr., Central Provs., Apl., 1909; dep. acctnt.-gen., United Provs., Apl., 1912; ditto, Punjab, Oct., 1914; on spl. duty in connection with revision of P.W. code, from Apl., 1918 to March, 1920; acctnt.-gen., May, 1923; chief auditor, O.R. Rly., Dec., 1923; offg. acctnt.-gen., Central Provs., June, 1924; acctnt.-gen., central revenues, May, 1925; acct.-gen., rlys., Feb., 1929; dir. of rly. audit., rly. bd., Apl., 1929; C.I.E., June, 1930; offg. contr. of civil accts., Apl., 1930; retd., Oct., 1932; kt., June, 1944.

KAYANI, MALIK RUSTUM, Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Punjab) (b. 18th Oct., 1902).—Educ. at Univ. of the Punjab and Trinity Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 29th Oct., 1927; arrived, Nov., 1927; and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1934; offg. dist. and sess. judge, March, 1935; confd., Nov., 1936; on depn. to N.W.F.P. as dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1942.

KAYE, JOHN FREDERIC BARKER, Indian Police (dist. supt., Madras) (b. 29th Aug., 1895).—Joined the service, 22nd Apl., 1919; asst. supt., Apl., 1921; offg. dist. supt., March, 1924; confd., May, 1930; pers. asst. to inspr.-genl. of rlys., and C.I.D., May, 1931; princpl. police training sch., June, 1934;

KAZI, AFTAB GHULAM NABI, M.Sc., Indian C.S. (b. 6th Nov., 1919).—Educ. at N.J. High Sch., Karachi and Bombay Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1943, and served in Bihar.

KAZIM RAZA, SAIYID, Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 25th Jan., 1898).—Joined the service, 18th Feb., 1921; offg. supt., Apl., 1924, and again, Apl., 1927; confd., Nov., 1932; asst. to D.I.G., C.I.D., Apl., 1925; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1930.

KEALY, SIR EDWARD HERBERT, Kt., C.I.E., M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 7th June, 1873).—Retd., Dec., 1932.*

KEARSEY, STEPHEN HENRY, late Indian Police (b. 6th May, 1882).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., 12th Nov., 1921; offg. dist. supt., March, 1926; confd., March, 1928; supt., rly., police, eastern sectn., Feb., 1932; retd., Jan., 1936.*

KEDAR NATH AGARWAL, late Indian Service of Engrs. (United Provs.) (b. 30th June, 1890).—Retd., March, 1938.*

KEEGAN, DENIS FRANK, Impl. Customs Service (asst. collr.) (b. 2nd Dec., 1896).—Apptd. probr., Impl. Customs Service, 18th Feb., 1924; asst. collr., Madras, Feb., 1926; secty., tariff bd., cotton textile industry enquiry, July, 1926; asst. collr., Bombay, Jan., 1928; and again, Dec., 1932; ditto, Karachi, June, 1931; ditto, Bombay, Aug., 1934; offg. collr., Karachi, Oct., 1936; transfd. to Madras, Feb., 1939; addtl. opium agt. and mgr., opium factory, Gazipur, May, 1940.

KEELAN, CYRIL JOHN (late Indian State Rlys.) (b. 8th June, 1885).—Joined the service as temp. engr., 5th Nov., 1908; asst. engr., July, 1912; resdt. engr., July, 1916; divl. engr., June, 1926; retd., March, 1941.

KEELAN, ESMOND HARDING, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 28th Sept., 1882).—Retd., Oct., 1936.*

KEELING, SIR HUGH TROWBRIDGE, Kt., C.S.I., A.M.I.C.E., late Madras Public Works Dept.—Retd., Apl., 1920.*

KEEN, PATRICK JOHN, M.B.E., Capt. I.A. (b. 30th June, 1911).—Apptd. to I.P.S. on probn., Oct., 1936; under-sec. to resdt., Central India, Nov., 1944.

KEENE, HUGH, Indian Police (dep. inspr. genl., Madras) (b. 22nd Nov., 1897).—Joined the service, 7th Oct., 1920; confd. asst. supt., July, 1922; offg. dist. supt., Apl., 1928; confd., Oct., 1930; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1924; asst. inspr.-genl., Nov., 1935; awarded Indian police medal, Jan., 1939; cent. intell. offr., Madras, March, 1939; confd. as dep. inspr.-gen., Aug. 1942.

KEITH, ROBERT FARQUHARSON, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 22nd June, 1912).—Educ. at Fettes College, Gonville and Caius Coll., Cambridge, and the School of Oriental Studies, London; apptd. after exam. of 1935; arrived in India, Jan., 1937, and served in Bombay, as asst. collr.; under-sec., govt. of Bombay, Apl., 1940; supt., Yeravac gaol, Nov., 1942; served in Sind from July, 1943.

KELAVKAR, MADHAV KRISHNA, O.B.E., M.B., B.S., D.T.M. & H., M.R.C.P., Lieut.-Col. I.M.S. (asst. dir.-genl., I.M.S.) (b. 30th Apl., 1893).—First comm. dated 26th Aug., 1926; in mil. employ prior to 31st May, 1933, when he joined medl. store dept., asst. dir.-genl., I.M.S., Oct., 1938; O.B.E., Jan., 1943.

KELLAWAY, HERBERT FRANK, late Office of High Commr. for India (b. 7th Feb., 1883).—Apptd. clerk, 2nd class, India store depot, 27th Dec., 1901; on mil. service, Oct., 1917 to Feb., 1919; transfd. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; higher clerical officer, Apl., 1922; retd., Feb., 1943.

KELLY, CHARLES SPENCER, Indian C.S. (dep. secty., defence dept., Burma) (b. 15th June, 1907).—Educ. at King Edward's School, Stafford and Balliol College, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served as asst. commr. in Burma; asst. supt., Shan States, Aug., 1935; dep. secty., defence dept., Apl., 1939; ditto, comm. and indus., March, 1940; dep. contr. of supplies, Aug., 1940.

KELLY, JAMES, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (Punjab) (b. 31st Aug., 1880).—Retd., Aug., 1935.*

KELLY, JOHN WILLIAM, C.I.E., B.A., Indian Finance Dept. (contr. of currency, Bombay) (b.

28th Sept., 1885).—Joined the service, 14th Oct., 1910; asst. acctnt.-gen., United Provs., May, 1912; ditto, Madras, Dec., 1913; asst. acct.-gen., United Provs., May, 1915; ditto, Central Provs., May, 1921; currency officer, Bombay, Apl., 1922; offg. dep. contr. of currency, Calcutta, Sept., 1925; ditto, Bombay, Oct., 1926; offg. contr. of the currency, Apl., 1931; June, 1932, and again, Feb., 1933; confd., Feb., 1935; C.I.E., June, 1934; dir., res. bank of India, Nov., 1935.

KELLY, SIR PATRICK ALOYSIUS, Kt., C.I.E., late Indian Police (Bombay) (b. 14th July, 1880).—Retd., Apl., 1935.*

KELLY, PHILIP DESMOND LORNE, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 13th Sept., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 22nd Dec., 1919; offg. supt., July, 1924; confd., Apl., 1930; dep. commr., Feb., 1939 to March, 1944; supt., rly. police, Oct., 1944.

KEMP, ARTHUR HUGH, Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. coll., Bihar) (b. 28th Feb., 1905).—Educ. at Portsmouth Grammar Sch., and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. coll. and mag.; jt. mag., Nov., 1928; offg. mag. and collr., March, 1935; sec. to govt., Orissa, rev. and devel. dept., June, 1944.

KEMP, CYRIL KENNETH, India Police (supt.) (b. 2nd Apl., 1903).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 2nd Dec., 1922; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1932; offg. supt., Nov., 1933; confd., March, 1934.

KEMP, SIR KENNETH MCINTYRE (legal advr. and solr. to the sec. of state) (b. 13th Dec., 1883).—Joined the service as profir., govt. law school, 1st June, 1919; editor, Indian law reports, June, 1921; offg. judge, high ct., Bombay, June, 1928; retd., May, 1931; apptd. advocate-genl., Bombay, Feb., 1935; knighted, May, 1937; retd., Dec., 1937; apptd. legal advr. and solr. to the sec. of state, Dec., 1938.

KENNEDY, ALWYNE JOSEPH, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 13th Sept. 1895).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 27th Nov., 1920; offg. supt., May, 1924; confd., Apl., 1929.

KENNEDY, ROBERT STEWART, late India Office (b. 29th Dec., 1879).—Educ. at George Watson's Coll., Edinburgh, and Madras Coll., St. Andrews; apptd. 2nd class clerk, registry and record dept., 10th Feb., 1904; transfed. to finl. dept., Apl., 1905; temp. asst. to resdt. clerks, Aug., 1914; temp. addl. resdt. clerk, Oct., 1914 to Sept., 1915; on mil. service, Sept., 1915 to Oct., 1919; transfed. to Indo-European tel. dept., 1920; transfed. to acctnt.-genl's dept., Feb., 1922; higher exec. officer, Apl., 1922; also assessor of income-tax; suptg. exec. officer, Jan., 1928; retd., July, 1940.

KENNEDY, WILLIAM GEORGE, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 29th Jan., 1909).—Educ. at Calday Grange Grammar School, West Kirby, Cheshire, and Jesus College, Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1936; spec. offr., home dept., Jan., 1940; ditto, petrol. Dec., 1941; ch. offr. corpn. of Lahore, Nov., 1943.

KENNY, DICK EDWARD COURTENAY, Lieut.-Col. I.A., late Burma Commn. (b. 20th Nov. 1885).—Retd., Jan., 1937.*

KENNY, WILLIAM JOHN, Indian Police (Bihar and Orissa) (b. 27th Nov., 1919).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Oct., 1939.

KER, CHARLES MURRAY, O.B.E., Indian C.S., (b. 2nd Sept., 1906).—Educ. at Rugby and Hertford College, Oxford; joined the service, 17th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr., secty., spl. tariff bd., Oct., 1935; under secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of indus. and lab., Nov., 1936; under-secty., dept. of lab., Nov., 1937; M.B.E., June, 1939; O.B.E., June, 1944; home sec. to govt., U.P., Nov., 1944.

KER, NALINI BEHARI, Office of High Commr. for India (educ. officer, exec. grade, educn. dept.) (b. 4th Jan., 1891).—Apptd. educ. officer, 15th July, 1929; actg. educ. officer (prin. exec. grade), May, 1941.

KER, STANLEY DARLING, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 31st March, 1888).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1910; exec. engr., N.W. rly., March, 1931; retd. July, 1942.

KERMODE, CHARLES WILLIAM DALY, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 19th Sept., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 27th Dec., 1924; dep. consvr., Nov., 1928; sylviculturist, Apl., 1935.

KERR, PERCIVAL JAMES, M.R.C.V.S., late Indian Veterinary Service (b. 2nd Feb., 1885).—Joined the service, 22nd Jan., 1911; supt. Oct., 1912; in mil. employ. from July, 1915 to March, 1920; offg. dir., C.V.D., Bengal, Oct., 1924; confd., July, 1927; services placed at the disposal of the govt. of India from Nov., 1938, for employment as animal husbandry expert, imperial council of agricultural research; retd., Feb., 1940.

KERR, WALTER JOULE, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bengal) (b. 1st Dec., 1880).—Retd., Dec., 1935.*

KERSHAW, SIR LOUIS JAMES, K.C.S.I., C.I.E., late Indian C.S., and India Office (b. 20th Dec., 1869).—Retd., Dec., 1934.*

KESAVANUNNI, NAYAR, M.B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 25th June, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 9th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927.

KESHAVA RAO, NEELAMANGALA, B.A., B.E. (C.E.), late Indian Service of Engrs. (Madras) (b. 29th March, 1889).—Joined the service as appr. engr., 4th July, 1913; asst. engr., July, 1914; exec. engr., July, 1923; suptg. engr., Nov., 1941; retd., March, 1944.

KESHO DAT JOSHI, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., United Provs.) (b. 29th Nov., 1890).—Joined the service as proby. extra asst. consvr., July, 1915; confd., Apl., 1917; promoted to I.F.S., 15th Apl., 1931; dep. consvr., Apl., 1931.

KESWANI, GOPALDAS HASSANAND, M.B.E., DIWAN BAHADUR, I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engineers, Sind (b. 7th March, 1883).—Retd., July, 1939.*

KEWALRAMANI, RAMCHAND MALHANDAS, late Indian Posts and Tels. (b. 3rd Oct., 1883).—Retd., Sept., 1938.*

KHAIRAZ, GULAM HUSSAIN RAHIMTULLA, Barr., late Bombay Judicial Dept. (b. 24th Dec., 1882).—Joined the dept., 1st Apl., 1913; 4th presdy. mag., Apl., 1913; 3rd ditto, Feb., 1924; 2nd ditto, March, 1925; retd., Sept., 1940.

KHALEELI, ABRAS, Indian C.S. (sub-collr., Madras) (b. 14th Sept., 1908).—Educ. at Brasenose College, Oxford; joined the service, 13th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931; and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., Feb., 1935; under-secty., dev. dept., Madras, May, 1936; served under central govt.,

July, 1939 to Nov., 1942; dir. of indus. and commerce, Feb., 1943.

KHALIK, MUHAMMAD ABDUL (see Muhammad A. K.).

KHAMBATTA, BURJOR FRAMJI, M.B.E., M.B., B.S. (Bom.), D.P.H. (Lond.) (port health officer, Karachi) (b. 30th July, 1892); joined the Bombay medical service on 1st March, 1921; asst. port health officer, Bombay, Nov., 1922 to Jan., 1924; port health officer, Karachi, Jan., 1924.

KHAN, ABBAL ALI (see Abbas Ali Khan).
KHAN, ABDUL ALI (see Abdul Ali Khan).
KHAN, ABDUL GHAFOOR (see Abdul Ghafoor Khan).

KHAN, ABDUS GHAYUR, Indian State Ryls. (supt. transportation, E.I. Rly.) (b. 17th Aug., 1900).—Joined the service, May, 1921; asst. supt., E.I. rly., Feb., 1925; asst. supt. junior scale, Apl., 1928; senior scale, Jan., 1939.

KHAN, ABDUL HAMID (see Abdul Hamid Khan).

KHAN, A. K. (see Abdul Kaiyum Khan).
KHAN, ABDUL HAMID, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr.).—Apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1941; served in Bombay as asst. collr.

KHAN, ABDUL MAJID (see Abdul Majid Khan).

KHAN, ABDUL RASHEED (see Abdul Rasheed Khan).

KHAN, AFTAB AHMAD, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 10th Oct., 1917).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1941; served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

KHAN, A.S. (see Abdus Samad Khan).
KHAN, AITIZAZ-UD-DIN AHMAD (see Aitizaz-ud-Din Ahmad Khan).

KHAN, AKHTER HAMI' (see Akhter Hamid Khan).

KHAN, ALLAH YAR (see Allah Yar Khan).

KHAN, AURELIUS DAVID, B.A. (Cantab.), Indian Civil Service (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 21st March, 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of Calcutta, and Selwyn Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 21st Oct., 1927; arrived Dec., 1928, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. addl. dist. and sess. judge, March, and again, Oct., 1933; addtl. dist. mag., Feb., 1937; mag. and collr., Oct., 1938; dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1939; spec. offr., fin. dept., Bengal, March, 1940; sec. civil supplies dept., Jan., 1945.

KHAN, DILAWAR HUSAIN (see Dilawar Husain Khan).

KHAN, FATEH MOHAMMED, M.D., Ch.B., D.T.M., D.P.H., Major, I.M.S. (b. 21st Aug., 1901).—First commission dated 23rd Oct., 1930; in milty. employ prior to 14th Sept., 1937, when he was transferred to civil employ, medl. officer of health, Simla, Sept., 1937; in temp. milty. employ from Jan., 1941.

KHAN, FATEH MUHAMMAD, KHAN BAHADUR, Indian State Ryls. (divl. transportation officer, N.W. Rly.) (b. 1895).—Joined service, May, 1918; asst. traffic supt., junior scale, May, 1920; divl. transportation (traffic commercial) officer; senior scale, Jan., 1939.

KHAN, FAZL MUHAMMAD (see Fazel, M.K.).

KHAN, GHAZANFUR, A. (see Ghazanfur Ali Khan).

KHAN, GHULAM AHMAD (see Ghulam, A. K.).

KHAN, IKRAM AHMED, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 1st June, 1915).—Educ. at Fzia-I-Am High Sch., Meerut, Aligarh Univ., and Queen's College, Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 21st Oct., 1939; confd., 26th Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940; and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

KHAN, INAYAT ULLAH (see Inayat Ullah Khan).

KHAN, ISLAM AHMAD (see Islam Ahmad Khan).

KHAN, KHURSHED AHMAD (see Khurshed Ahmad Khan).

KHAN, KURBAN ALI (see Kurban, A. K.).

KHAN, MAQSUD ALI (see Maqsud Ali Khan).

KHAN, MIR SAEED ALAM, Nawabzada (see Mir, S. A. K.).

KHAN, MUHAMMAD INAMULLAH (see Muhammad I. K.).

KHAN, MUHAMMAD MOOSA (see Muhammad. M. K.).

KHAN, NIAZ MUHUMMAD (see Niaz, M. K.).

KHAN, SAADAT-UL-LAH (see Saadat-ul-lah Khan).

KHAN, SAHIBZADA SARDAR MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Khan, S.S.).

KHAN, SAID ULLAH (see Said Ullah Khan).

KHAN, SARDAR ATA MUHAMMAD (see Ata Muhammad S. Khan).

KHAN, SHUJA-UD-DIN (see Shuja-ud-din, K.).

KHAN, TALIA MUHAMMAD (see Talia Muhammad Khan).

KHAN, ZAHID HASAN (see Zahid Hasan Khan).

KHAN, ZAMAN MEHDI (see Zaman Mehdi Khan).

KHANDALAVALA, DORAB, N. D., B.A. LL.B., late Bombay Judicial Dept. (b. 14th June, 1884).—Retd., Oct., 1939.*

KHANDEKAR, SADASHIV BALVANT, late Income Tax Dept., Bombay (b. 21st July, 1884).—Retd., July, 1939.*

KHAN-LEGHARI, SARDAR ATA MUHAMMAD, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 23rd Nov., 1913).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., Julapaha and Christ Church Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 5th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.

KHANNA, RATAN CHAND, M.A., F.R.E.S., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 21st March, 1899).—Joined the service, 17th Feb., 1922; asst. auditor, E.B. rly., Apl., 1927; asst. dir., army audit, E. Cmd., Apl., 1932; asst. acct.-genl., Central revs., Apl., 1936; dep. acct.-gen., United Provs., Oct., 1938; dy. fin. advr., supply finance, March, 1941.

KHARAK SINGH, SARDAR SAHIB, M.A. (Punjab), late Indian Agricl. Service (b. Punjab 23rd Nov., 1881).—Retd., Nov., 1936.*

KHARAS, JAMSHED GUSTADJI, Indian C.S. (asst. collr.) (b. 28th July, 1919).—Educ. at St. Aloysius' Coll. and Owen's Sch., London, and Univ. Coll., London; apptd. on probn. after seln. in Aug., 1941, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

KHAREGAT, P. M. (see Pheroze Merwan Kharegat).

KHARE, NARATAM BHASKAR, B.A., M.D. (memb. govr.-genl.'s exec. council, commonwealth relations) (b. 1884).—Late Central Provs. medl. service; member Central Provs. legis. council, 1923-29; member centr. legis. assembly, 1935-37; prime minister, Central Provs. and Berar, 1937-38; member govr.-genl.'s exec. council, (commonwealth relations), May, 1943.

KHAREGAT, RUSTAM MERWAN, M.B., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. (agency surgeon) (b. 3rd Feb., 1889).—First commn. dated 23rd Jan., 1917; civil surg., Ajmer, July, 1924; offg. agency surg., Bundelkhand, Apl., 1927; confd., July, 1927; ditto, Sistan, Feb., 1928; ditto, Bannu, Jan., 1930; civil surg., Hazara and supt., jail, Abbottabad, March, 1931; C.M.O., in C.I., and resdy. surg., Indore, June, 1934; agency surg., Bundelkhand, Oct., 1934; civ. surg., Ajmer and C.M.O., in Rajputana, Apl., 1938.

KHATTRI, BAINJNATH (see Bainjath, K.).

KHER, RAO SAHIB PANDIT, L. S. R. (see Lachhman Sitaram Kher.)

KHER, GOPAL SAKHARAM, B.A., LL.B., late Judl. Dept., Central Provs. (b. 16th Nov., 1885).—Joined the service, 11th Oct., 1910; sub-judge, Nov., 1923; dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1933; retd., Nov., 1940.

KHER, VASUDEO RAMKRISHNA, B.Sc., Indian Police, Central Provs. (b. 15th Aug., 1919).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., after exam. of 1940.

KHERA, S. S., Indian C.S. (name changed from Sucha Singh) (collr. and mag., United Provs.) (b., 3rd Apl., 1903).—Educ. at King's Coll., London; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1927; arrived, Nov., 1927, and served in the United Provs. as asst. commr.; jt. mag., March, 1930; exec. offcr., improvement trust, Cawnpore, May, 1936; collr. and mag. (confd.), Apl., 1941.

KHIN, HENRY AUNG, M.B., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., retd., late Burma Medl. Dept. (b. 8th Dec., 1887).—First commn., dated 1st Nov., 1920; asst. medl. supt., Rangoon gen. hosp., Oct., 1922; civil surg., Aug., 1924; retd., Dec., 1942.

KHINE, MAUNG YIN (see Yin Khin Maung).

KHINE, MAUNG KYAW, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr. Burma) (b. 10th Dec., 1903).—Educ. at Rangoon Univ. and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931; and served in Burma as asst. commr.; dep. regr. high ct., Sept., 1937.

KHONDKAR, FAZLE SOBHAN, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 5th Jan., 1905).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 17th Dec., 1925; confd., Apl., 1928; offg. addl. supt., Apl., 1932; dep. commr. of police, Calcutta, Nov., 1937; confd. supt., March, 1939; on spec. duty, civil supplies, govt. of India, Jan., 1944.

KHONDKAR, FAZLUR RAHMAN (see Fazlur, R. K.).

KHONDKAR GHOLAM MURSHED, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 25th Jan., 1901).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Oxford Univ. (non-coll.); joined the service, 24th Oct., 1924; arrived, 8th Dec., 1924; and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr., offg. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1930; and again, Sept., 1933; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1931; and again, May, 1933; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1933; chief contrl. of purchase (supply), dept. of supply, Aug., 1941-Aug., 1944.

KHOSLA, GOPAL DAS, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 15th Dec., 1901).—Educ. at Univ. of Edinburgh and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 21st Oct., 1926; arrived, Nov., 1926, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1930; and again, Jan., 1934; confd., Jan., 1937; addtl. judge, high ct., Lahore, Nov., 1944.

KHOSLA, RAM PRASHAD, B.A., late Indian

Educl. Service (b. 16th Aug., 1881).—Retd., Aug., 1936.*

KHOT, GAJANAN WAMAN, B.A., LL.B., Indian Police (supt., Sind) (b. 24th July, 1908).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Bombay, 1st March, 1932; confd., Apl., 1933; supt. (confd.), Nov., 1942; asst. to D.I.G., July, 1943; Indian police medal, June, 1943.

KHUNDHAR, NURAL AZEEM, B.A., LL.B., Judl. Dept., Bengal (judge, high ct., Calcutta) (b. 17th March, 1890).—Joined the service, 27th Oct., 1921; dept. supt. and membr. of legal affairs, Jan., 1924; offg. judge, high ct., Calcutta, variously, from Apl., 1934; confd., Nov., 1937.

KHURANA, DWARKA NATH, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Central Provs.) (b. 5th June, 1904).—Joined the service as appr. engr., 18th Nov., 1927; asst. exec. engr. (proby.), Nov., 1928; confd., July, 1930; exec. engr., March, 1940.

KHURSHID MUHAMMAD, KEAN BAHADUR, Shaikh, O.B.E., M.A., Punjab Civil Service (dep. commr.) (b. 7th Jan., 1883).—Joined the service as proby. extra asst. commr., 11th Jan., 1907; confd., Sept., 1911; junr. secty. to finl. commrs., Aug., 1927; dep. commr., Aug., 1931; offg. dep. secty., govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, Oct., 1932 to Dec., 1933; O.B.E., Jan., 1941.

KHURSHED AHMAD KHAN, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 15th March, 1897).—Educ. at Trinity Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr., from 31st Jan., 1922; jt. mag., Oct., 1924; offg. mag. and collr. variously, from Sept., 1925; offg. dep. commr. Apl., 1928; repres. of U.P. govt. in central legisl. assembly, Jan., 1931; mag. and collr., May, 1937; C.I.E., Jan., 1945.

KHUSHI RAM, SUD, LALA RAI BAHADUR, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 14th Dec., 1898).—Joined the service, 9th Oct., 1922; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1923; offg. exec. engr., Apl., 1932; confd., Oct., 1932.

KHURSHID, MOHAMMED, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Assam) (b. 8th Dec., 1907).—Educ. at the Punjab University and St. Catherine's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Assam as asst. commr., under-secty., fin. and rev. depts., March, 1938; ditto, govt. of India, infm. and broadcasting, Oct., 1941; dep. sec., ditto to June, 1942.

KHURSHID, SAHIBZADA MUHAMMAD, Major, I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 21st July, 1901).—First commn., 31st Aug., 1922; in milty. employ. to 29th June, 1927; asst. pol. agent and asst. commr., Sibi, Jan., 1929; ditto, Zhob, May, 1929; ditto, Loralai, Apl., 1931; asst. for Mekran to pol. agt. in Kalat, Apl., 1932; Adjt. Mekran levy corps, in addn., from Oct., 1933 to Nov., 1933; asst. pol. agent and cmdt. refugees camp, Quetta, June, 1935; transf. to for. service in Kalat State, Aug., 1935; addtl. asst. pol. agent, S. Waziristan, Dec., 1937; asst. pol. agent, S. Waziristan, Apl., 1938; asst. pol. agent, Chitral, Oct., 1938; pol. agent, Dir., Surat and Chitral, Apl., 1939; ditto in Chagai, March, 1940; dep. commr., Mardan, March, 1944.

KHWAJA MUHAMMAD AKRAM KHAN (see Muhammad Akram Khan, K.).

KHWAJA MUHAMMAD HUSAIN (see Muhammad Husain, K.).

KIDD, FREDERICK WILLIAM, C.I.E., Indian Police (dep. dir., intell. bureau) (b. 1st Sept., 1896).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 4th Dec., 1911; confd., May, 1914; supt. and dep. commr. of police, Calcutta, Oct., 1923; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1931; on depn. under G. of I. Home dept., intell. bureau, as cent. intell. officer, Bengal and Assam, from Dec., 1937; dep. dir., intell. bureau, Feb., 1940; dep. inspr.-gen., June, 1942; C.I.E., Jan., 1943.

KIDD, HUGH BERESFORD, Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 20th July, 1894).—Joined the service, 20th Nov., 1914; on mil. duty from 23rd July, 1918 to 24th March, 1919; supt., March, 1926; dep. commr. (temp.), Bombay, Dec., 1937 to Apl., 1938; confd. supt. (sel. grade), Apl., 1942; King's police medal, 8th June, 1944.

KIDWAI, AHMED NAZIR, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 16th Feb., 1916).—Educ. at Lucknow Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1940, and served in Assam as asst. commr.

KILBURN, DENYS, O.B.E., Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 12th Sept., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 15th March, 1921; asst. to dep. inspr.-gen., C.I.D., Punjab, Apl., 1926; offg. supt., Dec., 1926; confd., Oct., 1931; O.B.E., Jan., 1939.

KING, SIR ARCHIBALD JOHN, Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Madras) (b. 27th July, 1887).—Educ. at Liverpool Coll. and Lincoln Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 22nd Nov., 1911, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Feb., 1927; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1923; confd., Apl., 1926; offg. judge, high ct., Madras, July, 1934; confd., Jan., 1935; kt., Jan., 1944.

KING, ARNOLD JESSE, Indian Police, Madras (b. 18th Aug., 1895).—Joined the service, 4th Dec., 1920; asst. supt., Dec., 1924; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1923; offg. supt., March, 1927; confd., Apl., 1930; on depn. to govt., Ceylon, Apl., 1942 to Oct., 1943.

KING, SIR CARLETON MOSS, Kt., C.I.E., late Indian C.S., United Provs. (b. 17th July, 1878).—Retd., Oct., 1937.*

KING, CUTHBERT, M.A., Indian C.S. (addtl. commr., Punjab) (b. 27th Jan., 1889).—Educ. at Sherborne, Christ Church, Oxford, and Göttingen; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived, 22nd Nov., 1913, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; on mil. duty from Feb., 1917; on spl. duty under H.B.M.'s consul-gen. and agent to the govt. of India, Khorasan, from Jan., 1919 to Apl., 1920; dep. commr. (provl.), Apl., 1926; ditto, perm., Aug., 1928; addtl. commr., March, 1938.

KING, EVA FANNY, M.B.E., late India Office (b. 23rd July, 1870).—Retd., July, 1935.*

KING, FRANK JEROME MAITLAND, Col., R.E., late Survey of India (b. 30th March, 1884).—First commn. dated 10th Jan., 1903; apptd. asst. supt., survey dept., 27th March, 1907; on mil. duty from Oct., 1914 to Nov., 1916; dep. supt., March, 1922; supt., Jan., 1926; offg. dir., U.P., Apl., 1931; ditto, Frontier circle, Oct., 1931; dir., Oct., 1933; retd., March, 1939.*

KING, FREDERICK CHARLES, B.A., Barr., late Indian C.S. (b. 6th Jan., 1888).—Educ. at Clongowes Wood Coll. and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 7th Jan., 1913; and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., Apl., 1922; confd., July, 1927; offg. dep., commr.,

Nov., 1925; chairman, Assam labour bd., Apl., 1928; commr., cent. excises and salt dept., N. India, Feb., 1938; retd., July, 1941.

KING, GERALD STANLEY WEATHRAL, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 14th Feb., 1884).—Retd., Feb., 1939.*

KING, HAROLD HOLMES, C.I.E., M.B., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., retd. (b. 17th Aug., 1884).—Retd., Aug., 1936.*

KING, REV. WILLIAM, B.A., Indian Eccles. Estab., Bombay (b. 17th March, 1905).—Apptd. junr. chaplain on probn., 18th Dec., 1939.

KINGSLEY, EDWIN MAXIMILIAN, late Burma Frontier Service (b. 11th July, 1883).—Retd., July, 1939.*

KIRBY, HAROLD LEPINE, M.C., Indian Forest Service (depy. consvr., Burma) (b. 13th July, 1893).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 14th Dec., 1922; dep. consvr., Dec., 1925.

KIRBY, WALTER, B.Sc., Dept. of Mines in India (chief inspr.) (b. 6th Dec., 1891).—Joined the service as junr. inspr., 27th Apl., 1921; inspr., Oct., 1925; ch. inspr., Apl., 1938.

KIRKBRIDE, GEORGE, Lieut.-Col. I.A. Indian Political Service (b. 16th Apl., 1894).—First commn. dated 1st June, 1915; joined pol. dept., 22nd March, 1922; asst. commr., Nowshera, March, 1924; secty., British Legation, Kabul, Dec., 1926; asst. commr., Mansehra, Dec., 1928; and again, July, 1929; dep. commr., Hazara, Apl., 1929; dist. judge, Peshawar, Oct., 1929; secty. to resdt. in Mysore, March, 1931; pol. agent, Gilgit, Sept., 1934; ditto, Malwa, March, 1938; ditto, Chhattisgarh State, Nov., 1941; ditto, Mewar, Oct., 1943.

KIRKNESS, LEWIS HAWKER, C.I.E., O.B.E., D.S.O., late Indian State Rlys.—Joined the service, 15th Aug., 1929; dir., estabt., rly. bd., Dec., 1932; secty., rly. bd., Feb., 1933; C.I.E., June, 1936; retd.,

KIRKPATRICK, WILLIAM, C.I.E., B.E., B.A., M.Inst.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Sind) (b. 15th Sept., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1910; in milty. employ from 29th July, 1916 to 31st Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1918; offg. suptg. engr., Apl., 1925, Apl., 1928, and again Apl., 1929; confd., May, 1936; C.I.E., June, 1941.

KIRPALANI, HIRANAND KHUSHIRAM, C.I.E., M.A., Barr., Indian C.S.
