(mag. and collr., Bihar) (b. 9th Nov., 1896).—Educ. at Canning Coll., Lucknow, and Peterhouse, Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 13th Jan., 1922, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-secty., fin. dept., offg. dep. commr., March, 1932; dept. secty. to govt., Orissa, Apl., 1936; dir. of development, Orissa, Nov., 1936; mag. and collr., Feb., 1937; lab. commr., Bihar, March, 1941; sec., educ. etc. dept., Feb., 1944.

MEAKINS, HAROLD WHAYMAN, Indian State Rlys. (traffic manager, E.B. Rly.) (b. 9th Oct., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., on 18th July, 1908; dist. ditto, Apl., 1918; offg. dep. traffic manager, E.B. rly., variously from Oct., 1932; confd., Jan., 1937; traffic manager, ditto, Dec., 1939.

MEASURES, PHILIP HERBERT JOSEPH, C.B.E., Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl., United Provs.) (b. 2nd Jan., 1893).—Joined the service, Nov., 1913, as asst. supt.; supt., Maroh, 1925; C.B.E., Jan., 1931; dep. inspr.-genl. (confd.).

MEDD, H. A. N., late Consulting Architect, Central P.W.D. (b. 21st Sept., 1892).—Consulting architect to govt., Central Provs., 14th Dec., 1935; transf. to Central P.W.D., Oct., 1939; retd.,

MEEHAN, ROBERT LYS WILLIAM, V.D., Indian State Rlys. (ch. mechl. engr., E.B. Rly.) (b. 30th Apl., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. loco. supt., 3rd Jan., 1914; dist. loco. supt., Dec., 1922; supt., mechl. records, Apl., 1925; pers. asst. to dep. ch. mechl. engr., Dec., 1926; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr., June,

1929; confd., May, 1931; offg. ch. mechl. engr., E.I. rly., Jan., 1936; ch. mechl. engr., E.B. rly., Jan., 1938.

MEEK, ARTHUR STANLEY, C.M.G., Lieut.-Col., I.A. (ret'd.), late Indian Pol. Service (b. 7th Oct., 1883).—Retd., Oct., 1938.*

MEEK, SIR DAVID BURNETT, C.I.E., O.B.E., M.A., D.Sc., Indian Educl. Service (Indian trade commr.) (b. 10th March, 1885).—Joined the service, 11th Feb., 1911, as prof'r., Daeca Coll.; asst. contr. of munitions, govt. of India, Oct., 1918, to Apl., 1919; dir. of industries, Bengal, Jan., 1920; O.B.E., June, 1924; dir.-genl. of comml. intell., Apl., 1926; C.I.E., June, 1933; Indian trade commr., Jan., 1935; representative of the govt. of India to commonwealth statistical conf., Ottawa, Sept., 1935; kt., May, 1937; dep. high commr. for India (in addn.), Jan., 1944.

MEGAW, SIR JOHN WALLACE DICK, K.C.I.E., M.B., B.Ch., B.A., K.H.P., Maj.-Gen., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 8th Feb., 1874).—First commn. dated 27th Jan., 1900; in mil. employ to June, 1903, when he was apptd. to officiate as civil surgn. in Bengal; first resdt. surgn., Presdy. Genl. Hospl., Nov., 1909; civil surgn., Bihar and Orissa, Apl., 1912; prof'r. of pathology, King George's Med. Coll., Lucknow, Oct., 1914; temp'y. princpl. (in addn.), Sept., 1916; dir. and prof'r., Sch. of Tropical Medicine, Calcutta, Nov., 1921; C.I.E., Jan., 1926; inspr.-genl. of civil hosp's., Punjab, Feb., 1928; surg.-genl. with govt. of Madras, Sept., 1928; dir.-genl., I.M.S., March, 1930; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1933; ret'd., Nov., 1933; presdt., medl. bd., India office, Nov., 1933, to Nov., 1939.

MEGGITT, FREDERICK JOSEPH, M.Sc., Ph.D., Indian Educl. Service (b. 10th Aug., 1890).—Joined the service as lecturer in biological science, Univ. Coll., Rangoon, 5th Feb., 1923.

MEHER, MANEKSHA RUSTAMJI, M.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bombay) (b. 10th Dec., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of Bombay and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 15th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1935; confd., Aug., 1936; served in Sind as dist. and sess. judge, March, 1944.

MEHKRI, MUHAMMAD ASADULLAH, B.A., Indian State Rlys. (dist. contr. of stores, G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 14th Jan., 1902).—Joined service, June, 1926; asst. contr. of stores, June, 1929; dist. contr. of stores, senior scale, Oct., 1938.

MEHTA, SIR CHUNILAL VIJBHUKHANDAS, K.C.S.I., M.A., LL.B.—Apptd. member of govr.'s exec. council, 22nd June, 1923; ret'd., Sept., 1928.*

MEHTA, DADIBA CURSETJEE, M.A., LL.B., late Bombay C.S., Judl. Branch (b. 27th Nov., 1878).—Retd., Nov., 1938.*

MEHTA, DESRAJ, O.B.E., B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Orissa) (b. 21st Nov., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bihar and Orissa, 6th Nov., 1926; offg. exec. engr., March, 1933; confd., Oct., 1935; under-secty. to govt. p.w.d., Apl., 1936.

MEHTA, GUR SARAN DAS, Rai Bahadur, late Indian Audit Dept. (b. Oct., 1883).—Retd., Nov., 1938.*

MEHTA, INDRAVADAN NARAYANBAI, B.A., LL.B., Barr., late Bombay Judicial Dept. (b. 20th Jan., 1886).—Joined the dept., 18th Feb., 1925; 6th presdy. mag., Feb., 1925; 5th ditto, March, 1925; chief ditto (confd.), Oct., 1939; ret'd., May, 1941.

MEHTA, JAMNADAS MADHAVJI, M.A., LL.B., Barr.-at-law (b. 3rd Aug., 1884).—Member, cent. legis. assembly, 1923-30; again, 1941; Mayor of Bombay, 1926-27; member, nat. def. council, 1941; rev. and fin. minister, Bombay govt., 1937; repr. of govt. of India with Burma govt., 1944.

MEHTA, KANHAIYA LAL, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 15th March, 1913).—Educ. at Maharana's Inter. Coll., Udaipur, Agra Univ., and London Sch. of Economics; joined the service, 23rd Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.

MEHTA, NANALAL CHAMANLAL, B.A., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 17th Sept., 1891).—Educ. at Bombay, Cambridge, and London; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1915, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., May, 1918; dir. of co-operative societies, Gwalior state, Jan., 1920; offg. mag. and collr., July, 1924; confd., Dec., 1931; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1924; dir. of land records and inspr.-genl. of registrn., July, 1930; secty. Impl. council of agricl. research, Aug., 1935; offg. vice-chairman, ditto, Aug.-Dec., 1936; secty., industries dept., United Provs. govt., March, 1939; ret'd., 1st July, 1944.

MEHTA, NATWAR LAL, M.Sc., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 2nd Dec., 1901).—Joined the service, 25th Feb., 1926; dep. chief auditor, E.I. rly., Oct., 1933; asst. acctnt.-genl., United Provs., 2nd Jan., 1935; dep. acctnt.-genl., United Provs., Nov., 1937; dep. ch. audr., N.W. rly., Sept., 1939; and again, Sept., 1940; ch. audr., rly. clg. accts., March, 1940; asst. acctnt.-genl., in office of dep. acctnt.-genl., posts and tels., Calcutta, Nov., 1941.

MEHTA, PERSHOTAM LAL, Indian Police (supt.) (b. 1st March, 1907).—Apptd. proby. asst. supt., Bengal, 18th Jan., 1930; confd., March, 1932; asst. inspr.-genl., Feb., 1943; confd., supt., Jan., 1944; Indian police medal, 1945.

MEHTA, SHIV CHARAN DAS, RAI BAHADUR, late Indian Police (b. 1st Aug., 1881).—Retd., Aug., 1936.*

MEHTA, SHREENATH, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 28th Oct., 1904).—Educ. at Univ. of Allahabad; Univ. of Nagpur and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 28th Sept., 1928; arrived, 25th Oct. 1928, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; prime minister, Kotah state, July, 1942; dep. contr., civ. supplies, Jan., 1944; dep. ch. contr. imports, Dec., 1944.

MEHTA, SHRIMUKHRAO LAXMILAL, B.A., Indian C.S. (dir. of industries, Assam) (b. 1st Nov., 1892).—Educ. at Bombay and Clare Coll., Cambridge; apptd. to the I.C.S. by nomination, 15th Oct., 1917; arrived in India, 21st Dec., 1917, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1929; again Jan., 1930; confd. as def. commr., Nov., 1934; dir. of industries, Assam, Feb., 1935; sec. educ. and l.s.g. deptts., Mar. 1942.

MEIKLEJOHN, WILLIAM, C.I.E., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (consvr.) (b. 5th Dec., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 23rd Dec., 1910; in mil. employ from 1st Jan., 1918, to 14th Apl., 1919; dep. consvr., Oct., 1920; offg. consvr., Apl., 1930; transfid., N.W.F.P. as offg. consvr., Dec., 1930; ditto, United Provs., Nov., 1934; ditto, Bengal, Apl., 1935; consvr., Aug., 1935; senr. ditto, Dec., 1938; C.I.E., June, 1941,

MELDRUM, JAMES WHITE, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Cent. Provs.) (b. 12th Apr., 1908).—Educ. at Ayt Academy, Edinburgh Univ., and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr. under secty. to govt., Central Provs., Jan., 1935; dep. commr., Feb., 1942; sec. to high commr. for India, in S. Africa, Dec., 1943.

MELLOR, RAYMOND GEORGE, M.B.E., Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 6th Apr., 1912).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Punjab, 10th Nov., 1931; confd., Nov., 1933; M.B.E., Jan., 1943.

MENESSE, NORMAN HAROLD, O.B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 20th Sept., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bombay, 1st Oct., 1925; awarded K. i-H. medal, 2nd class, June, 1928; offg. exec. engr., Oct., 1929; confd., Sept., 1934; in for service as admin., Shikarpur municipality, Nov., 1934, to March, 1937; O.B.E., May, 1937.

MENON, ATCHUTH MADHAVA, B.A., I.L.B., A.S.A.A., Office of High Commr. for India (higher exec. officer, accts. dept.) (b. 10th July, 1892).—Apptd. to office of high commr. for India, 15th Nov., 1920; higher clerical officer, Apr., 1922; higher exec. officer (temp.), May, 1925; confd., June, 1927.

MENON, A. V. GOVINDA (see Govinda Menon, A. V.).

MENON, KIZHAKKEPAT RAMUNNI, Indian C.S. (secty., p.w.d., Madras) (b. 2nd June, 1896).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 26th Oct., 1920; arrived, 27th Dec., 1920; and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., July, 1922; offg. under-sec. to govt., law dept., Nov., 1924; under-sec., govt. of India, home, dept., Apr., 1927; addl. dep. secty., govt. of India, educn. etc., dept., Oct., 1930, and again, June, 1934; secty., public dept., office of H.C. for India, Apr., 1931, to March, 1934; adviser and secty. to govt. of India delegation to internatl. labour conf., Geneva, 1933; secty., rev. dept., Madras, May, 1937; ditto, p.w.d., Oct., 1937; confd. as collr., Dec., 1939; inspr., muncl. cls., July, 1941, to March, 1944; sec., p.w.d., again, May, 1944.

MENON, KIZHAKKEPAT SANKARA (see Sankara Menon, K.).

MENON, KOMATTIL GOVINDA, M.B.E., M.Sc., B.A., Indian C.S. (b. 19th Sept., 1909).—Educ. at B.M. High Sch., Palghat, Madras Univ., University Coll., London; and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 2nd Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., Jan., 1936; under-secy. to govt., Madras, p.w.d., July, 1938; branch direct., eastern group supply coun., Aug., 1941; M.B.E., June, 1944.

MENON, KONNANATH RAMAKRISHNA, M.B.E., M.A., B.L., Mil. Accts. Dept. (b. June, 1901).—Joined the service as offcr., cl. II, May, 1917; A.M.A.G., i/c M.A., sec., June, 1933; D.M.A.G. (junr.), Apr., 1936; addtl. ditto (junr.), Oct., 1936; M.B.E., 1938; asst. commr. of income tax, Bombay, Jan., 1939; commr., ditto, and apptd. to fin. and comm. depts., Nov., 1939; dir. of inspn. (income tax), June, 1943.

MENON, KUMAR PADMA SIVASANKARA (see Sivasankara Menon, K. P.).

MENON, MANAKAT KRISHNA, Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 14th Dec., 1906).—Joined the

service as proby. asst. supt., Madras, Jan., 1931; confd., Jan., 1933.

MENON, MANGAT GOPAL, Indian C.S. (asst. collr. and mag.) (b. 26th Dec., 1919).—Educ. at Montfort Boys' High Sch., Madras Univ., and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn. after seln. in Aug., 1941, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.

MENON, MULLASSERI MADHAVA, Local fund audit dept., Burma (b. 8th July, 1888).—Apptd. asst. examr., 19th March, 1927.

MENON, PARAKAT ACHUTHA, Indian C.S. (under-secy., home dept., govt. of India) (b. 2nd Jan., 1905).—Educ. at Univ. of Madras and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., May, 1931; under-secy. (p.w.d.), Madras, Jan., 1934; ditto, home dept., govt. of India, Apr., 1937.

MENON, PARAKAT MADHAVA, M.B.E., Indian C.S. (b. 7th Jan., 1906).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., Feb., 1932; under-secy. to govt. (p.w.d.), Madras, Jan., 1937; attd. govt. of India, lab. dept., Aug., 1938; under-secy. to govt. of India, dept. of lab., Dec., 1938; M.B.E., Jan., 1942; dir. of ind. and commerce, Madras, Apr., 1942; dep. secty., govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands.

MENON, THARAVANAT ACHUTHA, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 4th Jan., 1911).—Educ. at the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 23rd Nov., 1936; arrived in India, Dec., 1936, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1938; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Apr., 1942; addl. dist. mag., May, 1943.

MENON, TOTTAKAT NARAYARA, B.A., Office of the High Commr. for India (exec. officer, store dept.) (b. 6th Oct., 1896).—Apptd. to office of high commr. for India, Aug., 1924; actg. exec. officer, Apr., 1926; confd., Oct., 1930.

MENON, VADAKKE KURAPATH ROMUNI, B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bihar) (b. 29th Aug., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of Madras and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service 19th Oct., 1926; arrived, 22nd Nov., 1926, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-secy. to govt., fin. dept., B. and O., Oct., 1931; offg. secty. to govt., ditto, July, 1933; offg. mag. and collr., Apr., 1934; offg. secty. to govt., local self govt. dept., Apr., 1936; dep. commr., Sept., 1939; sec. to govt. fin. dept., Aug., 1940; mag. and collr., Jan., 1941; inspr.-genl. regn. and commr. of excise, Oct., 1944.

MENON, VAPAL PANGUNNI, C.I.E., Rao Bahadur (reforms commissioner) (b. 30th Sept., 1894).—Joined the service, 8th Sept., 1914; asst. secty., govt. of India, reforms office, Jan., 1933; under-secy., ditto, Sept., 1934; dep. secty., ditto, Sept., 1936; jt. secty., ditto, June to Oct., 1937; dep. secty., ditto, Oct., 1937; jt. secty., ditto, June to Oct., 1938; dep. secty., ditto, Oct., 1938; dep. secty., sectt. of the govr.-genl. (reforms), March, 1940; jt. secty., ditto, Feb. to June, 1941; dep. secty., ditto, June, 1941; C.I.E., June, 1941; reforms commr., Sept., 1942.

MERCER, CHARLES VICTOR, late Indian State Rlys. (Burma) (b. 10th Feb., 1887).—Retd., March, 1935.*

MERCHANT, FRAMROZ RUSTOMJI, F.S.A.A., late Income Tax Dept., Bihar and Orissa (b. 12th Nov., 1888).—Joined the service, 1st July, 1922, as income tax officer, Bombay; offg. asst. commr. of income tax, July, 1928; confd., Oct., 1929; offg. commr. of income tax, Dec., 1932, and again, May, 1934; transfed. to Bihar and Orissa, March, 1939; ret'd., Nov., 1943.

MEREDITH, HERBERT RIBTON, B.A., Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Patna) (b. 8th Apl., 1890).—Educ. at Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 17th Dec., 1914, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Sept., 1922; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1923; addtl. ditto, Apl., 1925; offg. judl. commr., March, 1929; dist. and sess. judge, March, 1931; offg. regr., high ct., Patna, Apl., 1932; offg. secty. to govt., judl. dept., Bihar and Orissa, Apl., 1934; regr., high ct., Patna, Nov., 1934; addtl. judge, ditto, July, 1939; judge, ditto, Oct., 1940.

MERRELLS, GEORGE LUEN, B.A., Burma C.S. (cl. I) (asst. commr.) (b. 14th Dec., 1915).—Educ. at Colfe's Gr. Sch., Lewisham, and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 1st Oct., 1937; confd., 6th Sept., 1938; arrived in Burma, Nov., 1938, and served as asst. commr.; on milty. serv., Nov., 1940.

MERRIMAN, JOHN LONGSHAW, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bihar) (b. 26th Dec., 1886).—Ret'd. June, 1939.*

MERRINGTON, HERBERT FAGENT, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 5th May, 1904).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Punjab, 17th Oct., 1927; exec. engr., Oct., 1936; reg. camouflage offr., Oct., 1941; on depn. to govt. of India, civ. def. dept., March, 1943; services at disp. of C.-in-C., Nov., 1943.

MERSH, CHARLES MELMOTH BAILEY, M.B.E., (Central Provs.) (b. 25th Oct., 1884).—Late electrical adviser; ret'd., Oct., 1939.*

METCALFE, SIR HERBERT AUBREY FRANCIS, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., M.V.O., B.A., Indian C.S., ret'd., late Indian Political Service (b. 27th Sept., 1883).—Educ. at Charterhouse, and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1907; arrived, 24th Nov., 1908, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; personal asst. to pol. agent, Phulkian states and Bahawalpur, Apl., 1911; transfed. to Delhi as sec., muncl. cttee., Nov., 1912; asst. pte. sec. to Viceroy, March, 1914; and asst. sec. to the chief commr., N.W.F.P. (temp.), March, 1917; city mag., Peshawar, May, 1917; asst. commr., Charsadda, Feb., 1919; pte. sec. to chief commr., N.W.F.P., May, 1919; sec. to ditto, Dec., 1920; asst. commr., Thal, Apl., 1922; M.V.O., June, 1922; counsellor, Kabul legation, Nov., 1924; pol. agent, Dir. Swat and Chitral, Nov., 1925; sec. to ch. commr. and agent to govr.-genl. in N.W.F.P., March, 1927; C.I.E., June, 1928; dep. commr., Peshawar, Nov., 1928; offg. dep. secty., for. and pol. dept., govt. of India, Nov., 1930; confd., May, 1931; offg. for. secty., ditto, May, 1932; confd., Jan., 1933; C.S.I., June, 1933; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1936; secty., external affairs dept., govt. of India, Apl., 1937; A.G.G., resdt. and ch. commr. in Baluchistan, Aug., 1939; ret'd., Nov., 1943.

METCALFE, ROY DOUGLAS, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 9th Feb., 1909).—First commn., 31st Jan., 1929; pers. asst. to pol. resdt. in Persian Gulf, Dec., 1934; asst. pol. agent, Bahrain, Apl., 1935; under trng. in Punjab, Nov., 1935; under-secty. to resdt. for Central India, Sept., 1938; confd. in Indian

political service, May, 1939; publ. offcr. in Persian Gulf, Apl., 1940, and again, Apl., 1941; pol. offcr., Trucial Coast, Oct., 1940; secty. to resdt., eastern states, March, 1942; asst. pol. agt., Chhattisgarh states, Aug., 1942; pol. agt., ditto, in addn., May, 1943; secty. to resdt., eastern states, Aug., 1943; pol. agt., Muscat, Nov., 1943.

MEYER, P. M. ROSE (see Rose Meyer, P. M.).

MIAN, MUHAMMAD TASDIQUE HUSSAIN, M.Sc. (Pun.), Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Central Provs.) (b. 1st June, 1905).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Central Provs., 5th Nov., 1929; dep. consvr., Nov., 1934.

MICHAEL, JAMES DUNBAR, Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., E.I. Rly.) (b. 19th Nov., 1899).—Asst. exec. engr., centr. Indian coal field rly. survey, Oct., 1922; ditto (junr. scale), E.I. rly., Oct., 1927; dep. dir., rly. board, Apl., 1939; exec. engr., provl., July, 1939.

MIDDLETON, ARTHUR PURLING, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bihar) (b. 14th Oct., 1884).—Educ. at Eton, and Magdalen Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 25th Nov., 1909, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transfed. to Bihar and Orissa, Apl., 1912; under-sec. to govt., rev. and judl. depts., Feb., 1916; jt. mag. and dep. collr., June, 1918; mag. and collr., Oct., 1922; commr. of income tax, Bihar and Orissa, Apl., 1923; offg. commr., Apl., 1929; and again, Jan., 1932; confd., Jan., 1933; ret'd., July, 1944.

MIDDLETON, LEONARD, B.A., late Indian C.S. (N.W.F.P.) (b. 13th March, 1884).—Ret'd., Aug., 1939.*

MIDDLETON, WILLIAM EDWARD, B.A., Indian Police (dist. supt.) (b. 2nd Oct., 1907).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Madras, 5th March, 1929; confd., Aug., 1931; offg. dist. supt., June, 1934; confd., Jan., 1943.

MIDGLEY, ERIC ATKINSON, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 25th March, 1913).—Educ. at Christ's Hospital, Horsham, and Merton Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 15th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.

MILLARD, CLIVE NEWCOME, B.A., Bombay C.S. (collr.) (b. 9th Aug., 1891).—Joined the service as dep. collr., 22nd Aug., 1916; offg. collr. and dist. mag., Apl., 1929; confd., Dec., 1939.

MILLER, ALFRED, M.B., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. (ret'd.) (b. 29th Apl., 1869).—Examr. of medical stores, India store depot, Dec., 1920; ret'd., May, 1932.*

MILLER, GEORGE WESLEY, M.D., D.P.H., Maj., I.M.S. (princl. medl. offcr., R.I.N.) (b. 23rd Apl., 1904).—First commn. dated 4th Aug., 1931; in milty. employ to 7th Feb., 1938; civil surg., Chhindwara, Feb., 1938; port health officer, Bombay, July, 1939; offg. ch. ditto, Delhi prov., Apl., 1940; offg. dep. public health offcr. with govt. of India, Nov., 1940; princpl. medl. offcr., R.I.N., with rank of surgn.-commdr., R.I.N., Feb., 1941.

MILLER, HAROLD BELLETT, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 4th May, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bengal, 28th Feb., 1921; offg. supt., rly. police, May, 1927; supt., Nov., 1931; asst. inspr.-genl., Jan., 1942, to Feb., 1943.

MILLETT, HUMPHREY JOHN CURNOW, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bombay) (b. 29th June, 1897).—Joined the service, 21st Jan., 1921, as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Jan., 1925.

MILLS, JAMES PHILIP, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (advr. to the govr., Assam) (b. 18th Feb., 1890).—Educ. at Winchester Coll., and Corpus Christi Coll., Oxford; apptd. after the exam. of 1912; arrived, 10th Dec., 1913, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Jan., 1924; and again, March, 1930; confd., Aug., 1932; offr. on spl. duty, reforms offr., Nov., 1935; secty. to the govr., Apl., 1937; C.I.E., Jan., 1941; advr. to govr. (tribal areas and states), Oct., 1943.

MILLS, PERCY STRICKLAND, C.I.E., M.B., Col., I.M.S., ret'd., late Civil Med. Dept., Bihar (b. 28th May, 1883).—First commn. dated 1st Feb., 1906; in mil. employ to 6th June, 1911; plague medl. offcr., June, 1911; on mil. duty from Aug., 1914, to May, 1921; civil surg., March, 1922; offg. inspr.-genl. of civil hosp., Bihar and Orissa, May, 1935; confd., Aug., 1935; C.I.E., Jan., 1938; surg.-genl. with govt. of Bengal, Nov., 1937; ret'd., Aug., 1941.

MILNE, ERIC IVAN, Indian State Rlys. (dist. traffic supt., Burma Rlys.) (b. 20th March, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., 2nd Jan., 1920; dist. traffic supt., Burma rlys., Dec., 1930; offg. dep. traffic manager, Aug., 1932.

MILNER, CHARLES EDWARD, late Indian Forest Service (Burma) (b. 17th Sept., 1887).—Arrived, 18th Dec., 1909, and served as asst. commr.; dep. commr., Dec., 1914; on mil. service, May, 1915, to Feb., 1919; offg. consvr., Apl., 1926; confd., Sept., 1933; ret'd., Sept., 1942.

MILNER-WHITE, RUDOLPH, M.A., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 13th Nov., 1885).—Ret'd., Oct., 1935.*

MILTON, HENRY JOSEPH, Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 21st Dec., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 28th Nov., 1922; offg. supt., March, 1930; confd., June, 1934.

MILTON, RALPH STANLEY, late Indian Police (Madras) (b. 13th Apl., 1889).—Joined the service, 23rd Nov., 1909; asst. supt., May, 1911; supt., July, 1922; commr. of police, Bangalore, March, 1935; ret'd.,

MIN, MAUNG KYAW, R.A., LL.B., Indian C.S. (secty., labour dept., Burma) (b. 15th Nov., 1899).—Educ. at St. Xavier's Coll., Calcutta, and Trinity Hall, Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1923, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-secty. to govt., fin. dept., Oct., 1927; offg. dep. commr., May, 1931; dep. secty., educn. dept., Burma, June, 1936; secty., ditto, Oct., 1936; dep. secty. to govt., Burma, Dec., 1936; secty., forest dept., Burma, Jan., 1937; secty. to the premier, Sept., 1937; secty., labour dept., May, 1941.

MINCHIN, ALFRED ALYSON FENNELL, late Indian Forest Service (b. 25th Aug., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Dec., 1908; dep. consvr., Jan., 1914; offg. consvr., Madras, May, 1925; confd., June, 1928; ret'd., Oct., 1940.

MINISTER, CYRIL JOHN, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 31st Oct., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 15th March, 1921; offg. supt., June, 1924; confd., Sept., 1930; asst. to d.i.g., March, 1942, to March, 1944; Indian police medal, 1944.

MINNITT, G. C., A.M.I.C.E., M.I.Struct.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 10th May, 1887).—Joined the service as resdt. engr., G.I.P. rly., 14th March, 1905; sanitary engr., May, 1932; ret'd., Jan., 1940.

MINSHULL, WILLIAM TRAVERS, B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 31st Dec., 1884).—Ret'd., March, 1939.*

MINSON, HERBERT, M.B.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 14th Nov., 1886).—Ret'd., May, 1937.*

MIR AMIR-UD-DIN, B.A., LL.B., Judicial dept., Madras (b. 7th Dec., 1889).—Joined the service as offg. 2nd asst. regr., high ct., origil. side, 20th Feb., 1917; confd., Apl., 1917; 1st asst. ditto, Apl., 1921; dep. regr., appellate side, Aug., 1922; offg. dist. judge, Sept., 1926; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1928.

MIRAJKAR, VAMAN RAGHUNATH, O.B.E., F.R.C.S., M.R.C.P., Lieut.-Col., ret'd., late I.M.S. (b. 13th Oct., 1887).—First commn. dated 15th March, 1920; in milty. employ to 28th June, 1926; profr., King Edward Medl. Coll., Lahore, June, 1926; O.B.E., Nov., 1935; ret'd., and re-empld., Jan., 1943.

MIRCHANDANI, BHAGWANDAS DAYARAM, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 25th Feb., 1906).—Educ. at Univ. of Bombay and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; asst. judge, under trng., July, 1934; asst. judge and addtl. sess. judge (confd.), July, 1940; joint ditto, var., from Dec., 1940; dist. and sess. judge, Sind, Sept., 1943.

MIRCHANDANI, TNAUMAL SHEWAKRAM, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (supig. exec. engr., Sind) (b. 3rd March, 1888).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1911; exec. engr., Oct., 1920; offg. suptg. engr., variously from March, 1925; confd., Dec., 1937.

MIRCHANDANI, TOLARAM JETHANAND, O.B.E., M.Sc. (Lond.), A.M.I.E.E. (exec. engr., elec. dept., Madras) (b. 1st Oct., 1896).—Engaged on contract as pers. asst. to the chief engr. for electricity from 1st Sept., 1931; confd., as exec. engr., Sept., 1933; suptg. engr., May, 1943 (ch. dist. inspr.); O.B.E., June, 1941.

MIRCHANDANI, UDHARAM MANIRAM, Indian C.S. (collr., Sind) (b. 26th Sept., 1896).—Educ. at St. Patrick's High Sch., Karachi, and Trinity Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 14th Dec., 1921; arrived, 23rd Jan., 1922, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; offg. collr. and dist. mag., Oct., 1927; offg. dep. secty. to govt., fin. dept., Bombay, Feb., 1932; collr., Sind, March, 1936; settl. commr. and dir., land records, June, 1942.

MIR SAEED ALAM KHAN, NAWABZADA, Barr.-at-Law, Indian Political Service (b. 28th Dec., 1892).—Joined the service, 15th Oct., 1923; asst. to A.G.G., Madras states, July, 1928; asst. commr., Peshawar, Nov., 1930; ditto, Bannu, Apl., 1931; offg. under-secty. to A.G.G., Punjab states, Apl., 1933; under-secty. to A.G.G., states of W.I., Aug., 1934; addl. pol. agent, Sabar Kantha agency, Jan., 1936; under-secty. to A.G.G., states of W.I., May, 1936; guardian and comp. to heir apparent of H.H. the Maharaja Morvi, Nov., 1936; secty. to resdt. for Kolhapur and the Deccan states, May, 1938; senior sub-judge, Peshawar, Apl., 1939; addtl. dist. and sess. judge, ditto, Nov., 1939; dist. and sess. judge, Peshawar, Sept., 1940.

MIRZA, SAHIBZADA HARUN QADIR SAIYID MUSA ALI, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 4th Nov., 1882).—Ret'd., Nov., 1937.*

MIRZA, SAHIBZADA SYED ISKANDAR ALI (see Syed Iskander Ali Mirza, S.).

MIRZA, SYDNEY J., B.A., LL.B., late

Income Tax Dept., Bombay (b. 21st Apr., 1886).—Joined the service 27th Nov., 1912; inc. tax off. Feb., 1924; spl. inspecting off., May, 1926; offg. asst. commr. of income tax, Sind, March, 1928; confd., Oct., 1929; retd., Apr., 1941.

MISHRA, BRAJABIHARI, Indian Police (Orissa) (b. Sept., 1916).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., March, 1940.

MISRA, KRUPA SINDHU, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 22nd July, 1908).—Educ. at the Patna Univ., and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 7th Oct., 1932; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Apr., 1935.

MISRA, LAKSHMI HANKAR, M.A., LL.B. (judge, ch. ct., Oudh).—Apptd., May, 1943.

MISRA, SIR LAKSHMIPATI, B.Sc., Indian State Ryls. (genl. mgr., E.B. Rly.) (b. 4th July, 1888).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 9th Oct., 1912; offg. exec. engr., O. and R. Rly., Dec., 1918; services lent to Baroda state as engr.-in-chief, Baroda State Ryls., from Apr., 1924; exec. engr., E.I. Rly., Apr., 1928; offg. contr. of stores, Nov., 1930; offg. dep. agent, June, 1932; confd., Nov., 1932; offg. divl. supt., May, 1935; confd., Jan., 1936; dep. chief engr. (provl. perm.), Apr., 1936; genl. manager, Sept., 1939; member, rly. bd., Nov., 1943; kt., June, 1944.

MISRA, SHARAD CHANDRA, M.A., Indian Police (b. 7th Apr., 1910).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., United Provs., 25th Jan., 1933; confd., Jan., 1935.

MISRA, TIKA RAM (see Tika, R. M.).

MITCHELL, ALEXANDER, V.D., M.D., late Indian State Ryls. (E.I. Rly.) (b. 19th Jan., 1888).—Retd., Apr., 1938.*

MITCHELL, ALFRED NORVAL, O.B.E., Indian C.S., Indian Pol. Service (b. 18th Dec., 1906).—Educ. at Shrewsbury Sch., and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. under-secty. to govt., Central Provs., Oct., 1933; under-secty. to govt., N.W.F.P., Feb., 1936; offg. ch. secty., ditto, June, 1936; home secty. to govt., N.W.F.P., Apr., 1937; confd., Feb., 1938; asst. pol. agent, S. Waziristan, Oct., 1938; senr. sub-judge, Peshawar, Nov., 1939; admin. Bastur state, Apr., 1940; O.B.E., June, 1943; pol. agt., Subar Kantha agency, Jan., 1942; pol. agt., Orissa states, March, 1942, to July, 1943; on foreign service in Kolhapur states, Apr., 1944.

MITCHELL, SIR DAVID GEORGE, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., V.D., B.Sc., late Indian C.S. (Central Provs.) (b. 31st March, 1879).—Retd., July, 1937.*

MITCHELL, DAVID THOMAS, O.B.E., late Veterinary Dept., Burma (b. 16th March, 1885).—Apptd. research officer, 10th Dec., 1927; dir. of vety. services, Jan., 1930; O.B.E., June, 1939; retd., March, 1940.

MITCHELL, HAROLD CHARLES, Indian Police (supv., United Provs.) (b. 7th March, 1896).—Joined the service, 21st March, 1920; offg. supt., May, 1923; supt. (provl. sub.), July, 1930; confd., July, 1931; asst. to dep. inspr.-genl., C.I.D., United Provs., Oct., 1932; cent. intell. offr., United Provs. and Ajmere, Jan., 1937.

MITCHELL, HAROLD CHARLES BARNES, late Bombay Judl. Dept. (b. 18th Oct., 1883).—Retd., Sept., 1936.*

MITCHELL, JOHN EBENEZER MILLER, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 27th March, 1897).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 11th Dec., 1922; dep. consvr., Dec., 1924; chief for. offr., Coorg., Aug., 1933; served in R.N. from Aug., 1939.

MITCHELL, JOHN FOWLER, C.I.E., B.Sc., late Indian C.S. (b. 30th Dec., 1886).—Educ. at Allan Glen's Sch., Glasgow, Royal Coll. of Science, London, Glasgow, and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 28th Nov., 1910, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; transfed. to Delhi, Oct., 1912; reverted to the Punjab, Jan., 1914; under-sec. to govt. of Punjab, fin. dept. (s.p.t.), Oct., 1920; offg. dep. sec. to govt. of India, fin. dept., May, 1922; offg. acctnt.-genl., Madras, Jan., 1924; acct.-genl., Central Provs., Oct., 1926; dir. of audit, United Provs., Nov., 1928; offg. dir. of rly. audit, Dec., 1930; offg. dep. auditor-genl. in India, Apr., 1934; C.I.E., June, 1935; retd., March, 1937.

MITCHELL, SIR KENNETH GRANT, C.I.E., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 28th Aug., 1885).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1909; exec. engr., Oct., 1917; road engr. (tempy.) to govt. of India, May, 1930; C.I.E., Jan., 1934; consulting engr. to govt. of India (roads), March, 1934, and again, Sept., 1938; suptg. engr., May, 1935; member, council of state, March, 1937; on spec. duty, commn. dept., June, 1938; consltg. engr. to govt. of India (roads), Sept., 1938; kt., June, 1941; retd., Aug., 1942; re-empld. as ch. contr., road devel. and transport, Aug., 1942.

MITRA, AKHIL CHANDRA (see Akhil, C. M.).

MITRA, ASOK, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 1st March, 1917).—Educ. at Burdwan Town Sch., Calcutta Univ., and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 26th Oct., 1939; confd., 23rd Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1941.

MITRA, BIRENDRA MOHAN, B.Sc., India, C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 28th Aug., 1899).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ., and Magdalen Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1923; arrived, 4th Dec., 1923, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., March, 1929; offg. dist. and sess. judge, June, 1932; ditto, Assam, Oct., 1933; addl. ditto, Oct., 1932; confd. as dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1936.

MITRA, BIRENDRA NATH, B.A., late Indian Fin. Dept. (b. 29th Aug., 1883).—Retd., Feb., 1939.*

MITRA, SIR DHIRENDRA NATH, C.B.E., B.A., B.L., Legis. Dept., apptd. solicitor to the govt. of India, Apr., 1937; C.B.E., June, 1939; kt., June, 1944.

MITRA, HIMANSHU MOHAN, B.Sc., late Dept. of Mines in India (b. 31st March, 1884).—Joined the service as electric inspr., 1st May, 1924; retd., May, 1940.

MITRA, MANMATHA NATH (see Manmatha, N. M.).

MITRA, MONORANJAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Assam) (b. 1st Aug., 1898).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. Coll., and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1923; arrived, 8th Dec., 1923, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; offg. addl. dist. mag., Oct., 1931; offg. dep. commr., Apr., 1933; confd., Nov., 1938; jt. sec. (home), Oct., 1944.

MITRA, NARENDRA KUMAR, O.B.E., B.Sc.,

Indian State Rlys. (ch. engr., E.I. Rly.) (b. 4th Sept., 1887).—Joined the service, 1st Apl., 1913; resdt. engr., Nov., 1921; exec. engr., Aug., 1927; provl. perm. dep. ch. engr., May, 1939; confd., Aug., 1941; ch. engr., Nov., 1941; O.B.E., Jan., 1943.

MITRA, PRAN KUMAR, Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 15th Oct., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 8th Dec., 1924; offg. supt., Apl., 1932; and again, March, 1933; confd., May, 1937.

MITRA, RABINDRA KUMAR, B.A. (Cal.), Barr., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 15th Dec., 1904).—Educ. at Univ. of Calcutta, University Coll., London, and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1931; offg. addl. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1936; secty., bd. of rev., Bengal, March, 1939; contr. of printing and stationery, March, 1941; confd., Sept., 1941.

MITRA, ROOPENDRA KUMAR, Judl. Dept., Bengal (judge, high ct.).—Apptd. offg. judge, high ct., Calcutta, 31st July, 1934; addl. judge, ditto, Nov., 1934, and Aug., 1936; high ct., judge, Bengal, Nov., 1937.

MITRA, SAMARENDRA LAL, M.B., B.Sc., D.T.M. & H., D.P.H., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., Public Health Dept., Bihar (dir., public health) (b. 23rd Dec., 1887).—First commn. dated 1st Nov., 1920; in mil. employ prior to 5th Sept., 1925; offg. dir. of public health, Sept., 1925; offg. dir. of public health, Assam, March to Nov., 1929; ditto, Bihar and Orissa, Oct., 1930; and again, Feb., 1933; dir. of public health, Bihar, Feb., 1937; also inspr.-genl. of civil hosps., Feb., 1941.

MITRA, SARAT CHANDRA, late Indian Posts and Tels. (b. 23rd Oct., 1882).—Retd., Oct., 1937.*

MITRA, SATISH CHANDRA, Barr., late Judicial Dept., Bengal (b., 10th Jan., 1880).—Retd., Jan., 1935.*

MITRA, S. K. M.S. (Cal.), Ph.D. (Ohio), Indian Agricl. Service (dir. of agric.) (b. 15th Feb., 1887).—Joined the service as economic botanist, Assam, 28th Feb., 1921; dir. of agric., Assam, Sept., 1937.

MITRA, SATYENDRA NATH, M.B., Ch.B., D.F.N. (asst. dir. of public health, Bengal) (b. 11th Nov., 1889).—Apptd. asst. dir. of public health, 13th Sept., 1920; confd., Sept., 1925.

MITRA, SHAILENDRA NATH, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 17th Jan., 1909).—Educ. at Government High Sch., Partabgarh, Government Intermediate Coll., Fyzabad, Allahabad Univ., Imperial Coll. of Science, London, and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 7th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Bengal as asst. collr. and mag.

MITRA, TINCORI, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bengal) (b. Jan., 1900).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 19th Dec., 1923; asst. exec. engr., Dec., 1925; offg. exec. engr., June, 1929; confd., Dec., 1934.

MITTER, SIR BROJENDRA LAL, K.C.S.I., Barr. (fed. adv.-genl.).—Apptd. advocate-genl., Bengal, Dec., 1925; kt., Jan., 1928; member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council, Dec., 1928; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1932; delegate of India at assembly of League of Nations, 1933; member, govr.'s exec. council, Bengal, May, 1934; fed. advocate-genl., Apl., 1937.

MITTER, DWARKA NATH, late Judicial Dept., Bengal.—Retd., March, 1937.*

MITTER, GANESH CHANDRA, O.B.E., M.Sc., M.I.M., Mint and Assay Dept. (ch. assayer, Bombay) (b. 1st Aug., 1897).—Joined the service as dep. assay master on probn., 28th March 1922; confd., Feb., 1923; offg. assay master, Bombay, Aug., 1927; ch. assayer, Apl., 1932; O.B.E., Jan., 1939.

MITTER, MOHAN LALL, M.I.L.E., Indian State Rlys. (transpn. (power) supt., senr. scale, E.I. Rly.) (b. 3rd May, 1899).—Asst. loco. supt., 15th Aug., 1924; supt. (power), senr. scale, July, 1936.

MITTER, S. C., O.B.E., B.Sc. (Eng.) Lond. (dir. of indus., Bengal) (b. 10th Dec., 1900).—Joined the service as indus. engr., 9th Oct., 1925; dep. dir. of indus., Bengal, Aug., 1934; dir., ditto, May, 1937; O.B.E., Jan., 1943.

MOBBS, ERIC CHARLES, B.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (b. 10th Sept., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 11th Dec., 1922; services lent to Tehri Garhwal state for two years from May, 1925; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927; princpl. for coll., Dehra Dun, Apl., 1938.

MOCKETT, SIR VERE, Barr., Judl. Dept., Madras (judge, high ct., Madras).—Apptd. judge, high ct., Madras, 21st July, 1934; kt. Jan., 1943; apptd. ch. justice, Madras high ct., 13th to 30th Sept., 1943.

MODAK, BHASKAR LAKSHMAN, A.M.I.C.E., M.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bombay) (b. 29th Sept., 1884).—Retd., Oct., 1939.*

MODAK, EMMANUEL SUMITRA, B.A., Indian Police, Bombay (b. 25th March, 1920).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn. after exam. of 1940.

MODAK, SATYENDRA NATH, M.A. (Cal.) B.A. (Cantab.), Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 24th Dec., 1891).—Educ. a Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; apptd. by nomination; arrived, Dec., 1916, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Aug., 1925; confd., May, 1927; commr. for workmen's compensation, Bengal, Sept., 1938; spec. offr., judl. dept., Dec., 1942.

MODDER, EUGENE ASHLEY CLIVE, late Indian Forest Service (Bengal) (b. 3rd Apl., 1883).—Retd., 1938.*

MODI, LONJI SHAHPURIJI, F.R.C.S.I., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., retd. (b. 9th March, 1884).—Retd., May, 1939.*

MOHAMMED, ALI SAHIB, Indian Police (b. 26th June, 1914).—Apptd. asst. supt. Madras, on probn., 1st March, 1938.

MOHAMMAD SHARIF, B.A., LL.B.—Apptd. pte. secty. to the law member, Oct., 1939; asst. solicitor, govt. of India, legisl. dept., May, 1941.

MOHAN LAL, BATRA, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 1st July, 1903).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., Oct., 1926; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1927; exec. engr., May, 1937.

MOHAN LAL, KUNJ BEHARI, M.Sc., Indian Forest Service (b. 25th Jan., 1907).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Assam, 14th Nov., 1930; dep. consvr., Nov., 1935.

MOHAN, MAN (see Man Mohan).

MOHAN, NETER PARKASH (see Neter Parkash M.).

MOHAN RAO, PEJAVAR, M.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 25th May, 1887).—Joined the service, 28th Oct., 1910; asst. acctnt. genl., May, 1911; dep. acctnt. genl., posts and tels., Aug., 1918; ditto, Madras, Sept., 1921; ditto, Nagpur, Jan., 1922; asst. acctnt. genl., United

Provs., Oct., 1922; ditto, Madras, March, 1923; ditto, Bengal, Jan., 1924; dep. acctnt.-genl., posts and tels., Madras, Apl., 1925; dep. acctnt.-genl., Cent. Provs., Apl., 1928; audit offer., Indian stores dept., Oct., 1928; offg. dep. ch. accts. offer., E.I. rlys., Nov., 1932; offg. ch. ditto, Apl., 1933; offg. acctnt.-genl., Bombay, May, 1934; govt. examr. of accts., M. & S.M. and S.I. rlys., Oct., 1934; offg. ch. accts. offer., E.I. rly., Feb., 1935; acctnt.-genl., Bengal, Sept., 1936; ditto, Bihar, March, 1938; ditto, Central Provs. and Berar, Aug., 1939; ditto, Central revs., Nov., 1939.

MOHAN SINGH, SARDAR BEHADUR, C.I.E.—Apptd. member of Council of India, March, 1935; advr. to sec. of state for India, Apl., 1937, to March, 1940; C.I.E., Jan., 1941.

MOHAN, YADAVA (see Yadava Mohan).

MOLE, ROBERT FREDERIC, B.A., Burma C.S. (cl. I) (asst. commr.) (b. 10th Aug., 1914).—Educ. at Clifton Coll., and Hertford Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 1st Oct., 1937; confd., 16th Sept., 1938; arrived in Burma, Nov., 1938, and served as asst. commr.; on military service, Nov., 1940; sub. divl. offr., Bassein, March, 1941.

MOLES, SAMUEL, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab)—Educ. at Royal Academical Institution, Belfast, and Belfast Univ.; joined the service, 22nd Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under-sec. (transport), Sept., 1942; addtl. dep. sec. fin. dept., 1944.

MOLLOY, OSCAR HUGH, Burma C.S. (cl. I) (b. 16th May, 1915).—Educ. at St. Joseph's Coll., North Point, Darjeeling, and Rangoon Univ.; apptd. on probn., 30th Sept., 1938; asst. supt., Shan states, July, 1940; on military service, Nov., 1940.

MOLLOY, PATRICK REGINALD HEMBROUGH, B.A., Burma C.S. (cl. I) (asst. commr.) (b. 16th Oct., 1912).—Educ. at St. Joseph's College, Naini Tal, India, and Rangoon Univ.; joined the service, 30th Sept., 1937; arrived in Burma, Nov., 1937, and served as asst. commr.; asst. supt., Kyaukme, Dec., 1940; ditto, Mongyai, March, 1941.

MOLONEY, JOHN EDMUND (b. 24th Aug., 1886).—Apptd. to the late R.I.M. as asst. engr. from 1st Sept., 1911; held various engr. and ship surveyor appts., 1929-1938; apptd. ch. surveyor with the govt. of India, 31st July, 1938; promtd. engr. capt., R.I.N. (superintendent), 30th Apl., 1938.

MONANI, MAHOMEDALI GULAMHUSAIN, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 29th Oct., 1910).—Educ. at St. Xavier's High Sch., Bombay, St. Vincent's High Sch., Poona, Bombay Univ., and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; asst. judge (under trng.), Nov., 1939.

MONDAL, GOPI BALLAV, Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Bengal) (b. 2nd Feb., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bengal, 7th Oct., 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1931; confd., suptg. engr., Aug., 1944.

MONE, NARAYAN TRIMBAK, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 16th Apl., 1906).—Educ. at Univ. of Allahabad, Univ. of Nagpur, and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1929; arrived, 16th Dec., 1929, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; dep. commr., provl., July, 1941; dep. sec., govt. of India (food),

June, 1943; again, Sept., 1944; sugar contr. for India, May, 1944.

MONE, TRIMBAK WASUDEO, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 13th Feb., 1880).—Retd., Feb., 1935.*

MONRO, ALEXANDER, C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 17th Feb., 1890).—Retd., March, 1939.*

MONRO, WALTER COLIN, late Indian Forest Service (United Provs.) (b. 27th Sept., 1888).—Joined the service, 10th July, 1915; extra asst. consvr., United Provs., July, 1917; promoted to I.F.S., as asst. consvr., May, 1932; dep. consvr., Nov., 1933; retd., 27th Sept., 1943.

MONTAGU, AINSLEY MARSHALL RENDALL, C.I.E., A.M.I.C.E., A.M.I.M.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 6th Nov., 1891).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1914; on mil. duty from 24th March, 1915, to 11th May, 1920; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; secty. (temp.), cent. board of irrign., May, 1931; ch. engr. and sec., Punjab p.w.d. (irrgn.), March, 1943; C.I.E., Jan., 1945.

MONTEATH, SIR DAVID TAYLOR, K.C.B., K.C.M.G., C.V.O., O.B.E., B.A., India and Burma Office (actg. perm. under-sec. of state for India and for Burma) (b. 7th Apl., 1887).—Educ. at Clifton Coll. and Trinity Coll., Oxford; apptd. to Admiralty, Dec., 1910; junr. clerk, mil. dept., India Office, 5th Dec., 1911; transfld. to pol. dept., Nov., 1912; resdt. clerk, Apl., 1914, to Feb., 1915; on duty in mil. dept. from Oct., 1914; services temp. lent to the Admiralty, Feb., 1915; on mil. service, 1918; O.B.E., Jan., 1918; pte. sec. to Lord Sinha, Apl., 1919; senr. clerk, pol. dept., Dec., 1919; princpl., Apl., 1921; actg. dep. clerk of the council, June, 1916; pte. sec. to sec. of state, Dec., 1927; actg. asst. secty., public and judl. dept., Apl., 1931; asst. secty., finl. dept., July, 1931; C.V.O., June, 1931; secty. to Burma round table conf., London, Dec., 1931; joint secty., milty. dept., Sept., 1934; asst. under-sec. of state for Burma, Apl., 1937; C.B., June, 1938; actg. under-sec. of state for Burma, June, 1940; ditto for India and for Burma, Jan., 1942; K.C.M.G., Jan., 1942; K.C.B., June, 1944.

MONTEATH, JOHN, B.A., C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (b. 9th Oct., 1878).—Educ. at Clifton and King's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1901; arrived, 29th Nov., 1902, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag., and asst. to the collr. of Bombay and chief inspr. of factories; asst. pol. agent, Kathiawar, March, 1908; 1st asst., Nov., 1909; municipal commr., Ahmedabad, Apl., 1915; offg. postmaster-genl., Punjab, Nov., 1915; ditto, Madras, June, 1916; confd., Sept., 1918; collr. and dist. mag., Dec., 1922; collr., dist. mag. and pol. agent, Nov., 1923, and again, July, 1928; sec. to govt., home and eccl. depts., Oct., 1926; member, legisl. council, 1927 and 1932; offg. commr., Apl., 1932; C.I.E., Feb., 1937.

MONTFORD, (HORACE MOUTRIE, India Audit Office (suptg. exec. offer.) (b. 4th June, 1900).—Apptd. asst. clerk, 14th Aug., 1919, after previous service from 24th Apl., 1918; second-class clerk, 29th Apl., 1920; transfld. to India audit office, March, 1922; exec. offr., Apl., 1922; higher exec. offr., Aug., 1933; suptg. ditto, March, 1936; loaned to min. of infm., Jan., 1944.

MONTGOMERY, HENRY, B.A., late Indian

C.S. (Bombay) (b. 1st May, 1884).—Retd., March, 1935.*

MONTGOMERY, ROBERT ERNEST, C.I.E., late Office of High Commr. for India (b. 9th July, 1878).—Retd., Sept., 1938.*

MOODIE, ADAM WILSON, O.B.E., M.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (consvr., Burma) (b. 17th May, 1887).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 16th Dec., 1911; dep. consvr., Dec., 1916; O.B.E., June, 1919; offg. consvr., Apl., 1933; confd., Nov., 1935.

MOODY, BASIL, M.A., V.D., Indian State Rlys. (ch. optg. supt., N.W. Rly.) (b. 13th Oct., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., 11th Jan., 1912; asst. dist. traffic supt., N.W. rly., Jan., 1922; offg. dist. ditto, Nov., 1923; offg. dep. dir. of traffic and statistics, rly. bd., Feb., 1926; divl. comml. officer, N.W. rly., Nov., 1929; offg. divl. supt., N.W. rly., Jan., 1934; confd., Nov., 1936; offg. secty., rly. bd., March, 1935, and again, Oct., 1936; ch. optg. supt., Jan., 1938.

MOOKERJEE, BIJAN KUMAR (judge, high ct., Calcutta).—Apptd., July, 1939.

MOON, EDWARD PENDEREL, O.B.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 13th Nov., 1905).—Educ. at Winchester and New Coll., Oxford; fellow of All Souls, 1927; joined the service, 16th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under secty. to govt., pol. and home depts., Punjab, Dec., 1932; offr. on spec. duty, Nov., 1937; dep. commr., Dec., 1937; secty. to govt., June, 1938; O.B.E., June, 1941; retd., Jan., 1944.

MOONEY, HERBERT FRANCIS, O.B.E., Indian Forest Service (asst. consvr., Orissa) (b. 6th Nov., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., March, 1921; agency forest officer, Nov., 1923; forest advr., eastern states, Apl., 1935; O.B.E., June, 1939.

MOORE, DENIS BENJAMIN, Indian Police (b. 21st March, 1917).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bihar, on probn., Dec., 1937; confd., Oct., 1941; a.d.c. to govt., Orissa, March, 1940.

MOORE, ERNEST ARTHUR, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 21st Dec., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bengal, 4th Oct., 1924; exec. engr., Oct., 1933; temp. suptg. engr., July, 1944.

MOORE, FREDERICK THOMAS, Office of High Commr. for India (exec. officer, general dept.) (b. 17th Feb., 1897).—Apptd. temp. clerk, India Office, Jan., 1920; transf. to H.C.'s Office, Apl., 1922; clerical officer, Jan., 1924; exec. ditto, June, 1927.

MOORE, JAMES PATRICK, Indian Police (Madras) (b. 31st Oct., 1916).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Oct., 1939.

MOORE, JOHN RICHARD, Office of High Commr. for India (hr. exec. officer, store dept.) (b. 16th Jan., 1888).—Apptd. 2nd-class clerk, 4th Apl., 1908; transf. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; exec. officer, Apl., 1922; hr. ditto, Feb., 1938.

MOORE, LEONARD ALFRED JOHN, Office of High Commr. for India (exec. officer, general dept.) (b. 11th Oct., 1902).—Apptd. clerical officer, India office, 27th Apl., 1920, after previous service, from 25th Feb., 1918; transf. to office of high commr. for India, Apl., 1922; exec. officer, Apl., 1924.

MOORE-GILBERT, SAMUEL MALCOLM, Indian Police (b. 22nd July, 1919).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., Nov., 1938; confd., Mar., 1941.

MOORTHY RAO, SRINIVASARAO SRINIVASA,

B.E. (Mech. Mysore), Indian Posts and Telegraphs (ch. electrician, wireless) (b. 21st Oct., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. div. engr., wireless (temp.), 10th Nov., 1926; confd. div. engr., wireless, Apl., 1928; ch. elec., wireless, March, 1937.

MOOS, PESTONJI NANABHAI, M.A., LL.B., Indian C.S. (judge and sess. judge, Bombay) (b. 29th Aug., 1894).—Educ. at Elphinstone Coll., Bombay, and University Coll., London; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived 6th Jan., 1922, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; doing duty as asst. judge, Aug., 1925; offg. judge and sess. judge, Apl., 1928; confd., Nov., 1929; sec. to govt. (legal), and remembrancer of legal affairs, Jan., 1941.

MOOS, SORAB NANABHOY, C.I.E., M.A., Indian Educl. Service (dir. of public instrn., Poona) (b. 25th Sept., 1890).—Joined the service, 14th May, 1919; vice-princl., D. J. Sind Coll., May, 1919; inspr. of science teaching, Bombay presdy., Dec., 1925; offg. asst. director of public instrn., Apl., 1926; and again, Sept., 1933; educl. inspr., Jan., 1927; offg. dep. dir. of public instrn., March, 1932; offg. dir., Nov., 1936; dep. dir. public instrn., Poona, Dec., 1937; dir., ditto, confd., March, 1940; C.I.E., Jan., 1943.

MORAN, ARTHUR VIVIAN, late Office of High Commr. for India (b. 30th March, 1879).—Retd., March, 1939.*

MORAY, VISHWASRAO DINKARRAO, Indian Police (b. 11th May, 1914).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., 14th March, 1938; confd., Mar., 1940.

MORE, IAN ANDREW HANSON, India Office (asst. princpl., mil. dept.) (b. 14th Jan., 1915).—Educ. at Pettes Coll., Edinburgh, and Trinity Coll., Oxford; apptd. asst. princpl., 11th Oct., 1938; serving with H.M. Forces.

MOREHEAD, FREDERICK THOMAS, O.B.E., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 30th June, 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 18th Dec., 1922; dep. consvr., July, 1925; O.B.E., June, 1932.

MORGAN, REV. BASIL IVOR, Indian Eccles. Estabt. (senr. chaplain) (b. 9th Dec., 1887).—Apptd. junr. chaplain, 16th Jan., 1922; senr. chaplain, Jan., 1932.

MORGAN, CHARLES CAREY, late Judl. Dept., Bengal (b. 21st Sept., 1880).*

MORGAN, DAVID EVAN, India Office (exec. officer, accont.-genl.'s dept.) (b. 4th March, 1917).—Apptd. exec. officer, 31st Aug., 1936.

MORGAN, DONALD LINDSEY, late Indian Police (b. 5th Nov., 1888).—Retd., May, 1937.*

MORGAN, FRANCIS DAVID PATERSON, Indian Police (asst. supt., Madras) (b. 14th Aug., 1914).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Madras, 22nd Nov., 1934; confd., Jan., 1937; a.d.c. to govt., March, 1940; served under Pol. dept. of govt. of India from Jan., 1943.

MORGAN, FREDERICK ROBERT, late Indian State Rlys. (N.W. Rly.) (b. 8th Aug., 1882).—Retd., Aug., 1937.*

MORGAN, HUGH CAREY.—Apptd. solicitor to the govt. of Bengal, Apl., 1935; retd., 1938.

MORGAN, JOHN ANTHONY PATERSON, late Burma Police (cl. I) (b. 28th July, 1919).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Nov., 1938; trans. to mil. dept., Oct., 1940; retd., June, 1943.

MORGAN, MAURICE DAVID, late Indian Police (Central Provs.) (b. 2nd Dec., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Dec., 1909; dist. supt., Feb., 1931; retd., Oct., 1940.

MORGAN, PAUL ROBERT JAMES, Indian

Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 1st Feb., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 6th Dec., 1920; offg. supt., Apl., 1925; confd., Aug., 1926; asst. inspr.-genl. (prov.), Jan., 1940.

MORLEY, ALEXANDER FRANCIS, B.A., Burma Office (princpl., econ. and overseas dept.) (b. 6th Jan., 1908).—Educ. at Rugby and Queen's Coll., Oxford; apptd. asst. princpl., 20th Oct., 1930; pte. secty. to parly. under-sec. of state, Dec., 1933; actg. princpl., March, 1936, and posted to econ. and overseas dept., Aug., 1936; advr. and secty., Indian govt. del. to 21st and 22nd internatl. lab. conf., 1936; advr., ditto, 23rd and 24th internatl. lab. conf., June, 1937, and June, 1938; confd. princpl., Oct., 1937; secty. to Indian del. to Brussels nine-power conf., Nov., 1937; lent to min. of aircraft production, July, 1940, to March, 1942.

MORLEY, WILLIAM PATRICK, late India Posts and Telegraphs (b. 9th Aug., 1888).—Joined the service, Dec., 1905; proby. supt., Dec., 1912; confd., March, 1915; dep. post-master-genl., Jan., 1939; p.m.g., Oct., 1943; retd., Nov., 1943.

MORRIS, AUSTIN ROBERT, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Burma) (b. 7th Dec., 1885).—Retd., March, 1939.*

MORRIS, FREDERICK WILLIAM AUBREY, Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and sub. collr., Madras) (b. 26th Aug., 1907).—Educ. at Cardiff High Sch., and Corpus Christi Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 17th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930; and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., Aug., 1932; commercial tax officer, Madras, July, 1939.

MORRIS, JAMES ARCHIBALD, A.M.I.M.E., Indian State Ry's. (works manager) (b. 26th Sept., 1888).—Joined the service, 1st Jan., 1924; asst. works manager, E.I. rly., Nov., 1932; works manager, Aug., 1934.

MORRIS, MICHAEL, M.B.E., late Indian Police (b. 10th Feb., 1880).—Retd., Feb., 1935.*

MORRIS, RALPH CLARENCE, C.M.G., late Indian Police (Burma) (b. 10th March, 1889).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 6th Dec., 1908; dist. supt., Dec., 1917; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Apl., 1928; asst. inspr.-genl., Nov., 1928; dep. ditto, Dec., 1931; offg. inspr.-genl., June, 1933, and again, Feb., 1937; confd., June, 1939; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1935; C.M.G., Jan., 1941; retd., 10th March, 1944.

MORRIS, WILLIAM HERBERT, M.B.E. (b. 17th March, 1894).—Joined Mint Service as asst. engr., Nov., 1912; head engr., Oct., 1930; dep. mint master (tempy), 3rd Jan., 1941.

MORRISON, ROBERT VICTOR, M.D., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., retd., late Burma Medl. Dept. (b. 1st Sept., 1887).—First commn. dated 27th Jan., 1912; in milty. employ prior to 15th July, 1925; pathologist, July, 1925; offg. medl. supt., March, 1929; princpl., medl. coll., Rangoon, March, 1933; prof'r. of medicine, Rangoon Univ., Nov., 1935; retd., 1st Sept., 1942.

MORSE, HENRY MERRET RAVENSBURY, Indian State Ry's. (dep. ch. mechl. engr., N.W. Rly.) (b. 31st May, 1893).—Joined the service as asst. loco. supt., 5th Oct., 1915; divl. rolling stock offcr., Dec., 1927; offg. supt., workshops, N.W. rly., March, 1936; and again, March, 1937; dep. ch. mechl. engr., provl., Nov., 1940; dep. ch. optg. supt., May, 1944.

MORTLOCK, REV. ARTHUR GEORGE, late Indian Eccles. Estabt.—Apptd. junior chaplain, Madras, 1st Nov., 1931; retd., Apl., 1941.

MORTON, A. F., THE REV., Burma Eccles.

Estabt. (b. 2nd March, 1908).—Apptd. chaplain, on probn., 5th Oct., 1940.

MORTON, JOHN PERCIVAL, Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 15th May, 1911).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Punjab, 24th Nov., 1930; confd., Nov., 1932; Ind. police medal, Sept., 1935; bar, Sept., 1940.

MORTON, KENNETH VALENTINE FREELAND, Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 13th May, 1907).—Educ. at Edinburgh Academy and University Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 14th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under-secty. to govt., Punjab, pol. and home depts., Nov., 1934, to Oct., 1936; colonization offr., Apl., 1938; dep. commr. (sub provl.), Nov., 1941; dep. sec., devl. dept., Apl., 1943.

MORTON, VIVIAN WALTER, late Survey of India (b. 10th Dec., 1880).—Retd., Dec., 1935.*

MOSELY, SIR ARCHIE GERARD, late Indian C.S. (b. 6th March, 1883).—Educ. at Clifton, and Wadham Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1906; arrived, 19th Dec., 1907, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; dep. commr. (provl.), June, 1918; dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1923; offg. judge, high ct., Rangoon; July, 1929; confd., Feb., 1932; kt., June, 1941; retd., March, 1943.

MOSS, CHARLES HENRY DE VERE, O.B.E., Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 30th Oct., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bombay, 16th June, 1923; offg. supt., Apl., 1929; confd., July, 1933; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1931; O.B.E., June, 1941; princpl., trng. sch., Nasik; Sept., 1936, to June, 1939.

MOSS, ERIC DE VERE, C.I.E., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 13th Apl., 1896).—Educ. at Dulwich Coll., and Victoria Coll., Jersey; joined the service, 15th Oct., 1923, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., Oct., 1925; asst. commr., Apl., 1926; offg. dep. commr., Oct., 1926; offg. secty., bd. of rev., United Provs., March, 1932; mag. and collr., Dec., 1934; C.I.E., Jan., 1943; sec. to govt., indus. dept., and war prodn. commr., Apl., 1943.

MOTI LAL, AGGARWAL, LALA, Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 7th Jan., 1906) (asst. exec. engr., Punjab).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 19th Nov., 1927; proby. asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1928; confd., Nov., 1929.

MOTI RAM, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 16th Feb., 1897).—Joined the service, 19th Nov., 1920, as apprentice engr.; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1922; offg. exec. engr., May, 1928; confd., Jan., 1931; p.a. to ch. engr. and under-secty. to govt. (I.B.), July, 1937; suptg. engr., Nov., 1940.

MOULD, SAN CARTER, C.I.E., B.A. (Cantab.), late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 27th Sept., 1880).—Retd., Sept., 1935.*

MOUNTAIN, MICHAEL HAROLD, Indian Police (Bombay) (b. 14th Aug., 1917).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Oct., 1939.

MOWBRAY, ROBERT, C.I.E., M.A., India Office (rly. adviser and govt. dir. of Indian rly. companies) (b. 31st March, 1877).—Educ. at Manchester Gr. Sch. and Brasenose Coll., Oxford (scholar, 1896-1900; Green prize, 1905); apptd. junr. clerk, acctnt.-genl.'s dept., India Office, 29th Oct., 1900; joint editor of India Office List, Nov., 1907 to July, 1913; assessor of income-tax, March, 1910 to June, 1917; senr. clerk, July, 1913; clerk to the commrs. of income-tax, Oct., 1920; principal, Apl., 1921;

actg. dep. clerk of Council, 1st Dec., 1928; confd., Feb., 1931; rly. adviser and govt. dir. of Indian rly. companies, June, 1931; member, Indian staty. rly. bd. cttee., June, 1933; ret'd., June, 1945; C.I.E., Jan., 1945.

MOWDUDUR RAHMAN, B.A., Barr., Bengal Judl. Dept.—Joined the service as judge, Calcutta small cause ct., 14th Jan., 1923.

MOYNIHAN, MARTIN JOHN, B.A. (Oxon.), India Office (asst. principal) (b. 7th Feb., 1916).—Educ. at Birkenhead Sch. and Magdalen Coll., Oxford; apptd. asst. principal, 27th Feb., 1939; serving with H.M. Forces.

MRA, MAUNG SHWE, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 18th Feb., 1910).—Educ. at National High Sch., Akyab, Rangoon Univ., and Christ Church, Oxford; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-secty., educ. dept., Apl., 1938; addl. dy. contrl. of finance (defence), June, 1941.

MUAZZAM HUSSAIN KHAN, M.A., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal (b. 1st Sept., 1903).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 1st July, 1928; confd., Feb., 1931; supt. (temp.), May, 1936.

MUDALIAR, SIR RAMASWAMI, K.C.S.I., Diwan Bahadur (member, govr., genl.'s exec. council) (b. 14th Oct., 1887).—Member, Legislative Council, Madras, 1920-26; member, council of state, 1930; member, Indian legislative assembly, 1931-34; member, round table conference, all sessions, and federal structure committee; member, Indian franchise committee; member, special textile tariff board; member, council of India, July, 1936; Kt., Feb., 1937; adviser to secty. of state for India, Apl., 1937; member, govr.-genl's exec. council, May, 1939; K.C.S.I., June, 1942; reptive., govt. of India, imp. war cabinet and Pacific war cl., Aug., 1942 to July, 1945; suppy member, govr.-genl's exec. cl., Aug., 1943.

MUDIE, SIR ROBERT FRANCIS, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., O.B.E., Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 24th Aug., 1890).—Educ. at Fettes Coll., and King's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived, 1st Nov., 1915; on mil. duty with territorials to Apl., 1919; asst. mag. and collr., United Provs., Apl., 1919; O.B.E., June, 1919; joint mag., Dec., 1920; dep. commr. of income-tax, Dec., 1921; offg., dep. commr., March, 1922; special rent officer in addn., July, 1924; offg. mag. and collr., Oct., 1925; confd. May, 1932; offg. dep. sec. to govt., rev. dept., Apl., 1926; offg. settlement offcr., Oct., 1926; jt. secty., Indian round table conf., London Nov., 1930-Jan., 1931; C.I.E., June, 1935; on spl. duty with rly. bd., Apl., 1936; mag. and collr., Dec., 1937; rev. sec. to govt., United Provs., Apl., 1938; chief ditto, Nov., 1939 to Nov., 1941; C.S.I., Jan., 1941; actg. govr. of Bihar, Sept., 1943 to Jan., 1944; home member, govr.-genl's exec. cl. July, 1944; K.C.I.E., June, 1944.

MUEENUDDIN, GHULAM, Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 6th May, 1906).—Educ. at Aitchison Coll., Lahore, Punjab Univ., and Oxford Univ.; joined the service, 13th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., variously, from May, 1935; to Apl., 1937; colonization offr., Apl., 1938; rev. sec. to fin. commrs., Sept., 1941; dep. commr. (sub-provl.), Dec., 1941.

MUHAMMAD ABDUL AZIZ (see Abdul Aziz, M.).

MUHAMMAD ABDUL GHANI ANSARI, B.A., LL.B., Income Tax Dept., United Provs. (asst. commr.) (b. 19th Oct., 1890).—Joined the service as proby. dep. collr., 23rd May, 1913; confd., May, 1915; inc.-tax offcr., May, 1926; asst. commr., July, 1927.

MUHAMMAD ABDUL HAMID, SHAIKH, Khan Bahadur, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (Punjab) (b. 16th Sept., 1897).—Joined the service, 6th Nov., 1921; asst. engr., Nov., 1922; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1923; on depts. to Bahawalpur state, Apl., 1930; exec. engr., Nov., 1931; under-sec. to Govt., Apl., 1937; prof'r., Punjab coll. of engrg., Jan., 1944 to March, 1944.

MUHAMMAD ABDUL KHALIK, B.A., K.B., late Indian Police (Bengal) (b. 25th Jan., 1886).—Joined the service as proby. dep. supt., 23rd March, 1912; confd., March, 1914; supt., Dec., 1930; ret'd., Jan., 1941.

MUHAMMAD ABDUL MAJID, KHAN SAHIB, Khwaja, M.B.E., B.A., late Punjab C.S. (b. 24th Aug., 1884).—Ret'd., Aug., 1939.*

MUHAMMAD ABDULLAH, KHAN SAHIB HAFIZ, CHAUDHRI, late Punjab Agric. Service (b. Oct., 1885).—Joined the service, 15th Apl., 1907, and held non-gazetted appts. to 9th May, 1916; asst. dir. of agric., May, 1916; apptd. to I.A.S. from 29th Oct., 1921; dep. dir. of agric., Oct., 1921; asst. prof'r., Punjab agric. coll., Apl., 1924; ret'd., Oct., 1940.

MUHAMMED ABDUR RAHMAN, SIR (see Abdur Rahman, Sir Muhammad).

MUHAMMAD ABOO ABDULLAH, Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 1st Sept., 1905). Apptd. proby. asst. supt., Bengal, 6th Feb., 1930; confd., Apl., 1932; asst. dir., intell. bureau, home dept., June, 1938.

MUHAMMAD, APZAL HUSSAIN, M.Sc. (Punjab), M.A. (Cantab.), Dept. of Agric., Punjab (entomologist to govt., Punjab) (b. 10th March, 1889).—Joined the service, 6th Jan., 1919; entomologist to govt., Punjab, Sept., 1919; ditto and princpl., Punjab agric. coll., Lyallpur, Apl., 1933.

MUHAMMAD, AHMAD SAID KHAN (see Ahmad, S. K. M.).

MUHAMMAD AKRAM, AGHA, B.A., late Indian Police (b. 17th June, 1881).—Ret'd., June, 1936.*

MUHAMMAD AKRAM KHAN, KHWATA, B.A., Indian Police, ret'd. (b. 15th May, 1884).—Joined the service as dep. supt., Feb., 1908; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1918; on foreign service as inspr.-genl. of police, Bhopal state, 7th Nov., 1921; dist. supt., Sept., 1926; awarded Indian police medal, Feb., 1937; ret'd., May, 1939.

MUHAMMAD ALI KHAN, Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 1st Sept., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 15th June, 1924; offg. supt., Apl., 1932, and again, Feb., 1933; supt., Apl., 1937.

MUHAMMAD ANWAR ALI, Indian Police (b. 1st Nov., 1906).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Punjab, 14th Jan., 1930; confd., Jan., 1932.

MUHAMMAD AZAM, KHAN, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 3rd Feb., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., N.W.F.P., 1st Oct., 1924; exec. engr., Oct., 1933.

MUHAMMAD AZIM HUSAIN, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 5th Oct., 1913).—Educ. at Central Model School, Lahore, Punjab

Univ. and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 25th Sept.; arrived in India, Dec., 1937, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.

MUHAMMAD AZFAR, B.A., LL.B., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 1st Apl., 1909).—Educ. at the Queen's Intermediate Coll., Benares, Allahabad Univ. and Jesus Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; transfed. to Orissa, March, 1940.

MUHAMMAD BAZL-UL-LAH SAHIB, Sir Khan Bahadur, B.A., C.I.E., O.B.E., late Madras Civil Service (b. 31st Jan., 1875).—Retd. 30th Jan., 1935.*

MUHAMMAD EHSANUR RAHMAN, B.A., Impl. Customs Service (collr.) (b. 15th Sept., 1896).—Joined the service, 17th Jan., 1917; asst. collr., March, 1923; offg. collr., Oct., 1934; and again, Apl., 1937; collr. (confd. provl.), Oct., 1944.

MUHAMMAD IAKHAR-UD-DIN, Mian, late Indian Service of Engrs. (Punjab) (b. 28th July, 1889).—Joined Oct., 1913, as asst. engr.; asst. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1922; under-secty. to govt., irrig. branch, Apl., 1928; retd., 28th July, 1944.

MUHAMMAD FAZLUL KARIM, Khan Bahadur, B.A., late Bengal C.S. (b. 23rd Oct., 1881).—Retd., Oct., 1936.*

MUHAMMAD, GHULAM, see Ghulam, M.

MUHAMMAD, GUL (see Gul Muhammad).

MUHAMMAD HABIBULLAH, Sir Sahib Badahur, K.C.S.I., K.C.I.E.—Apptd. member of exec. council, Madras, 17th Dec., 1920; knighted, June, 1922; member of royal commn. on the superior public services in India, 1923-24; K.C.I.E., June, 1924; member of govt.-genl.'s exec. council, 31st Dec., 1924 to 31st March, 1930; K.C.S.I., June, 1927.

MUHAMMAD HAMID, Khan Bahadur, B.A., late Bihar C.S. (b. 16th Sept., 1883).—Retd., May, 1937.*

MUHAMMAD HUMAYUN, Khan Bahadur, B.A., Madras Civil Service (sub. collr.) (b. 4th Aug., 1886).—Offg. dep. collr., Nov., 1918; confd., July, 1921; sub. collr., March, 1937.

MUHAMMAD HUSAIN, KHWAJA, B.A., Indian Police (dist. supt., Central Provs.) (b. 18th March, 1897).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., 14th June, 1920; offg. dist. supt., Feb., 1924; confd., March, 1928.

MUHAMMAD IBRAHIM, Mian, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 7th June, 1899).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 15th Oct., 1923; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1924; offg. exec. engr., Sept., 1933; confd., Oct., 1933.

MUHAMMAD IDRIS, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal).—Joined, 13th May, 1939; confd., May, 1941.

MUHAMMAD, INAMULLAH KHAN, Khan Bahadur, Indian Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr., Orissa) (b. 7th Aug., 1908).—Joined the service as asst. engr. exec., Bihar and Orissa, on probn., 4th Apl., 1932; confd., Aug., 1933.

MUHAMMAD INAMUR RAHIM (see Rahim, M. I.).

MUHAMMAD ISMAIL, B.Sc., A.M.I.E.S., Indian Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr., Punjab) (b. Nov., 1901).—Joined the service as temp. engr., 4th July, 1927; apptd. to I.S.E. as asst. exec. engr., Punjab, July, 1931.

MUHAMMAD ISMAIL, Khan Bahadur, Barr.-at-Law (judge, high court, Allahabad).—Apptd., Aug., 1937.

MUHAMMAD JAMIL SYED, M.A., LL.B., Indian Audit Dept. (b. Feb., 1900).—Joined the service, 26th Feb., 1926; currency officer., Madras, March, 1931; asst. acct. genl., United Provs., Jan., 1937; asst. acct.-genl., posts and telegraphs, Delhi, Oct., 1938; dep. comptr., Sind, Oct., 1940; accts. officer., E.I. Rly., Nov., 1941.

MUHAMMAD KHAN, SAHIBZADA SARDAR, Bombay C.S. (collr. and dist. mag.) (b. 22nd May, 1886).—Joined the service as proby. dep. collr., 28th Aug., 1910; confd., June, 1913; offg. dep. commr., Feb., 1929; offg. collr. and dist. mag., Apl., 1930; confd., Dec., 1931.

MUHAMMAD MOOSA KHAN, Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., Jail Dept., Madras (supt.) (b. 3rd Oct., 1887).—First commn., dated 8th Dec., 1915; in milty. employ to 27th July, 1925; supt., central jail, Clannanore, June, 1928; ditto, Vellore, June, 1931; supt. of the penitentiary, Madras, Jan., 1938.

MUHAMMAD MUSANNA, Khan Bahadur SHAIKH, late United Provs. C.S. (b. Feb., 1883).—Joined the service, 16th March, 1906; dep. collr., May, 1908; mag. and collr., Jan., 1933; retd., Feb., 1938.

MUHAMMAD NUR, Sir KHWAJA, C.B.E., Khan Bahadur, late Judl. dept., Bihar.—Apptd. dep. president, legislative council, 8th Aug., 1922; president, ditto, 21st Nov., 1922; C.B.E., March, 1929; judge, high ct., Oct., 1930; knighted, Feb., 1937; retd., Sept., 1939*; apptd. chmn., jt. publ. serv. commn. for Bihar, C.P. and Berar, and Orissa, Jan., 1940.

MUHAMMAD SAID, Khan Bahadur, Mian, Barr., late Indian Police (b. 29th Sept., 1880).—Retd., Sept., 1935.*

MUHAMMAD SALEH AKBAR HYDARI, Sir, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., Indian C.S. (India's repres. Eastern Group supply council) (b. 12th Oct., 1894).—Educ. at Bombay Univ. and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1919; arrived, 9th Feb., 1920, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Jan., 1922; offg. under-sec. to govt., development dept., Madras, Oct., 1923; under-sec., govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, June 1924; offg. dep. sec. ditto, Nov., 1925; agent to govt. of India in Ceylon, Oct., 1927; secty. to impl. council of agricl. research, June, 1929; secty. to the state delegation to the round table conf., from the Hyderabad state, July, 1931 to Jan., 1932; dep. secty., govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, Apl., 1932; secty. to the state delegation to the round table conf., from the Hyderabad state, Oct., 1932 to Nov., 1933; offg. jt. secty. to govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, June, 1934; confd., Oct., 1935; C.I.E., Jan., 1935; collr. (provl. subs.), Oct., 1935; confd., Oct., 1936; offg. secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, Apl. to Sept., 1937; secty. to govt. of India, dept. of labour, May, 1938; repres. of India on eastern group supply council, Feb., 1941; C.S.I., June, 1941; K.C.I.E., June, 1944.

MUHAMMAD SANA ULLAH, Khan Bahadur, B.A., M.Sc., F.C.S., Archaeological Survey Dept. (b. 16th Nov., 1886).—Apptd. archaeological chemist in India, 29th June, 1917.

MUHAMMAD SHAHAB-UD-DIN, B.A., B.L., Indian C.S. (judge, Madras) (b. 13th May, 1895).—Educ. at Madras Christian Coll. and Law Coll.; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 2nd Jan., 1922, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag.,

June, 1925; on judl. training at Salem, July, 1929; offg. dist. and sess. judge, June, 1931; confd., Jan., 1935; addtl. judge, high ct., Feb., 1943.

MUHAMMAD SHARIFF, SHAIKH, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 23rd Nov., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1919; asst. exec., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1931.

MUHAMMAD SIRAJUDDIN SAHIB, B.A., Indian Police (dist. supt.) (b. 7th June, 1904).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Madras, 14th June, 1930; confd., June, 1932; confd. as dist. supt., Oct., 1944.

MUHAMMAD SULAIMAN KHAN BAHADUR, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (supg. engr., Central P.W.D.) (b. 5th June, 1892).—Joined the service, 1st Sept., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1920; offg. exec. engr., March, 1926; confd., Oct., 1929; offg. suptg. engr., Aug., 1936; confd., July, 1940.

MUHAMMAD USMAN SIR, Sahib Bahadur, Khan Bahadur, K.C.I.E. (b. 1884).—Apptd. member of govr.'s exec. council, Madras, 30th March, 1925; Kt., June, 1928; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1933; actg. govr. of Madras, May to Aug., 1934; memb., nat. def. council, July, 1941; posts and air memb., govr.-genl.'s exec. council, July, 1942.

MUHAMMAD WALI (see Wali Muhammad).

MUHAMMAD ZAHIRUDDIN AHMAD FARUQI (see Zahiruddin, A. F. M.).

MUHAMMAD ZIA-UD-DIN SAHIB, KHAN SAHIB, B.A., Indian Police (b. 1st Dec., 1890).—Joined the service, 31st March, 1915; apptd. to the Indian Police as dist. supt., Madras, Apl., 1937.

MUHSIN ALI, B.A., M.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs. (United Provs.) (b. 10th Aug., 1888).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1912; asst. engr., Nov., 1912; exec. engr., Oct., 1921; prof. of civil engrg., Thomason Coll., Roorkee, Oct., 1928; offg. suptg. engr., March, 1935; confd., Dec., 1939; ret'd., 10th Aug., 1943.

MUIR, DAVID IAN RENNIE, O.B.E., Indian Civil Service (sub.-collr., Madras) (b. 11th Feb., 1903).—Educ. at George Watson's Coll., Univ. of Edinburgh, and Exeter Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub.-collr., July, 1932; jt. secty., bd. of rev., Madras, Apl., 1936; secty. to high commr. for India in Union of S. Africa, Nov., 1940 to Dec., 1943; O.B.E., June, 1943; secty. post-war reconstr. dept., Aug., 1944.

MUIR, GEORGE BASIL FAIRLIE, late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 29th Aug., 1882).—Ret'd., Feb., 1938.*

MUIRHEAD, ALEXANDER KERSHAW, late Indian State Ry's. (b. 14th Aug., 1886).—Joined the service as storekeeper, 10th Sept., 1907; on mil. duty from 4th Jan., 1917; dist. contr. of stores, July, 1918; contr., bales, Calcutta, Jan.-June, 1922; offg. dep. agent, Apl., 1929; offg. ch. personnel officer, Apl., 1932; offg. ch. contr. of stores, N.W. rly., May, 1933; and again, Feb., 1934; confd., May, 1934; ret'd., Aug., 1941.

MUKERJEE, AMULLYA CHARAN, Rai Bahadur, B.Sc., late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 20th Feb., 1885).—Joined the service, 20th Feb., 1906; supt., July, 1920; asst. sec. to govt. of India, fin. dept., Apl., 1922; examr., outside acct., Calcutta, March, 1923; offg. dep. contr. of currency, Calcutta, Oct., 1926; currency officer, Calcutta, Feb., 1929; dep. contr. of the

currency, Calcutta, Apl., 1929; ditto, Bombay, Aug., 1934; ch. acct., res. bank of India, Jan., 1935; ch. auditor, E.B. rly. and govt. examr. of accts., A.B. rly., Nov., 1935; ch. auditor, E.I. rly., Apl., 1938; ret'd., Feb., 1940.

MUKERJEE, SUBODH CHANDRA, M.A., late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 19th Aug., 1891).—Ret'd., Apl., 1934.*

MUKERJI, BHARMADEVA, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 30th Oct., 1912).—Educ. at Govt. Intermediate Coll., Allahabad, and Allahabad Univ., joined the service, 21st Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in B. & O. as asst. mag. and collr.; posted to Orissa, May, 1938; under-sec. to govt., Apl., 1942; dep. contr. supply dept. and dep. sec., ditto, Apl., 1943.

MUKERJI, PARESH NATH, Rai Bahadur, C.B.E., M.A., late India Posts and Tels. (b. 22nd Dec., 1882).—Ret'd., Apl., 1939.*

MUKERJI, TARANANDA, M.B., D.P.H. (Port Health Officer, Chittagong) (b. 1st Oct., 1893); joined present post, 26th June, 1928.

MUIRHEAD, Brig. J. I., C.I.E., M.C.—Apptd. pers. asst. to sec. mil. dept., India Office, Feb., 1945.

MUKHARJI, ABHAYAPADA, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge), Bihar (b. 1st Dec., 1899).—Educ. at Patna Univ. and Exeter Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1924; arrived, 16th Dec., 1924, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; addl. dist. and sess. judge, March, and again Nov., 1932; dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1935.

MUKHARJI, AMULYA CHANDRA, O.B.E., B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 5th March, 1898).—Joined the service, 29th Oct., 1921; offg. exec. engr., Apl., 1927; confd., Jan., 1932; suptg. engr. (temp.), July, 1943; O.B.E., Jan., 1945.

MUKHARJI, ASHUTOSH, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 16th Apl., 1885).—Joined the service, 2nd July, 1906; prof., Patna Coll., May, 1919; princpl. science coll., Patna, Feb., 1935; ret'd., Apl., 1940.

MUKHARJI, BHABANI CAHRAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bihar) (b. 1st Aug., 1901).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Oxford (non-collegiate) joined the service, 28th Oct., 1925; arrived, 6th Dec., 1925, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-sec. to govt. finl. dept., Sept., 1929; addl. under-sec. to govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, July, 1931; offg. dep. commr., May, 1932; offg. mag. and collr., Sept., 1932; and again, March, 1933; offg. dep. secty. to govt., pol. and appts. depts., July, 1935; secty., local self-govt. dept., Bihar, March, 1939 to Oct., 1939; mag. and collr., 1939; sec. local self-govt. dept., Aug., 1942 to Sept., 1944.

MUKHARJI, BONBEHARI, B.A., Rai Bahadur, Indian Police (supt.) (b. 29th Jan., 1887).—Joined the service, 1910; confd., as supt., Bengal, Oct., 1937; dep. commr. of police, Calcutta; awarded King's police medal, 1919.

MUKHARJI, CHARU CHANDRA, O.B.E., B.A., Rai Bahadur, late Bihar Civil Service (b. 18th Nov., 1882).—Ret'd., March, 1938.*

MUKHARJI, KSHIROD LAL, Rai Bahadur, B.A., late Bengal C.S. (b. 31st March, 1881).—Ret'd., March, 1936.*

MUKHARJI, NIRMAL KUMAR, M.A., Indian C.S. (b. 9th Jan., 1921).—Educ. at Delhi Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1943, and served in Punjab.

MUKHARJI, SATISH CHANDRA, B.A., late

Bihar C.S. (b. 3rd Nov., 1881).—Retd., March, 1937.*

MUKHARJI, UPANANDA, M.A., Indian Police (b. 21st Dec., 1909).—Joined the service as asst. supt. of police, Bengal, on probn., 12th March, 1934; confd., Feb., 1936; addl. supt., Apl., 1940; King's police medal, 1943.

MUKHERJEA, ARUN KUMAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 20th Jan., 1915).—Educ. at Zillah Sch., Mymensingh, Calcutta Univ. and London Sch. of Oriental Studies, apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 5th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Sept., 1938, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1939; jt. magt. and dep. collr., Nov., 1939; dep. contr., rationing, May, 1944.

MUL CHAND BIJAWAT, RAI BAHADUR, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (United Provs.) (b. 15th Jan., 1886).—Joined the service, 13th Oct., 1909; asst. engr., Oct., 1910; exec. engr., Oct., 1918; under-secty. to govt. p.w.d., United Provs., Feb., 1931; offg. suptg. engr., July, 1934; confd., Nov., 1937; profr. civ. engrg., Thom. Coll., Roorkee, Oct., 1939; retd. from I.S.E., 13th Jan., 1941; re-empld., Jan., 1941.

MULK RAJ, CHOPRA, LALA, Indian Service of Engrs. (Punjab) (b. 18th Aug., 1906).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 24th July, 1930; apptd. to I.S.E. as asst. exec. engr., Punjab, July 1913; exec. engr., July, 1940; served under cent. govt., Dec., 1942; addtl. under-sec., govt. Punjab, Sept., 1944.

MULKANI, GOPALDAS GURBOMAL, M.A., LL.B., Judl. Dept., Bombay (asst. judge) (b. 20th Nov., 1889).—Joined the service, 1st Apl., 1918; asst. judge, Dec., 1934; offg. dist. and sess. judge, variously, from May, 1934.

MULLA, T. N. (see Tej Narayan Mulla).

MULLAN, CHARLES SEYMOUR, C.I.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr.)
