ROBERTSON, JAMES PERCY WYNNE, late Indian Police (Burma) (b. 17th Aug., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., 18th Apl.,

1920; dist. supt., Aprl., 1924; awarded Indian police medal, Feb., 1937; asst. inspector-genl., Dec., 1937; retd., 9th Sept., 1944.

ROBERTSON, LEO CAYLEY, M.A. (Hons.), Barr., Burma Judicial Dept. (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 19th June, 1891).—Apptd., June, 1938.

ROBERTSON, MURRAY, Indian State Rlys. (junr. dep. agent, E.I. Rly.) (b. 15th June, 1887).—Joined the service as asst. secty. to agent, 20th Aug., 1920; jt. secty. to agent, Aug., 1924; secty. to agent, Jan., 1925; offg. junr. dep. agent, Oct., 1930; confd., Nov., 1931.

ROBERTSON, THOMAS HENRY, Office of High Commr. for India (executive offcr., store dept.) (b. 8th June, 1895).—Apptd., 2nd class clerk, 4th Feb., 1915, and attached to store dept.; on mil. service from May, 1915 to Aug., 1919; transfed. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; exec. offcr., Aprl., 1922; actg., higher exec. offcr., Jan., 1940.

ROBEY, EDWARD BEAUMONT, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 30th Dec., 1880).—Retd., Dec., 1935.*

ROBINS, LESLIE CYRIL FREDERICK, Indian Police (b. 4th Dec., 1907).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 24th Nov., 1928; confd., Nov., 1930; offg. supt., June, 1935; police asst. to A.G.G. in C.I., March, 1937; confd. as supt., March, 1942.

ROBINSON, EDWARD CHARLES, Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl., United Provs.) (b. 5th Nov., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Nov., 1912; supt., July, 1925.

ROBINSON, HAROLD WOOD (see Wood-Robinson, Harold).

ROBINSON, STEPHEN ERIC, Indian Police (asst. supt.).—Apptd. asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., 24th Nov., 1934; confd., Nov., 1936.

ROBINSON, SYDNEY HERBERT, late Office of High Commr. for India (b. 31st May, 1876).—Retd., Oct., 1938.*

ROBINSON, SIR SYDNEY MADDOCK, Kt., Barr. (1888), late Judl. Dept., Burma.—Retd., Dec., 1925.*

ROBINSON, Tom, late Indian Police (b. 29th Sept., 1883).—Retd., Nov., 1937.*

ROBINSON, THOMAS MIDDLETON, Indian State Rlys. (dipl. mech. engr., N.W. Rly) (b. 4th Feb., 1894).—Asst. carriage and wagon supt., junr. scale, 28th Feb., 1922; divl. mech. engr., sent. scale, Nov., 1936.

ROBINSON, WILLIAM DOUGLAS, O.B.E., Indian Police (b. 5th Nov., 1907).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 16th Nov., 1927; cent. intell. offcr., Punjab and Delhi, March, 1939; asst. dir. intell. bureau, May, 1941; supt. (confd.), June, 1942; senr. supt., Delhi, May, 1944; O.B.E., Jan., 1945.

ROCH, ERNEST TWINING, Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Bombay) (b. 24th May, 1892).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1919; asst. exec. engr., March, 1920; offg. exec. engr., Dec., 1923; confd., Oct., 1924; suptg. engr. (confd.), May, 1943.

RODGER, SIR ALEXANDER, Kt., O.B.E., late Indian Forest Service (b. 11th Aug., 1875).—Retd., Feb., 1931.*

RODGER, JOHN, O.B.E., M.C., M.B., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. (b. 19th Dec., 1891).—First commn. dated 30th July, 1920; in mil. employ to Jan., 1929; resdy. surg., Mewar, 7th Jan., 1929; civil surg., Sibi, Oct., 1932; offg. resdy. surg. and C.M.O., Baluchistan, Feb., 1933; and again, Sept., 1935; civil surg., Sibi and Loralai, in addn., Aprl., 1924, and again, Oct., 1936;

O.B.E., May, 1937; legation surg. and H.M. Chargé d'Affaires, Nepal, June, 1938; civilsurg., Hayara, June, 1939.

RODGER, ROBERT CRUDEN, M.C., D.C.M., Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 7th June, 1895).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bombay, 11th Nov., 1923; offg. supt., May, 1928; confd., Aprl., 1935; asst. to D.I.G., C.I.D., Poona, Aprl., 1937 to Aprl., 1938; awarded Indian Police Medal, 1942; cent. intell. offcr., Bombay, Jan., 1943.

RODGERS, REV. ARTHUR HAROLD, M.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (jun. chaplain) (b. 13th June, 1907).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., Lahore Diocese, 21st Nov., 1942.

RODGERS, E. W. F., late Dept. of Industries and Labour, Civil Aviation Dir. (b. 21st Nov., 1889).—Retd., Oct., 1938.*

RODWELL, ERNEST GRAVENOR, O.B.E., F.C.H., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 11th Aprl., 1881).—Retd., Aprl., 1936.*

ROE, HAROLD RILEY, C.I.E., late Indian Police (United Provs.) (b. 15th Oct., 1883).—Retd., June, 1935.*

ROGERS, ERIC MAXFIELD, Indian Police (supt.) (b. 2nd Sept., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 25th Nov., 1922; offg. supt., Aprl., 1926; confd., Jan., 1934; asst. to D.I.G., C.I.D., Oct., 1936 to Mar., 1940.

ROGERS, REV. ERIC WITHAM, Indian Eccles. Estabt., United Provs. (junr. chaplain) (b. 17th Aprl., 1898).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., 31st March, 1935; junr. chaplain, March, 1937.

ROGERS, REV. GEORGE THOMAS, M.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (junr. chaplain) (b. 18th Nov., 1899).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., Bengal; junr. chaplain, Jan., 1935.

ROGERS, KENNETH DAVID, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 22nd Feb., 1914).—Educ. at Roundhay Sch., Leeds, and Leeds Univ.; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 7th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sub-divl. offcr., Aprl., 1941; rationing contr., Rawalpindi, 1944.

ROGERS, SIR LEONARD, K.C.S.I., C.I.E., M.D., F.R.S., F.R.C.P., F.R.C.S., Major-Genl., I.M.S. (retd.) (b. 18th Jan., 1868).—Presdt., medical bd., India Office, Nov., 1928 to Nov., 1933.*

ROGERS, THOMAS EDWARD, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. magt. and collr., Bengal) (b. 28th Dec., 1912).—Educ. at Bedford Sch., and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 16th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; H.B.M.'s vice-consul, Bushire, Aug., 1941; asst. pol. agt., Bahrain, Aug., 1944.

ROHATGI, D. P. (see Durga Prasad Rohatgi).

ROLLO, JAMES FREDERICK, late Northern India Salt Rev. Dept. (b. 3rd Nov., 1884).—Joined the service, 20th Aprl., 1908; asst. commr., Sept., 1926; asst. gen. manager, Sambhar, July, 1934; asst. commr., Kohat, March, 1935; retd.,

ROMER, HERBERT JOHN, M.B.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 19th Jan. 1879).—Retd., Jan., 1937.*

ROMESH CHANDRA, B.Sc. C.E. (hons.), M.I.E. (Ind.), Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Assam) (b. 17th March, 1897).—Joined the service, 14th Nov., 1921, as asst. exec. engr.; exec. engr., Nov., 1930; prof. civil engrg., Roorkee, Oct., 1937 to July, 1938; exec. engr., Nov., 1938.

RONALDSHAY (EARL OF) (see under Zetland (Marquess of)).

RONSON, JOHN LANCASTER, Indian Police (b. 11th Jan., 1918).—Apptd. asst. supt., Madras, on probn., Nov., 1938; confd., Nov., 1940.

ROPER, WILLIAM EDWARD CHARLES, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Burma) (b. 26th June, 1902).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Burma, 1st Oct., 1924; exec. engr., Oct., 1931.

ROSAIR, HARRY BASIL, L.R.C.P., and S.I., L.A.H. and L.M. (Dub.), D.T.M., late Jail Dept., United Provs. (b. 1st May, 1882).—Retd., May, 1937.*

ROSE, HUGH, Indian State Rlys. (dept. supt. of stores) (b. 7th May, 1892).—Joined the service, 4th March, 1920, asst. supt. of catering, Burmra rlys., May, 1924; dep. supt. of stores, Burmra rlys., Oct., 1935.

ROSE, H. MAURICE, late Opium dept., United Provs. (b. 6th Feb., 1880).—Retd., Feb., 1935.*

ROSE, HUGH ELLISHA, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 1st May, 1883).—Retd., July, 1937.*

ROSE, ROBERT FREDERICK, late Indian Service of Engineers (b. 19th Feb., 1884).—Retd., Feb., 1939.*

ROSE, REV. THOMAS PERCIVAL, M.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (senr. chaplain).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., Punjab, 2nd Dec., 1931; junr. chaplain, Dec., 1935; senr. ditto, Dec., 1943.

ROSE MEYER, PATRICK MAURICE, Indian Audit Dept. (b. 9th Oct., 1892).—Joined the service, 11th March, 1912; asst. dir., army audit., S. Cmd., Jan., 1929; dep. govt. exr., B.B. rly. and C.I. rly., March, 1935; dep. ch. auditor, E.B. rly., Apl., 1935; dep. govt. examiner of accts., B.N. rly., Nov., 1938; ch. auditor, E.B. rly., Apl., 1941; ditto, rly. clearing accts, Delhi, Aug., 1941; dy. chief auditor, E.I. rly., Dec., 1941; ch. auditor, E.B. rly. and govt. exmr., A.B. rly., Jan., 1942.

ROSEVEARE, MAJOR WILLIAM LEONARD, M.C., R.E., late Indian Service of Engrs., Burma (b. 11th Dec., 1895).—First commn., 16th Sept., 1914; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1924; exec. engr., Nov., 1927; retd., March, 1938.

ROSS, GEORGE MABYN, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 30th Apl., 1883).—Retd., Apl., 1938.*

ROSS, HERBERT STEWART, B.A., Indian C.S. (commr., United Provs.) (b. 27th Dec., 1885).—Educ. at Christ Coll., Brecon, and Jesus Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 26th Nov., 1910, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag.; jt. mag., Sept., 1916; on mil. duty from Aug., 1918 to Jan., 1919; asst. supt., Dehra Dun, Apl., 1922; offg. supt., ditto, Apl., 1922; offg. mag. and collr., March, 1925; confd., July, 1926; secty., bd. of rev., Jan., 1927; offg. commr., Feb., 1935; bd. of rev., Jan., 1927; offg. commr., Feb., 1935; member, Madhe Sahaba enqy. cttee., Apl., 1937; commr., Apl., 1939; confd., Nov., 1941.

ROSSINGTON, MAURICE HERBERT, Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Burma) (b. 31st July, 1908).—Educ. at the Royal Academical Institution, Belfast, and Univ. Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Dec., 1932, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-secty., home dept., Apl., 1937; dep. commr., Apl., 1939.

ROSS, ROBERT, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 25th Jan., 1917).—Educ. at Hamilton Academy, St. Andrew's Univ., and

Jesus Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn. after selection, in May, 1940, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

ROUGHTON, NOEL JAMES, C.S.I., C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 25th Dec., 1885).—Educ. at Winchester, and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 22nd Nov., 1909, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; regr., judl. commr.'s court, July, 1913; under-sec. to chief commr., Jan., 1918 to March, 1919; dep. commr. (provl.), Dec., 1920; confd., Nov., 1921; dir. of indus. and regr. of co-op. societies, Central Provs., July, 1923; dep. sec. to govt. of India, commerce dept., June, 1925; finl. secty. to govt., C.P., Apl., 1928; C.I.E., Jan., 1933; offg. commr., Feb., 1933; confd., July, 1934; offg. ch. secty. to govt., U.P., May, 1933; member govt.'s exec. council, Central Provs. (tempy.), Nov., 1934, and again, May, 1936; services placed at disposal of govt. of India, dept. of indus. and lab., Nov., 1936; member-secty., tariff bd., May, 1938; C.S.I., June, 1938; estabt. offr. to govt. of India, Jan., 1939; chmn. C.P. pub. ser. commn., Apl., 1941; retd., 1942.

ROUPELL, KATHLEEN ZELIA, India Audit Office (higher clerical offcr.) (b. 11th March, 1890).—Apptd. clerical offcr., 6th Jan., 1922; higher clerical offcr., July, 1935; actg. hr. exec., Oct., 1941.

ROUSE, SIR ALEXANDER MACDONALD, Kt., C.I.E., F.C.H., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 14th Sept., 1878).—Retd. Aug., 1933.*

ROUSE, WILLIAM PERCY MEADOWS, Indian Police (b. 24th Feb., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., N.W.F.P., 17th Nov., 1926.

ROUTH, REGINALD ALAN, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 26th Sept., 1884).—Retd., Sept., 1939.*

ROUTLEDGE, BRYAN HOWARD, Indian Police (supt., Assam) (b. 14th Apl., 1903).—Joined the service, 25th Nov., 1922; deputed to Sardah Police training coll. in Bengal to 16th May, 1924; proby. asst. supt., May, 1924; confd., Nov., 1924; offg. supt., Oct., 1932; confd., Feb., 1933; asst. to d.i.g. Mar., 1936 to Apl., 1938.

ROW, KODIKAL SANJIVA (see Sanjiva, Row, K.).

ROW, PANDRANG V. (see Pandrang Row).

ROWE, ALBERT JOHN, Office of High Commr. for India (higher exec. offcr., accts. dept.) (b. 23rd Oct., 1892).—Apptd. second class clerk, India Office, 12th Nov., 1913, and attd. to acctnt. genl.'s dept.; services lent to high commr. for India, from Oct., 1920; exec. offcr., Apl., 1922; actg. higher exec. offcr., Apl., 1925; confd., Apl., 1926.

ROWE, BERTHRAM ALFRED, Indian Police (b. 14th Jan., 1918).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., Nov., 1938.

ROWLAND, FRANCIS GEORGE, B.A., late Indian C.S., Bihar (b. 14th Aug., 1883).—Educ. at Harrow and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1905; arrived, 29th Nov., 1906, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transfd. to Bihar and Orissa, Apl., 1912; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Apl., 1913; attaché, legisl. dept., govt. of India, Apl., 1917; dist. and sess. judge, and ditto, July, 1917; offg. dep. sec., legisl. dept., govt. of India, Oct., 1917; addl. legal rembr., Bihar and Orissa, Jan., 1918; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1919; judl. commr., Nov., 1923; offg. judge, high ct., Patna, variously, from June, 1929; addl. judge, ditto,

variously, from March, 1931; judge, high ct., Patna, Aug., 1936; judge, fedl. ct., 25th May, to 4th June, 1943; ret'd., Feb., 1944; on spl. duty, govt. of India (home), Aprl., 1944.

ROWLAND, SIR JOHN EDWARD MAURICE, Indian State Rlys. (chief rly. commr., Burma) (b. 30th Aprl., 1882).—Joined the service as asst. engr. (temp.), 24th May, 1904; ditto (perm.), July, 1909; dist. engr., March, 1919; offg. variously, as ch. and dep. ch. engr., from June, 1927; confd. as dep. ch. engr., June, 1929; offg. ch. engr., May, 1933; and again, Dec., 1934; confd., March, 1935; offg. agent, Burma Rlys., Feb., 1935; confd., Oct., 1935; chief rly. commr., Aprl., 1937; kt., June, 1941.

ROWLAND, THEODORE, M.B.E., India Office (higher exec. offcr., military dept.) (b. 20th July, 1892).—Apptd. second class clerk, India Office, 6th March, 1912, and att'd. to registry and record dept.; transf'd. to mil. dept., Jan., 1917; on mil. service from Dec., 1915 to March, 1919; exec. offcr., Aprl., 1922; dep. reading clerk to council, Feb., 1926 to Feb., 1932; actg. hr. exec. offcr., Jan.-July, 1932; confd., March, 1933; actg. suptg. exec. offcr., Nov., 1941; M.B.E., Jan., 1942.

ROWLANDS, SIR ARCHIBALD, K.C.B., M.B.E.—Apptd. finl. advr. (mil. fin.), govt. of India, July, 1937; K.C.B., 1941; advr. to Viceroy on war admin., Oct., 1943; member, govr.-genl.'s exec. cl. (finance), Aprl., 1945.

ROWLANDSON, EDMUND JAMES, C.I.E., late Indian Police (Madras) (b. 27th Oct., 1882).—Ret'd., Dec., 1935.*

ROWLEY, JOHN HEWITT, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 25th Aprl., 1917).—Educ. at Llanfyllin County Sch., Mont., Univ. Coll. of North Wales, Bangor, and Jesus Coll., Oxford; apptd., on probn., 29th Sept., 1939; confd., 29th Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.

ROWNTREE, HAROLD KIRKBY, M.C., M.B., Lieut.-Col. (ret'd.), late I.M.S. (b. 27th Oct., 1887).—Ret'd., Sept., 1938.*

ROWNTREE, JOHN BATEMAN, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Assam) (b. 5th Aprl., 1906).—Joined the service as proby. asst. consvr., 11th Oct., 1929; confd., Oct., 1930; dep. consvr., Jan., 1938.

ROXBURGH, JAMES, late India Office (b. 8th Aprl., 1875).—Ret'd., Feb., 1936.*

ROXBURGH, THOMAS JAMES YOUNG, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 2nd March, 1892).—Educ. at Merchant Taylors' Sch. and Magdalene Coll., Cambridge; apptd., after exam. of 1914; arrived in India, Dec., 1915, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; I.A.R.O., Aug., 1916 to Feb., 1919; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Aprl., 1920; offg. chief presy. mag., Calcutta, June, 1923; confd., May, 1927; C.I.E., Jan., 1932; offg. secty. to govt., judl. dept., Bengal, Feb., 1935; judl. secty., Bengal, Aprl., 1937; addtl. judge, Calcutta high ct., Feb., 1940; judge, ditto, March, 1943.

ROY (see also Ray).

ROY, ARUN KUMAR.

ROY, SIR ASOKA KUMAR, M.A., B.L., Barr.-at-Law (memb., govr.-genl.'s exec. council, law) (b. 9th Sept., 1886).—Member of standing cl., Bengal, 1929; Kt., Feb., 1937; advocate-genl. of Bengal, 1934-43; member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council (law), June, 1943.

ROY, BEJOY KUMAR, M.A., Indian Forest Service, M.A., B.Sc. (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 4th March, 1896).—Joined the service as asst.

consvr., 11th Dec., 1920; dep. consvr., Dec., 1924.

ROY, CHANDRA BALI, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Central Provs.) (b. 9th Aug., 1894).—Joined the service, 16th Oct., 1916; asst. engr., Oct., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1920; offg. exec. engr., Nov., 1924; confd., Oct., 1926; confd., Feb., 1938.

ROY, HIMADRI NARAYAN, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 6th Dec., 1918).—Educ. at Victoria Sch., Kurseong, Calcutta Univ., and King's Coll., London; apptd. on probn., after selection in Aug., 1940, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

ROY, JAMES LEISHMAN, A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Punjab) (b. 29th Aprl., 1893).—Joined the service, as asst. engr., Oct., 1915; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1924; under-sec. to govt., irrign. bch., Aug., 1932; under-sec. (construction), Punjab irrign. sect., Jan., 1933; ditto (north), May, 1933; suptg. engr., May, 1940.

ROY, KEITH COTTON, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 26th July, 1912).—Educ. at Wyggeston Gr. Sch., Leicester, University Coll., London, and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, Dec., 1935; arrived in India, Jan., 1936, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; spl. duty, fin. dept., govt. of India, June, 1941; under-sec., fin. dept., Aprl., 1942.

ROY, PARESH LAL, M.A., Indian State Rlys. (dist. traffic supt., E.B. Rly.) (b. 20th Dec., 1893).—Asst. traffic supt., Nov., 1919; dist. ditto, Jan., 1937.

ROY, SIR SATYENDRA NATH, C.S.I., C.I.E., Indian C.S. (sec. to the govt. of India, dept. of war transport) (b. 23rd Sept., 1888).—Educ. at Govt. Sch., Bankura, Bengal, Calcutta Univ., and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 25th Nov., 1913, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr., and sec. to prov. cttee. to consider proposals of pub. serv. commn., Nov., 1917, to Jan., 1918; offg. under-sec. to govt. of Bengal, gen. dept., Jan., 1918; ditto, finl. dept., Feb., 1918; employed under Indian def. force, Feb. to June, 1918; on spl. duty, genl. dept. of govt. of Bengal, June, 1918; under-sec. to govt. of Bengal, genl. dept., July, 1918; dep. chairman, Howrah municipality, Oct., 1919, to Nov., 1920; offg. mag. and collr., Aprl., 1921; offg. dep. sec., govt. of Bengal, pol. and appt. dept., Nov., 1925; mag. and collr., Sept., 1927; dep. sec., Indian central cttee., Oct., 1928; dep. sec. to govt. of India, home dept., Aprl., 1929; C.I.E., Jan., 1932; joint sec., Indian round table conf., London, 3rd session, Nov.-Dec., 1932; offg. addl. sec. to govt., Bengal, pol. dept., Aprl., 1933; jt. sec. to the govt. of India, dept. of indus. and lab., July, 1936; offg. sec., ditto, Oct., 1936; sec., dept. of communications, Nov., 1937; C.S.I., June, 1938; tempy. member, govr.-genl.'s exec. cl., March to Aprl., 1942; secty., govt. of India (war transport), July, 1942; kt., June, 1942.

ROY, SATYENDRA NATH (see Ray).

ROY, SURES CHANDRA, M.B.E., M.Sc., D.Sc., Meteorological Dept. (meteorologist) (b. 1st March, 1899).—Joined the service as meteorologist on probn., 7th March, 1927; confd., March, 1929; services placed at the disposal of the govt. of Burma with effect from Feb., 1937; meteorologist, Indian met. dept., Aug., 1942; M.B.E., June, 1944.

ROY, SUHRID KUMAR, B.Sc., Ph.D., F.G.S., Indian Sch. of Mines (b. 1st Jan., 1895).—Joined the service as profy. of geology, 3rd Jan., 1928.

ROYDS, THOMAS, D.Sc., late Meteorological Dept. (b. 11th Apr., 1884).—Retd., Apl., 1939.*

RUDDELL, Rev. J. W. F., B.A., Ind. Eccles. Estabt. (junr. chaplain) (b. 8th Aug., 1896).—Apptd. chaplain, Bombay, on probn., 1st Oct., 1934; junior chaplain, Oct., 1936.

RUMBOLD, HORACE ALGERNON FRASER, B.A., India Office (princl., econ. and overseas dept.) (b. 27th Feb., 1906).—Educ. at Wellington and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. asst. principl., Jan., 1929; pte. sec. to parly. under-sec. of state, Apl., 1930; ditto to perm. under-sec. of state, Dec., 1933; actg. principl., Sept., 1934; confid., Apl., 1937.

RUNDETT, LESLIE ST. CLARE, A.C.G.I., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 26th March, 1891).—Retd., Sept., 1938.*

RUNGANATHAN, SIR SAMUEL E., Dewan Bahadur, M.A., I.E.S. (ret'd.) (b. 30th Dec., 1877).—Apptd. advr. to sec. of state for India, May, 1940; kt., Jan., 1943; high commr. for India, 10th June, 1942.

RUPCHAND BILARAM, B.A., LL.B., late Judl. Dept., Bombay (b. 15th May, 1878).—Retd., May, 1938.*

RUSBY, LIONEL STUART, late Indian Police (Bombay) (b. 6th Nov., 1896).—Retd., Oct., 1938.*

RUSE, VICTOR HAROLD, B.A., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 12th Oct., 1915).—Educ. at Wanstead County High Sch., London, and Queen's Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confid., 7th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; ret'd., 14th Jan., 1943.

RUSHBROOK WILLIAMS, LAURENCE FREDERIC, C.B.E., M.A., B.Litt., F.R.Hist.S., M.R.A.S., late dir., central bureau of infn., govt. of India, 1st June, 1919; C.B.E., June, 1923; ret'd., Dec., 1925.*

RUSHTON, HUGH DARRELL, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 6th Nov., 1903).—First commn., 30th Aug., 1923; in mill. employ until 20th May, 1929; pers. asst. to rest. at Hyderabad, 25th May, 1929; ditto to ch. commr., N.W.F.P., May, 1931; asst. pol. agent, Chitral, May, 1932; asst. commr., Nowshera, Oct., 1933; dist. and sess. judge, Dera Ismail Khan, Oct., 1935; add. ditto, Peshawar, July, 1936; asst. commr., Nowshera, Sept., 1938; sec. to pol. rest. in the Persian Gulf, March, 1939; under-sec. to rest. at Hyderabad, Dec., 1939; asst. pol. agent, Sibi, Apl., 1941; dep. commr., Hazara, Sept., 1944.

RUSSELL, ALEXANDER ALFRED, M.C., Maj., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 5th Oct., 1898).—First commn. dated 30th Jan., 1917; in mill. employ prior to 20th Apl., 1924; supy. asst. commr., Peshawar, March, 1925; sec., Kabul legation, Apl., 1925; supy. asst. commr., Mardan, Dec., 1926; under-sec. to ch. commr., N.W.F.P., Feb., 1927; asst. commr., Kohat, Apl., 1928; under-sec. to rest., Persian Gulf, May, 1928; offg. sec. to ditto, May, 1929; British trade agent, Gyanthe, etc., Nov., 1931; sec. to A.G.G. for Deccan states, Apl., 1934; ditto, states of W.I., March, 1935; dep. commr., Dera Ismail Khan, Nov., 1936; ditto, Hazara, Dec., 1937; sec. to the rest. for Rajputana, Apl., 1939; pol. agent; Eastern

Rajputana States, March, 1941; and again, Oct., 1944.

RUSSELL, SIR (CHARLES) LENNOX (SOMERVILLE), Kt., late Indian C.S. (Bengal).—Retd., Aug., 1926.*

RUSSELL, EDWARD WILSON, A.M.I.C.E., V.D., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 24th Oct., 1886).—Retd., Feb., 1939.*

RUSSELL, HAROLD GEORGE, O.B.E., Indian Police (Supt., Punjab) (b. 24th Feb., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 25th Nov., 1922; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1928; offg. supt., Nov., 1932; confid., May, 1937; O.B.E., June, 1936; asst. insprgen., May, 1937; senr. supt., Lahore, March, 1940; served under govt. of India (commns.), June, 1942, as motor transport offr.; dep. contr., road transport (war transport dept.), Aug., 1942; contr., Oct., 1944.

RUSSELL, JAMES MCCONNELL, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 28th July, 1909).—Educ. at Stranraer High Sch., Glasgow Univ. and Wadhham Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Dec., 1932, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-sec., fin. dept., Burma, Feb., 1935; asst. settlement offr., Oct., 1937; on mil. service, Nov., 1940.

RUSSELL, JAMES WILLIAM, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 2nd May, 1899).—Joined the service, 25th Oct., 1921; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1922; offg. exec. engr., May, 1927; confid., Oct., 1931.

RUSSELL, JOSHUA FORBES, O.B.E., India Service of Engrs. (ch. engr., Bengal) (b. 4th Feb., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 6th Apl., 1920; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1925; exec. engr., Oct., 1926; confid. as suptg. engr., Nov., 1942; ch. engr., Aug., 1944.

RUSSELL, LAWRENCE WALTER, Indian Police (asst. supt., Bihar) (b. 6th Jan., 1912).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 10th Nov., 1931; confid., Apl., 1933.

RUSSELL, ROBERT EDWIN, C.S.I., C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (advr. to govr. of Bihar) (b. 21st Apl., 1890).—Educ. at Campbell Coll., Belfast, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived, 13th Dec., 1913, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; on mil. service from Oct., 1915, to Apl., 1919; addl. under-sec. to govt., Bihar and Orissa, educn. and munpl. depts., Apl., 1919; offg. dep. commr., Oct., 1922; offg. sec. to govt. rev. dept., March, 1927; confid., July, 1928; mag. and collr., Nov., 1928; C.I.E., Jan., 1934; offg. ch. sec. to govt., Bihar and Orissa, Aug., 1934, to Sept., 1936; ch. sec. to govt., Bihar, March, 1938; advr. to the govr., Bihar, Nov., 1939; C.S.I., Jan., 1941.

RUSSELL, ROBERT TOR, C.I.E., D.S.O., F.R.I.B.A. (b. 2nd July, 1888).—Consulting architect, central p.w.d., Oct., 1933.

RUSSELL, STEVEN NOEL, O.B.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 24th Dec., 1908).—Educ. at King's Sch., Ely, and King's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-sec. to govt., pol. and appts. depts., Jan., 1936; O.B.E., June, 1941; under-sec., defence/war, govt. of India, Aug., 1941; addl. dep. sec. (war), Apl., 1943.

RUSSELL, THOMAS BRIAN, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Madras) (b. 15th Feb., 1888).—Retd., Dec., 1939.*

RUSSELL, SIR THOMAS GUTHRIE, K.C.S.I., K.C.I.E., B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian State

Rlys, (b. 19th Jan., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 21st Nov., 1913; resdt. engr., Sept., 1919; contr. of stores, Nov., 1923; dep. agent, June, 1925; offg. agent, May, 1927; ch. commr. of rlys., rly. bd., Oct., 1929; kt., June, 1932; K.C.I.E., May, 1937; dir.-genl., munitions production, and ex-officio addl. sec. to govt. of India, dept. of supply, Aug., 1940; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1943; ret'd., Jan., 1942.

RUSTAMJEE, K. F., B.Sc., (Hon.), Nagpur, Indian Police (b. 22nd May, 1916).—Appdt. asst. dist., supt., Cent. Provs. and Berar, on probn., 7th March, 1938.

RUSTOMJI, NARI KAIKHOSRU, Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 16th May, 1919).—Educ. at Bedford Sch., and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., after seln. in Aug., 1941, and served in Assam as asst. commr.

RUTHERFORD, SIR THOMAS GEORGE, K.C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (Governor of Bihar) (b. 25th Sept., 1886).—Educ. at George Watson's Coll. (Edinburgh), Edinburgh and University Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 1st Dec., 1910, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub. collr. and jt. mag., Sept., 1916; on mil. duty, from Nov., 1917, to Dec., 1919; special commr., agency operations, Apl., 1924; C.I.E., Jan., 1925; offg. collr. and dist. mag., Jan., 1925; collr. and dist. mag. (provl.), Aug., 1929; confd., Feb., 1930; offg. sec., p.w. and l. dept., Madras, Apl., 1934; offg. commr. of labour, Madras, March, 1935; offg. sec., home dept., Madras, June, 1936; offg. second sec. to govt., Madras, June, 1936; offg. inspr.-genl. of prisons, Madras, Nov., 1936; commr. of lab., Nov., 1937; sec. to govr., Apl., 1938; C.S.I., June, 1939; advr. to the govr., Oct., 1939; actg. govr., Jan., 1943; govr., March, 1943; K.C.S.I., March, 1943; actg. govr., Bengal, Sept., 1943 to Jan., 1944.

RUTHNASWAMY, MARIA DOSS, C.I.E., Barr.-at-Law, Principal, Law Coll., Madras, June, 1928; Member, Madras Public Service Commn., Jan., 1930.

RUTLEDGE, REV. JAMES WILLIAM RENWICK, M.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (b. 26th Aug., 1896) (senr. chaplain).—Appdt. chaplain on probn., Ch. of Scotland, Bombay, 10th Feb., 1928; junr. chaplain, Feb., 1930; senr. ditto, Feb., 1940.

RUTNAM, DONALD ROSS, O.B.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 19th Sept., 1901).—Educ. at Ceylon Univ. Coll., Colombo, and Trinity Hall, Cambridge; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1925; arrived, 31st Dec., 1925, and served in Bengal as asst. collr.; asst. commr., Central Provs., Aug., 1926; offg. dep. commr., Jan., 1929; on foreign serv. as admin., Bastar State, March, 1931; dep. commr. (provl.), Nov., 1937; confd., Feb., 1939; O.B.E., Jan., 1941; jt. sec. to govt. police, etc., depts., March, 1941; dep. sec., govt. of India (war transport), March, 1944; jt. sec., ditto, Oct., 1944.

RYALL, JAMES EDWARD, O.B.E., late Indian Police (Punjab) (b. 21st Oct., 1893).—Retd., March, 1936.*

RYAN, CECIL CRAWFORD LINDSAY, Maj., I.A., ret'd., late Indian Political Service (b. 13th Dec., 1897).—First commn. dated 30th Jan., 1917; joined the pol. dept., 21st May, 1923; vice-consul, Ahwaz, May, 1924; ditto, Duzdab, Oct., 1929; under-sec. to agent to govr.-genl., Punjab states, Dec., 1930; asst. to resdt., Kashmir, Nov., 1931; counsellor, British

legation, Kabul, Apl., 1934; sec. to pol. res. in the Persian Gulf, Nov., 1935; H.M. consul-genl., French estates in India, May, 1937. —Retd., Nov., 1941.

RYAN, G. C., Indian Police (b. 21st July, 1914).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., 22nd Nov., 1934.

SAADAT ALI KHAN, KHAN BAHADUR, AGHA, B.A., late Indian Police (b. 28th Nov., 1883).—Retd., Nov., 1938.*

SAADAT-UL-LAH KHAN, Indian Agricl. Service (dep. dir. of agric.) (b. 14th Apl., 1898).—Joined the service as dep. dir. of agric., Madras, on probn., 24th Jan., 1922; confd., Nov., 1922; agricl. offr., Quetta, Aug., 1932; dep. dir., agric., Madras, Dec., 1934.

SAADULLA, SIR MUHAMMAD, MAULVI SAJYID, Kt., M.A., B.L.—Member, govr.'s exec. council, Assam, 1st Apl., 1929, to March, 1934; chairman of cttee. on public accts., 1933-34; chief minister, Assam, Apl., 1937, to Sept., 1938; prime minister from Nov., 1939 to Dec., 1941, and from Aug., 1942; member, nat. def. council, July, 1941.

SABHARWAL, LAKHPAT RAI, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (consvr. Bihar) (b. 18th Aug., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 5th March, 1919; pers. asst. to presdt., forest research inst., March, 1936; consvr. of forests, Bihar, 1938.

SABIHUDDIN, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A., Barr.-at-Law, late Indian Posts and Tels. (Bihar and Orissa) (b. 16th May, 1886).—Joined the service as proby. supt., 17th June, 1907; confd., Sept., 1909; dep. p.m.g., Aug., 1937; Khan Bahadur, Jan., 1938.—Retd., July, 1941.

SABINE, HAROLD EDWARD, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 12th July, 1894).—Joined the service, 6th Dec., 1920, as proby. asst. supt.; confd., May, 1923; addl. supt., Jan., 1926; supt., Aug., 1926; asst. inspr.-genl., Oct., 1943; to Feb., 1944; Indian police medal, 1941.

SABNIS, TRIMBAK SITARAM, M.Sc., Indian Agric. Service (United Provs.) (b. 8th June, 1890).—Joined the service, 19th May, 1923; economic botanist, June, 1923; princpl. agric. coll., Sept., 1941; confd. in sel. grade, Apl., 1943.

SACHCHIDANAND, AKHAURI, M.Sc., Indian Police (see Akhaury, S.).

SACHDEV, MULK RAJ, O.B.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 12th Oct., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of the Punjab and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 5th Oct., 1928; arrived, Dec., 1928, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1933; O.B.E., June, 1942; dep. dir.-genl. (disposals), Oct., 1943.

SACHSE, SIR FREDERIC ALEXANDER, C.S.I., C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (Bengal) (b. 27th Feb., 1878).—Retd., Dec., 1937.*

SADASHIVA RAU, KALLE RAMA RAU, B.A., late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 16th July, 1884).—Retd., July, 1939.*

SADASIVAM, PILLAI, DORAIWAMI, Rao Bahadur, B.A. (Madras), B.Sc. (Tech.), Manch., A.M.C.I. (Manch.) (dep. dir. purchase) (b. 15th June, 1886).—Joined the service, 10th June, 1920, as asst. dir. of industries, Madras (tempy.); apptd. asst. dir. of purchase, Indian Stores Dept., Dec., 1922; dep. ditto, July, 1935.

SADDLER, JAMES, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 13th Sept., 1913).—Educ. at Foriar Academy and St. Andrews Univ.; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 9th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Dec.,

1938, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1940; under sec., home dept., Nov., 1941; under govt. of India infm. dept., Nov., 1942; dep. sec., civ. supplies, Dec., 1944.

SADASIVAM, TUMULURU RAMAKRISHNIAH, B.A., Finance Dept., Govt. of India (b. 27th Nov., 1892).—Joined the service as probir., 9th Feb., 1915; asst. contr., paper currency, Nov., 1916; asst. acct. genl., posts and tels., Madras, 24th June, 1921; asst. acct.-genl., Cent. Provs., Oct., 1921; as st. acct.-genl., posts and tels., Calcutta, March, 1922; dep. ditto, Oct., 1924; asst. dir. of army audit, W.C., March, 1926; ditto, S.C., May, 1927; audit offr., N.W.F.P., Feb., 1930; asst. acct.-genl., posts and tels., Delhi, Jan., 1931; dep. ditto, Jan., 1931; dep. acct.-genl., Bombay, Aprl., 1931; attd. offr., office of dir., rly. audit, May, 1932; offg. dir., rly. audit, Jan., 1933; offg. audit offr., L.B. and C.C., Aprl., 1934; comptr., Sind, Aprl., 1936; dep. dir.-genl., finance, posts and tels., Jan., 1937; acct. genl., Punjab, Aprl., 1939; acct.-genl., Bihar, Sept., 1939; on for. serv. (govt. of Burma), June, 1940, to June, 1942; acct.-genl. (confd.), cl. II, Nov., 1941.

SADHU RAM, CHAUDHRI, B.A., Indian Police (supt.) (b. 24th July, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 6th Oct., 1922; offg. supt., Feb., 1928; confd., March, 1934; King's police and fire service medal (bar to medal), Nov., 1940.

SADIQ ALI KHAN, AQA, late Indian Police (United Provs.) (b. 21st Jan., 1886).—Joined the service, 1st Nov., 1910; apptd. to I.P. as supt., Aprl., 1934; retd., July, 1940.

SADULLAH, ABUL MUZAFFAR, M.A., Indian Police (b. 28th Feb., 1915).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bengal, on probn., 11th May, 1938; confd., May, 1940.

SADULLAH KHAN, KHAN BAHADUR, late Indian Political Dept. (b. 29th Dec., 1880).—Retd., Dec., 1935.*

SAGREIYA, KAMPTA PRASAD, B.A. (Oxon), B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Central Provs.) (b. 10th Feb., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Central Provs., 27th Oct., 1927; dep. consvr., Dec., 1931; silviculturist, March, 1937, to May, 1943.

SAH, DEBI LAL (see Debi Lal Sah).

SAHAI, RAM CHANDRA (see Ram Chandra Sahai).

SAHAI, RAMESHWAR (see Rameshwar Sahai).

SAHAY, BHAGWAN, Indian C.S. (b. 15th Feb., 1905).—Educ. at Univ. of Allahabad and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, 10th Nov., 1929, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., March, 1931; dep. sec. to govt., United Provs., indus. bch. (temp.), May, 1936, and again, May, 1937; supt. of census oper. (prov.), Dec., 1939; sec., imperial council of agric. research, July, 1941; dep. sec. to govt. of India, dept. educn., health and lands, Jan., 1944.

SAHAY, JAYADEVA, M.A., Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 2nd Jan., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 30th Aprl., 1923; offg. addl. supt., Feb., 1932; supt., May, 1936.

SAHAY, VISHNU, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bombay) (b. 22nd Nov., 1901).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ., and Lincoln Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 23rd Oct., 1925; arrived, 7th Dec., 1925, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag.; offg. dep. commr.,

Aprl., 1928; offg. mag. and collr., Jan., 1934; confd., March, 1939; offg. regr., co-op. soc., United Provs., Aug., 1934; dir. of agric., June, 1939; sugar. contr. for India, Sep., 1944.

SAHGAL, AMRIT LAL, B.A., LL.B., A.C.A., R.A. (b. 20th Jan., 1904).—Joined the service, 21st Sept., 1935, as sec., Indian acc. bd. and ex-officio asst. sec. to govt. of India.

SAHGAL, HARA NARAYAN, late Indian State Rlys. (E.B. Rly.) (b. 21st Nov., 1886).—Asst. engr., Oct., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1919; exec. engr. (prov.), Nov., 1935; retd., Aprl., 1942.

SAHGAL, NAROTTAM, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 18th Nov., 1918).—Educ. at Bishop Cotton Sch., Simla, Punjab Univ., and Trinity Hall, Cambridge; apptd. on probn. after seln. in Aug., 1940, and served in Punjab as asst. commr.

SAHI, INDRA DEVA NARAIN, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr. and mag.) (b. 27th Sept., 1916).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1940, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.

SAHIB, ABDUR RAHIM (see Abdur Rahim Sahib).

SAHIB KHAN NOON, MALIK, M.B.E., Punjab C.S. (dep. commr.) (b. Nov., 1896).—Extra asst. commr., May, 1911; confd., Aprl., 1913; M.B.E., Jan., 1919; dep. commr., June, 1935.

SAHIB, MUHAMMAD SIRAJUDDIN (see Muhammad S.S.).

SAHIB, SAIVID ABDUL QADIR (see Saiyid Abdul Qadir S.).

SAHIB, SHARIF MUHAMMAD ALI (see Sharif, M. A. S.).

SAHIBZADA, AHMED KHAN, O.B.E., M.B., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. (ass. dir. gen.) (b. 15th Oct., 1891).—First commn. dated 1st March, 1922; in milty. employ to Aprl., 1925; civil medl. offr., Bannu, Aprl., 1925; ditto, Tochi Agency, Aprl., 1928; ditto, N. Waziristan, Nov., 1929; civil surgeon, Hazara, Feb., 1933; O.B.E., Jan., 1935; asst. dir. gen., I.M.S., Jan., 1944.

SAHNI, NARSING DASS M., B.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 12th Oct., 1900).—Joined the service, 9th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927.

SAID ULLAH KHAN, B.A. (Oxon), Barr., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 15th July, 1896).—Educ. at Chief's Coll., Lahore, and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 2nd Oct., 1922, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., July, 1927; dep. commr. (prov.), Aprl., 1929; confd., Nov., 1932; sec., med., etc., depts., Feb., 1941; addtl. commr., Nov., 1942.

SAIGAL, DEVI DAYAL (see Devi Dayal, S.).

SAIN, KANWAR LALA (see Kanwar Sain, L.).

SAING, U BA, Barr., late Burma Commn. (b. 9th Nov., 1881).—Retd., Nov., 1936.*

ST. JOHN, SIR HENRY BEAUCHAMP, K.C.I.E., C.B.E., Lieut.-Col., I.A. (ret'd.) (late Ind. pol. service) (b. 26th Aug., 1874).—Retd., Nov., 1930.*

ST. JOHN, OLIVER CHARLES BEAUCHAMP, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 22nd Oct., 1907).—First commn., 2nd Feb., 1928; in mil. employ prior to 1st June, 1931; under sec. to A.G.G. in Baluchistan, June, 1931; offr. on spl. duty, govt. of India, in home dept. (temp.), May, 1933; asst. pte. sec. to H.E. the Viceroy, May, 1933; under trng. in the United Provs., Nov., 1934; under sec. to the A.G.G. in Baluchistan, June, 1935; asst.

to the dep. A.G.G. in Baluchistan, July, 1935; asst. commr., Ajmer, Apl., 1936; on for service in Alwar State, from 1st Sept., 1936, to 18th Nov., 1936; asst. commr., Ajmer, Nov., 1936; under-sec. to A.G.G., W.I. States Agency, Jan., 1937; pol. agent, Sabar Kantha Agency, Sept., 1937; under-sec. to the resdt. for the States of W.I., Nov., 1937; pol. agent, W. Kathiawar, March, 1938; under-sec. to the resdt. for the States of W.I., June, 1938; asst. for Mekran to the pol. agent in Kalat and ex-officio comdt., Mekran levy corps, Oct., 1938; non-localised asst. pol. agent in Baluchistan, Nov., 1939; asst. commr., Mansehra, Oct., 1941; sec. to govt., N.W.F.P., Aug., 1943.

SAIYID, ABDUS SALAM (see Abdus Salam Saiyid).

SAIYID ABDUL QADIR SAHIB, B.A., late Indian Forest Service (Madras) (b. 15th Sept., 1885).—Joined the service, Dec., 1907; dep. consvr., Nov., 1925; retd., Sept., 1940.

SAIYID, ABDULLAH ABU (see Abdullah, A. S.).

SAIYID ALI AMIR, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Bihar) (b. 1st Aug., 1895).—Joined the service as appr. engr., 20th Oct., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1929; suptg. engr., May, 1942.

SAIYID AMINUDDIN, B.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (collr. and dist. mag., Bombay) (b. 21st Apl., 1895).—Educ. at Aligarh Collegiate Sch., and Downing Coll., Cambridge; joined the service 14th Dec., 1921; arrived, 6th Jan., 1922, and served in Bombay as asst. collr., offg. collr. and dist. mag., March, 1926; confd., July, 1936; settlt. commr. and dir., land records, etc., May, 1938, to May, 1940; again, Oct., 1944.

SAIYID, MUHAMMAD AHSAN QULI, Khan Bahadur, Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 1st July, 1884).—Held non-gaz. appt. to 30th June, 1921; dep. supt., 1st July, 1921; supt., 4th Feb., 1938; confd., 8th Nov., 1938.

SAIYID MUHAMMAD MASIH, late Bengal Jud. Service (b. 23rd Oct., 1885).—Apptd. dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1929; services placed at disposal of govt. of Assam, Feb., 1932; retd., Oct., 1940.

SAIYID MUHAMMAD SHU'AIB RIZAWI, Khan Bahadur, Indian Police, retd. (b. 11th Nov., 1885).—Retd., Nov., 1938.*

SAIYID MUJIBUR RAB, M.B.E., M.A., Indian Police (supt., Orissa) (b. 1st Sept., 1899).—Joined the service, 1st Nov., 1922; offg. supt., Feb., 1930; confd., Nov., 1932; M.B.E., Jan., 1931; transf. to Orissa, Feb., 1941.

SAIYID MUNIRUDDIN SIRAJUDDIN MAULVI, M.A., Bombay C.S. (collr. and dist. mag.) (b. 25th March, 1889).—Dep. collr., Jan. 1924; collr. and dist. mag., May, 1937.

SAJBA SHANKAR RANGNEKAR (see Rangnekar, S. S.).

SAKER, RICHARD KENNETH MAITLAND, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 30th Dec., 1908).—First commn., 30th Aug., 1932; in mil. employ prior to 15th Nov., 1933; under trng. under the A.G.G., Gujarat States, and resdt., Baroda, Nov., 1933; asst. mag. and collr., Meerut, June, 1934; under-sec. to A.G.G., Rajputana, Jan., 1936; confd., Apl., 1937; under-sec. to the rest. for Baroda and the Gujarat States, Nov., 1937; sec., March, 1939, to Apl., 1939; transf. to Quetta, June, 1939; under-sec. to A.G.G., rest., and ch. commr. in Baluchistan, July, 1939; under-sec., ext. affairs dept., Apl., 1940; Brit.

trade agent, Gyanse, June, 1941; pol. agt. for Kalat and Bolan Pass, Oct., 1944.

SAKSENA, BHAGWATI PRASAD (see Bhagwati, P. S.).

SAKSENA, NIGMENDRA SEN, M.A., Indian Police, United Provs. (b. 17th May, 1919).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., after exam. of 1940.

SAKSENA, PREM CHANDRA, Indian Police (b. 26th Dec., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Central Provs., 3rd Sept., 1925; offg. dist. supt., March, 1928; confd., Aug., 1941.

SALAHUDDIN AHMAD YUSUF, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bengal) (b. 28th Jan., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 4th Dec., 1925; dep. consvr., Nov., 1929.

SALAMAT ULLAH, HAJI MOHAMMAD, M.C., M.B., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., Jail Dept., United Provs. (inspr.-genl. of prisons) (b. 16th Dec., 1892).—Apptd. supt., central prison, Lucknow, 14th Feb., 1926; inspr.-genl. of prisons, United Provs., Feb., 1935.

SALE, JOHN FORD, M.A., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 20th Feb., 1884).—Retd., Dec., 1937.*

SALE, STEPHEN LEONARD, B.A., Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Lahore) (b. 30th Sept., 1889).—Educ. at Marlborough and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 30th Nov., 1914, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; on mil. duty from May to Aug., 1918; offg. dist. and sessions judge, Dec., 1922; provl. ditto, Sept., 1924; legal remembr. and sec., legisl. dept., Sept., 1928; addl. judge, high ct., Lahore, June, 1934; judge, ditto, Nov., 1939.

SALISBURY, ALAN JACK, B.A. (Oxon), Indian C.S. (regr., high ct., Patna) (b. 9th Apl., 1905).—Educ. at Christ's Hospital, St. John's Coll., Oxford, and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1929; arrived, 8th Nov., 1929, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and coll.; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1935; dist. and sess. judge, Aug., 1936; regr., high ct., Patna, Dec., 1943.

SALISBURY, ARTHUR GEORGE, India Office (suptg. exec. offcr., acct.-genl.'s dept.) (b. 29th Oct., 1885).—Educ. at Elizabeth Coll., Guernsey; apptd. 2nd class clerk, 16th July, 1906; minor staff clerk, Oct., 1915; staff clerk (acting), Apl., 1920; confd., Apl., 1921; higher exec. offr., Apl., 1922; suptg. exec. offr., March, 1927; apptd. assessor of inc. tax, March, 1927; actg. asst. acct.-genl., Jan., 1941; clerk to the commr. of inc. tax, March, 1941.

SALISBURY, REV. MARK, LL.D., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (senr. chaplain, Punjab) (b. 16th Oct., 1883).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., 12th Nov., 1921; junr. chaplain, Dec., 1923; senr. chaplain, Dec., 1933.

SALMOND, HUBERT GEORGE, C.I.E., Assoc.M.Inst.C.E., A.C.G.I., Indian State Rlys. (ch. govt. inspr. of rlys., comm. dept.) (b. 3rd Jan., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1911; in mil. employ from July, 1915, to June, 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; dep. dir., civil engrg., rly. bd.; offg. dep. ch. engr., Oct., 1932; dep. agent, works, E.B. rly., March, 1933; dep. ch. engr. (provl. perm.), Apl., 1938; on spec. duty, commrs. dept., Apl., 1941; transf. as ch. govt. inspr. of rlys., commrs. dept., May, 1941; C.I.E., Jan., 1944.

SALOWAY, REGINALD HARRY, O.B.E., Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 26th Oct., 1905).—Educ. at Exeter Sch., and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in the

United Provs. as asst. collr. and mag.; asst. commr., March, 1930; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1933; offg. dep. commr., Sept., 1935; offg. sec., bd. of rev., United Provs., Aprl., 1936; O.B.E., Jan., 1942.

SALTER, MALCOLM GURNEY, B.A., Indian Educl. Service (princpl., Daly coll., Indore) (b. 10th May, 1887).—Joined the service as asst. master, Daly coll., 26th Jan., 1913; on mil. duty from 5th Dec., 1916, to 29th Oct., 1919; princpl., Daly coll., July, 1930.

SALUSBURY, CHARLES VANNE, C.I.E., Indian C.S. (commr., Punjab) (b. 15th Feb., 1887).—Educ. at Magdalen Coll. Sch., and Hertford Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 27th Nov., 1911, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; city mag., Delhi, Sept., 1915; asst. coln. offr., Lower Bari Doab Canal colony, Aprl., 1916; on spl. duty for Upper Chenab Canal colony work, Lahore, June, 1917; on spl. duty, Punjab civil sec., Dec., 1917; on spl. duty on staff of lieut.-govr., March, 1918; dep. commr. (prov.), Feb., 1925; deputed to Bikaner State, Oct., 1929, to March, 1931; offg. sec. to govt., transf. depts., Punjab, May, 1932; offg. commr., May, 1934; and again, Aprl., 1936; offg. sec. to govt., Punjab, elec. and indus. dept., Jan., 1936; rev. and div. commr., N.W.F.P., Nov., 1936; commr. (perm.), Nov., 1941; C.I.E., Jan., 1942.

SAMLER, WILLIAM HADLEY GOODLIKE, M.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Punjab) (b. 18th Aprl., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 15th Dec., 1922; on dept. to Kashmir State from 31st Jan., 1924; dep. consvr., Oct., 1927.

SAMPSON, EPHRAIM OSWIN, M.B.E., late Indian Forest Service (Bombay) (b. 14th Aug., 1886).—Held non-gaz. appts. from 1st Aprl., 1907, to 23rd Dec., 1912; proxy. extra asst. consvr., Dec., 1912; extra asst. consvr., Aug., 1915; asst. consvr., Feb., 1925; dep. consvr., Feb., 1926; M.B.E., June, 1935; ret'd., Aug., 1941.

SAMS, SIR HUBERT ARTHUR, Kt., C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (Punjab) (b. 3rd May, 1875).—Ret'd., March, 1934.*

SAMUEL, GEORGE M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 26th Aug., 1908).—Educ. at Hamilton Academy, Glasgow Univ., and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1932; arrived in India, Dec., 1933, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-sec., defence dept., Aprl., 1937; served in Sind as dep. motor transpt. contr. Dec., 1942; provl. rationing auth., July, 1943.

SAMUEL, JOHN AUGUSTUS, C.I.E., B.A., LL.B. (Cantab.), Barr., late Bihar Provl. Ser. (b. 3rd Feb., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. to supt. and membr. of legal affairs, 24th July, 1917; asst. sec., legis. council, Jan., 1921; dep. sec., legis. dept., Aprl., 1924; sec., ditto, Aprl., 1939; C.I.E., Jan., 1943; ret'd., July, 1943.

SAN, MAUNG BA, B.A., Burma C.S. (cl. I) (asst. commr.) (b. 31st March, 1914).—Educ. at Rangoon Univ.; apptd. on probn., 1st Oct., 1937; confd., 5th Sept., 1938; arrived in Burma, Oct., 1938, and served as asst. commr.

SANDEMAN, RONALD FREDERICK, B.A., Dip., Forestry, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bombay) (b. 3rd Nov., 1897).—Joined the service, 10th Dec., 1923, as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Nov., 1925.

SANDERS, REV. HOROLD MARTIN, M.A.

(Oxon.), B.A. (Lond.), Eccles. Dept., Central Provs. (senr. chaplain) (b. 7th Jan., 1900).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., 3rd Feb., 1929; junr. chaplain, Jan., 1931; senr. chaplain, Jan., 1941.

SANDES, JOHN DRUMMOND, M.D., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 5th March, 1883).—prof., medical coll., Calcutta, Aprl., 1925; ret'd., Dec., 1935.*

SANDYS, ULRIC CAPEL, V.D., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 1st Dec., 1881).—Transfd. to Junagadh State Rly., 1936.*

SANER, ROBERT MORTON, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 30th Dec., 1911).—Educ. at Westminster and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1934; arrived in India, Oct., 1935, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; attaché, def. dept., Aug., 1940; under-sec., ditto, Oct., 1940.

SANGAL, HARA NARAYAN, B.A., Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., E.B. Rly.) (b. 21st Nov., 1886).—Asst. eng., Oct., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1919; exec. engr. (prov.), Nov., 1935.

SANJANA, BOMAN S., Dept. of Industries, Bihar (b. 18th Sept., 1887).—Apptd. prof., Bihar coll. of engr., 7th July, 1925.

SANJANA, KAIKOBAD EDALJI JAMSHEDJI, B.A., Barr., Khan Bahadur, late Central Provs. C.S. (b. 11th May, 1883).—Ret'd., May, 1938.*

SANJIVA RAO, BENEGAL, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 12th Dec., 1883).—Ret'd., Dec., 1938.*

SANJIVA ROW, KODIKAL, C.I.E., M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (member, federal public serv. commn.) (b. 18th March, 1890).—Joined the service, 3rd Sept., 1914; pers. asst. to contr. of currency, Jan., 1925; supt. fin. dept., Dec., 1925; asst. secty. to the govt. of India, fin. dept., Dec., 1932; offg. budget offr., fin. dept., variously from Aprl., 1931; confd., March, 1933; C.I.E., June, 1935; apptd. representative of the govt. of India, applicn. cttee. for the Indo-Burma finl. award, Jan., 1936; dep. sec., fin. dept., govt. of India, Aprl., 1936; addl. jt. sec., ditto, Aprl., 1937; jt. sec., fin. dept., govt. of India, Aprl., 1939; member, federal public services commn., Sept., 1940.

SANJEVI PILLAI, TIRUPATTUR GANGADHARAM PILLAI, M.A., Rao Bahadur, Indian Police (dist. supt.) (b. 28th Dec., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Madras, 1st Sept., 1922; offg. dist. supt., March, 1929; confd., Sept., 1932; supt., sel. grade, Oct., 1944; awarded Indian police medal, Jan., 1944.

SANKARA AYYAR, TIRUNELVELI SELLAMIER, C.I.E., B.A., B.E. (b. 1st Dec., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. examr., 17th Aug., 1909; asst. acct.-genl., United Provs., March, 1914; asst. auditor, N.W. rly., June, 1918; dep. auditor, E.B. rly., Oct., 1921; govt. examr. of accts., M. & S.M., and S.I. rlys., Nov., 1922; ditto, B. and N.W. and R. & K. rlys., July, 1924; divl. audit offr., N.W. rly., Nov., 1924; dep. acct.-genl., posts and tels., March, 1925; offg. dep. auditor, N.W. rly., Nov., 1926; asst. auditor, ditto, Dec., 1926; dep. ch. accts. offr., E.I. rly., March, 1928; offg. dir. of finance, rly. bd., Nov., 1930; confd., May, 1931; dir., rly. bd., Aprl., 1932; offg. finl. commr. of rlys., Oct., 1935; C.I.E., June, 1938.

SANKARA MENON, KIZHAKEPAT, B.A., Barr., late Madras C.S. (Judicial Bch.) (b. 21st May, 1881).—Ret'd., May, 1936.*

SANKARA NARAYANA, B. C., Barr., at-

Law; Judl. Dept., Madras (b. 25th Nov., 1893).—Master, high ct., Madras, Jan., 1941.

SANKARAN NAIR, KINATTINKARA, B.A., Indian Police, Madras (b. 20th Dec., 1920).—Appptd. asst. supt. on probn., after exam. of 1942.

SANSBURY, WILLIAM HENRY, late India Office (b. 16th June, 1882).—Appptd. 2nd class clerk, 20th Nov., 1902; minor staff clerk, Jan., 1919; higher clerical offr., Apl., 1922; actg. asst. supt. of records, Aug., 1940; retd., March, 1941.

SANSON, ADAM JOHN WALKER, M.C., late Indian Police (Bombay) (b. 28th May, 1897).—Retd., Nov., 1939.*

SANT PRAKASH SINGH, SARDAR, Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 1st May, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 14th Apl., 1920; offg. supt., Nov., 1926; confd., May, 1929; Indian police medal, June, 1941; asst. inspr. gen., rly. police, May, 1944.

SANT RAM, LALA, Rai Bahadur, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 5th May, 1880).—Retd., May, 1935.*

SANT SINGH, SARDAR BAHADUR, late Indian Police (Central Provs.) (b. 15th July, 1886).—Held non-gaz. appt. from 1st Jan., 1908; dept. supt. (temp.), March, 1923; Sardar Sahib, Jan., 1924; confd., Dec., 1925; Sardar Bahadur, Jan., 1935; on depn. to I.P. contingent at H.M.'s Coronation, March, 1937; dist. supt. of police, Cent. Provs., and Berar, May 1938; retd., July, 1941.

SANTOS, JOHN, B.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 19th Jan., 1890).—Joined the service, 2nd Nov., 1914; asst. acctnt.-genl., Sept., 1925; examr., outside audit, Bombay, June, 1926; offg. asst. sec., fin. dept., Apl., 1929; offg. under-sec., ditto, Nov., 1932; dep. acct.-genl., Bombay, Apl., 1933; services lent to the govt. of Bombay, March, 1936; compt. r., Sind, Oct., 1940; acct.-genl., Madras, March, 1941.

SANWAL, BHAIRAVA DAT, B.Sc., B.A., Barr.-at-Law, Indian C.S. (asst. commr.) (b. 25th March, 1917).—Educ. at Allahabad and London Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1941; served in United Provs. as asst. commr.

SAPRU, ANAND NARAYAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (collr. and mag., United Provs.) (b. 31st March, 1901).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ. and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1924; arrived, 23rd Dec., 1924, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr., jt. mag., July, 1927; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1928; services at disposal of A.G.G., Punjab States, for employment in Patiala State, Apl., 1931; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1932; offg. excise commr., United Provs., March, 1935, and inspr.-genl. of regn. in addn., Apl., 1935; collr. and mag. (confd.), Dec., 1938; dir. of indus., Oct., 1939.

SAPRU, SIR TEJ., Bahadur, P.C., K.C.S.I., LL.D.—Law member of govt.-genl.'s exec. council, 1920-23.*

SARAN, REDHA KANTA (see Redha Kanta Saran).

SARDAR SINGH, M.A., Indian Police (b. 1st Feb., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 27th May, 1927; offg. supt., Apl., 1933.

SARDARI LAL, MALHOTRA, LALA, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 2nd Dec., 1901).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 24th Oct., 1924; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1925; exec. engr., Oct., 1934.

SARDHANA, MADAN GOPAL (see Madan, G. S.).

SARDESAI, VIDYADHAR NARHAR, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 28th July, 1905).—Educ. at Univ. of Bombay and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1929; arrived, Dec., 1929, and served as asst. collr., Bombay; asst. judge, Sept., 1934; dist. and sess. judge, May, 1939, again, Apl., 1942; under govt. of India, legis. dept., May to Oct., 1940.

SARGENT, JOHN PHILIP, C.I.E., D.Litt., M.A., (educ. commr. with the govt. of India, and ex-officio, jt. sec., dept. of educn., health and lands) (b. 27th Dec., 1888).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch. (Foundation Scholar), 1903-08; Oriel Coll., Oxford (Open Scholar), 1908-12; organising inspr. of schs., E. Riding of Yorks. educn. cttee., 1913-20; assist. educn. offr., city of Birmingham, 1920-27; dir. of educn., Southend-on-Sea cty. borough, 1927-31; dir. of educn., county of Essex, 1931-38; apptd. offr. on specl. duty under the E.H. and L. dept., govt of India, Nov., 1938, to Jan., 1939; educn. commr. with the govt. of India, Jan., 1939; ex-officio joint sec., dept. of educn., h. and l., March, 1941; C.I.E., June, 1941; educn. advr. to govt. of India, Jan., 1943.

SARIN, HARISH CHANDRA, Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bihar) (b. 27th May, 1914).—Educ. at Govt. Intermediate Coll., Allahabad, and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 3rd Oct., 1938; confd., 9th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr.; under-sec., pol. and appts. dept., Sept., 1943.

SARKAR, BASANTA BIHARI, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 5th Aug., 1901).—Educ. at Univ. of Calcutta, Univ. Coll., London, and Jesus Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1926; arrived, Nov., 1926, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Dec., 1927; offg. dist. and sess. judge, March, 1932; offg. mag. and collr., Sept., 1933; jt. sec. to govt., co-op., etc., dept., Bengal, July, 1940; sec., comms. etc. depts., March, 1944.

SARKAR, BHABADEV, RAI BAHADUR, B.A., late Bihar C.S. (b. 16th May, 1883).—Retd., May, 1938.*

SARKAR, BINOD BIHARI, M.B.E., Rai Bahadur, Bengal C.S. (mag. and collr.) (b. 22nd July, 1888).—Joined the service, Dec., 1908; dep. mag. and dep. collr., Jan., 1912; mag. and collr., March, 1938; M.B.E., June, 1942.

SARKAR, HIRENDRA NATH, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal) (b. 18th Jan., 1905).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 1st May, 1928; confd., Sept., 1930; offg. addl. supt., Feb., 1934.

SARKAR, SIR JADU NATH KT., C.I.E., M.A., late Indian Educl. Service. —Joined the service, 30th June, 1898; prof. of history, Ravenshaw Coll., Cuttack, July, 1919; ditto, Patna coll., Oct., 1923; C.I.E., Jan., 1926; vice-chancellor, Calcutta Univ., 1926; kt. June, 1929.

SARKAR, PRAFULLA KUMAR, M.A., Indian Rly. Accts. Service (senr. accts. offr.) (b. 14th Sept., 1900).—Joined the service, May, 1926; accts. offr., Apl., 1929; sent ditto, Feb., 1936.

SARKAR, SUBODH CHANDRA, Judicial Dept., Bengal (judge, Calcutta small cause ct.) (b. 1st Sept., 1886).—Joined the service, 24th May,

1915; dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1928; judge, Calcutta small cause ct., Jan., 1934.

SARMA, ANANTANARAYANA, A.N. (see Anantanarayana, S. A. N.).

SARMA, DURGESHWAR, R.B., B.L., late Assam C.S. (b. 18th Feb., 1885).—Joined the service, 5th May, 1911; extra asst. commr., May, 1911, to 1924; sub-div. offr., 1924 to March, 1935; dep. commr., March, 1935; dir. of land records and commr. of income-tax, Assam, Apl., 1936; commr. of excise and regr., jt. stock coys., etc., March, 1939; retd., Feb., 1940.

SARMA, G. K., SESHADRI (see Seshadri Sarma, G. K.).

SARMA, TIRNOSTIYUR RAMASWAMI AIYAR VRIIDHAGIRI, B.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 16th Nov., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. examr., 12th Aug., 1907; asst. audit offr., July, 1920; dept. acct.-genl. (posts and tels.), Sept., 1920; audit offr., Bombay Development Scheme, May, 1923; dep. auditor, O. & R. Rly., Apl., 1924; asst. auditor, E.I. rly., Dec., 1925; govt. examr. of accts., June, 1928; offg. dep. auditor-genl., N.W. rly., March, 1928; dep. ch. accts. offr., N.W. rly., Apl., 1929; offg. dep. auditor-genl., Apl., 1931; govt. exr. of accts., S. & S.M. & R.I. rlys., Dec., 1931; ch. auditor, rly. clearing accts., July, 1935; ditto, N.W. rly., Apl., 1938; ch. auditor, G.I.P. rly. and govt. examiner of accts., B.B. & C.I. rly., Jan., 1939; ch. accts. offcr., E.I. rly., Sept., 1939.

SARRE, LIONEL W., Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 17th Apl., 1909).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Bombay, 18th Jan., 1930; confd., Aug., 1931; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1938; confd. as supt., Dec., 1940; dep. commr., C.I.D., Bombay, June, 1944.

SARUP SINGH, BHAI, Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Punjab) (b. 27th Apl., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 27th Nov., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1928; regr., p.w.d., Punjab, Dec., 1939; perm. suptg. engr., July, 1944; on dept. to Patiala State, Feb., 1944.

SASTRI, K. S. R. (see Ramaswami Sastri, K. S.).

SASTRI, MANDAKULATHUR PATANJALI, (judge, high ct., Madras).—Apptd. March, 1939.

SASTRI, S. KUPPUSWAMI (see Kuppuswami, Sastri, S.).

SATHE, DATTARAYA LAXMUN, M.A., B.Sc., late Indian Forest Service (Madras) (b. 27th May, 1889).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 14th March, 1914; dep. consvr., March, 1919; offg. consvr., Aug., 1933; confd., Jan., 1935; retd., May, 1944.

SATHE, DINKER DATTATRAY, B.Sc., B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr. and mag.) (b. 23rd Sept., 1918).—Educ. at St. Joseph's High Sch., Bangalore, Agra Univ., and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn. after seln. in Aug., 1940, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.

SATHE, JAGANNATH LAKSHMAN, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (advr. to govr., United Provs.) (b. 20th Apl., 1886).—Educ. at Bombay Univ., and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 8th Oct., 1910, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Apl., 1917; mag. and collr., Dec., 1924; employed as sec., bd. of rev., from Nov., 1923; offg. excise commr., Apl., 1927; confd., May, 1928; dir., bureau of statistics and economic research, Apl., 1932; sec., fin. dept., Apl., 1933;

confd. commr., Dec., 1938; C.I.E., June, 1943; advr. to govr., Dec., 1944.

SATHIANATHAN, WILLIAM RATNAM SAMUEL, Indian C.S. (sub. collr. and dep. mag., Madras) (b. 15th March, 1900).—Educ. at Madras Univ., Peterhouse Coll., Cambridge, and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1924; arrived, 15th Nov., 1924, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr., March, 1928; dir. of land records, Madras, Dec., 1931; collr. and dist. mag., June, 1934, again Aug., 1940; estate collr., Vizianagram, Oct., 1935; regr., co-op. societies, Jan., 1942.

SATTANATHAN, ARMUGA NAYAKAR, B.A. (Hons.), Imperial Customs Service (export trade contr., Calcutta) (b. 15th May, 1905).—Joined the service, May, 1928; asst. collr. of customs, 1929.

SATYANARAYAN CHOWDARY, CHELSANI, Rao Sahib, B.A., B.L., Jud. Dept., Madras (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 28th Nov., 1898).—Joined the service, Feb., 1937; apptd. dist. and sess. judge on probn., Feb., 1937; confd., Feb., 1938.

SATYAWADI, SHEO CHARAN, M.A., Indian Customs Service (collr. of customs) (b. 5th Nov., 1894).—Joined the service, 6th Oct., 1911; asst. collr., Oct., 1913; offg. collr. for customs, Chittagong; March, 1924; ditto, Rangoon, 1931; ditto, Calcutta, June, 1933; ditto (provl. perm.), Karachi, Sept., 1940; confd. as collr., May, 1941; export trade contr., Karachi, Nov., 1942.

SATYAMURTI, R., M.A., M.L. (master, high ct., Madras) (b. 1st Sept., 1889).—Joined the service, Jan., 1919; dist. munisff., Oct., 1922; asst. regr., July, 1930; dep. regr., July, 1934; master, March, 1938.

SAUDAGAR SINGH, RAI BAHADUR, M.A. B.L., late Bihar C.S. (b. 3rd Jan., 1885).—Joined the service, 14th Jan., 1913; sub-judge, Nov., 1929; offg. dep. regr., high ct., Patna, June, 1930; offg. regr., ditto, Jan., 1932; dist. and sess. judge, Aug., 1935; retd., Jan., 1940.

SAUDAT-UL-LAH KHAN, Indian Agric. Service (b. 14th Apl., 1898).—Joined the service as dep. dir. of agric., Madras, 24th Jan., 1922; with govt. of Baluchistan as agricl. offr., Quetta, Apl., 1930.

SAUMAREZ SMITH, WILLIAM HANBURY, M.B.E., Indian C.S. (under-sec., home dept., Bengal).—Educ. at Winchester and Trinity Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, 3rd Dec., 1934, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1936; under-sec., home dept., Bengal, Jan., 1938; under-secty. to govr.-genl. (public), Sept., 1940; M.B.E., 1943; addl. dep. sec., home dept., Aug., 1944.

SAUNDERS, CHARLES HUMPHREY AUGUSTUS, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 8th March, 1886).—Retd., Oct., 1939.*

SAUNDERS, RT. REV. CHARLES JOHN GODFREY, M.A., late Bengal Ecclesi. Dept. (b. 15th Feb., 1888).—Retd., Aug., 1940.*

SAUNDERS, CYRIL SIVWRIGHT, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 23rd Jan., 1887).—Retd., Aug., 1932.*

SAUNDERS, HENRY HUME, O.B.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 23rd June, 1888).—Retd., Dec., 1936.*

SAUNDERS, HOWARD FAUNLEROY, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (Madras) (b. 15th Apl., 1885).—Joined the service, 21st March, 1919; inspr. of schs., Feb., 1922; dist. educl. offr., Jan., 1923; addl. dep. dir. of public instr.,

Nov., 1927; dep. dir., Feb., 1932; offg. inspr. of European schs., Feb., 1932; offg. dir. of public instrn., June, 1935; inspector of European schs., Nov., 1936; retd., Apr., 1940.

SAUNDERS, JOHN ALFRED, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bihar and Orissa) (b. 28th May, 1887).—Retd., March, 1938.*

SAUNDERS, JOHN FREDERICK, B.A., Indian C.S. (sub. collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 21st Apr., 1910).—Educ. at Dunstable Gr. Sch., and Selwyn Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr., sub. collr. and jt. mag., Apr., 1937.

SAUNDERS, LAWRENCE EDWARD, late Indian Police (b. 27th Aug., 1889).—Retd., Aug., 1935.*

SAUNDERS, PERCY TUNSTALL, O.B.E., M.R.C.V.S., late Indian Vety. Service (Madras) (b. 8th Sept., 1884).—Retd., Sept., 1939.*

SAUNDERS-JACOBS, RUSKIN ATKINSON, B.Sc., Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., E.I. Rly.) (b. 20th May, 1897).—Joined the service, 19th Aug., 1921; asst. engr., Jan., 1924; exec. engr. (prov.), Apr., 1936; confd., Feb., 1939.

SAVAGE, GERALD ROBERT, Indian Police (b. 1st Aug., 1917).—Apptd. asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., Dec., 1937.

SAVARA, A. N. (see Amar Nath S.).

SAVIDGE, CECIL ARTHUR GRANT, M.B.E., M.A., Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 20th May, 1905).—Educ. at Aberdeen Gr. Sch., Univ. of Aberdeen, and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1929, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; asst. commr., Bannu, Apr., 1934; dep. commr., Bannua, Aug., 1935; asst. commr., Nowshera, Nov., 1935; ditto, Bannu, July, 1936; confd., Apr., 1937; under-sec. to govt. of India, ext. affairs dept., Oct., 1937; again, from Sept., 1938; dep. ditto, Aug.-Sept., 1938; asst. pol. agt. and asst. commr., Quetta-Pishin, Apr., 1940; M.B.E., Jan., 1941; on depn., 1941; and again, Nov., 1944.

SAVOOR, SNANKAR RAO ULLAH, B.A., D.Sc., Indian Educl. Service (princl. govt. collr., Kumbakonam) (b. 14th Jan., 1893).—Joined the service as profr., presdy. coll., Madras, 18th Feb., 1921; princpl., govt. coll., Kumbakonam, June, 1929; confd., Jan., 1936; offg. dep. dir. of public instrn., Apr., 1931.

SAWHNEY, DHAN RAJ, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 13th Dec., 1882).—Retd., Dec., 1937.*

SAYER, MICHAEL WYNNE, B.A., late Indian Agric. Service (b. 10th Sept., 1885).—Joined the service as supt. agriculturist, 20th March, 1914; sec., sugar bureau (temp.), March, 1921; offg. impl. agriculturist and jt. dir., May, 1934; confd., Jan., 1936; retd., Sept., 1940.

SAYERS, SIR FREDERICK, C.I.E., late Indian Police (Madras) (b. 22nd July, 1885).—Joined the service, 3rd Dec., 1906; asst. supt., 1908; supt., Nov., 1916; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1927; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., June, 1929; and again, March, 1933; confd., Aug., 1933; offg. inspr.-genl., Oct., 1936; C.I.E., May, 1937; commr. of police, Apr., 1937; inspr.-genl. (confd.), Jan., 1938; retd., July, 1940; kt., Jan., 1941; apptd. advr. to sec. of state for India, March, 1942.

SAYERS, RICHARD JOHN Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 12th Feb., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 13th Dec., 1923; dep. consvr., May, 1928.

SAYIED, ABDULLAH ABU (see Abdullah Abu, S.).

SCAMP, EDWARD, late Office of High Commr. for India (b. 27th Nov., 1881).—Retd., Nov., 1936.*

SCHOFIELD, SIDNEY CHARLES APPS, I.S.O., India Office (higher exec. offr., acctn.-genl.'s dept.) (b. 7th Feb., 1883).—Educ. at Allyn's Sch., Dulwich; apptd. clerk, 2nd class, acctnt.-genl.'s dept., 8th Nov., 1901; on mil. service from June, 1915, to July, 1919; services lent to office of chief commr., Baghdad, from July, 1919; resumed duty in acctnt.-genl.'s dept., Aug., 1920; staff clerk (actg.), Aug., 1920; confd., Apr., 1921; higher exec. offr., Apr., 1922; also assessor of inc. tax; I.S.O., June, 1938.

SCHUSTER, SIR GEORGE ERNEST, K.C.S.I., K.C.M.G., C.B.E., M.C. (b. 1881).—Educ. at Charterhouse (scholar), and New Coll., Oxford; barr.-at-law, 1905; served European War, 1914-18; ch. asst. to organiser of internatl. credits under League of Nations, 1921; member of advisory ctee. to Treasury under Trade Facilities Act, 1921-2; ch. of advisory ctee. to colonial sec. on E. African loans, 1926-28; K.C.M.G., 1926; finl. sec., Sudan Govt., 1922-27; member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council, Nov., 1928; K.C.S.I., June, 1931; member of Indian deleg. at Impl. Econ. conf., July, 1932; ditto, monetary and econ. conf., London, June, 1933; member, Indian res. bank ctee., July, 1933; vice-prest., govr.-gen.'s exec. council, Aug., 1933, to May, 1934.

SCOTLAND, PATRICK JAMES, M.A., late Indian C.S. (Bihar and Orissa) (b. 16th March, 1898).—Retd., June, 1935.*

SCOTT, ANDREW BENNETT, B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 25th Jan., 1913).—Educ. at Perse Sch., Cambridge, and St. Catharine's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 16th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1939; addl. dist. mag., May, 1942; mag. and collr., Oct., 1944.

SCOTT, ARCHIBALD GIFFORD, C.I.E., late Indian Police (Central Provs.) (b. 21st Apr., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Dec., 1909; dist. supt., Sept., 1921; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1931; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., Feb., 1934; confd., Dec., 1935; C.I.E., Jan., 1942; retd., Sept., 1944.

SCOTT, CHARLES PETER, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr. and mag.) (b. 30th Dec., 1917).—Educ. at Weymouth Coll. and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1939; confd., 27th Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.

SCOTT, CHARLES WINTER, O.B.E., D.F.C., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (consvr., Burma) (b. 7th Jan., 1892).—Joined the army in the summer of 1915, and reported his arrival at Rangoon on 13th Dec., 1919; asst. consvr., Feb., 1916; dep. consvr., Feb., 1921; O.B.E., June, 1932; forest economist, major products, Burma, July, 1933; jt. timber advr., rly. and army depts., Oct., 1934; timber advr. offr., rly. bd., Sept., 1936; consvr. (confd.), Feb., 1939.

SCOTT, FRANCIS BURGESS, Col., I.A., retd., late Survey of India (b. 3rd March, 1885).—First commn. dated 21st Dec., 1904; apptd. to I.A., 16th Feb., 1909; proby. asst. supt., Apr., 1910; confd., Oct., 1912; offg. dep. supt.,

Apr., 1919; confd., Aug., 1924; supt., Oct., 1926; offg. dir., Apr., 1936; confd., Nov., 1937; retd., March, 1940.

SCOTT, FRANCIS WILLIAM, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 9th Nov., 1886).—Educ. at Newcastle-under-Lyne High Sch., Jesus Coll., Cambridge, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 12th Dec., 1911, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1921; dep. commr. (prov., sub.), Aug., 1927; confd., May, 1928; retd., Dec., 1942.

SCOTT, GEORGE EDWARD, O.B.E., B.E., B.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Burma) (b. 10th Oct., 1884).—Retd., Oct., 1939.*

SCOTT, HENRY DONALD MORTIMER, Indian Police (sup., Punjab) (b. 17th Feb., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 15th Jan., 1920; offg. supt., March, 1926; confd., July, 1932; King's police medal, Feb., 1937; awarded bar to medal, Jan., 1938; Indian police medal, Sept., 1940; dep. dir., civ. defence, Jan., 1943; served under govt., Baluchistan, Apr., 1943.

SCOTT, HERBERT BODLEY, O.B.E., F.R.C.S.E., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., retd., late Burma Med. Dept. (b. 14th Dec., 1882).—Retd., Apr., 1937.*

SCOTT, IAN DIXON, B.A., Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 6th March, 1909).—Educ. at Queen's Royal Coll., Trinidad, Balliol Coll., Oxford, and Sch. of Economics, London; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; asst. commr., Bannu, Oct., 1935; asst. pol. agent, Chitral, Apr., 1936; asst. commr., Mansehra, Nov., 1937; confd. in Indian Pol. Serv., July, 1939; census supt., N.W.F.P., Dec., 1939; asst. dir. of intell., govt. of India, Peshawar, July, 1941; princpl., Islamia Coll., Peshawar, Jan., 1943.

SCOTT, JAMES ALEXANDER, O.B.E., Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl., Punjab) (b. 2nd Dec., 1895).—Joined the service, 20th Nov., 1915; on mil. duty from 26th July, 1916, to 4th Feb., 1919; asst. supt., Dec., 1920; supt., Dec., 1924; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1926; princpl., police trng. sch., Dec., 1929; O.B.E., Jan., 1931; sent: supt., Delhi, Oct., 1936; dep. inspr.-gen. (sub. perm.), Jan., 1943.

SCOTT, JAMES EDWARD, O.B.E., M.A., late Indian C.S. (Bihar and Orissa) (b. 13th Feb., 1882).—Retd., Sept., 1937.*

SCOTT, MURIEL ELENA, M.A., M.B.E., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 18th June, 1888).—Joined the service as asst. lecturer on educn., Univ. Coll., Rangoon, 2nd Apr., 1923; lecturer on educn., ditto, Nov., 1926; lecturer, teachers' training coll., Rangoon, Apr., 1931; retd., June, 1943.

SCOTT, SAMUEL GORDON AMAND, Indian Police (b. 25th Oct., 1914).—Apptd. asst. supt., Burma, on probn., 5th Dec., 1934; asst. supt. of police, Shan States, March, 1940.

SCOTT, SIR WALTER LAWRENCE, C.I.E., M.A., B.Sc., late Indian C.S. (Assam) (b. 7th Aug., 1880).—Retd., Dec., 1939.*

SCOTTER, HENRY HAROLD GORDON DILL, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 25th March, 1888).—Joined the service, 15th Oct., 1913; dist. loco. supt., E.B. rly., Oct., 1927; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr., Oct., 1934; retd., June, 1940.

SCOTT-SCOTT, DOUGLAS V.D., Indian State Rlys. (works manager) (b. 16th June, 1890).—Joined the service, 11th March, 1921; asst. works manager, Dec., 1928; works manager, G.I.P. rly., prov., Apr., 1935; confd. senior scale, Feb., 1938.

SCRIMSHAW, SYDNEY HENRY, Office of High Commr. for India (higher clerical off., accs. dept.) (b. 9th Apr., 1891).—Apptd. 1st July, 1925; transf. from the G.I.P. Rly. Co.

SCRIVEN, GEORGE WILLIAM, M.I.C.E., A.K.C., Indian State Rlys. (govt. inspr. of rlys.) (b. 24th Sept., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st June, 1915; exec. engr., Oct., 1922; trans. to comms. dept. as govt. inspr. of rlys., May, 1941.

SCROGGIE, HAROLD FORBES, O.B.E., Indian Police (supt., N.W.F.P.) (b. 14th Nov., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 15th March, 1921; offg. dist. officer, frontier constabulary, Jan., 1926; offg. supt., Nov., 1926; confd., Oct., 1931; dist. offr., frontier constab., Oct., 1934; O.B.E., June, 1942.

SCROGGIE, JOHN ADAM, O.B.E., Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 27th March, 1895).—Joined the service, 20th Nov., 1915; on mil. duty from 26th July, 1916, to 19th Jan., 1919; asst. supt., July, 1921; supt., Apr., 1925; O.B.E., Feb., 1937; asst. inspr.-gen., rly. police, Oct., 1939; supt. (sel. gr.), Dec., 1939; dep. inspr.-gen., Lahore, June, 1941.

SCRUBY, JOSEPH, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 26th March, 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1910; I.A.R.O., 25th March, 1915; exec. engr., Oct., 1918; offg. dep. ch. engr., N.W. rly., Oct., 1932; and again Oct., 1935; ditto (probl. perm.), Oct., 1935; confd., Apr., 1936; retd., July, 1940.

SEAL, AMARENDRA NATH, B.Sc. (Engineering, London) (engr.-in-chief, lighthouse dep. and ch. inspr. of lighthouses in British India) (b. 15th Jan., 1895).—Educ. at Presidency Coll., Calcutta, and Univ. Coll., London; joined service on 2nd March, 1931, as inspr. of lighthouses in British India; engineer-in-chief, lighthouse dept., and chief inspr. of lighthouses in British India, 25th March, 1938; confd., 7th Oct., 1938.

SEAL, BENOVENDRA NATH, B.A. (Cantab.), Barr., Indian Educl. Service (prof., Elph. Coll., Bombay) (b. 14th Apr., 1892).—Joined the service, 25th March, 1922; prof. of English and logic, Gujarat coll., March, 1922; doing duty as prof. of English, Karnatak Coll., Dharwar, Oct., 1925; confd., Feb., 1926; prof., Elph. Coll., Bombay, June, 1930; princpl. secondary trng. coll.

SEALE, HERBERT JOHN, A.M.I.B.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 9th Apr., 1881).—Retd., Apr., 1938.*

SEALY, WILFRED ARTHUR PRINCE, Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl., Bihar) (b. 27th May, 1886).—Joined the service, 2nd Dec., 1905, as asst. supt. of police; asst. to dep. inspr.-gen., Bengal, Sept., 1911; ditto, Bihar and Orissa, Apr., 1912; supt., Sept., 1914; persl. asst. to inspr.-gen. of police, Bihar and Orissa, Oct., 1918; recd. King's police medal; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., June, 1926; confd., Feb., 1931.

SEAMAN, REV. ALFRED JONATHAN, M.A. (name changed to Nix-Seaman), late Indian Eccles. Establt. (b. 14th Jan., 1886).—Retd., Nov., 1939.*

SEAMAN, CHARLES KENNINGALE, M.A., late Indian C.S. (Central Provs.) (b. 2nd Nov., 1888).—Retd., Nov., 1937.*

SEARLE, CARLETON STUART, M.C., Maj., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 29th Nov., 1895).—First commn. dated 8th Aug., 1914; joined the pol. dept., 13th June, 1923; asst. pol. agent, Chilas, July, 1924; asst. commr., Kohat, Oct., 1926; ditto D.I. Khan, Sept.,

1928; ditto, Tank, Nov., 1929; dep. commr., Dera Ismail Khan, Sept., 1930; senr. sub-judge, Peshawar, Apr., 1931; jt. dep. commr., Peshawar, July, 1931; pol. agent, Khyber, Jan., 1934; dep. commr., Dera Ismail Khan, Nov., 1938; pol. agent, Orissa States, Jan., 1939; pol. agent, Chagai, Nov., 1939; ditto in Kalat and ditto in charge of Bolan Pass, Apr., 1940; ditto in Zhob, Oct., 1941.

SEARLE, HUMPHREY FREDERIC, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Burma) (b. 1st March, 1888).—Retd., July, 1938.*

SEATON, EDWARD ALBERT, B.A., late Indian Forest Service (b. 3rd Apr., 1880).—Name changed from "Siltzler" by Deed Poll, May, 1927; retd., Aug., 1935.*

SEIN, MAUNG BA, T.P.S., Indian State Ry's. (statistical offr.) (b. 30th Aug., 1881).—Joined the service, 1st Aug., 1907; asst. engr., Burma Ry's., Apr., 1921; offg. statistical offr., Apr., 1925; confd., March, 1931.

SELVAM, AROGYASWAMI THAMARSELVAN PANNIR, RAO BAHADUR, BART.—Apptd. member of govr.'s exec. council, Madras, 16th Aug., 1934.

SELWYN, JOHN SIDNEY AUGUSTUS, M.B.E., Indian Police (asst. supt., Punjab) (b. 17th Oct., 1908).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Punjab, 20th Nov., 1928; transf. to N.W.F.P., Jan., 1930; confd., Nov., 1930; offg. dist. offr., Frontier constab., July, 1932; confd., Nov., 1935; M.B.E., Jan., 1939.

SEN, AMARENDRA NATH, Bengal Jud. Service (b. 13th May, 1891).—Apptd. dist. and sess. judge, Apr., 1928; judge, high ct., Calcutta, Nov., 1938; judge, ditto, Oct., 1942.

SEN, BHIM (see Bhim Sen).

SEN, BHUPATI MOHAN, M.B.E., M.A. (Cantab.), M.Sc., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 1st Apr., 1888).—Joined the service as profrr., Dacca Coll., 9th July, 1915; profrr., presdy. coll., Calcutta, Aug., 1923; principl., ditto, Aug., 1931; M.B.E., Jan., 1942; retd., Apr., 1943.

SEN, BINAY RANJAN, C.I.E., B.A. (Calcutta), Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 1st Jan., 1898).—Educ. at Calcutta and Oxford (non-coll.); joined the service, 31st Oct., 1922; arrived, 4th Dec., 1922, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; addl. dist. mag., Feb., 1928; offg. mag. and collr., Nov., 1929; addl. sec., pol. and appt. depts., Bengal, Nov., 1931; dep. sec., ditto, Nov., 1932; mag. and collr., Feb., 1936; sec., rev. dept., Bengal, Apr., 1940; dir. of civil evac., Apr., 1942; addtl. commr., Nov., 1942; dir.-gen., govt. of India (food), Aug., 1943; C.I.E., Jan., 1944.

SEN, GIRISH CHANDRA, Rai Bahadur, M.A., late Bengal C.S. (b. Sept., 1886).—Joined the service, Jan., 1910; dep. mag. and collr., Jan., 1912; mag. and collr., Oct., 1937; retd., Oct., 1941.

SEN, JYOTI LAL, M.C., M.B., Lieut.-Col. (ret'd.), late I.M.S. (b. 22nd Oct., 1883).—Retd., Oct., 1938.*

SEN, KARUNAKETAN, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 19th Nov., 1911).—Educ. at Narainganj High English Sch., Bengal, Calcutta Univ., King's Coll., London, and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1924; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1936; dep. contr., distrbn., civ. supplies, Feb., 1944.

SEN, KSHIROD CHANDRA, Rai Bahadur, B.E.,

late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 28th Dec., 1879).—Retd., Dec., 1935.*

SEN, KSHITIS CHANDRA, B.A., Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Bombay) (b. 5th Oct., 1888).—Educ. at Calcutta and Trinity Hall, Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived, 15th Nov., 1913, and served in Bombay as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. judge and addl. sess. judge, Nov., 1921; asst. membr. and sec. to legisl. council, Dec., 1923; off. judge and sess. judge, May, 1926; and again, Jan., 1928; confd., Jan., 1929; jt. judge and addl. sess. judge, Nov., 1926; regr., high ct. Bombay, Apr., 1928; offg. judge, high ct., Bombay, July, 1934, June, 1935, June, 1936, March, 1937, and Nov., 1938; offg. sec. to govt., legal dept., Bombay, Feb., 1935; confd., Dec., 1935; addtl. judge, high ct., Bombay, Nov., 1937; judge, high ct., Bombay, Aug., 1941.

SEN, KUMUD KANTA, M.A., Indian Audit Dept.
