(b. 26th Nov., 1896).—Joined the service, 20th Feb., 1922; examr., outside audit dept., Bengal, Apr., 1936; dep. dir., rly. audit, Apr., 1937; dep. acct.-genl., posts and tels., Delhi, July, 1938; dep. contr., rly. accts., June, 1940; ditto, supply accts., Dec., 1940.

SEN, MANMATHA NATH, RAI BAHADUR, B.A., late Bihar and Orissa C.S. (b. 15th July, 1880).—Retd., July, 1935.*

SEN, MONISHI MOHAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (b. 16th Dec., 1919).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1943 and served in Bengal.

SEN, NAKUL, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 14th Aug., 1910).—Educ. at Govt. High Schs., Delhi and Simla, Univ. of Delhi, and Magdalene Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 6th Sept., 1935; arrived in India, Oct., 1935, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; sub. divl. offr., May, 1938.

SEN, NALIN SANKER, M.A., Indian State Ry's. (dep. transport supt.) (b. 3rd Sept., 1893).—Joined the service, 1st May, 1917; asst. transpn. supt., G.I.P. rly., junr., Nov., 1922; ditto, senr., Jan., 1930; divl. transpt. supt., March, 1941; dep. ditto, Aug., 1943.

SEN, NALINI KANTA, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 27th Oct., 1895).—Joined the service, 26th Feb., 1920; asst. auditor, E.B. rly., May, 1921; divl. audit offr., N.W. rly., May, 1925; dep. acct.-gen., United Provs., Sept., 1932; asst. contr. of rly. accts., Dec., 1935; dep. acct.-gen., Burma, July, 1936; offg. acct.-gen., Burma, Oct., 1936; re-transfd. to India, March, 1939; dep. ch. accts. offr., N.W. rly., March, 1939; dep. ch. accts. offr., E.B. rly., Dec., 1939; ditto, E.I. rly., Dec., 1940; ditto, E.B. rly., Oct., 1941.

SEN, NARENDRA KUMAR, late Bengal C.S. (b. 5th Jan., 1881).—Retd., Jan., 1936.*

SEN, NARENDRA NATH (see Naendra Nath, S.).

SEN, PRANAB KUMAR, M.B.E., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal) (b. 11th Nov., 1912).—Apptd. on probn., 12th Feb., 1937; confd., Feb., 1939; M.B.E., Jan., 1943.

SEN, SACHINDRA NATH, M.Sc. (Cal. and London), Ph.D. (London), Meteorological Dept. (meteorologist) (b. 5th Dec., 1891).—Joined the service as meteorologist, 14th Sept., 1925; supt. ditto, March, 1943.

SEN, SAMARENDRANATH, B.A., B.Sc. Econ., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 10th Aug., 1914).—Educ. at Govt. Sch., Comilla, Calcutta Univ., Univ. Coll., London, and Univ. Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept.,

1938; confd., 7th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. magte. and dep. collr., May, 1941; addl. dep. dir., civ. supplies, March, 1944; reg. contr., procurement, Jan., 1945.

SEN, SISIR KUMAR, Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 3rd Feb., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of the Punjab, and King's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 20th Oct., 1927; arrived, Nov., 1927, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Apr., 1933; ditto, Assam, Jan., 1935; dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1937; confd., Nov., 1941.

SEN, SUKUMAR, B.A. (Cal.), Ind. C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 2nd Jan., 1898).—Educ. at Calcutta and London Univ.; joined the service, 30th Oct., 1922; arrived, 13th Dec., 1922, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1928; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1931; offg. ch. presy. mag., Calcutta, Apr., 1934 (confd., Dec., 1934) to Nov., 1937;

SEN, SURENDRA NATH (see Surendra Nath Sen).

SEN, SUSIL C., C.B.E.—Apptd. solicitor to the Central Govt. at Calcutta, Apr., 1937.

SENAPATI, NILAMANI, B.A., B.Sc., F.R.G.S., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bihar) (b. 19th Feb., 1897).—Educ. at Ravenshaw Coll., Cuttack, Patna Coll., and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 15th Jan., 1922, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. settl. offr., Nov., 1925; jt. mag., Jan., 1929; offg. mag. and collr., July, 1929; ditto (provl. subs.), Apr., 1936; dep. sec., pol. and aspt. depts., Bihar, Apr., 1939; jt. ditto and provl. press advr., Oct., 1939.

SEN GUPTA, ATUL CHANDRA, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 14th Feb., 1887).—Held temp. appts. from 21st Aug., 1917, to 10th Apr., 1919; profrr., Morris Coll., Nagpur (on probn.), Sept., 1920; confd., Sept., 1922; offg. princpl., ditto, July, 1932; confd., June, 1933; ret'd., Feb., 1942.

SEN GUPTA, BIRENDRA NATH, M.Sc., Indian Audit Dept. (b. Jan., 1896).—Joined the service, 21st Sept., 1920; asst. dir. of audit, Defence Services, E.C., Apr., 1936; dep. acct.-genl., central rev., May, 1938; asst. ditto, Apr., 1940; dep. acct.-genl., comm. and rev., Jan., 1941; comptr., Orissa, Nov., 1941.

SEN GUPTA, DEBENDRA NATH, B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bengal) (b. 31st Dec., 1888).—Joined the service, 26th Jan., 1914; asst. engr., Jan., 1915; exec. engr., Jan., 1924; suptg. ditto, Aug., 1937; ret'd., Dec., 1943.

SEN GUPTA, MANINDRA LAL, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Orissa) (b. 1st Sept., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 9th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., July, 1930.

SEN GUPTA, MOHIT KUMAR, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 4th Apr., 1894).—Joined the service, 27th Feb., 1919; asst. acct.-genl., Central Provs., July, 1925; dep. contr., Assam, May, 1929; dep. acct.-genl., central revs., Sept., 1932; audit offr., Indian stores dept., Feb., 1933; and again, Oct., 1935; offg. dep. dir.-genl. (finance), posts and tels., May, 1935; finl. advr. and sec., local reconstruction cttee., Quetta, Feb., 1936; finance offr., comm., June, 1939; again, March, 1940; finl. advr. to ch. commr., Delhi, Aug., 1939; again, June, 1940; finl. advr., communications, March, 1940; confd. as acct.-genl. (cl. II), Sept., 1944.

SENIOR, ARTHUR FAIRFAX, late Indian Police, Punjab (b. 7th Aug., 1897).—Ret'd., Sept., 1938.*

SENNECK, FRANCIS HARRY, late Indian C.S. (Madras) (b. 30th Dec., 1887).—Ret'd., Jan., 1939.*

SEPHTON, RALPH, B.A., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 8th Nov., 1882).—Ret'd., Sept., 1939.*

SESHADRI, MEENAKHISUNDARA, Indian C.S. (sub-collr., Madras) (b. 17th Jan., 1905).—Educ. at Univ. of Madras and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1929; arrived, Oct., 1929, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., Sept., 1932; city (1st class) mag., Madura, Jan., 1939, to July, 1939.

SESHADRI SARMA, GAVARPAT KRISHNASWAMI, B.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 6th Dec., 1892).—Joined the service, 4th May, 1914; asst. sec., govt. of India fin. dept., May, 1933; services placed at disposal of govt. of India, for. and pol. dept., Oct., 1935; under-sec. (common) to crown and extl. affairs depts., Apr., 1937; finl. advr. to ch. commr., Delhi, March, 1940; crown fin. offcr., May, 1944.

SESHAGIRI RAO, PAMIDI HANUMANTA, B.Sc., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 13th Jan., 1898).—Joined the service, 23rd Feb., 1922; on for. service under the Reserve Bank of India, March, 1935; dep. acct.-genl., Madras, Jan., 1938; ditto, Bombay, June, 1938; office of finl. advr., comms. att. to I.S. dept., Nov., 1940; ditto, under mil. fin. dept., Apr., 1940; dep. finl. offr., purchase, June, 1940; dep. contr. rly. accts., June, 1941; dep. ch. accts. offcr., E.I. rly., Oct., 1941.

SESHU AYYAR, ERODE RAMASWAMY, C.I.E., M.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 26th Oct., 1892).—Joined the service, 2nd March, 1914; asst. acctnt.-genl., Burma, March, 1916; asst. acctnt.-genl., posts and tels., Calcutta, May, 1917; asst. acctnt.-genl., Central Provs., Apr., 1922; dep. acctnt.-genl., posts and tels., ditto, Sept., 1925; dep. govt. examrr., accts., B.N. rly., March, 1931; offg. dep. dir., rly. clearing accts. office, Nov., 1932; offg. dir., ditto, March, 1933; offg. dep. ch. accts. offcr., E.I. rly., Feb., 1934; acctnt.-genl., Bengal, Oct., 1937; dir. rly. audit, Jan., 1940; confd. acctnt.-genl. (cl. I), Sept., 1942; C.I.E., Jan., 1945.

SET, MAUNG (see Maung Set).

SETALVAD, SIR CHIMANLAL HARILAL, Kt., K.C.I.E., B.A., LL.B.—Member of govr.'s exec. council, Bombay, Jan., 1921, to June, 1923.*

SETALVAD, MOTILAL C., B.A., LL.B.—Apptd. advocate genl. for the Province of Bombay, 12th Dec., 1937; ret'd., Sept., 1942.

SETH, JAGAT BIHARI, B.A., B.Sc., Indian Educl. Service (profrr., govt. coll., Lahore) (b. 23rd Sept., 1893).—Joined the service, 21st Oct., 1921; profrr., govt. coll., Lahore, Apr., 1922.

SETH, KUNJ BEHARILAL, M.A., B.Sc., LL.B., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 20th Nov., 1895).—Educ. at Morris and Hialop Colls., Victoria Coll. of Science, Nagpur, and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; apptd. by nomination in India; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 11th Jan., 1922, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., March, 1927; and again, Apr., 1932; offg. dist. and sess. judge, March, 1928; offg. senr. dep. regr., co-op. societies, Nov., 1934; dep. commr., March, 1937; revenue sec., Nov., 1938; ch. minister, Alwar State, July, 1942; prime minister, Kotah State, Dec., 1943.

SETHI, DAULAT RAM, C.I.E., M.A., B.Sc., Indian Agric. Service (dir. of agric., Bihar) (b. 25th Apl., 1891).—Joined the service, 30th Oct., 1914; dep. dir. of agric., Nov., 1914; offg. dir. of agric., Apl., 1932; confd., Aug., 1934; served as agric. mktg. advr. to govt. of India, June to Sept., 1938; dir. of agric. prodn. (food), govt. of India, March, 1943; C.I.E., Jan., 1945.

SETHI, RAM LAL, M.Sc., M.R.A.S., Indian Agric. Service (asst. agricl. commr.) (b. 20th Apl., 1894).—Joined the service as economic botanist to govt., United Provs., 19th Dec., 1921; asst. agricl. commr., Aug., 1937; confd. in sel. grade, Sept., 1941; cane commr., Sept., 1941.

SETHU RAO, KAIWAR (see Kaiwar, Sethu Rao).

SEWARD, HERBERT GREGORY, Indian Police (b. 12th Nov., 1908).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 24th Nov., 1928; confd., Nov., 1936; addtl. asst. to I.G. police, March, 1938; confd. as supt., Jan., 1942.

SEWELL, ROBERT BERESFORD SEYMOUR, C.I.E., M.A., F.A.S.B., F.L.S., F.Z.S., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., late Zoological Survey of India (b. 5th March, 1880).—Retd., March, 1935.*

SEYMOUR, ALMERIC HIGH, M.A., Indian C.S. (sec., govt., Burma defence dept.) (b. 23rd July, 1894).—Educ. at St. Edward's Sch., Oxford, and Worcester Coll., Oxford; on mil. service, Aug., 1914, to Oct., 1919; joined the service, 11th March, 1921; arrived, 20th Apl., 1921, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; asst. to commr., settl. and land records, July, 1923; supt. of colonization in addn. from July to Nov., 1924; jt. regr., co-op. societies dept., Jan., 1926; offg. dep. commr., Dec., 1929; confd., Jan., 1934; dep. sec., fin. dept., Burma, March, 1932; offg. sec. to govt. of India, reforms office, July, 1933; sec. fin. dept., Burma, March, 1934, and again, Jan., 1936; addl. sec. to govt., reforms office, Burma, Feb., 1936; offg. sec., ditto, June, 1936; sec., defence dept., Apl., 1937; sec., Burma def. council, Oct., 1939; contr. of supplies, Burma, June, 1940; sec., reconstrn. dept., 1944.

SEYS, STANLEY AUGUSTUS, M.C., India Office (higher exec. officer, accts. dept.) (b. 23rd March, 1890).—Served as sec. div. clerk, Scotch Educn. Office, Apl., to Oct., 1911, and in office of engr. in-chief, G.P.O., from Oct., 1911; appd. second class clerk, India Office, 25th Nov., 1912, and attd. to stores dept.; on mil. service from Aug., 1914, to Feb., 1919; transfed. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; transfed. to I.E. Tel. Dept., India Office, Feb., 1922; exec. offr., Apl., 1922; transfed. to mil. dept., Jan., 1927; higher exec. offr. and assessor of inc. tax, Jan., 1938.

SHADI LAL, SIR Rai Bahadur, Kt., P.C., M.A. (b. 12th May, 1874), late Punjab Judl. Service.—Retd., May, 1934.* P.C., March, 1934; member of judl. cttee. of P.C., May, 1934, to Nov., 1938.

SHAH, ABUL HASANAT MUHAMMAD ISMAIL, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal) (b. 13th Feb., 1905).—Appd. proby. asst. supt., 12th June, 1927; confd., Sept., 1929; offg. supt., Feb., 1934.

SHAH, AGHA SAIVID BAD, O.B.E., Major, I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 23rd Jan., 1903).—First commn., 30th Aug., 1923; in mil. employ to 21st Jan., 1930; asst. commr., Peshawar, Apl., 1932; asst. pol. agent, N. Waziristan, Feb., 1935, and again, Nov., 1933; ditto,

Mohmands, July, 1933; asst. commr., Thal, Apl., 1934; under-sec. to A.G.G., Punjab states, March, 1935; asst. pol. agent, Quetta-Pishin, Feb., 1936; pol. agent, ditto, June, 1937; offr. on special duty, Quetta, March, 1938; asst. pol. agent, Quetta-Pishin, Apl., 1938; asst. commr. Nowshera, Feb., 1939; ditto, Tonk, June, 1940; addtl. dep. sec., ext. affairs dept., Aug., 1940; dep. sec., ditto, Sept., 1941; O.B.E., Jan., 1943; counsellor, Brit. legation, Kabul, Dec., 1944.

SHAH, AMBALAL NAROTHAMDAS, B.A., LL.B., Barr., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Central Provs.) (b. 29th Sept., 1896).—Educ. at Bombay Univ., and Queen's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 9th Nov., 1921; arrived in India, 11th Dec., 1921, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., May, 1925; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1932; confd., June, 1934; legal sec., Feb., 1939 to Dec., 1943.

SHAH, ASGHAR ALI, M.B.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 3rd Apl., 1914).—Educ. at Punjab Univ.; appd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 19th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; M.B.E., Dec., 1943; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1940; under sec., rev. dept., May, 1943; dep. dir., textiles, Jan., 1945.

SHAH, BAGER ZAINULABIEDIN, M.R.C.S. (Eng.), L.R.C.P. (Lond.), Lieut.-Col., ret'd., late I.M.S. (Bombay) (b. 5th Apl., 1885).—First commn. dated 14th March, 1920, and served in the mil. dept. prior to 21st Apl., 1923; offg. civil surg., June, 1923; confd., Aug., 1927; supt. of Mahableswar, Oct., 1937; civil surg., Poona, March, 1938; transfed. to Sind, Apl., 1938; transfed. to Bombay, March, 1939; ret'd., Apl., 1940.

SHAH, HAMID MUKHTAR, Khan Sahib, B.A., Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 15th March, 1886).—Joined the service, 22nd May, 1909; appd. to I.P. as supt., Apl., 1935.

SHAH, JAKUB (see Jakub, S.).

SHAH, JELAL MOOCHOO, O.B.E., M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., Lieut.-Col. I.M.S., ret'd. (Bombay) (b. 17th Jan., 1886).—Served in mil. dept. prior to 16th Oct., 1922; M.B.E., Sept., 1921; offg. dy. asst. dir.-genl., I.M. Services, Oct., 1922; offg. pers. asst. to surg.-genl. with govt. of Bombay, June, 1924; confd., May, 1926; specialist in venereal disease, Apl., 1931; O.B.E., June, 1943; ret'd., Jan., 1941.

SHAH, KUNWAR PRATAP BIKRAM (see Pratap Bikram Shah K.).

SHAH, MAZHAR HUSSAIN, M.B., B.S., M.R.C.P., M.R.C.S., D.P.H., Major, I.M.S. (b. 3rd June, 1902).—First commn., dated 30th Apl., 1931; mil. employ prior to 16th Oct., 1937, when he was appd. civil surg.; in temp. mil. employ from Sept., 1941.

SHAH, NATVERAL BALUBHAI, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Sind) (b. 22nd Sept., 1900).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 8th Oct., 1923; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1924; offg. exec. engr., June, 1933; confd., Oct., 1933.

SHAH, POPATLAL GOBINDLAL, C.I.E., M.A., B.Sc., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 9th Dec., 1888).—Joined the service, 10th March, 1914; asst. acctnt.-genl., Nov., 1917; dep. acctnt.-gen., Madras, Apl., 1926; asst. ditto, Bengal, Dec., 1926; audit offcr., Calcutta, May, 1927; dep. acct.-genl., Bengal, Aug., 1927; ditto, Bihar and Orissa, Jan., 1928; ditto, Bombay, Apl., 1929; offg. acct.-genl., Bombay, June, 1930;

dep. ch. accts. offr., G.I.P. rly., March, 1933; chief auditor, E.I. rly., May, 1938; ch. auditor, N.W. rly. and govt. examiner of accts, B. & N.W. rly., and R. & K. rly., Dec., 1938; acct.-genl., Bombay, Oct., 1939; C.I.E., June, 1944.

SHAH, SAIVID MAHMUD, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A., LL.B., late Indian Police Service (b. 31st March, 1878).—Retd., March, 1933.* M.B.E., Jan., 1934; O.B.E., Jan., 1942.

SHAH, YAKUB (see Yakub, Shah).

SHAHA, HIRA LAL, M.A., Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 10th Feb., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bengal, 13th July, 1925; offg. supt., July, 1931; confd., Aug., 1938.

SHAHAB, QUDRAT ULLAH, B.Sc., M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 26th Feb., 1917).—Educ. at Punjab Univ.; apptd. on probn., after exam. of 1940, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., served under Bengal govt., Feb., 1944.

SHAHAB-UD-DIN, MUHAMMAD.

SHAH, AGA, B.A., Indian C.S. (b. 25th Aug., 1920).—Educ. at Madras Univ.; apptd. on probn., after exam. of 1943, and served in Bombay.

SHAIKH, ABDUL HAMID, C.I.E., Lieut.-Col. I.M.S., Jail dept., United Provs. (inspr.-genl. of prisons) (b. 5th Feb., 1890).—First commn., dated 22nd Feb., 1921; in mil. employ prior to 30th Sept., 1927; supt., Oct., 1927; dep. dir.-gen., I.M.S., Jan., 1937; inspr.-genl. of prisons, Oct., 1940; C.I.E., June, 1942.

SHAIKH, MUHAMMAD ABDUL KARIM, M.A., LL.B., late Sind C.S., Judicial Branch (b. 28th Apr., 1885).—Held non-gazetted appts. from Nov., 1908 to Oct., 1911; sub-judge, Oct., 1911; offg. asst. judge, Apr., 1928; confd., Jan., 1930; offg. dist. and sess. judge, March, 1931; confd., Feb., 1934; retd., Apr., 1940.

SHAIKH, MUHAMMAD NAZIR J., B.A., LL.B., late Bombay C.S., Judl. Branch (b. 20th Jan., 1886).—Held various judl. appts. from Dec., 1927; asst. judge, 26th May, 1929; offg. judge and sess. judge, Oct., 1929, June, 1930, and Dec., 1930; confd., Dec., 1933; retd., Jan., 1941.

SHAIKH YAKUB VAZIR MUHAMMAD, Khan Bahadur, M.B.E., B.A., late Bombay C.S. (b. 11th Apr., 1883).—Retd., June, 1937.*

SHAIKH, VAZIR ALI, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 23rd Feb., 1914).—Educ. at Punjab Univ.; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 15th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. magt. and dep. collr., Dec., 1939; dep. dir., civil supplies, March, 1944; regnl. contr., procurement.

SHAIN, MAUNG HLA, B.Sc., B.L., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 22nd Oct., 1905).—Educ. at Rangoon Univ. and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; joined the service, 20th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; dep. sec., dept. of agric. and forests, Oct., 1938; ditto, fin. dept., March, 1940; addtl. sec., fin. dept., Sept., 1940; dep. sec., ditto, Apr., 1941; offg. sec., ditto, June, 1941.

SHALOM, RALPH E., B.A., India Posts and Tels. (senr. dir.-genl.) (b. 3rd Aug., 1893).—Joined the service as proby. supt., Oct., 1914; confd., March, 1916; depy. postmaster-genl., Feb., 1939; senr. depy. dir.-genl., May, 1944.

SHAM LAL, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 11th Jan., 1900).—Joined the service, 20th Oct., 1922; apprentice engr., Sept., 1923; asst. exec. engr., March,

1924; offg. exec. engr., Sept., 1928; confd., Oct., 1932.

SHAM LAL, RAI BAHADUR, P.M.S., late Civil Surgeon, United Provs. (b. 26th Feb., 1886).—Civil surg., July, 1929; retd.

SHAM SINGH, RAI BAHADUR, B.A., Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. June, 1891).—Joined the service as proby. dep. supt., 1st Aug., 1913; confd., Nov., 1915; promoted to I.P.S. as supt., 1st Oct., 1930; awarded King's police medal, Feb., 1937.

SHAMALDHARI LALL, C.I.E., B.A. (Oxon.) Indian C.S. (jt. sec., govt. of India, lab. dept.) (b. 4th Oct., 1894).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Exeter Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1919; arrived, 13th Jan., 1920, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-sec. to govt. fin. dept., June, 1924; under-sec. to govt. of India dept. of industries and labour, Aug., 1925; offg. dep. sec., ditto, Nov., 1927; confd., Apr., 1928; jt. sec., commn. on labour, June, 1929; offg. mag. and collr., March, 1931; ditto (provl. subs.), Oct., 1933; dir. of industries and labour, Apr., 1933; sec. to govt., Bihar and Orissa, educn. and dev. dept., Apr., 1935; mag. and collr., Oct., 1935; dep. high commr. for India, May, 1938; C.I.E., Jan., 1941; sec. to govt. of India, lab. dept., March, 1944.

SHAMSHER SINGH, KANWAR, Indian Police (b. 23rd Oct., 1913).—Apptd. asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., 27th Jan., 1936.

SHAMSODDOHA, A. H. M. (see Abu Hamid Muhammad Shamsoddoha).

SHAMSI, SYED ZAHIRUDDIN, late Indian State Rlys. (N.W. Rly.) (b. 16th Sept., 1891).—Asst. traffic supt., Oct., 1913; divl. transpn. offr., May, 1935; retd., 7th Nov., 1944.

SHAMSUDDIN AHMAD, Khan Bahadur, B.L., late Bengal C.S. (b. Apr., 1881).—Joined the service, 3rd Sept., 1906; dep., mag. and dep. collr., Jan., 1908; inspr.-gen. of regn., Bengal, June, 1931.

SHAMS-UL-HASAN, Munshi, B.A., LL.B., late United Provs. C.S.—Retd., Apr., 1937.*

SHANBHAG, VISHWANATH BABURAO, Indian Police (b. 8th Oct., 1913).—Apptd. asst. supt. of police, Bombay, on probn., 14th March, 1938.

SHANKAR, VIDYA, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 27th Feb., 1909).—Educated at Dayanand Anglo-Vedic Coll., Cawnpore, Allahabad Univ. and St. John's Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 7th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; under-sec., Bombay (rev.), March, 1939; ditto, (fin.), Apr., 1940; under-sec., govt. of India (home), Sept., 1941; dep. ditto, Oct., 1943.

SHANTI PRASAD, M.Sc., Indian Police (b. 16th July, 1909).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., United Provs., 16th Jan., 1933; confd., Jan., 1935.

SHAPURJI, NASARVANJI JAMSHEDJI RATNAGAR (see Ratnagar, S. N. J.).

SHARAN, RADHA KABTA, B.A., B.L., Inc. tax Dept. (asst. commr.) (b. 19th June, 1886).—Joined the service, 11th Jan., 1909; dep. mag. and dep. coll., Aug., 1918; inc.-tax offr., Apr., 1925; asst. commr., Bihar, Aug., 1932.

SHARAN SINGH, LAL RAM, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 20th March, 1906).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ. and Jesus Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; on for. service as settlement offr., Chhattarpur State,

Dec., 1937; commr. of settlements, Aug., 1944; rev. sec., Sept., 1944.

SHARANGPANI, PRABHAKAR SHRIDHAR, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs., (exec. engr., Central Provs.) (b. 29th Jan., 1895).—Joined the service, 14th Sept., 1918; asst. engr., Sept., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1922; offg. exec. engr., May, 1926; confd., Sept., 1928; under-sec., p.w.d., Nov., 1937; supt. of works, July, 1943.

SHARBAT KHAN, Mir, Khan Bahadur, C.I.E., late Indian Political Dept. (b. 1880).—Retd., June, 1935.*

SHAREEF, AHMED ALI SAHIB, K.B., B.A., Madras C.S. (sub.-collr.) (b. 3rd Feb., 1890).—Joined the service, 7th March, 1914; dep. collr., May, 1931 sub.-collr., confd., (1st gr.), Dec., 1939.

SHARIF, MUHAMMAD, see Muhammad Sharif.
SHARIF, MUHAMMAD ALI SAHIB, B.A., Khan Bahadur, late Indian Police (b. 28th June, 1887).—Joined the provl. service as proby. dep. supt., 23rd Feb., 1912; confd., March, 1915; apptd., to I.P. as supt., 26th March, 1931; dep. commr., Feb., 1932; retd.,

SHARIFF, MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Shariff.).

SHARLING, ALFRED FRANCIS LESLIE, late Bihar C.S. (b. 1st Nov., 1886).—Retd., Sept., 1938.*

SHARMA, ASHA RAM, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Orissa) (b. 3rd Nov., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 29th June, 1925; dep. consvr., Jan., 1931; transf. to Orissa, March, 1939.

SHARMA, C. D.

SHARMA, DHYAN SWARUP, Indian Police (United Prov.) (b. 14th Jan., 1917).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Feb., 1940.

SHARP, ALEXANDER EASSON, B.Sc., M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 26th July, 1892).—Retd., Apl., 1938.*

SHARP, FRANCIS EVERARD, C.I.E., Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 5th Apl., 1890).—Joined the service, 22nd Nov., 1909, as asst. supt.; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1921; supt. and dep. commr. of police, Nov., 1922; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., Nov., 1935; supt. of police, G.I.P. & M. and S.M. rlys., Nov., 1938; C.I.E., Jan., 1942.

SHARP, SIR HENRY, Kt., C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A. (Oxon.), late Indian Educl. Service (Bengal).—Retd.*

SHARP, SAMUEL HENRY, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 7th May, 1882).—Retd., May, 1939.*

SHARPE, REGINALD TAAFFE, Barr., late judge, high ct., Rangoon.—Apptd., July, 1937; retd., May, 1939.

SHARPE, WILLIAM MCCORMICK, B.A., D.S.O., Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Calcutta) (b. 11th June, 1893).—Educ. at Cookstown Academy, Coleraine Academical Inst., and Trinity Coll., Dublin; on mil. service from Oct., 1914; joined the service, 17th Feb., 1920; arrived, 11th May, 1920, and posted to Bengal; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1924, and again, Sept., 1926; offg. registrar, high ct., appellate side, Apl., 1926; confd., Nov., 1928; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1927; confd., Sept., 1929; communal ratio offr., home dept., Bengal, Oct., 1939; judge, high ct., Jan., 1944.

SHARPLES, CHARLES NORMAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (collr. of customs, Karachi) (b. 29th Aug., 1909).—Educ. at Blackpool Secondary Sch. and Selwyn Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served

in Bombay as asst. collr.; offg. asst. rev. offr., L.B. and C. constrn., Jan., 1934; offg. dep. commr., March, 1936; asst. collr. (Impl. Customs Service), Bombay, Dec., 1936; ditto, Karachi, Nov., 1937; temp. under-sec. to govt. of India, commerce dept., Nov., 1938; dep. sec., ditto, Nov., 1939; collr. (confd.), Sept., 1939.

SHARPLEY, FORBES WILMOT, B.Sc., Ph.D., F.R.S.E., M.I.E.E., Indian School of Mines (b. 7th Jan., 1897).—Apptd. profir. of mechl. and electrical engrg. on probn., 28th Dec., 1926; confd., June, 1929.

SHATTOCK, JOHN SWITHUN HARVEY, M.B.E., B.A., Indian C.S., Indian Political Serv. (b. 21st Nov., 1907).—Educ. at Westminster and Christ Church, Oxford, and School of Oriental Studies, London; apptd. after exam. of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Apl., 1933; offg. under-sec. to govt., Bengal, pol. and appts. dept., Apl., 1934; asst. pte. sec. to govr. of Bengal, Nov., 1934; under-sec. to the Govt. of India, defence dept. and sec., Indian Soldiers' Bd., Nov., 1936; apptd. to Ind. political serv.; subst. and posted as offr. on spec. duty, W.I. States agency, Oct., 1939; sec. to resdt. for Baroda, etc., Sept., 1940; M.B.E., Jan., 1941; dep. sec., pol. dept., March, 1944.

SHAW, GEORGE ELLIOTT, B.Sc., F.I.C., F.C.S. (b. 4th March, 1872).—Joined the service as asst. quiniologist, 16th Dec., 1905; govt. quiniologist, Oct., 1917.

SHAW, JAMES O.B.E., B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Orissa) (b. 13th Sept., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bihar and Orissa, 1st Oct., 1926; offg. exec. engr., Jan., 1933; confd., Aug., 1936; O.B.E., Jan., 1941.

SHAW, JOHN, Burma Frontier Service (supt.) (b. 4th Sept., 1890).—Apptd. extra asst. commr., May, 1913; asst. supt. (B.F.S.), Nov., 1922; supt., Oct., 1935.

SHAW, JOSEPH, M.A., Barr., Judicial Dept., Burma (judge, high ct., Rangoon) (b. 4th Nov., 1886).—Apptd. asst. govt. advocate, Aug., 1918; addl. asst. sec., legis. council, Feb., 1920; offg. judge, small cause courts, July, 1920; asst. govt. advocate, Dec., 1922; judge, small cause cts., March, 1924; chief judge, ditto, May, 1926; acting judge, high ct., Rangoon, variously, from Nov., 1932; puisne judge, Jan., 1938.

SHAW, WILLIAM, M.B.E., late Assam C.S. (b. 5th Apl., 1889).—Joined the service, 4th March, 1909; dep. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1911; extra asst. commr., Dec., 1919; dep. commr., July, 1933; commr. of inc.-tax, Apl., 1940; M.B.E., Jan., 1944; retd., 5th Apl., 1944.

SHEARCROFT, REGINALD JAMES, M.B.E. (Commissary), Major, I.M.I. (establ. offr., Govt. of India, def. dept.) (b. 14th Jan., 1893).—Held mins. apptt. at A.H.Q., Feb., 1919 to Nov., 1934; first commn., 15th Nov., 1935; offr. supvr., Adjt.-Gen.'s Bch. A.H.Q., India, 15th Nov., 1935; apptd. establ. offcr. to govt. of India, def. dept., Aug., 1937; M.B.E., June, 1938.

SHEARER, JAMES GREIG, M.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (addl. judge, high ct., Patna; judge, Bihar) (b. 9th Jan., 1893).—Educ. at Dundee High Sch., Edinburgh Univ., and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1916; arrived 20th Dec., 1917; and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-sec. to govt.,

pol., &c., dept., Aug., 1920; offg. mag. and collr., Apl., 1924 and Feb., 1925; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1925, and again, May, 1927; offg. mag. and collr., Feb., 1926; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1927; offg. dist. and sess. judge, June, 1929; confd., Apl., 1932; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1934; regr., high ct., Patna, July, 1936; on for service, Rampur Durbar, Apl., 1939; addtl. judge, high ct., Patna, July, 1940; confd., Jan., 1943.

SHEARER, JOHN BURT, O.B.E., B.A. (Oxon.), M.A. (Glas.), Indian C.S. (commr. of inc.-tax) (b. 28th Dec., 1904).—Educ. at The Acad., Greenock, Univ. of Glasgow and Trinity Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 21st Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under-sec. to govt., Punjab, home and pol. depts., Jan., 1931; under-sec. to govt. of India, finance dept., Apl., 1933; first sec., central bd. of rev., May, 1935; dep. sec., finance dept., Govt. of India, Apl., 1937; on spec. duty, fin. dept., Apl., 1938; apptd. to fin. and comm. pool, May, 1939; commr. of inc.-tax, Oct., 1939; O.B.E., June, 1944.

SHEBBEARE, EDWARD OSWALD, late Indian Forest Service (b. 8th March, 1884).—Retd., Sept., 1938.*

SHEEHY, EDWIN, M.B.E., Indian Police, Bombay (b. 14th Sept., 1891).—Held non-gaz. appts. to May, 1926; prom. to I.P. as supt., May, 1941; dep. commr. of police, Aug., 1943.

SHEEHY, SIR JOHN FRANCIS, C.S.I., B.A., Indian C.S. (member, central bd. of revenue) (b. 12th Oct., 1889).—Educ. at St. Tarlath's Coll., Tuam; Natl. Univ. of Ireland (St. Patrick's Coll., Maynooth and Univ. Coll., Galway); apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 20th Oct., 1914, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; on mil. duty from Oct., 1917 to Jan., 1920; sec., dev. commn., Rangoon, March, 1922; dep. sec. to govt. (in addn.), Apl., 1924; asst. commr., inc. tax, Dec., 1926; offg. commr., Oct., 1928; confd., June, 1930; member, central bd. of rev., and ex-officio jt. sec., govt. of India, fin. dept. (cent. revs.), Apl., 1937; C.S.I., June, 1939; ditto, addtl. sec., Feb., 1943; kt., Jan., 1943.

SHEEHY, MICHAEL JOSEPH, C.B.E., B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Burma) (b. 20th Sept., 1893).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1920; asst. exec. engr., Feb., 1921; exec. engr., Nov., 1926; suptg. engr., confd., June, 1940; ch. engr., Dec., 1942; C.B.E., June, 1944.

SHEIKH, ABDUL LATIF, B.A., B.Sc. (Edin.), A.M.I.C.E., Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., N.W. rly.) (b. 1st Oct., 1888).—Joined the service, 3rd July, 1916; asst. engr., Jan., 1921; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1926; exec. engr. (provl.), March, 1938.

SHEIKH, MOIZZUDDIN, B.A., Indian State Rlys. (divl. comm'l. offr.) (b. 25th Aug., 1890).—Joined the service, 15th June, 1912; asst. dist. traffic supt., May, 1922; divl. transptn. (traffic comm'l.) officer, March, 1931; dep. genl. mang., Sept., 1941.

SHELDON, FELIX LUCIEN, M.A., LL.B., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bihar) (b. 7th Jan., 1915).—Educ. at St. Peter's Coll., Agra, Allahabad Univ., and St. Catherine's Society Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 8th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr.; addtl. dist. mag., June, 1944.

SHELLY, JAMES, M.C., late Indian Service of Engrs. (United Provs.) (b. 17th Nov., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 27th Nov., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Apl., 1922; offg. exec. engr., Oct., 1926; confd., Oct., 1927; pers. asst. to ch. engr., Nov., 1936; ret'd., 5th Feb., 1941.

SHELSWELL, OSCAR HENRY CLIVE, M.B.E., late Indian Forest Service, Madras (b. 22nd May, 1894).—Retd., Sept., 1938.*

SHENOY, JOSEPH PATRICK LASRADO, Indian C.S. (sub.-collr. and jt. mag.) (b. 29th Oct., 1907).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; joined the service, 13th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930; and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub. collr., March, 1933; commr., Madura Municipality, Nov., 1934; dep. sec., fin. dept., July, 1940 to June, 1943; ditto, public dept., June, to Aug., 1943; commr. corpn. of Madras, July, 1944.

SHEO ADHAR SINGH, P.M.S., late Civil Surgeon, United Provs. (b. 12th Oct., 1884).—Civil Surg., May, 1927; ret'd.

SHEO SINGH BEDI, SARDAR BAHADUR, BAWA, Indian Service of Engineers (exec. engr.) (b. June, 1886).—Joined the service as temp. engr., 21st Dec., 1908; asst. engr., Jan. 1923; asst. exec. engr., Jan. 1931; exec. engr., Sept., 1936.

SHEPHERD, GEORGE EDWARD, O.B.E., late India Office (b. 2nd May, 1875).—Retd., Oct., 1936.*

SHEPHERD, JAMES FORREST, M.B., Ch.B. (Aberd.), M.Ch. (Liv.), Major, I.M.S. (D.M.O., Madras) (b. 3rd Dec., 1899).—First commn., 29th Feb., 1924; in milty. employ until 3rd Feb., 1934; dist. medl. offr., March, 1934; confd. in civil dept. with effect from June, 1936; princpl., medical coll., etc., Vizagapatam, May, 1939.

SHEPHERD, WILLIAM SKINNER, M.A., late Indian Forest Service (b. 11th Nov., 1890).—Retd., Oct., 1936.*

SHEPPARD, ARTHUR LEWIN, M.B., F.R.C.S., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd., late Burma Medl. Dept. (b. 30th Apl., 1882).—Retd., Apl., 1939.*

SHEPPARD, FREDERICK AUGUSTUS BERRILL, O.B.E., M.B.B.S. (U. Melb.), F.R.C.S. (Edin.), Captain, I.M.S., Madras Medical Dept., (b. 21st Apl., 1904).—First commn. dated 2nd Feb., 1932; in mil. employ until Aug., 1936; dist. medl. offr., Sept., 1936; O.B.E., June, 1941.

SHERIDAN, A. M., Major, I.M.S. (civil surg., U.P.).—Date of first commn., Apl. 29th, 1929; civil surg., Sept., 1936.

SHERIDAN, SIR PHILIP CAHILL, Kt., C.M.G., late Indian State Rlys.—Retd., June, 1929.*

SHERRY, WALTER CAMPBELL, Office of High Commr. for India (exec. offr., store dept.) (b. 12th July, 1885).—Educ. at Dorchester Gr. Sch.; apptd. 2nd class clerk, 31st Aug., 1904; transfld. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; exec. offr., Apl., 1922.

SHETE, VENKATESH GOPAL, L.C.E., M.I.E. (Ind.), M.R.San.I., A.M.San.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 26th July, 1882).—Retd., July, 1937.*

SHETH, GUNENDRA LALBAI, B.Sc. Econ., Indian C.S. (asst. collr.) (b. 10th Nov., 1915).—Educ. at New High Sch., Ahmedabad, Univ. Coll., London, and Trinity Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1939; confd., 26th Aug., 1940; arrived in India, Nov., 1940, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

SHIELDS, ALFRED EDWIN, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 7th May, 1916).—Educ. at Stockton Sec. Sch. and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 13th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Dec., 1938, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

SHIELS, DR. T. DRUMMOND, M.C., M.P., Parly. Under-Secty. of State, June-Dec., 1929.

SHILLIDY, GEORGE ALEXANDER, C.I.E., late Indian Police (Bombay) (b. 7th March, 1886).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 22nd Nov., 1906; supt. of police, Dec., 1916; recd. King's police medal, Jan., 1922; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., Apl., 1927; ditto, March, 1929; confd., Apl., 1932; C.I.E., Jan., 1931; offg. inspr.-gen., Oct., 1935; confd., May, 1936; ret'd., Feb., 1941.

SHILLIDY, JOHN ARMSTRONG, C.S.I., B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bombay) (b. 6th June, 1882).—Ret'd., March, 1936.*

SHINDE, PANDURANO KRISHNARAO, B.A., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 2nd Dec., 1883).—Ret'd., Dec., 1938.*

SHIRLEY, GEOFFREY STANHOPE, late Indian Forest Service, Burma (b. 19th July, 1888).—Ret'd., Nov., 1939.*

SHIROLE, DINKARRAO ABURAO, B.A., Indian Police, Bombay (b. 1st March, 1903).—Joined April, 1928, as dep. supt.; Indian police medal, 1939; prom. to I.P. as supt., Jan., 1940.

SHIRRAS, GEORGE FINDLAY, M.A., F.S.S., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 16th July, 1885).—Educ. at Robert Gordon's Coll., Aberdeen, and Univ. of Aberdeen; apptd. to Indian educl. service as prof'r. of economics, Dacca Coll., 10th Apl., 1909; on special duty under govt. of India, finl. dep., May, 1910, to Apl., 1913; on special duty in office of dir. of public instrn., Bengal, Oct., 1913; ditto, March, 1914; dir. of statistics, govt. of India, from Apl., 1914; member of Bengal statistical cttee., Feb., 1918; member of Bd. of Agric. in India, 1918; dir., Bombay Labour Office, Apl., 1921; member, legisl. council, 1921, and again in 1924; supy. prof'r. of economics, Gujarat Coll., Ahmedabad, March, 1926; offg. princpl., Gujarat Coll., June, 1926; confd., Feb., 1930; ret'd., July, 1940; author of 'Some Aspects of Indian Commerce and Industry,' 'Indian Finance and Banking,' and articles on finance.

SHIRREFF, ALEXANDER GRIERSON, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 29th Apl., 1883).—Educ. at Merchant Taylors' Sch., and St. John's Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1906; arrived 9th Dec., 1907, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; regr. ct. of judl. commr., Oudh, Feb., 1913 to July, 1915; jt. mag., Jan., 1916; under-sec. to govt., United Provs., Apl., 1916; on mil. duty (I.A.R.O.), July, 1918 to Apl., 1919; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1919 to Nov., 1921; offg. mag. and collr., Nov., 1921; confd., Dec., 1923; offg. commr., March, 1935; provl. subst., Feb., 1938; advr. to the govt., Oct., 1942; confd. member, bd. of rev., Nov., 1942.

SHIVDASANI, HIRANAND RUPCHAND, O.B.E., B.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 9th Aug., 1904).—Educ. at Univ. of Bombay and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 28th Sept., 1928; arrived, Oct., 1928, and served in the United Provs. as asst. collr. and mag.; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1933; confd., Nov., 1941; O.B.E., Jan., 1944; ch. commr., Ajmer-Merwara, Dec., 1944.

SHIVDASANI, RAMCHAND TEKCHAND, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, United Provs.)

(b. 14th Nov., 1898).—Educ. at Bombay Univ. and London Univ. (Sch. of Economics); joined the service, 25th Oct., 1923; arrived, 11th Dec., 1923, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., May, 1927; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1932; offg. excise commr., Oct., 1933; offg. inspr.-gen. of regn. (in addn.), 1933; offg. dir. of indus., U.P., Feb., 1935; mag. and collr. (provl. subst.), Feb., 1938; confd. as dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1941.

SHIVESHWARKAR, SADANAND WAMAM, Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 1st March, 1912).—Educ. at Savantvadi High Sch., Bombay Univ. and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 14th Jan., 1937; arrived in India, Feb., 1937, and served in U.P. as asst. mag. and collr.

SHOOBERT, WILFRED HAROLD, C.I.E., Indian C.S. (dir.-gen., posts and tels.) (b. 7th June 1896).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch. and Christ Church, Oxford; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1920; arrived, 4th Dec., 1920, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.; services placed at disposal of Assam Labour Board from Apl., 1923 to March, 1924; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1925; confd., Nov., 1933; provl. supt., census operations, Apl., 1930; offg. commr. of settlements, etc., C.P., March, 1934; and again, Apl., 1936; services placed at disposal of govt. of India, indus. and lab., March, 1937; p.m.g., U.P. circle, May, 1938; senr. dep. dir.-gen., posts and tels., Aug., 1940; dir.-gen., ditto, March, 1942.

SHORT, REV. GEORGE MURRAY DAVIDSON, M.A., late Indian Ecclesl. Establ. (Madras) (b. 21st Dec., 1890).—Joined the service as junr. chaplain, 19th Dec., 1924; in mil. employ. from Feb., 1925 to March, 1926; senr. chaplain, Dec., 1935; ret'd., Jan., 1944.

SHORT, VIVIAN AUGUSTUS, C.I.E., late Indian Police (b. 30th Sept., 1883).—Ret'd., Jan., 1936.*

SHORTT, NORMAN ROBERT, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 14th July, 1883).—Ret'd., July, 1938.*

SHOVELLER, HAROLD LANGLEY, A.C.A., late income-tax dept., Bombay (b. 16th Jan., 1884).—Ret'd., Jan., 1939.*

SHRI SHRIDHAR NEHRU (see Nehru, S. S.).

SHRINAGESH, JAYAVANT MALLANNAH, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 1st Jan., 1905).—Educ. at West Buckland Sch., Barnstaple, and Trinity Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 2nd Oct., 1928; arrived, Oct., 1928, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr., offg. dep. commr., Oct., 1932, and again, March, 1933; addl. ditto, July, 1933; dep. sec., govt. of India, dept. of supply, Aug., 1941; ditto, labour, June, 1944.

SHRIVASTAVA, NIRMAL CHANDRA, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 1st Sept., 1913).—Educ. at Patwardhan High Sch., Nagpur, Nagpur Univ. and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 21st Sept., 1936; arrived in India, Oct., 1936, and served in the Central Provinces as asst. commr.; under-sec. to govt. of Central Provs., Apl., 1939.

SHROFF, SARVA DAMAN, B.Sc., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Madras) (b. 6th Nov., 1887).—Joined the service, 21st May, 1913; asst. engr., Oct., 1916; asst. sany. engr., March, 1917; asst. exec. engr., May, 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1925; ret'd., Nov., 1942.

SHUKLA, JANARDAN DATT, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., U.P.) (b. 1st July,

1915).—Educ. at Govt. High Sch., Lalitpur, Allahabad Univ., Queen Mary Coll., London, and Corpus Christi Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 11th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in U.P. as asst. mag. and collr.

SHUKUL, BADRI PRASAD, B.A., late Indian Police (Central Provs.) (b. 2nd May, 1885).—Retd., May, 1938.*

SHUKUL, PANDIT RAGHUBAR DAYAL (see Raghubar, D. S. P.).

SHULDHAM, WALTER FRANK QUANTOCK, Major, I.A., ret'd., late Indian Political Dept. (b. 17th June, 1892).—Retd., March, 1935.*

SHYAM SUNDER PRASAD, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bihar) (b. 1st March, 1903).—Joined the service as dep. consvr., Bihar and Orissa, 3rd Dec., 1926; divl. for offr., Bihar, May, 1944.

SI, U KA, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Burma) (b. 4th Apl., 1902).—Educ. at Calcutta and Rangoon Univs., and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; joined the service 29th Oct., 1925; arrived, 7th Dec., 1925, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-sec. to govt., local govt., dept., Nov., 1929; offg. dep. commr., July, 1932; confd., Feb., 1937; supt., census operations, Apl., 1940.

SIDDIQI, SHUJAAT ALI, M.A., Mil. Accts. Dept. (b. 9th Nov., 1902).—Joined the service as offr., cl. II, March, 1928.

SIDESHWARI PRASAD VARMA, C.I.E., M.Sc., late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 28th March, 1890).—Joined the service, 18th March, 1914; asst. acctnt.-genl., United Provs., Nov., 1916; asst. auditor, N.W. rly., Sept., 1918; ditto, O. & R. rly., Nov., 1921; dep. acctnt.-genl., rly., Oct., 1922; asst. auditor-genl., Jan., 1923; dep. acctnt.-genl., Central Revenues, Oct., 1923; on spl. duty for revision of postal and tel. codes, May, 1924; offg. finl. advr., posts and tel., May, 1928; services placed at disposal of Baroda durbar, Nov., 1929-May, 1930; ditto, rly. bd., May, 1930; dep. finl. advr., posts and tels., Nov., 1930; offg. finl. advr., posts and tels., March, 1931; member, standing finance cttee., Benares Hindu univ., March, 1933; finl. advr., posts and tels., Apl., 1933; C.I.E., Jan., 1936; fin. offr., posts and tels., July, 1936; attd. offr. in A.G.'s dept., U.P., Apl., 1937; acct.-genl., U.P., Apl., 1938; ret'd., Oct., 1941.

SIFTON, SIR JAMES DAVID, K.C.S.I., K.C.I.E., B.A. (Oxon.), late Indian C.S. (Bihar and Orissa) (b. 17th Apl., 1878).—Retd., Nov., 1937.*

SILVER, CECIL HERBERT, India Office (adm. offcr., for pol. intell.) (b. 28th Jan., 1886).—Educ. at Whitgift Sch.; apptd. clerk, 2nd class, 15th March, 1907, and employed in the registry and record dept.; transf. to judl. and public dept., May, 1914; resdt. clerk, Dec., 1916 to Aug., 1920; minor staff clerk, Jan., 1919; joint editor, India Office List, Nov., 1920 to May, 1926; actg. staff clerk, Apl., 1921; admin. offcr., Apl., 1922; sec. to Indian delgn. to 4th Internl. Labour Conf., Geneva, Oct., 1922; sec. to Indian delgn. to Internl. Passport Conf., Geneva, May, 1926; admin. offr. for pol. intell., June, 1937.

SILVESTER, COLIN NORMAN, Indian State Riys. (dep. ch., mechl. engr.), E.B. rly. (b. 25th Sept., 1895).—Joined the service, 10th Apl., 1920; asst. rolling stock offr., Dec., 1925; works mang., E.B. rly. (prov.), Aug., 1934; confd., Sept., 1936; dep. ch. mechl. engr., Jan., 1942.

SIMCOCK, ERIC, Office of High Commr. for India (higher exec. offcr., general dept.) (b. 15th July, 1895).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, 5th Aug., 1914; on mil. service from Oct., 1915; transf. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; higher exec. offr., June, 1927.

SIMMONS, CHARLES EDWARDS, late Indian Forest Service (b. 29th Jan., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Assam, 20th Dec., 1913; in mil. employ from 20th Oct., 1915 to 11th Jan., 1921; dep. consvr., Assam, Jan., 1921; on depn. to the forest coll., Dehra Dun, as instr., from Dec., 1921; offg. consvr., Assam, Sept., 1936; consvr., Bengal, Jan., 1938; ret'd., 28th Jan., 1944.

SIMMONS, EDWARD CLARE, Indian Forest Service (b. 26th Jan., 1899). (dep. consvr., Burma)—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 24th Dec., 1923; dep. consvr., May, 1928.

SIMMONS, JESSE JOHN (b. 12th Apl., 1886).—Joined the service, 17th July, 1912; supt. Bombay city police, 28th Oct., 1930; prom. to Indian police, 11th Apl., 1937; dep. commr. of police, Bombay, Apl., 1937; ret'd., May, 1941.

SIMMS, JOHN GERALD, O.B.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (collr. and mag., Bombay) (b. 6th Sept., 1904).—Educ. at Winchester and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; collr., Nov., 1939; under-sec., govt. of India, home dept., Nov., 1938 to March, 1943; O.B.E., Jan., 1944.

SIMPSON, EDWARD SKINNER, Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 31st Oct., 1897).—Joined the service, 3rd Sept., 1923; arrived in India, 2nd Nov., 1923, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1928; confd., Nov., 1932; regr., high ct., Calcutta, appellate aide, March, 1935 to July, 1937.

SIMPSON, JOHN ALEXANDER, C.I.E., M.A., India Office (jt. sec., mil. dept.) (b. 25th Nov., 1892).—Educ. at Robert Gordon's Coll., Aberdeen, and Aberdeen Univ.; apptd. junr. clerk, 15th Sept., 1919, and attd. to pol. dept.; resdt. clerk, Apl., 1920 to March, 1921; served with 14th Bn. co. of London Regt. (London Scottish), Sept., 1915 to Feb., 1916; 4th Bn. Gordon Hrs., March to Aug., 1917; and 124th Baluchistan Infy., Sept., 1917 to Aug., 1919; princpl., Apl., 1921; dep. clerk of council, June, 1931; actg. joint sec., mil. dept., Jan.-July, 1932; and again, Sept., 1934; confd., Apl., 1937; C.I.E., Jan., 1945.

SIMPSON, SIR JOHN HOPE, K.B.E., C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (N.W. Prov. and Oudh).—Retd., Dec., 1916.*

SIMPSON, SIR MAURICE GEORGE, Kt., C.S.I., M.I.B.E., late India Office and India Tel. Dept. (b. 3rd Nov., 1886).—Retd., from India Tel. Dept., Dec. 1914.*

SIMPSON, PATRICK, late Survey of India (b. 12th Feb., 1881).—Retd., Feb., 1936.*

SIMPSON, REGINALD HUGH, Indian Police (asst. supt., Sind) (b. 14th Aug., 1912).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt. of police, Bombay, Nov., 1933; confd., Apl., 1936; served in Sind from Oct., 1938; Indian police medal, 1942; asst. comdt., Sind police rifles, Oct., 1943.

SIMPSON, SYDNEY, late Indian State Riys. (b. 3rd May, 1885).—Retd., June, 1940.*

SIMPSON, WILFRID JAMES, M.B., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 4th Feb., 1885).—Retd., May, 1935.*

SIMS, ARTHUR MITFORD, C.I.E., B.Sc., Indian State Rlys. (ch. engr., N.W. Rly.) (b. 31st March, 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1911; on mil. duty from 30th March, 1916 to 8th Nov., 1918; exec. engr., Oct., 1920; offg. dep. ch. engr. (bridges), July, 1934; offg. dep. agent, N.W. rly., Apr., 1936; confd., Nov., 1937; dep. chief engr. (prov. perm.), Apr., 1938; ch. engr., prov., Oct., 1941; confd., Oct., 1943; C.I.E., Jan., 1943.

SIMS, FREDERICK, M.B.E., Public Works Dept., Bihar (b. 4th Feb., 1894).—Joined the service as electrical engr. and elec. inspr., 17th Oct., 1927; elec. engr. and elec. inspr. (confd.), Oct., 1939; M.B.E., June, 1941.

SINCLAIR, MALCOLM CECIL, O.B.E., Major, I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 25th Sept., 1899).—First commn., dated 1st Oct., 1918; in mil. employ to 7th Sept., 1920; asst. resdt., Aden, Oct., 1924; and asst. to resdt. in Kashmir, Apr., 1927; asst. resdt., Kolhapur, Mar., 1930; asst. commr., Manshera, Apr., 1931; dep. commr., Hazara, Apr., 1932; dep. commr., Bannu, Sept., 1932; civil sec. to ch. commr., Aden, Sept., 1935; civ. sec., dist. mag. and p'port. offr., Aden, Apr., 1937; again, Oct., 1937; O.B.E., June, 1938; Brit. trade agt., Gyantse, and asst. to pol. offr., Sikkim, July, 1940; pol. agt., Western Kathiawar agency, Sept., 1941; consul-gen., Pondicherry, Nov., 1944.

SINCLAIR, SAMUEL CHRISTINA, O.B.E., B.A., late India Posts and Tels. (b. 2nd Dec., 1882).—Retd., Dec., 1937.*

SINGH, AJIT (see Ajit Singh),
SINGH, BADAN (see Badan S.),
SINGH, BAKSHI (see Bakshi S.),
SINGH, BALWANT SHIHN (see Balwant Singh Shihn).

SINGH, BANAPHAR JANAKIRAM (see Janakiram Singh, B.).

SINGH, BAWA KARTAR (see Bawa Kartar Singh).

SINGH, BAWA RAMNICK (see Bawa Ramnick Singh).

SINGH, BRAJ BHUSHAN (see Braj Bhushan, S.).

SINGH, BUDH (see Budh S.).

SINGH, DALIP (see Dalip Singh).

SINGH, DALJIT (see Daljit Singh).

SINGH, DARSHAN (see Darshan Singh).

SINGH, DEVI (see Devi Singh).

SINGH, GURBACHAN (see Gurbachan, Singh).

SINGH, GURBAKHSH (see Gurbakhsh, S.).

SINGH, GURDIAL SUNDER (see Gurdial, S. Singh).

SINGH, GURMUKH (see Gurmukh Singh).

SINGH, HARI (see Hari Singh).

SINGH, JAGDEO, GAREWAL S. (see Jagdeo, S. G. S.).

SINGH, JASWANT (see Jaswant Singh).

SINGH, JHUNNA (see Jhunna Singh).

SINGH, JIWAN AMRIK (see Jiwan, A. S.).

SINGH, JOGENDRA (see Jogendra Singh).

SINGH, KAPUR (see Kapur, S.).

SINGH, KARAN (see Karan Singh).

SINGH, KARTAR (see Kartar Singh).

SINGH, KHARAK (see Kharak Singh).

SINGH, KUNWAR, BALBIR (see Balbir Singh, Kunwar).

SINGH, KUNWAR SHAMSHER (see Shamsher Singh, Kunwar).

SINGH, LAIQ (see Laiq Singh).

SINGH, LAL RAM SHARAN (see Sharan Singh, Lal Ram).

SINGH, LALLAN PRASAD, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collv., Bihar) (b. 1st July, 1912).

—Educ. at Queen's Intermediate Coll., Benares, Allahabad Univ. and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 21st Sept., 1936; arrived in India, Nov., 1936, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. cané commr., Nov., 1940.

SINGH, MAHARAJ KUNWAR (see Mahara Kunwar Singh).

SINGH, MALIK ANUP, M.B., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., Jail Dept., Bengal (insp.-gen.) (b. 22nd Sept., 1891).—First commn., 1st Nov., 1920; supt., central jail, Midnapore, Oct., 1929; ditto, presdy. jail, Jan., 1931; offg. inspr.-gen. of prisons, Bengal, Apr., 1934; and again, Nov., 1936; confd., May, 1937.

SINGH, MAN (see Man Singh).

SINGH, MOHAN (see Mohan Singh).

SINGH, NATHA (see Natha Singh).

SINGH, NAWAB (see Nawab Singh).

SINGH, NEHPAL (see Nehpal Singh).

SINGH, PARTAB (see Partab Singh).

SINGH, PRABH (see Prabh Singh).

SINGH, PRITAM, BRAR (see Pritam Singh, B.).

SINGH, RACHPAL (see Rachpal S.).

SINGH, RAJ NARAYAN (see Raj Narayan S.).

SINGH, RAM (see Ram Singh).

SINGH, REGINALD, late India Posts and Tels. (b. 5th July, 1889).—Joined the service, May, 1909; gazetted postmaster, Jan., 1924; presdy. postmaster, Madras, Sept., 1936; presdy. postmaster, Bombay, Jan., 1938; ret'd., July, 1944.

SINGH, RIPDAMAN (see Ripdaman, S.).

SINGH, SANT PRAKASH (see Sant Prakash, S.).

SINGH, SANT (see Sant, Singh).

SINGH, SARDAR (see Sardar Singh).

SINGH, SARUP (see Sarup Singh).

SINGH, SHAM (see Sham Singh).

SINGH, SHEO ADHAR (see Sheo Adhar Singh).

SINGH, SITAL (see Sital Singh).

SINGH, SUCHA, Indian C.S. (name changed to S. S. Khara, q.v.).

SINGH, TARA (see Tara Singh).

SINGH, TARLOK (see Tarlok Singh).

SINGH, TEJA (see Teja, Singh).

SINGH, TRIBENI PRASAD, M.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr.) (b. 21st Jan., 1918).—Educ. at Patna Univ.; apptd. on probn. after exam. of 1941; served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.

SINGH, TRIBHUBAN PRASAD (see Tribhuban Prasad Singh).

SINGHA, JAI RAJ (see Jai Raj Singha).

SINGLE, HERBERT STANLEY, M.A., late Indian Forest Service (Burma) (b. 6th March, 1893).—Retd., May, 1933.*

SINGLETON, PATRICK WILLIAM, late Impl. Customs Service (b. 1st Feb., 1884).—Joined the service, 5th Apr., 1905, as asst. opium agent (proby.); asst. opium agt., Nov., 1907; asst. collr. of custom., July, 1912; offg. collr., Rangoon, Jan., 1935; confd., July, 1937; ret'd., Feb., 1940.

SINHA, ALAKH KUMAR, C.I.E., O.B.E., M.A., late Indian Police (Bihar and Orissa) (b. 29th June, 1884).—Joined the service, 21st Feb., 1908; asst. supt., Jan., 1920; supt., Apr., 1924; O.B.E., June, 1926; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., March, 1936; awarded King's police medal, Feb., 1937; dep. inspr.-gen., Bihar, Aug., 1938; ret'd., 23rd Jan., 1940; C.I.E., Jan., 1941.

SINHA, AVADH KISHOR PRASHAD, Rai Bahadur, Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 16th Nov., 1896).—Joined the service, 2nd Jan., 1921; promoted to I.P. as supt., Feb., 1935.

SINHA, BABU NIRSU NARAYAN, M.A., B.L.

—Apptd. prest., Bihar and Orissa legisl. council, 21st Jan., 1931; member, govt.'s exec. council, Bihar and Orissa, Jan., 1934 to March, 1937; actg. vice-prest., ditto, Oct., 1934.

SINHA, BHUVANESHWAR PRASHAD (b. 1st Feb., 1899).—Apptd. judge, high ct., Patna, Oct., 1943.

SINHA, HARNANDAN PRASAD, Indian Serv. of Engrs. (b. 3rd Jan., 1906).—Apptd. as asst. exec. engr., United Provs., Jan., 1929; transfed. to the central public works dept., 1932; exec. engr., July, 1941.

SINHA, KALI PRASHAD, M.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bihar) (b. 1st March, 1897).—Educ. Calcutta Univ. and Queen's Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 1st Feb., 1924; arrived, 1st Feb., 1924, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., March, 1930; offg. addl. dist. and sess. judge, May, 1932; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1933; mag. and collr. (confd.), 1938; commr. of labour, Bihar, March, 1944.

SINHA, MADAN MOHAN (see Madan, M. S.).

SINHA, MITHILESH KUMAR, B.A., Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 30th Sept., 1903).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 23rd Apl., 1928; supt., March, 1940.

SINHA, RAM NARAYAN, R.B., Indian Police, Bihar and Orissa (b. 1st Feb., 1900).—Apptd. dep. supt., Nov., 1923; prom. to I.P. as supt., Jan., 1940; awarded Indian police medal.

SINHA, RAMA AKHANDALESHWAR PRASHAD, Indian Police (b. 29th Jan., 1913).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bihar, on probn., 27th Jan., 1936; confd., Apl., 1937.

SINHA, RAMANI MOHAN, B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bengal) (b. 19th Jan., 1886).—Joined the service, 25th Jan., 1910, and held non-gazetted appt. prior to 1st Feb., 1920; asst. engr., Feb., 1920; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1928; exec. engr., Jan., 1933; retd., Jan., 1941.

SINHA, ROMANI MOHAN, Indian State Rlys. (dep. ch. engr. (Signals)), (b. 22nd March, 1892).—Joined the service as asst. signal engr., 1st Nov., 1919; dist. signal engr., E.I. Rly., March, 1931; offg. dep. ch. engr. (signals), E.I. Rly., Nov., 1934; confd., Feb., 1935.

SINHA, SHIVA PRASAD.—Apptd. judge, high ct., Allahabad, Sept., 1944.

SINHA, SUDHIR KUMAR, Indian Police (b. Jan., 1910).—Apptd. proby. asst. supt., Bengal, 1st March, 1932; confd., Dec., 1935.

SINHA, HONBLE. SUSHIL KUMAR, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bengal) (b. 9th June, 1895).—Retd., Apl., 1937.*

SINHA, HON. TARU, B.A., Mil. Accts. Dept. (b. 9th Feb., 1899).—Joined the service as offr. in Cl. II, Oct., 1922; prmted, Cl. I, Nov., 1941.

SINTON, JOHN ALEXANDER, V.C., O.B.E., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., retd. (b. 2nd Dec., 1884).—Retd., Aug., 1938.*

SIRA JUDDIN AHMAD, B.Sc., LL.B., Indian Police (b. 1st Nov., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 29th June, 1925; offg. supt., May, 1929; and again, March, 1933; confd., Sept., 1939.

SIRCAR, SIR NRIPENDRA NATH, K.C.S.I., Barr., Bengal Judicial Dept.—Member, govt.-gen.'s exec. council, May, 1934 to Apl., 1939.*

SIRKAR, SATYA CHARAN, B.A., Indian State Rlys. (divl. transpn. offr., N.W. Rly.) (b. 1st Dec., 1897).—Joined service, Nov., 1919; asst. dist. traffic supt., junior scale, Nov., 1921; divl. transpn. (traffic commercial) offr., senior scale (provl.), Jan., 1939; confd., July, 1939.

SITAL PRASAD, B.Sc., late Inc. Tax Dept. (b. 7th May, 1892).—Apptd. asst. commr., United Provs., June, 1934; offr. on spec. duty cent. bd. of rev., Jan., 1940; dir. of insp., inc. tax, Sept., 1940; retd., Jan., 1943.

SITAL SINGH, M.A., Sardar Bahadur, late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 10th March, 1886).—Joined the service, 21st Nov., 1910, and held non-gazetted appt.; offg. supt., Jan., 1918; retd. to non-gazetted appt. from 2nd March, 1918; offg. supt., Jan., 1920; confd., March, 1922; asst. sec., Oct., 1922; offg. under sec., Apl., 1929; dep. acct.-gen., central revs., Dec., 1932; ditto, Punjab (works), Apl., 1936; retired, March, 1941.

SITZLER, EDWARD ALBERT.—Name changed by Deed Poll to SEATON, q.v.

SIVARAMA KRISHNAN, RAMANATH, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Madras) (b. 19th Oct., 1899).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and Jesus Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 27th Oct., 1924; arrived 8th Dec., 1924, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., July, 1927; sub-collr., Jan., 1928; dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1937; confd., Nov., 1937.

SIVARAMA KRISHNAN, SESHIAH, B.S., Indian Audit Department (b. 16th Apl., 1895).—Joined the service, 7th Aug., 1916; asst. acct.-gen., Bengal, Sept., 1936; special telephone rev. acctg. offr., Jan., 1937; asst. acct. gen., Central Provs., Aug., 1938; dep. acct. gen., Central Provs., Nagpur, March, 1939; Rao Bahadur, June, 1939; dep. acct. gen., posts and tels., Madras (in transit), Feb., 1942.

SIVARAMAN, BALARAM, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 10th Jan., 1912).—Educ. at Christian Coll. Sch., Madras Univ. of Madras, and the Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; posted to Orissa, Aug., 1937; served under govt. of India, pol. dept. at Ranpur Darbar, Feb.-March, 1939.

SIVA RAMAN, MANAKKAL SUNDARALINGAM IYER, Indian C.S. (sub-collr. and jt. mag. Madras) (b. 9th May, 1907).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; joined the service, 10th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr., Sept., 1932; spec. settlement offr., Apl., 1937; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Aug., 1937.

SIVASANKAR, TUMKAR, Indian C.S. (sec. develop. dept. Madras), (b. 14th Oct., 1902).—Educ. at Univ. of Mysore, Victoria Univ., Manchester, and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 21st Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., July, 1929; offg. dep. commr. of excise, Madras, Apl., 1934; sec. cent. road traffic bd., Apl., 1938; dep. sec. devel. dept., March, 1941; addtl. sec., ditto, March, 1943; sec., ditto, June, 1943.

SIVASANKARA MENON, KUMAR PADMA, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 18th Oct., 1898).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and Christ Church, Oxford; joined the service, 1st Nov., 1922; arrived, 13th Dec., 1922, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; under-sec. to resdt., Hyderabad, Feb., 1925; under-sec. to C.C. and A.G.G. in N.W.F.P., May, 1927; dist. judge, Peshawar, Apl., 1929; agent to the govt. of India in Ceylon, Oct., 1929; dist. and sess. judge,

Peshawar, Aug., 1934; offg. addl. dep. sec. to the govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, June, 1935; confd., Oct., 1935; offg. dep. sec., ditto, Sept., 1935; addl. dep. sec. to the govt. of India for. and pol. dept., Apl., 1936; ditto, external affairs dept., Apl., 1937; relief commr. for Baluchistan in addn., Apl., 1936; pol. agent, Zhoib, Nov., 1937; Dewan, Bharatpur State, Apl., 1940; C.I.E., Jan., 1943; pol. agt., W. Rajputana States, May, 1943; on spec. duty, govt. of India, external affairs dept., July, 1943; agt.-genl. for India, in China, Sept., 1943; and again, July, 1944.

SIVASWAMI AIYAR, SIR PAZHAMANHERI SUNDARAM AIYAR, K.C.S.I., C.I.E., B.A., B.L., member of exec. council, Madras, Feb., 1912 to Feb., 1917.*

SKEMP, FRANK WHITTINGHAM, M.A., late Indian C.S. (Punjab) (b. 13th Dec., 1880).—Educ. at Owens Coll., Manchester; apptd. after exam. of 1903; arrived, 10th Dec., 1904, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1923; addl. judge, high ct., Lahore, March, 1927; actg. ditto, Apl., 1927; addl. ditto from Nov., 1928; confd., Oct., 1933; ret'd., July, 1941.

SKINNER, ARTHUR FREDERICK, Office of High Commr. for India (higher executive offr.—store dept. (b. 28th May, 1887).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, 22nd Sept., 1906; on mil. service from Dec., 1916 to Feb., 1919; transfed. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; exec. offr., Apl., 1922; actg. higher exec. offr., June, 1929; confd., Nov., 1932; actg. princpl. ditto, Jan., 1940; actg. contr., July, 1941.

SKINNER, JAMES MACGREGOR, M.B., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 14th Apl., 1880).—Ret'd., Apl., 1935.*

SKINNER, PHILIP ERNEST FREEMAN, late Indian C.S. (Central Provs.) (b. 6th March, 1904).—Ret'd., March, 1936.

SKRINE, CLARMONT PERCIVAL, O.B.E., B.A., Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 28th Feb., 1888).—Educ. at Winchester, New Coll., Oxford, and University Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 25th Nov., 1912, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; temp. asst. pol. agent and asst. commr., Sibi, Oct., 1915; H.B.M.'s vice-consul at Kerman, Oct., 1916; H.B.M.'s consul for Kerman and Persian Baluchistan, Dec., 1917; prob., pol. dept., Jan., 1918; under-sec. to govt. of India, for. and pol. dept., Jan., 1920; pol. agt., Quetta, Apl., 1921; H.M.'s consul-general, Kashgar, July, 1922; sec. to agent to govr.-gen., Punjab States, July, 1926; H.B.M.'s Consul for Sistan and Kain, Apl., 1927; pol. agt. and dep. commr., Sibi, March, 1929; pol. agt., Kalat, March, 1932; and again, Dec., 1934; rev. and judl. commr. in Baluchistan, Aug., 1934; O.B.E., Nov., 1935; offg. resdt., Madras States, Nov., 1936; confd. as 2nd class resdt., Nov., 1938; on depn., 1941; consul-gen., Khorasan, Oct., 1944.

SLADE, MEAD, C.I.E., Indian C.S. (collr. of customs) (b. 25th Jan., 1894).—Educ. at Alminster Sch. and University Coll., London; on mil. service from Sept., 1914 to Oct., 1923; joined the service, 29th Oct., 1923, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; and asst. to commr. of settlmnt. and land records, May, 1925; offg. dep. commr., Feb., 1927; confd., July, 1932; asst. collr., customs, Calcutta, Apl., 1928; offg. collr., ditto, May, 1930; ditto, Rangoon, Nov., 1932; ditto, Bombay, Feb., 1934; offg. jt. sec. to the govt. of India, dept. of commerce,

June, 1936; temp. jt. sec., ditto, March, 1937; member, council of state, March, 1937; C.I.E., June, 1938; member, central bd. of rev. and ex-officio jt. sec. to the govt. of India, finance dept. (central revs.), Oct., 1938.

SLADEN, JOSEPH MAURICE, C.I.E., Indian C.S. (collr. and dist. mag., Bombay) (b. 22nd Feb., 1896).—Educ. at Winchester and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 27th Oct., 1920; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1920, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; offg. asst. pte. sec. to govr., May to Nov., 1922; offg. collr. and dist. mag., and pol. agent, March, 1925; asst. commr. in Sind and Sindhi translator to govt., March, 1928; jt. sec., Indian round table conf., London, 2nd session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; minister, Khairpur State, May, 1932; collr., March, 1936; sec., home dept., Bombay, March, 1938; offg. ch. sec., govt. of Sind, Jan., 1943; C.I.E., Jan., 1943.

SLATER, ALFRED, M.A., late Mil. Accts. Dept. (b. 25th June, 1887).—Joined the service as mil. acct., 2nd cl., Dec., 1909; D.M.A.G. (junr.), March, 1923; ditto (senr.), Feb., 1924; and again, March, 1929; dep. finl. advr., mil. fin., Feb., 1925; sec., army retrenchment cttee., Dec., 1931; confd., as cl. I offr., Dec., 1929; confd. as cmd. contr., Nov., 1934; senr. dep. finl. advr., Oct., 1939; ret'd., 2nd Jan., 1942.

SLATER, OWEN, M.C., Col. R.E., Survey of India (dir.) (b. 19th June, 1890).—First commn. dated 23rd July, 1910; asst. supt. (proby.), 20th Apl., 1920; confd., Oct., 1922; supt., May, 1928; dir., May, 1939.

SLATER, RICHARD MERCER KEENE, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 27th May, 1915).—Educ. at Eton, Magdalene Coll., Cambridge, and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 13th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Punjab as asst. commr.

SLATER, SAMUEL HENRY, C.M.G., C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (Madras) (b. 12th Jan., 1880).—Ret'd., Sept., 1935.*

SLATTERY, JOHN, C.B.E., late Indian Police (Punjab) (b. 26th June, 1886).—Ret'd., May, 1937*; chrnm., pub. serv. commn., Punjab and N.W.F. Prov., May, 1937; C.B.E., Jan., 1942.

SLEEM, M., Barr. (advocate-general, Punjab) (b. 14th Jan., 1892).—Apptd. advocate-general, 11th Feb., 1938.

SLOAN, SIR TENNANT, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., M.A., Indian C.S. (b. 9th Nov., 1884).—Educ. at Glasgow Academy and Glasgow Univ.; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 25th Nov., 1909, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag.; under-sec. to govt., Jan., 1915; asst.-supt., Dehra Dun, April, 1917; city mag., Lucknow, July, 1917; temp. addl. under-sec. to govt. of India, home dept., Sept., 1917; spl. duty, home dept., Nov., 1917; offg. under-sec. to govt. of India, home dept., May, 1918; on depn. to England, May to Oct., 1919; dep. sec. to govt., United Provs., March, 1921; offg. dep. sec. to govt. of India, home dept., March, 1924; jt. sec., ditto, Apl., 1925; sec. to govt., rev. and public wks. dept. (B. and R.), U.P., March, 1929; C.I.E., Jan., 1930; services placed at disposal of govt. of India, home dept., May, 1932; jt. sec. to the govt. of India, home dept., Apl., 1933; offg. sec., ditto, June, 1935; C.S.I., Jan., 1936; settlmnt. commr., Oct., 1936 to July, 1939; commr., Jan., 1939;

confd., May, 1942; advr. to the govr., United Provs., Nov., 1939; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1942.

SLOSS, DUNCAN JOHN, C.B.E., M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (Burma) (b. 20th June, 1881).—Retd., Dec., 1936.*

SMALL, GERALD AGNEW, B.A., late Indian Educl. Service (Assam) (b. 31st Aug., 1886).—Joined the service, 21st Apr., 1911; inspr. of schools, July, 1911; on mil. service from Apr., 1916 to May, 1920; offg. dir. public instrn., June, 1928; confd., Oct., 1931; retd., 1st Sept., 1941.

SMALLWOOD, ROBERT, Lieut.-Col., Indian Army (b. 25th Aug., 1893) (mil. accts. dept.).—Service in the Indian Army up to 25th July, 1935; joined mil. accts. dept. as an offr. in Class II, July, 1935; fin. sec., F.O.C., R.I.N., July, 1940; reverted to mil. accts. dept., Sept., 1941.

SMART, COLIN N. B., late Indian State Rlys. (G.I.P. rly.) (b. 18th Feb., 1885).—Joined the service, 7th Jan., 1921; resdt. engr., G.I.P. rly., Jan., 1926; statistical offr., March, 1932; retd., Feb., 1942.

SMART, ROBERT BROUGHTON, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 9th Apr., 1907).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, 17th Jan., 1930; confd., Jan., 1932.

SMART, WILFRID WILMOT, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bombay) (b. 10th Jan., 1876).—Retd., Nov., 1935.*

SMELLIE, BENJAMIN ALEXANDER, O.B.E., B.A., LL.B., late Central Provs. C.S. (b. 26th March, 1890).—Joined the service as extra asst. commr. on probn., 18th May, 1914; confd., July, 1915; ditto and under-sec. to govt., May, 1928; offg. dep. commr., March, 1930; confd., Feb., 1933; O.B.E., June, 1941; sec. to govt. (agric.), Oct., 1941; retd., 37th Mar., 1943.

SMITH, ARCHIBALD CLIFFORD, Indian Police (princpl., p.t. school, Burma) (b. 9th Oct., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., 7th Feb., 1921; dist. supt., June, 1924; awarded King's police medal, Feb., 1937; princpl., p.t. sch., Dec., 1936; transf. to mil. dept., Dec., 1939.

SMITH, BERTRAM GILBERT, O.B.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 4th Apr., 1883).—Retd., March, 1938.*

SMITH, CECIL CURTIS HAROLD, Major, I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 22nd Aug., 1898).—First commn. dated 26th Nov., 1915; in mil. employ up to 5th Apr., 1925; asst. pol. agent, Chilas, July, 1926; asst. commr., Thal, Sept., 1930; asst. commr., Thal sub-divn., Apr., 1931; dep. commr., Kohat, Nov., 1932; pol. agent, Kurrum, June, 1935; dep. commr., Peshawar, March, 1938; pol. agt. in Zhob, Nov., 1940; sec. to resdt., Punjab States, Oct., 1941; ch. min., Nabha State, Sept., 1944.

SMITH, CHARLES HAROLD, O.B.E., M.D., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. (retd.) (b. 19th June, 1883).—Retd., March, 1938.*

SMITH, DANIEL RICHARD, Major, I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 18th Jan., 1897).—First commn., dated 4th June, 1915; in mil. employ prior to May, 1923; asst. pol. agt., Bahrein, June, 1924; vice-consul, Duzdap, Nov., 1924; asst. for Mekran to pol. agt. in Kalat, Feb., 1927; pol. agt., Chagai, May, 1929; British trade agt. at Gyantse and asst. to pol. offr. in Sikkim, Sept., 1929; under-sec. to agt. to govr.-gen., Rajputana, March, 1930; offr. on special duty, Mirpur, June, 1932; pte. sec. to Maharajah of Rewa, Oct., 1932; pol. agt., Harasti and Tonk, Oct., 1933; asst. to resdt., Kashmir, March,

1934; pol. agt., Sabar Kantha Agency, Oct., 1937; pol. agt. and dep. commr., Sibi, Nov., 1938; consul, Zahidan, Oct., 1944.

SMITH, EDWIN CHARLES ALLAN, L.R.F.P.S., L.R.C.P. & S., D.P.H., Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. (asst. surg., Bombay) (b. 16th Nov., 1887).—First commn., 1st July, 1921; offg. asst. dir. of public health, Rangoon, Aug., 1926; offg. supt. central mental hosp., Yeravda, Nov., 1928; confd., Aug., 1929.

SMITH, EDWIN DENSHAM, late Indian Police (United Provs.) (b. 3rd Feb., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 25th Nov., 1906; supt., June, 1920; offg. asst. inspr.-gen., rly. police, June, 1931; retd., Feb., 1940.

SMITH, ERIC CONRAN, C.S.I., C.I.E., Indian C.S. (sec., home dept., govt. of India) (b. 3rd Dec., 1890).—Educ. at Dulwich Coll. and Corpus Christi, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived in India, 1st Nov., 1915, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; temp. empld. in jud. and public dept., India Office, from Apr. to June, 1919; pte. sec. to govt. of Madras, Apr., 1921; C.I.E., June, 1924; asst. for. serv. as commr. for Corp. of Madras, Oct., 1928; sec., local self-govt. dept., Madras, Oct., 1931; collr (provl. subs.), Feb., 1933; addl. jt. sec. to govt. of India in the reforms office, Oct., 1934; collr., Dec., 1934; offg. pte. sec. to Viceroy, June, 1935; addtl. jt. sec., govt. of India, reforms office, Aug., 1935; member council of state, Apr., to May, 1936; jt. sec. govt. of India, reforms office, March, 1937; addtl. ditto, home dept., Feb., 1938; confd. & jt. sec., home dept., Apr., 1938; jt. sec. to G.G. (public), June, 1938; sec., ditto, Oct., 1939; sec., home dept., govt. of India, Dec., 1939; C.S.I., Jan., 1942.

SMITH, FRANCIS ARTHUR, Indian State Rlys. (dist. loco. supt., E.B. Rly.) (b. 12th Jan., 1903).—Asst. loco. supt., Jan., 1926; dist. loco. supt., July, 1938.

SMITH, FRANCIS WILLIAM HEAD, C.I.E., India Office (actg. asst. under-sec. of state for Burma) (b. 18th Aug., 1886).—Educ. at Tor bridge, and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. junior clerk, India Office, 2nd Nov., 1909, and attached to fin. dept.; resdt. clerk, Dec., 1911 to Dec., 1912; asst. sec. to Rl. Commn. of Indian fin. and currency, May, 1913 to Feb., 1914; reading clerk to council, July, 1913; Apr., 1914; transf. to public works dept., Apr., 1914; senr. clerk, May, 1917; services temp. lent to mil. dept., Dec., 1914; actg. asst. sec. public works dept., Jan., 1920; confd., March, 1921; actg. joint sec., mil. dept., May, 1923; dep. clerk of the council, Apr., 1924; sec. to Rl. commn. on agric. in India, 1926-28; actg. sec., services and general dept., 1st Dec., 1928; confd., June, 1929; C.I.E., March, 1929; actg. asst. under-sec. of state, Jan., 1940; ditto for Burma, Dec., 1943; lent to min. of lab., July, 1940, to Dec., 1943.

SMITH, FRANK LOVELL, Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, United Provs.) (b. 15th Sept., 1904).—Educ. at Perse Sch., Cambridge, and Peterhouse Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; dep. supt. of census oprns., U.P., March, 1931; offg. addl. dist. and sess. judge, Sept., 1935; confd., Jan., 1940.

SMITH, FREDERICK WILLIAM JAMES, Office of High Commr. for India (exec. off., store dept.) (b. 25th Dec., 1893).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, India store depot, 6th Aug., 1914; on

mil. service from Jan., 1916 to Feb., 1919; transf. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; exec. offr., Apl., 1922; actg. higher exec. offr., June, 1940.

SMITH, G. CORLEY, M.B.E., Commerce Dept., Govt. of India (asst. sec.) (b. 12th June, 1895).—Joined the service, 1st Apl., 1913; supt., commerce dept., Nov., 1928; offg. asst. sec., commerce dept., Sept., 1930; confd., June, 1932; offg. admin. offr., central p.w.d., Apl., 1933; and again, Apl., 1935; asst. sec., comm. dept., Nov., 1935; offr. on special duty in Bombay Customs House, Dec., 1938, to Apl., 1939.

SMITH, GEOFFREY WILLIAM JOHN, Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 30th March, 1913).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Assam, Nov., 1932; confd., Nov., 1934; asst. to dep. commr., Naga Hills, Sept., 1937 to March, 1939; asst. comdt., 4th bn., Assam rifles, Apl., 1940, to Sept., 1941; asst. to d.i.g., Jan., 1944.

SMITH, HARRY PERCIVAL, B.A., Indian Forest Service (consvr., Assam) (b. 26th May, 1893).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 22nd March, 1921; dep. consvr., Dec., 1923; on deptn. to Andamans from Jan., 1926 to May, 1929; p.a. to consvr. of forests, Assam, Oct., 1935; timber dir., govt. of India, Apl., 1942, to Oct., 1943; senr. consvr., Nov., 1943.

SMITH, SIR HENRY MONCRIEFF, Kt., C.I.E., B.A. (Cantab.), late Indian C.S. (N.W. Provs.) (b. 23rd Dec., 1873).—Retd., Dec., 1932.*

SMITH, SIR HENRY SCOTT, Kt., Indian C.S. (ret'd.) (Punjab).—Retd., May, 1925.*

SMITH, HENRY WRAY SANDES, B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 13th Apl., 1884).—Retd., Apl., 1939.*

SMITH, HERBERT CECIL, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (consvr., Burma) (b. 27th Jan., 1893).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 21st Dec., 1915; dep. consvr., Jan., 1922; offg. consvr., Feb., 1936; confd., Feb., 1938.

SMITH, HERBERT ST. CLAIR, M.B.E., late Bombay C.S. (b. 9th June, 1880).—Retd., June, 1935.*

SMITH, IAN WILLIAM KNIGHTON, B.A., B.E., late Indian State Ryls. (b. 13th Oct., 1882).—Retd., Sept., 1939.

SMITH, SIR JAMES COWLISHAW, Kt., C.I.E., B.A., LL.B., late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 14th Apl., 1873).—Retd., Dec., 1931.*

SMITH, JOHN EDWARD, Indian Police (b. 14th Oct., 1907).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 14th Dec., 1927; offg. supt., May, 1934; confd., Oct., 1940.

SMITH, SIR JOSEPH BENJAMIN GEORGE, Kt., C.I.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 14th Feb., 1878).—Retd., Feb., 1933.*

SMITH, NORMAN PERCIVAL ARTHUR, C.I.E., O.B.E., Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 30th Nov., 1892).—Joined the service, Nov., 1912; supt. of police, June, 1924; offg. dep. dir., intel. bureau, June, 1933; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., Nov., 1935; cent. intell. offr., Bombay Presyd., March, 1936; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1938; dep. commr. police, Bombay, Aug., 1938; jt. sec., home dept., Bombay, Oct., 1939; O.B.E., Jan., 1941; C.I.E., Jan., 1944.

SMITH, RAPHL JEANRENAUD, M.B.E., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bombay) (b. 7th Sept., 1895).—Joined the service, 4th Dec., 1923, as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Nov., 1924; M.B.E., June, 1943.

SMITH, REV. RICHARD MARMADUKE LANGDALE, B.A., late Indian Ecclesi. Estabt. (Madras) (b. 29th Oct., 1884).—Retd., Sept., 1938.*

SMITH, ROBERT GEORGE, Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 28th July, 1907).—Apptd. asst. exec. engr., United Provs., 8th Feb., 1931; confd., Feb., 1933; exec. engr., Feb., 1940.

SMITH, WALTER ROBERT GEORGE, C.I.E., Indian Police (member, fed. pub. serv. commn.) (b. 5th Nov., 1887).—Joined the service, 11th Dec., 1908, as asst. supt.; supt. of police, March, 1921; dep. commr. of police, Bombay, Feb., 1932; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., March, 1932; offg. commr. of police, Bombay, July, 1933; confd., Apl., 1935; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1933; C.I.E., May, 1937; memb., fed. pub. serv. commn., Feb., 1942.

SMITH, WILFRED ARTHUR, O.B.E., late India Posts and Tels. (b. 30th Dec., 1882).—Retd., July, 1937.*

SMITH, WILLIAM ROSE, B.Sc., late Indian State Ryls. (b. 19th May, 1886).—Joined the service, 17th Sept., 1909; resdt. engr., G.I.P. rly., March, 1923; exec. engr., May, 1932; ret'd., Dec., 1942.

SMITH-PEARSE, THOMAS LAWRENCE HOWARTH, C.I.E., B.A., Indian Educl. Service (princl., Rajkumar Coll., Raipur) (b. 15th July, 1893).—Educl. at Marlborough and St. John's Coll., Oxford; vice-princl., Rajkumar Coll., Raipur, Feb., 1921; princpl., ditto, July, 1931; C.I.E., Jan., 1944.

SMITHERMAN, FRANK, Indian Police (asst. supt., Burma) (b. 13th Oct., 1913).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt. of police, Burma, Nov., 1933; confd., Nov., 1935.

SMYTH, ARCHIBALD ADAMS, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 12th June, 1902).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Madras, Sept., 1925; offg. exec. engr., Aug., 1931; confd., Sept., 1934; awarded K.-i.-H. medal, cl. II, Jan., 1936; served with army dept. from Dec., 1939.

SMYTH, DAVID ALEXANDER, C.I.E., C.B.E., late Indian Police (Central Provs.) (b. 24th Nov., 1886).—Joined the service, Dec., 1907; asst. dist. supt., Dec., 1909; dist. supt., Feb., 1917; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1925; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., June, 1926; confd., June, 1928; offg. inspr.-gen., Apl., 1933; and May, 1935; C.B.E., June, 1935; C.I.E., Jan., 1941; ret'd., Nov., 1941.

SMYTH, JOHN WILLIAM, C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A., late Indian C.S. (Sind) (b. 13th May, 1880).—Retd., Nov., 1939.*

SMYTH, SIR SAMURL ANDREW, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., B.A., late Indian C.S. (Burma) (b. 18th March, 1877).—Retd., March, 1931.*

SMYTH, SAMUEL, Lieut.-Col., I.M.S. (b. 10th June, 1899).—Date of first commn., 4th Aug., 1927; apptd. civil surgeon (offg.), Apl., 1934; O.S.D., Mayo Hosp., Lahore, March, 1937.

SMYTHIES, EVELYN ARTHUR, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian Forest Service (United Provs.) (b. 19th March, 1885).—Joined the service, 11th Dec., 1908, as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Jan., 1914; offg. consvr., Apl., 1926; confd., Apl., 1929; offg. chief consvr., Dec., 1937; confd., Feb., 1938; C.I.E., June, 1939; ret'd., March, 1940.

SNADDEN, WILLIAM GEORGE, late Indian Police (Burma) (b. 23rd Apl., 1889).—Retd., June, 1936.*

SNELL, OF PLUMSTEAD, BARON, HENRY SNELL, C.B.E., Parly. under-sec. of state for India, March-Aug., 1931; delegate to Indian round table conf., 2nd session, Sept.-Dec., 1931.

SNELSON, EDWARD ALEC ABBOTT, B.A. (Cantab.), Barr., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess.

judge, Central Provs.) (b. 31st Oct., 1904).—Educ. at St. Olave's Gr. Sch., Calus Coll., Cambridge, and Sch. of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, 9th Nov., 1929, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; sub-judge, Dec., 1931.

SOARES, ALEXANDER DUARANTE, M.B., B.S., M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., Indian State Rlys. (dist. medl. offr., G.I.P. rly.) (b. 25th Jan., 1895).—Joined the service, 8th June, 1923; dist. medl. offr., G.I.P. rly., Apr., 1929.

SOBHAN, KONDKAR FAZLE (see Khondkar Fazle Sobhan).

SODHI, HARBHAJAN SINGH, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Central Provs.) (b. 24th May, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 9th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927.

SODHI, NARENDRA SINGH, M.C., L.R.C.P., D.T.M., Col., I.M.S. (ret'd.) (b. 9th Aug., 1882).—Ret'd., Aug., 1939.*

SOE, MAUNG AUNG, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Burma) (b. 27th Mar., 1906).—Educ. at Rangoon Univ. and Wadhram Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-sec., fin. dept., Burma Apl., 1936; dep. commr., March, 1938.

SOHONI, SHRIDHAR VASUDEV, B.A., Indian C.S.
